### Part 141

- Agh! What was that explosion!? The monsters have been sent flying... ｜ 呜哇！好大的爆炸声！魔物也都被炸飞了…
- You look very happy... ｜ 看起来好开心…
- <color=#37FFFF>Fischl:</color> Ozvaldo von Hrafnavins. I, the Prinzessin der Verurteilung, sovereign of the Immernachtreich, do hereby call upon thee to do all within thy power to deliver the traveler from the claws of fate that would seek to snatch them at every turn, and to ready thy mind lest thou be required to make the ultimate sacrifice in the performance of this noblest of duties.\n<color=#37FFFF>Oz:</color> ...You'd place my life in danger so easily, mein Fräulein? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>菲谢尔：</color>奥兹华尔多·赫芙那梵茵斯。为我，为幽夜净土的主宰，断罪的皇女，做好献出生命的觉悟，守望{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}注定多舛的命运吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>奥兹：</color>不要随便让我送命啊！
- But those are their stories and not mine. I'm just a memory that they have of their friend. They once believed that they could save me, but ultimately... ｜ 但那些是他们的故事，不是我的故事。我只是他们对一位朋友的记忆。他们曾相信他们能拯救我，但最终…
- #{M#They}{F#They}'re travelers that I met on the street just a moment ago. They happened to notice that you all were searching for me, so they helped me hide. ｜ #{M#他们}{F#她们}是我刚刚在路上遇见的外国旅客，只是碰巧发现你们在找我，帮我躲开了而已。
- No matter what, we'll defend our dignity as priests to the end! ｜ 无论如何，我们都要誓死捍卫身为祭司的尊严！
- "The underwater stronghold, the Fortress of Meropide, has continued in its noble autonomy, but that does not mean that others cannot interact with it." ｜ 「水下堡垒梅洛彼得堡从未结束它高贵自由的独立运作机制，但那不意味着人们无法与之产生交集。」
- Crystal Shrapnel Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 裂晶弹片持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Now, give it all you've got! ｜ 用力扔出炸弹！
- Talk to Arana ｜ 与兰拉娜对话
- Golden Bass ｜ 黄金鲈鱼
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Gah... you little twerp! I never said my strategy was EXACTLY the same as the one in the story! ｜ 你…你好烦啊！我没说过我的策略和故事里完全一样吧！
- Anyway, even if we did manage to meet up — what then? We all do different jobs now, and we all have new friends who aren't mutually acquainted. I'm not sure what we'd talk about. ｜ 更何况，凑到一起干什么呢？大家做的活都不一样，也有了彼此不认识的新朋友，没什么好聊的了。
- ...Then, could you please tell me where she's living nowadays? I really need to talk to her. ｜ 那，可以告诉我她现在的栖居地吗？…我必须跟她谈谈。
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Violet Arc</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>苍雷</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。
- "The outlander gently plucks at the harpstrings, telling his companion... From here to the ends of the sea, all this I give to thee..." ｜ 「异邦的来客轻抚琴弦，与他的伴友诉说…从这延伸到海的尽头，都已许给你…」
- Huh? You mean it's related to Genius Invokation TCG? ｜ 是和「七圣召唤」有关吗？
- *chuckle* ｜ 噗哧…
- Hahaha, sorry 'bout that, Mr. Morris! It's probably because I'm used to carrying fireworks all the time, so it doesn't feel like a lot of work to me. ｜ 哈哈哈，抱歉抱歉，可能我平时动的多，不觉得累。
- I hear you showed up here with no explanation and attacked my men. ｜ 听说您无缘无故来到这个地方，还打伤了我的人。
- I'm alright, really. I just always end up getting rescued by Outrider Amber... ｜ 我倒是还好，只是经常会被路过的侦察骑士安柏小姐搭救…
- No, it was nothing! No, whatever he wants, that's fine by me... ｜ 没什么，没什么，师兄说什么就是什么…
- Before we go our separate ways, Outlander, a word of advice. Don't be so quick to trust Albedo, and don't repeat the same mistakes that you did this time. You made a lot of rash decisions today. ｜ 再见之前，忠告你一句，外乡人。别太信任阿贝多了，至少别像这次一样，干这么多不经考虑的事。
- Arapacati's big brothers have not returned to Vanarana. We siblings can't celebrate Festival Utsava together if they don't return... ｜ 兰帕卡提的「哥哥」们，一直没有回到桓那兰那。如果他们不回来，我们「兄妹」就不能一起过无忧节…
- A feather from a bird of prey that flies almost too fast for the human eye to detect. ｜ 来自速度极快的猛禽，那奇迹般的一击肉眼几乎无法捕捉。
- Both the Vision Hunt Decree and the Statue of the Omnipresent God were conceived as a means of bringing about Eternity. But if I were really getting closer to Eternity, none of this ever would have happened. ｜ 眼狩令，千手百眼神像，这些都是为了催生「永恒」，但如果我离「永恒」真的越来越近的话，一切的故事都不会发生。
- I'm not giving up. ｜ 不会认输的。
- Four-Leaf Sigil ｜ 四叶印
- ...I knew it! ｜ …我就知道！
- Yet, these same weak humans are the ones who ultimately took over Natlan and the rest of the world... ｜ 然而，就是如此弱小的人类最终统治了纳塔，乃至于整个世界…
- Mythic Smith ｜ 传奇工匠
- Beauteous Beryl Conch ｜ 漂亮的苍晶螺
- Yet, my Imperator, you plan to call a halt to our noble war without cause or reason. Why have you done this? ｜ 然而您却打算无故停止高贵的战争，这到底是为什么？
- In that case, let's figure out a way to get up there and smash it open! ｜ 既然这样的话，我们就想办法上去把它敲碎就好啦！
- How strange. Why are you walking around in a place like this when you could be enjoying yourself in Inazuma City? ｜ 真是怪人，不去稻妻城吃喝游玩，却在这种危险的鬼地方闲逛。
- Unfortunately, despite that the ores there are of good quality, they are not suitable for my current research. ｜ 很遗憾，我去看过后，发现它们质量虽然不错，但并不适合我现在的研究。
- Hi. Here to check out the ocean view? ｜ 你好，你也来看海吗？
- 5-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Abyss Herald ｜ 深渊使徒
- To stop you from doing bad things, of course! ｜ 当然是希望你们不要再做坏事了！
- A kid, you say... Was his name Ruu? ｜ 小孩子的话…是叫阿瑠吗？
- It's just kinda weird. He doesn't seem like the kind of guy who'd participate in competitions like this one... ｜ 总觉得有点奇怪，他不像是会来参加这种比赛的人吧？
- Mare Jivari. ｜ 烬寂海。
- Conversely, if it is taken by someone who has not yet passed the trial, it will lose its "meaning" as a relic. ｜ 反之来说，如果没有通过试炼就取出了圣物，那么圣物也将失去圣物的「意义」。
- Uh-huh... But for us, even four or five Treasure Hoarders at a time is all in a day's work... ｜ 但对我们来说，同时应付四五个盗宝团，也是家常便饭了…
- An old longbow that belonged to the erstwhile aristocratic rulers of Mondstadt. Countless generations later, the bowstring is still tight and can still fire arrows with great force. ｜ 曾支配蒙德的旧日贵族的长弓。经过无数世代，弓弦仍十分有力，击发迅猛。
- Thank you. I'll keep that in mind. ｜ 谢谢，我会记得。
- We actually came to look for you, but then it turned into looking for Amber, but now we've met you, so we're back to that again... ｜ 其实我们一开始是想来找你，后来又决定要找安柏，结果又先遇上了你…
- If the books stored in this hut are anything to go by, this seems to be the place where the Goddess of Creation first made the townspeople of this Forest. ｜ 从这座小屋里的藏书来看，这里曾是人们口中「创世女神」工作的地方。
- Opponents Defeated: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败敌人：#1#/%1%
- Whoa, what huge pawprints... Did giant beasts used to live here? ｜ 哇…好大的爪印…这里以前有猛兽吗？
- This is not unexpected. I haven't made much progress, either. He appears to know that we are looking for him, and has opted to lie low for the time being. ｜ 不意外。我这里进展也不大，对方似乎意识到我们在侦查，不再有那么明显的举动了。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nThe pure water of Qingce has undergone a dramatic change. Challenge a unique incarnation of Rhodeia of Loch during this event to win rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nTravelers must reach Adventure Rank 20 in order to participate in the Wishful Drops event.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Rules</color>\n1. Complete the quest "Life Flows On (I)" to unlock the area exploration "Endora's Education." Complete daily explorations to earn Hearts of the Spring.\n2. During the event, a new Oceanid challenge "Rhodeia's Rage" will be added. Upon completing this challenge, spend either Original Resin or Hearts of the Spring to claim the reward.\nThe following characters will receive bonuses: ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n轻策的净水发生了异变。活动期间内可挑战特殊状态的洛蒂娅以获取奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级后，才能参与「纯水之愿」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n1.完成「潺潺向前·其一」任务后，将会开启区域探索「嫣朵拉的学习」。完成每日探索可以获得一枚「纯水真心」。\n2.活动期间内，纯水精灵将追加「洛蒂娅的愤怒」挑战。成功后，可以消耗原粹树脂或「纯水真心」领取奖励。\n以下角色获得额外提升：
- That was pretty good, I'll give you that. But don't relax just yet... ｜ 干得真不错啊，不过还没到可以松懈下来的时候…
- Gifts? What are you going to give us? ｜ 赠送礼物？你要送我们什么好东西？
- The original purpose of this sort of Fonta was to help children who don't like drinking water get into it... ｜ 而设计这种枫达的初衷…是为了让那些不喜欢喝水的孩子们喜欢上喝水…
- I've also got someone else in mind, Noelle, the trainee knight! She's a very honest person. I don't think she'd tell a lie. ｜ 我也想到一位，见习骑士诺艾尔小姐！她是个非常真诚的人，看起来就不太会说谎话。
- Local Specialty (Fontaine) ｜ 枫丹区域特产

- Plunge DMG|{param11:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param11:F1P}
- We have heard it said that this nation's sins can no longer be washed away. Well, I say that justice is most fragrant when it blooms amid sin! ｜ 听闻这个国度的罪孽已无法涤净，那正巧，唯有罪恶之中绽放的正义才最为馨香！
- Sorry, Timmie! ｜ 提米，对不起！
- Phew! Practice really tuckers me out. Gotta fill up on some food and drink! ｜ 唔！练习消耗了太多体力，得吃饱喝足才行！
- Dodo-King must have placed those things in the ocean! He's a bad guy! ｜ 海上那些东西，肯定是嘟嘟大魔王放的！他是坏人哦！
- Cannot use in current area ｜ 当前区域无法使用

- Leisure Time ｜ 闲暇时光
- Waverider ｜ 浪船

- Ms. Yun's performance was amazing! Especially the silk dance. Did you see it...? ｜ 云先生的戏真是太精彩了！尤其是中间那段绸舞，你有没有注意到…
- That sounds really rough. ｜ 真是不容易。
- This ancient blessed altar is filled with monsters that fear the power of Hydro.\nYou shall earn priceless Artifacts, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座远古祝圣祭坛中，聚集着惧怕水元素的魔物。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得珍贵的圣遗物。
- But then it exploded... the sky lit up... I looked back at her and saw her eyes, twinkling in the light of the fireworks... ｜ 结果声音砰砰砰的，烟花点亮了天空，再看她的侧脸，那眼睛啊，倒映出烟花的光，闪闪发亮…
- Complete an entire performance in the Imaginarium Theater on any difficulty having selected at least 8 Wondrous Boon or Brilliant Blessings events. ｜ 幻想真境剧诗：在任意难度下，完成整场演出时，选择过至少8次奇妙助益或辉彩祝福事件。
- Mt. Tianheng... Skybracer... Hmm... ｜ 天衡山…移霄导天真君…嗯…
- Ms. Gendou's attitude is the same as ever, huh... Anyway, let's check the slip's contents. ｜ 玄冬小姐的态度还是老样子…不管怎样，先看看签文吧。
- Oh, you're keeping those? ｜ 对战的部分保留了？
- Oh dear... What on earth has that old fool gotten himself wrapped up in? I do hope he's not in danger... ｜ 居勒什他…不会卷进什么危险的事情了吧？这老家伙…
- The paths of the first level have opened. Before you lies the <color=#00E1FFFF>Cryo Trial</color>. ｜ 第一层抉择通道已打开，前方为<color=#00E1FFFF>冰之试炼</color>。
- A model biscuit model made from fabric, inspired by the renowned Natlanese delicacy, Saurus Crackers. The model exquisitely replicates the original saurian-shaped cookies, making it look particularly enticing. Due to its highly realistic appearance, it is imperative to store them away from saurian whelps to prevent accidental consumption. ｜ 以布匹制成的饼干模型，选材自纳塔著名的美食——「龙龙饼干」，模型惟妙惟肖地再现了饼干原有的小龙造型，颇为诱人。因为形貌过于逼真，故此在保存的时候应务必远离小龙，避免误食。
- Uh, that's not how that works... ｜ 事情不是这样的…
- After learning the truth, I can never go back to Petit Chou and Al. ｜ 知道真相之后，我再也回不到小卷心菜和阿尔身边了。
- Hard ｜ 困难
- Don't push yourself too hard, Collei. ｜ 别太勉强自己，柯莱。
- Ah, look, our beggar CO just took on the most humiliating job ever... losing the last ounce of dignity we're left with on our behalf. ｜ 瞧瞧，我们的乞丐连长大人亲自揽了最丢人的活儿…真是太好了。我们所剩无几的脸面呀…
- Crocodile jerky prepared using a special recipe of the Tanit tribe. Though a bit hard to chew, the meat's ease of storage makes it a commonly consumed delicacy for tribal hunters.\nDespite tasting like fowl, the nutritional value of crocodile meat is said to be eight times more than the flesh of more typical beasts... ｜ 用塔尼特部族的秘方特制而成的鳄鱼肉干。尽管嚼起来有些费劲，但便于储存的特性依然使其成为了最受部落猎人们喜爱的美味。\n味道有些像禽肉，但据说营养含量是普通兽肉的八倍以上…
- ...F—Fatui... ｜ …愚人…众…
- Leave the opera house ｜ 离开歌剧院
- Naturally! ｜ 那是当然的！
- But when she's around, I also feel kinda... embarrassed... This song's supposed to be a gift, after all. I have to practice a few more times... ｜ 但是她在的时候，我又有点不好意思…总觉得作为礼物的曲子，得再多练习几次…
- And Crimson Staff and Ironclad Beetle King will be able to round them up for us in no time! If everything goes to plan... ｜ 不出意外的话，有「赤红一杵」和「金刚身怒面虫王」帮忙，两三下就能搞定！
- Wait! That voice, it's... ｜ …！这声音是…
- Fuel? Ah, so back then, that's why you... ｜ 燃料？啊，所以那个时候的火神大人才…
- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Lately, I've been so busy dealing with all the fallout from recent events, so I really haven't had any free time... ｜ 最近我都忙着处理之前那场风波引发的后续，实在抽不出时间…
- ...Demolition? Why do they wanna demolish this place? ｜ 拆除？为什么要拆除这里？
- Feel the breath of the wind atop mountains and beside rivers, and put your heart and soul into playing your tune. It's a surefire way to forget all your worries! ｜ 高山上，湖水边，感受着风的气息，全神贯注地演奏一曲，一定能让你把烦心事都忘光。
- Aren't actually inlaid with genuine Smaragdus Jadeite? Is that what you were about to say? ｜ 不是？什么「不是」，难道你想说，那块矿石并不是「翠珏岩」？
- ...It feels like I've been hiding inside my safe little castle for too long, and now I'm scared to go outside the walls and hear what people really think... ｜ …躲在自己建造的城堡里太久，都不敢听城堡外面…会有什么声音了…
- If you're here to make fun of an old man, you picked the wrong one. I don't take any nonsense. ｜ 嗯？来笑话我的吗？我常九爷可不吃这套。
- Feels like you're making this up as you go along... ｜ 感觉是现编的…
- Ho, did you come here because you've heard that an adeptus saved me, hoping that my luck might rub off on you? ｜ 哟，是不是听说我被仙人保佑了，所以过来想蹭我的运气啊？
- About the Kamera... ｜ 关于「留影机」…
- Low HP: II ｜ 生命值低·其二
- Talk to the Gruff Merchant ｜ 与蛮横的商贩对话
- Frightful Monster ｜ 诡谲的魔物
- I wasn't thinking about you either. I was just thinking. ｜ 我也没在想你的事情。我在思考。
- Travel Notes: Fanciful Fabrication ｜ 纪行·拟像
- Birch Sap ｜ 桦树
- (From Cyno's description, it sounds like the threat letter didn't come in an envelope. It was simply written on a crude piece of paper, and left for Cyrus to find.) ｜ （从刚才的描述来看，恐吓信没有信封，犯人把恐吓信息写在质地有些粗糙的纸上，将它摆到居勒什所在处。）
- When Aiming, the charging time is decreased by 0.285s based on each point of Sethos's current Elemental Energy. Charging time can be reduced to a minimum of 0.3s through this method and a maximum of 20 Energy can be tallied. If a <color=#FFD780FF>Shadowpiercing Shot</color> is fired, consume the tallied amount of Elemental Energy; if it is a Charge Level 1 shot, then consume 50% of the tallied amount of Elemental Energy. ｜ 瞄准射击时，赛索斯每1点当前元素能量都将使蓄力时间减少0.285秒，通过这种方式，至多使蓄力时间降低至0.3秒并计入20点元素能量；发射时，若发射的是<color=#FFD780FF>贯影箭</color>，将消耗计入的元素能量；如果发射的是一段蓄力的箭矢，则消耗计入元素能量的50%。
- "Still, all mining crew members are encouraged to only try this new dish after work, as you may need to consume inordinate amounts of water, which may be detrimental to mining work." ｜ 「不过，矿工兄弟姐妹们，请在结束工作后食用这款新菜，不然就需要大量补水，不利于下矿工作。」
- Me? I'm just a newbie in the Special Patrol, so I haven't accomplished anything praiseworthy... ｜ 我？我目前只是个「特巡队」的新人，没什么值得称赞的战绩…
- Please adjust camera angle to face the mural ｜ 需要将镜头转至正确角度，对准壁画
- Feelings About Ascension: Climax ｜ 突破的感受·转
- No need. We'll take it at the market rate. ｜ 不需要打折，我们按市场价收购。
- Reach Reputation Lv. 10 in Inazuma. ｜ 稻妻的声望等级达到10级。
- Why don't we invite Mavuika? ｜ 要不要把玛薇卡叫上？
- You must leave as soon as possible. This place is cursed, brave warrior. It is not somewhere that people should stay. ｜ 快走吧，快走吧，这里是被诅咒之地啊，勇士，不是人该涉足的地方。
- Fischl ｜ 菲谢尔
- Ei ｜ 影
- There he is? Phew, at least he looks fine... Alright, let's feed him the medicine now! ｜ 它在这儿呢！呼…还好还好，看起来没有什么大碍——对了，我们现在就把药剂喂给它吧！
- The Barking Fox wasn't difficult to control at all! It was actually pretty fun! But about that technical jargon of yours... Paimon doesn't know how to answer that! ｜ 「吼吼小狐」操作起来不算很难，我们玩得挺开心的，但你说的那些…专业术语，我们不知道该怎么回答啦！
- About Sayu's Troubles ｜ 关于早柚的烦恼…
- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making Almond Tofu. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱，记载着「杏仁豆腐」的制作方法。

- Thank you, my friends. *sigh* How can I ever show my gratitude? ｜ 谢谢两位好朋友，唉，我该怎么感谢你们呢。

Each attack that hits consumes 1% of the character's max HP. Can be triggered once every 0.3s. ｜ 「特尔克西」王子施放猛击高音后的20秒内，当前场上角色生命值高于50%时，该角色的普通攻击、重击、下落攻击与元素战技造成的伤害提升100%。每次攻击命中时将消耗相当于该角色生命值上限1%的生命值，此效果每0.3秒至多触发一次。

The Natlanese who have visited the Court of Fontaine, however, claim to have been unable to find the original — nor has anyone managed to find a local who's ever heard of an author named "K'n-yan". ｜ 在纳塔的部族间流传的幻想小说，据说翻译自枫丹著名作家昆扬的大热作品。然而根据曾经到访过枫丹廷的纳塔人的说法，他们从未找到过这本小说的原版，当地人也没听说过名为昆扬的作家。

- All that's left is some Ore Slag. Seems like someone took something from here. ｜ 怎么都是些都是矿渣，感觉里面有东西被人取走了一样。
- Faruzan would have to recuperate for quite some time after her escape to regain consciousness.\nSeeing Sumeru vastly changed from what she remembered, Faruzan almost believed that she was still within the ruins, trapped in some kind of illusion-generated device.\nIt was not until someone from the Akademiya came to confirm her identity using past records within Akasha and explained the changes the world had undergone during this time that Faruzan began to slowly accept that time had indeed passed.\nThat researcher brought her a Kshahrewar book, and as she cracked it open, she found this written on the title page:\n"Much of the content in this book came from Madam Faruzan's treatises and manuscripts. We hope that her name will still be remembered by future generations of students when she returns."\nAs Faruzan read this text, organized by old friends of hers, she felt as if she could almost see her classmates again, talking and chatting about their futures. Yet this was already something from a century ago.\nThe people she knew, the people who knew her... they were all no longer here.\nShe had returned to Sumeru indeed, but it was as if she had drifted to some strange land instead.\nEven wayfarers adrift may return to their home, but she had been left unmoored on time's ocean, and there was no returning to the past.\nThe poor researcher at her side was trying to pick and choose their words such that they might inquire as to what had happened to this senior from times past without touching any sore spots.\nFaruzan closed her book in silence before speaking of those past events in an even tone.\n"—It was just a failed experiment. Such things happen to us researchers, don't they?"\nNo matter the location, situation, or generation, time would never stop for Faruzan again. ｜ 自遗迹中逃出后，珐露珊又休养了许久，才恢复了意识。\n看着与记忆中大相径庭的须弥，珐露珊一度以为自己依然身处遗迹之中，眼前景象不过是某种幻境机关。\n直到教令院中来人，靠虚空百年前的记录确认了她的身份，又向她说明了这百年间的时移世易，珐露珊这才慢慢接受了已过百年的事实。\n教令院学者带来一本妙论派的书籍请她过目。珐露珊翻开封皮，只见扉页上写着：\n「这本书中的诸多内容，都来自珐露珊前辈的论述与手稿。惟望前辈回归教令院时，后世学生犹记珐露珊之名。」\n珐露珊读着故人整理的手稿，眼前似乎又看到了彼时一同高谈阔论，畅议未来的同窗们。可是，那是一百年前的事了。\n她所认识的人、认识她的人，都已经消失不见。\n明明回到了须弥，一切却是如此陌生，仿佛漂泊于异国他乡。\n只是乘风漂泊的游子，终究能回归故乡。而她沿着时间漂泊，再也回不到过往。\n一旁的学者斟词酌句，想要询问这百年间都发生了什么，却又不知如何开口，才不致触及这位老前辈的伤心处。\n珐露珊静静地合上书，神色如常地说起了旧事。\n「——只不过是一场失败的实验而已，身为学者，谁又能不经历几次呢？」\n无论身处何等境地，无论是在哪个时代，珐露珊的时间，都再不会停滞不前。

- Luxurious Chest ｜ 华丽的宝箱
- Gladiator's Destiny ｜ 角斗士的归宿
- The ancient dragons tried to use this device to strengthen the Ley Lines by imbuing them with power. ｜ 眼前的装置，是远古的巨龙试图强化地脉的道具，会将力量注入到地脉的中枢。
- Yep, they were Ms. Qiu and her assistants. ｜ 没错，就是邱老板他们。
- We have to hurry... ｜ 我们得加速了…
- Elemental Mastery ｜ 元素精通顺序
- Did you steal or damage some precious cultural relics? No, that can't be it. Did you collaborate with some bad actors and disturb the peace? Hmm, maybe not, actually. Something more minor... Ooh, you didn't pull a dine-and-dash, did you? ｜ 盗窃并损坏珍贵文物？不可能吧。勾结危险分子扰乱治安？感觉也不像。更加轻微的…啊，该不会是吃霸王餐吧。
- These empty hallways all eventually lead back to the same center. How did the people who worshiped the gods here live...? ｜ 这些空荡荡的回廊，最后总是通向同一个中心点…千年前，在其中敬奉神明的人们是怎么生活的呢…
- Look! It's over there! ｜ 快看！它就在那里！
- #Dear {NICKNAME}, dear Paimon, now this is what I call a real meal! ｜ #亲爱的{NICKNAME}，亲爱的派蒙，这才算正经的一顿饭。
- Combined Score ｜ 当前累积挑战积分
- When does the... ｜ 请问什么时…
- As long as you're happy, I'm happy. That's how Uncle Acatl teaches us to treat our guests. ｜ 你们开心的话，我就会开心。阿卡特叔叔说，这叫「待客之道」。
- Uh, Y—Yeah, that's right! Didn't we tell you before that we saw this huge storm-cloud and a shattered mountain on Seirai Island? ｜ 没、没错！之前，不是跟你说我们在清籁岛，看到好大好大的雷云、破碎的山吗？
- I understand how you must feel. If I were to get separated from my brother, I mean, if one of us wandered off and got lost or something, that would be... *sigh* ｜ 我能理解你的心情，要是我与弟弟杰里走散了的话，唉…
- "Yakov, what did the commander say to you that's got you so down?"\n"Well, the waves were really choppy, so I slipped and fell while carrying the device. Fortunately, I was quick enough to save it..."\n"But the commander still gave me an earful and ordered our squad to do signal reception tests. I mean, ugh, that's the toughest job around..."\n"Oh come on, don't feel so down. We've done this stuff a hundred times before. Hey, chin up! Go get yourself something to eat!" ｜ 「雅科夫，长官说了你些什么，你这么垂头丧气的。」\n「因为海浪颠簸，搬运仪器的时候摔了一跤，幸好我手快，装置没事…」\n「但是长官还是训话说，要让我们小队去各个岛上做装置的信号接收测试，那可是最辛苦的任务…」\n「没关系，不必这么伤心，咱们什么累活没干过啊。别伤心啦，先吃点东西吧！」
- ...A star appears within the wild... a sun ascends as bright as... jade... ｜ …荒地生星，璨如…烈阳…
- Thundering Pulse ｜ 飞雷之弦振
- I accept. Let's settle this with a duel. ｜ 那我接受了，一决胜负吧。
- I can't handle food with particularly strong flavors, like Haggis, for example. The experience of eating it is kind of like... suddenly getting hit with a faceful of Geo Specter out of nowhere. Does that make sense to you? ｜ 就拿羊杂哈吉斯举例吧，我吃不惯味道浓厚的菜。就像是好好地走在路上，冷不防被岩飘浮灵糊了一脸一样…我这么形容你能理解吧？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- A Purification Device I made. It can absorb excess Ley Line energy and temporarily stabilize an area. ｜ 我做的净化装置。能够吸收多余的地脉能量，暂时稳定这片区域的平衡。
- HP Cost|{param6:P} Current HP/s ｜ 生命值消耗|{param6:P}当前生命值/秒
- You startle pointlessly! My powers are more than enough to easily rescue the Sunyata Flower! ｜ 大惊小怪！以吾之威能，拯救「净觉花」不过是举手之劳！
- Character Story 3 ｜ 角色故事3
- (Do these inspectors who come around every day think I'm with the Fatui? I'm really not!) ｜ （那些天天来检查的人不会以为我是愚人众的吧？我真不是啊！）
- Talk smack, get whacked. He had it coming. ｜ 他不会说话，迟早挨打。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- We need people to... need people for doing... We just need more people. ｜ 最近打杂…不，跑腿…不，支援的人手有些不足…
- My pain will one day fade into nothing just as I reach the end of my life, but my buildings will endure. ｜ 我的痛苦终有一日会随瞬息而逝的人生一同消散，唯有作品长留于世。
- (H—His body has disappeared. He's not coming back... Jeht...) ｜ （他…他的形体已经消失了，他不会再回来了…婕德…）
- In the past, there were rumors that criminal gangs were using ads in The Steambird to communicate using secret codes. ｜ 过去曾有坊间传说称，犯罪团伙会通过《蒸汽鸟报》的广告栏目，使用密语与暗号进行沟通。
- Hmm... a true adventurer can't just barge on forward. It's also important to make sure there is a way back. That's what my dads always say. ｜ 嗯…真正的冒险家不能只顾着向前闯，确保后路也是很重要的事，老爹们经常这样跟我说。
- Hmm... Why don't we go check on him! ｜ 嗯…有点在意呢，要不我们去看看他吧！
- Oh, what a blessing from the God of Anemo! ｜ 哦？那可真是风神保佑。
- CD|{param13:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param13:F1}秒
- Haha, yes, now that I do remember. I was executing someone! ｜ 哈哈，对了，这个我记得，我挥刀是为了斩人！
- Stanley's an adventurer. ｜ 斯坦利是个冒险家哟。
- Dropped by samachurls ｜ 丘丘萨满掉落
- Go, then, go. I have all the time in the world to go nowhere, but it is not so with my little tanuki. ｜ 快去快去。吾辈反正没有别的去处，时间很多，小狸子们可不一样。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Now, let me see... ｜ 我看看…
- Your current falling block gains <color=#0075de>Flux</color>.\n<color=#0075de>Flux</color>: When a block with this effect is cleared, the chain count for this clearance is increased by an extra <color=#F39000>+1</color>. ｜ 我方当前下落方块获得<color=#0075de>「奇变」</color>。\n<color=#0075de>「奇变」</color>：当持有此效果的方块被消除时，使本次消除时的连锁消除数额外提升<color=#F39000>1</color>。
- Y'know, you call yourself "dopey," but you're pretty knowledgeable, aren't you? ｜ 明明名字里有「呆子」这个词，懂的道理却挺多的嘛，你好厉害！
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Details</color>\nIn a corner of the Quartier Lyonnais, an old friend has set up a booth, and is promoting an improved tabletop game "Lil' Fungi's Fun-Tastic Fiesta"...\nDuring the activity, participate in games and complete challenges to obtain various rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20, and complete the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom." (Complete the Archon Quest "Masquerade of the Guilty" to get the best experience from this event.)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nAfter the event begins, new challenge stages will be unlocked over time.\nComplete challenge stages and receive corresponding rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n在枫丹廷利奥奈区的一角，你们的老朋友布置好了摊位，正在宣传改进后的桌上游戏——「小小灵蕈大幻戏」…\n活动期间，参与游戏，达成挑战，即可获得多种奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」。（完成魔神任务「罪人舞步旋」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动开始后，会随时间解锁新的挑战关卡。\n完成挑战关卡，可以领取相应的奖励。
- Maybe there's still something we can do to calm him down! ｜ 就没有什么办法让他冷静下来吗？
- General Sangonomiya? ｜ 军师小姐？
- Anyway, in the name of Electro Archon and heaven, I know I was wrong! But these were the wealth that I stole— No, took... Uh, earned from all over! ｜ 总之，雷神在上，老天有眼，我知错了！这可是我穷尽一生，从各处窃…啊不，收敛…呃…赚回来的钱财啊！
- The main event venue is at the outskirts of the Citadel of Regzar, and the organizer you're looking for is Kareena. Tell her the situation and she'll get you set up. ｜ 学院庆典的主会场在「聚砂厅」附近的郊外，主持人名叫卡莉娜。你们把情况告诉她，她会帮你们安排妥当。
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- And don't you worry, Paimon'll be with you all the way! ｜ …派蒙一直陪在你的身边。
- Defeating me is no great victory... I am but the weakest among the Three Royal Blades of Narcissus... ｜ 就算击败了我…我也只是「纳西索斯王下三人众」中最弱的…
- Children of the Forest ｜ 森林的孩子们
- Talk to Uturunku (optional) ｜ 与乌图伦库交谈（可选）
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- And it grants knowledge to the people. ｜ 并将知识赐予人民。
- Collect all Electro particles within the time limit. ｜ 在限定时间内收集所有雷微粒。
- In the end, I shouted "don't you scare me, Hu Tao!", nearly flung myself off the bed, and scared my dad all at once. ｜ 最后，我大叫一声「胡桃你别吓我！」，从床上一下子蹦起来，把老爹吓了一跳。
- Urville found a job at Lumidouce Harbor. It's tough work, but he says that's a good thing. He's been eating more lately, so he should be stronger than before. ｜ 尤维尔在柔灯港找到了工作，很辛苦，但是他说这是好事。他最近吃得比以前多，应该也会比以前更强壮。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Okay, you've got this! ｜ 好！就是这样！
- Huh? Oh... okay then. ｜ 欸？啊…好的。
- Settings ｜ 设置
- I'm too old... I never let go, but still so much has slipped away... ｜ 我老了…再怎么不愿放下，也留不住多少东西…
- "Dance Vestments Billow Like Rainbow Jade" ｜ 「舞袂翩兮扬玉霓」
- When it comes to performance, Heizou should've been promoted many a time, considering all his achievements.\nHowever, in reality, Heizou has been a Doushin ever since he joined the Tenryou Commission.\nOn the other hand, many among his colleagues and superiors have risen through the ranks as a by-product of his achievements.\nAfter Heizou's cousin, Kano Nana, heard about it, she came to Heizou and was determined to stand up for him.\n"You may be a brat, but this unfair treatment you've suffered is way worse."\n"I'm going to give those goons a piece of my mind!"\nHeizou knew his cousin very well, so to save her from any trouble, Heizou patiently explained the reasons behind this situation — a rare thing for him.\n"Cuz, don't consider me lesser than them."\n"Wanna take a guess at how many inmates at the Police Station Jail can name the Yoriki?"\nHeizou spread his fingers of one hand, palm facing her. "This number at most."\nHaving no idea what he was getting at, Kano Nana replied hesitantly, "Five?"\n"What about the ones who can name this genius detective right in front of you?"\nHeizou spread his fingers of the other hand, this time palm facing himself, "This many at least."\n"Five again? What's the difference?"\nHeizou laughed, "Cuz, I'm talking about the number of hairs on my hands!"\n"Just like we have no hair on our palms, none of the inmates can name all the Yoriki."\n"But the inmates who can name me are as many as the hairs on the back of my hand!"\n"Now that my influence has far exceeded that of those Yoriki, what's in it for me to get promoted?"\n"On the contrary, staying close to the front line means that more criminals will be intimidated by the name of Shikanoin Heizou — that's my ultimate goal."\n"So don't worry about me, cuz. I have never strayed, and I will never stray from my path!" ｜ 从工作成果出发，平藏的功绩其实足够他升职几个来回了。\n但就实际而言，从加入天领奉行至今，平藏的职位一直是同心，从未变动过。\n反倒是他的同僚和上司中，因为沾了平藏的光而加官进禄的大有人在。\n平藏的表姐鹿野奈奈听说后特意找到平藏，要为他打抱不平：\n「你这小子虽然混蛋，但奉行所这种不公的做法更加混蛋。」\n「这下真是小混蛋遇见大混蛋，混蛋一箩筐了。我要去找他们说说理！」\n因为清楚表姐的性格，为了避免她惹上什么麻烦，平藏罕见地耐起性子解释起了缘由——\n「老姐可不要觉得我这同心不如上面的大人呀。」\n「如今去奉行所大牢里问问，你猜能说出那些与力名号的有几人？」\n平藏伸出一只手，五指打开，手心朝向鹿野奈奈，「至多这个数。」\n鹿野奈奈不知道自己的小老弟在卖什么关子，狐疑着回答：「五个？」\n「那能说出我这位天才侦探名号的呢？」\n平藏再次伸出一只手，依然是五指打开，这次是手背朝向鹿野奈奈，「至少这个数。」\n「又是五个？那有什么区别吗？」\n平藏开怀大笑道：「老姐，我说的是汗毛的数量啦！」\n「能说出几位与力名号的犯人，就像手心的汗毛一样，一位都没有。」\n「但能说出老弟我的名头的犯人，多如手背上的汗毛哦！」\n「连堂堂与力大人的名望都远不及我，我要来那一官半职的有什么用。」\n「反倒是留在离罪案更近的一线，才能让更多恶徒都畏于『鹿野院平藏』的威名吧？这才是我要完成的目标。」\n「所以放心吧老姐，我可是从没有、也绝不会偏离自己要走的路！」
- No, they're not. But that's what makes them a real hassle to find. *sigh* Those careless little... ｜ 不大。但就因为它们不大，每次找起来都很麻烦，唉，那群粗心的小子…
- No switchable colors ｜ 暂无可更改的色彩
- You two as well. No matter how busy your adventures get, remember to come back to Inazuma. We'll always welcome you, no matter when you drop by! ｜ 你们也是，不管冒险再忙，也要常来稻妻看看，无论什么时候，大家都很欢迎你们。
- But nowadays, there remains no one in the Order of Skeptics who is able to perform such a ritual. The best they can do is but to keep these Fravashi Trees alive. ｜ 不过如今矫论团早已无人能够主持这样的仪式，至多只能勉力维持这些「灵谷木」不至于枯死罢了。
- Are you waiting for someone? ｜ 在等人？
- ♬ ｜ ♬
- #Ah, such energy. Looks like {NICKNAME} and Paimon have been taking good care of you... ｜ #真是有活力，看来派蒙和{NICKNAME}把你照顾得很好呢…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- The gunpowder gave Paimon a boost! ｜ 火药推进派蒙，呼呼！
- Th—That's it? ｜ 这、这样就行？
- Seems likely! Teucer did seem really eager to hear his brother's speech... ｜ 很有可能！托克刚才说也想去听「公子」讲话的…
- Dear guest, would you like to purchase some minerals from Liyue? ｜ 客官，要来些璃月的矿石吗？
- Well, he'd better be! How will he become a comedian if he stutters in front of people? ｜ 那还不错。要是话都说不完整，想当喜剧演员是肯定没戏的。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Berserker's Timepiece ｜ 战狂的时计
- The "certainty" that he could draw well was inside him to begin with. That's why I didn't turn him away when he came to me for help. Things didn't go quite as I expected in the end, of course, but... ｜ 「画好」的「确信」原本就存在于他的内部，所以当他向我寻求帮助时我没有拒绝。虽然最后的结果和预想有些出入…
- to open the gate ｜ 打开大门
- Huh... What a ridiculous story... ｜ 怎么越听越离谱…
- "Isn't 7,000 Mora a little steep? It's just a shooting range, and it doesn't look like it's offering anything new..." ｜ 「七千是不是太贵了？只是射击训练，看上去也没有什么新意…」
- So many years have passed in the blink of an eye. Time truly flies... ｜ 一转眼都过去了这么多年了，时间过得可真快啊…
- Arataki "The Man" Itto ｜ 荒泷堂堂男子汉一斗
- Something seems to be wrong with three Monoliths within the mountains... ｜ 山中的三处「镇石」似乎出了问题…
- Complete "Omnipresence Over Mortals" ｜ 完成「千手百眼，天下人间」剧情
- Fully-Charged Aimed Shot|{param6:P} ｜ 满蓄力瞄准射击|{param6:P}
- ... ｜ ……
- Seriously!? You're playing dumb about something like this!? ｜ 居然装傻！
- (Err, what should we tell her? That Boethius is actually a big baddie, who used all that music to do a whole bunch of evil stuff...?) ｜ （怎么办？要不要告诉她，那个波爱修斯其实是个大坏蛋，还利用那些音乐做了一大堆坏事…）
- A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion. ｜ 制式的教官帽子。是拒绝了晋升的军官才能获得的殊荣。
- Well, she uh, kinda saved my life. So yeah, you could say we've met. ｜ 认识认识。她啊，已经是我的救命恩人了。
- Pfft, seriously? So he thought we were miners who live around here... ｜ 什么呀，原来他是把我们当成在这儿生活的矿工了…
- This majestic structure combines the Tri-Commission buildings and the Police Station to great effect, it has both the aura of a stately mansion and the practiced professional air of an executive agency, all while maintaining an optimized aesthetic. "Proper" is the operative word here indeed.\nThose of distinguished background and honest character will surely approve of this courtyard layout. Indeed, you have heard it said that a certain Tenryou Commission general once recommended that officials should stay close to the commission estates such that they might get to work more quickly and contribute more effectively to the Almighty Shogun's dream of achieving "eternity." ｜ 大气磅礴的稻妻庭院，将三奉行府第的建筑与奉行所的设施巧妙结合，兼具名门宅邸的气势与执行机构的干练，并保持着恰到好处的美感，可谓「正格」。\n出身显赫且臣心如水的志士，想必会认同这种庭院的布置。听说天领奉行的某位大将就曾提出过建议——官员们理应居住在岗位附近，以便快速投入工作，为将军大人所追求的「永恒」倾尽全力。
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- In the end, "fashion" is just a representation of the spirit of the times. People support your brand because they support the vision it represents. ｜ 说到底，「时尚」更多是代表着一种流行的思潮。人们选你的品牌，更多是选它背后所代表的理念。
- Meow meow... ｜ 喵呜…
- If you learn anything new, please tell me! ｜ 如果你有了什么新的见闻，也要跟我说说啊！
- Repaired the last Signaling Device ｜ 修好最后一台发信机
- Huixin... ｜ 慧心…
- ...The Almighty Shogun's presence is bound to cause a stir. Instead of struggling to maintain a low profile, it's better for her to step into the open. ｜ …既然将军来此，无论如何都会引起风波，不如堂堂正正，大方现身。
- A stone storage vessel that is said to be used for holding large amounts of Tidalga. Its lid has a small, simply-made opening into which Tidalga can be placed, though short Melusine hands cannot reach the bottom of said vessel. To the Melusines, this vessel's lid is very hard to open indeed, and thus they will only open it up together when enough Tidalga has been placed within, after which they may then enjoy a great feast... ｜ 形似大型锅具的石缸，据说是用来储存大量汐藻的器具，顶部有着一个构造简单的小口，可以将汐藻投入其中，美露莘们短短的手却够不到缸底。对美露莘们而言，石缸沉重的盖板很难打开，只有存入了足够多的汐藻后，大家才会一起打开这个石缸，满足地吃上一顿大餐…
- Buka...mita nye, guru-guru...yo mosi ka? ｜ Buka...mita nye, guru-guru...yo mosi ka?
- Jebrael... protected us, but he... *sigh* ｜ 哲伯莱勒他…他保护了我们，但他却…唉…
- Hmph, fine, since even my Yasnapati fancies so. I shall wake her up with my power and let you listen to her dimming voice. ｜ 哼，也罢，既然连吾之「谒颂主」都这样说了，就姑且以吾之力量将其唤醒，让你们听听她的终末之声好了。
- #Just like Paimon does with {NICKNAME}! ｜ #就像派蒙和{NICKNAME}那样！
- That does sound a lot more convenient. ｜ 听上去真的方便了好多。
- See you, Chili Pepper! ｜ 再见噢，椒椒！
- Come on! Help me stall her! ｜ ——快，想想有什么办法能拖住她！
- Defeat all opponents within <color=#f39001>{0}</color>s ｜ <color=#f39001>{0}</color>秒内击败所有敌人
- It's just that Pakaa doesn't understand me at all, and insists that my music resembles "kiddy music" more than it does "pop." ｜ 只有帕卡那小子没法理解我，非要说我的音乐比起「流行乐」更像是「儿歌」。
- Inherited HP|{param1:F1P} ｜ 继承生命|{param1:F1P}
- Come on, is this really so much to ask? Help me out here. ｜ 喂，这么点小事，帮个忙也没关系吧！
- Phew, it's just a cat. Thank goodness... ｜ 呜呜，原来是猫啊，真是太好了…
- Maybe humans and Melusines see the world differently, but I've always believed that we share the same feelings of friendship. That's something that transcends race. Take my hand — can you feel that? It's the warmth straight from my heart. ｜ 也许美露莘和人类看到的世界不太一样，但我始终相信我们对情谊的感知是相通的，它是可以跨越种族的。请握住我的掌心，能感受到吗？我真心的温度。
- "Maybe my son will also partake in these gatherings in the future. I hope he'll be able to make many friends." ｜ 「我的孩子将来大概也会参加这种聚会吧？希望他的朋友多一些。」

- Return to the Weary Inn and have a short rest ｜ 回「倦意之屋」稍作休息
- Anyway, try asking at the <color=#00E1FFFF>Flower Shop</color>. I heard a girl there's been talking about the time he rescued her. ｜ 不如你再去<color=#00E1FFFF>花店</color>问问看，听说有位姑娘曾经受过他的帮助。
- As things stand, I don't have any reason to harm the child. Whoever you met is likely to be both the thief who stole my notes and also an impostor. ｜ 现阶段我没有任何理由去伤害那位名叫乔尔的少年。而你见到的那个人，很可能就是偷走笔记并冒充我的人。

- Never mind, I should probably be worrying about next month's power... ｜ 算了，还是先想一想下个月的能源要怎么解决…

- Phew... You really are my savior! How many times have you saved me now? Once, twice... ｜ 呼啊…你真是我的大救星，救了我多少次了？一次，两次…
- Listen buddy, you'd better not try to trick us! ｜ 喂，你可不许耍什么花招哦！
- The Boar Princess (Active) ｜ 野猪公主（生效中）
- (Paimon is ready now! Do your worst!) ｜ （我已经准备好啦！放马过来吧！）

- The passing of time has its own consequences. The answer that I've been searching for amongst all those lives... perhaps it's life itself. ｜ 时间的流动自有其意义，我想从人类生活中寻找的答案，说不定就是生活本身。
- Come on, I'm just an errand runner... If a certain gentleman hadn't pressed me so hard, I wouldn't have had to resort to this. ｜ 哎呀，我也只是个跑腿的啦…要不是那位先生催得紧，我也不会这么忙不迭地把事给办了。

- Which type of perfume would you like, dear customer? ｜ 客人，你需要哪一款香水呢？

- There's... a lot of stuff here that doesn't make sense. What's going on? ｜ 唔…有很多想不通的事情…安，到底是怎么回事呀？
- I will ask you three questions. You may discuss among yourselves first before giving me an answer. ｜ 接下来我会出三道问题，你们可以互相讨论，决定之后再做回答。

- Oh? How could that be? ｜ 欸？怎么会有这种事？
- We were ambushed within the canyon on the way back. ｜ 我们回来时在峡谷遭到了伏击。
- A magic sword that grants the wielder unrivaled power! ｜ 据说是一柄只要握住，就可以获得无敌力量的神剑！
- And as for this slate... ｜ 至于这块石板嘛…
- The city's defenses are sufficiently stalwart, so there's no reason to worry there. But one such meteorite has landed right beside Springvale... ｜ 蒙德城的防卫还算全面，不需要担心，但是有一颗陨石正好落在了清泉镇旁边…
- "Tulipe" ｜ 「图利佩」
- Time will erase all traces of one's existence. ｜ 时间会抹掉一个人存在过的痕迹。

- Okay. Julie, let's get out of here. And fast...! ｜ 好了，朱莉，我们现在赶紧离开这里…

- And it's a literal labyrinth!? ｜ 结果这边居然是字面意义上的「迷宫」吗！
- Ah, watching the Shadow Pin burrow back into the ground really takes a load off my soul. ｜ 看到「小缝影针」重新钻入地中，就感觉心头有什么和火山一样沉重的东西落了下来。
- My mother would most likely keep worrying, while my father would try to comfort her while keeping his own worries in his heart... ｜ 妈妈恐怕会忍不住一直念叨，爸爸就在一边安慰她。但爸爸可能只是嘴上不说，却把担忧都放在心里了…

- Hmm? What is this stall doing here? Maybe it's for participants who need a break? ｜ 嗯？怎么在这里有摊位，是让我们中途休息吗？

- What I want to say next is perhaps not befitting of a member of the Inazuma Shogunate, Yashiro Commission, Kamisato Clan, but... unless I am mistaken, I trust that you will not take issue with this slight departure from convention on my part...\nThat is to say... I'm a little tired, may I rest my head on your shoulder? Just for a moment. ｜ 接下来要说的话，可能不太符合「稻妻幕府社奉行神里家」的身份。不过，就我的判断，你应该能容许我小小的任性吧？\n…稍微有点累了…可以让我靠一下你的肩膀吗？一下就好。
- Marechaussee Hunter ｜ 逐影猎人
- Ah... I was gonna say! This is The Alcor we're talking about here, and I'm the chief mate to boot... ｜ 欸——我说呢！这才对嘛，毕竟我堂堂「死兆星」号的大副…
- Liyue Qixing? ｜ 「璃月七星」？
- Would people come forward just to fuss over things like... Hmm, something like "How disrespectful! How dare you make the Anemo Archon seem so carefree! That's far too presumptuous!" ｜ 会不会有人跳出来指指点点…嗯…「大不敬！你这家伙竟敢把风之神写得如此散漫，何等僭越！」
- I'm afraid so... The color has all but completely faded from my paper. To be honest, all I really remember is that I'm supposed to wait here for the Hero of Prophecy. But, I've already forgotten who gave me that order to begin with... ｜ 嗯…我的颜色也褪得差不多了。说实话，我只记得自己要在这里等待勇者，但已经忘了是谁让我在这里等…
- It looks like I'm not very good at this... ｜ 看来，我的确不擅长这游戏…
- But it was the Dandelion Knight that represented her hopes for the future — a future belonging to the newly formed Knights of Favonius... ｜ 而建立西风骑士团之后的「蒲公英骑士」，代表她所期望的，骑士团的未来…
- Please leave deliveries at the door. Don't knock, leave messages, or ask for a signature. I'm sick of signatures! ｜ 请将货物放在门口，不用敲门，不用留言，不用签字，我受够签字了！
- Hahaha... Seems like you've got the hang of wind gliding now! Let's do the final stage. ｜ 看来你已经掌握了用风之翼飞行的诀窍，那么我们就开始最后一环吧。
- Qingce Jadestone Bamboo ｜ 轻策寒玉竹
- I might even get caught by some weird people, or run into peculiar monsters. Then there would be no time for me to finish my paper and I'd miss the paper defense... again. ｜ 说不定，还会被莫名其妙的人抓起来，或者是遇见乱七八糟的魔物。最后论文一个字没动，答辩日又过了…
- It's just that he seems to be a bit too preoccupied and forgot to have some of the bread that I brought for him. I can't finish the bread alone. Would you like to share it with me? ｜ 就是他好像沉迷其中，顾不上吃我带来的面包了。我一个人可吃不完，您愿意赏光分享吗？
- Dropped by Lv. 40+ Tainted Hydro Phantasms ｜ 40级以上浊水幻灵掉落
- Xenochromatic Crystal ｜ 异色结晶石

- I'm big now and I'm not scared of anything! ｜ 我已经长大了，是大老虎，不害怕！
- Well, now this is interesting. Are all Liyue little children brave like them? Walker! ｜ 呵呵，可真是有趣啊，璃月的小朋友都这么有胆色吗？沃克。
- Noelle would like to display her basic skills to you at the training ground. ｜ 诺艾尔打算在训练场上向你展示自己的基本功。
- I have a hard time eating mushrooms, mostly because I'm scared... Not the type of scared that makes you want to run away, though! When I was little, I once ate a poisonous mushroom and was bedridden for days... If you want to eat any of Sumeru's mushroom dishes, please make sure to check that the ingredients are all edible! ｜ 我有点难以接受菌菇那一类，主要是害怕。不是那种见到了想逃走的害怕啦。我…我是小时候误吃过毒蘑菇，在床上躺了好几天…如果你想尝一尝须弥的菌菇美食，要记得确保是无毒蘑菇哦。
- In terms of age, I'm the eldest, of course. He just doesn't want to admit it. ｜ 从年龄上说，当然我是大哥了。他不愿意承认而已。
- Oh! I almost forgot, I must take a look at my own dream first... ｜ 喔！对对，得先看看我自己的梦想…
- Pyro Slime Condensate ｜ 火史莱姆凝液
- May the Anemo Archon protect you. ｜ 愿风神护佑你们。
- Elphane ｜ 欧菲妮
- Owner's Message ｜ 店主留言
- Frame Repair: Pneuma ｜ 机体修复·芒
- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- Give up? Ahh... I do love the sound of that phrase. It would mean finally coming to terms with fate, but also... for me to finally be free. ｜ 放弃？啊…多么动听的词语，意味着终于可以接受命运，也意味着…解脱。
- ...And if not for the Windblume Festival, would I even have met that man? Hmph... ｜ …更何况，如果不是风花节，我就不会认识那个男人了，哼…
- We'd like to borrow the kitchen here. ｜ 我们想借这里的厨房用一下。
- I promise there won't be any trouble. I need a bit of your time, that's all. ｜ 不会是什么麻烦事，只是想借用一下你的时间。
- Hmm? Pardon me, I was lost in thought. ｜ 嗯？不好意思，自顾自想得有点出神了。
- ...How many secrets does Liyue truly hold? ｜ …璃月，到底埋藏着多少秘密…
- I know, and that's why we hold ceremonies to thank the Great Thunderbird for its protection. ｜ 我知道，所以我们才会举办祭典，感谢雷鸟大人的保护。
- Feel free to check with Miko. ｜ 那去找神子大人问问？
- Changing actors at the last minute is just too risky. If anything went wrong, it could bankrupt the whole troupe! ｜ 临时换人风险实在太大，万一出了事…整个剧组都赔偿不起！
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Perhaps the issue is with your sales strategy. ｜ 也许销售策略有问题。
- A hundred years ago, my greatest source of frustration was my inability to decipher the information engraved on ruin monuments. Now, nothing irritates me more than the struggle to get funding. Ugh, it's making my head hurt again... ｜ 一百年前，我最大的烦恼不过是解读不了遗迹碑文上的信息。一百年后，什么烦心事都比不过弄不到研究经费…唉！愁人…
- No Suitable Artifacts ｜ 没有符合条件的圣遗物
- (Ms. Touyama?) ｜ （远山小姐？）
- Teapot Traveling Salesman ｜ 周游壶灵商店
- Beg for mercy. ｜ 求饶吧。
- But then a group of hilichurls came out of nowhere and occupied my resting place. So I had no choice but to brave the elements out here! ｜ 但是不知道从哪里来了一群丘丘人占领了我的歇息之处，我只能在外面吹冷风啦！
- Dazzling Display of Floral Chaos ｜ 乱花迷人眼
- They're super cute. ｜ 很可爱。
- I want some Pate de Fruit, too. ｜ 我也想要果果软糖。
- For Fruits, Seeds, and Trees ｜ 为了「果实」、「种子」，还有「树」
- The story our parents would tell us was always the same... If we went to the water alone, then we'd be snatched away and eaten by a Water Imp called Thelxie. ｜ 大人们总说，小孩子不可以独自跑去水边，否则就会被特尔克西抓走吃掉，那就是水妖。
- I'd like to do it myself, but I was asked to repair another ship, which needs to go out to sea again to fish... ｜ 我也想自己去，但我还被人拜托去维修另外一艘急着要再出海收网的船…
- Oh, Chosen of Dragons... You have completed every trial set before you... ｜ 啊、啊…受龙所选者，你们已完成了所有试炼…
- But, we just have to get past it! War is cruel, and the Abyss certainly isn't going to go easy on us. Only Natlan's strongest deserve to stand against them. ｜ 打起精神来！战争是残酷的，深渊不会对我们留手。只有当下实力最强的人，才有资格参加巡夜者战争。
- Master, this is Sucrose, an alchemist with the Knights of Favonius. We just met. ｜ 是砂糖小姐，师父，她是西风骑士团的炼金术士，我们才认识不久。
- #{NICKNAME}, if you've got family you're looking for, you should be able to understand me, right? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，如果你也有亲人要追寻，应该能理解我吧？
- Prosperous Partnerships ｜ 八观盛明
- Mysterious Message ｜ (test)神秘的讯息
- Wait till the next morning (08:00 – 10:00) ｜ 等待至次日早晨（8-10点）
- Oh, I found some, alright. ｜ 找到了。
- Alright *cough* ... Ah, I don't know how to thank you. Hmm... How about you keep all this stuff here, then? ｜ 好啦，咳咳…真不知道该怎么感谢你们，不如，这里的东西你们就拿走吧。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Goodbye! I hope I'll still remember you the next time we meet. ｜ 再见！希望下次见面我还能记得你。

- Okay, let's get this done. ｜ 别说了，走吧。
- Huh? ｜ 欸？
- Then... Miss Furina... ｜ 那么…芙宁娜小姐。
- Max Potential Rewards This Stage ｜ 本局通关最高可获奖励
- And... if you don't mind, Miss Kumi— Well, it's at your convenience, of course, I wouldn't want to... ｜ 以及…如果久美小姐不嫌弃的话，当然是出于方便啦，我也希望…
- So what do we do now? ｜ 那现在怎么办？
- The number of droplets fired by the Sacred Simulacrum has exceeded the limit, and has been reset. ｜ 仙像发射的水珠超过上限，已重置

- Ifa doesn't know what's going on, so he agreed no questions asked. Ororon would find the gem as soon as he opened the bag. He knows how important it is, so I knew he would make the switch. ｜ 伊法不知道情况，就这么帮着拿过去了。欧洛伦只要打开就会发现里面有宝石，他也一定会自己更换，那对他很重要。
- Have I not made myself clear? You're barking up the wrong tree. I don't want this job, nor do I know of anyone else who would. ｜ 还没明白我的意思吗？你们从一开始就找错人了，我不想帮这个忙，也帮不上忙。
- Rrawr! ｜ 呀！
- What is it, Chevka? ｜ 叶夫卡…怎么了？

- So I plan on sneaking by the monsters to find my stupid father... What's your plan? ｜ 我准备绕开那些魔物，悄悄地找到那个笨蛋老爹…你准备怎么办？
- ...This is a big problem. Man, haha, what terrible luck! Still, wouldn't this make for a pretty interesting story opener? ｜ …这下问题可糟糕了，真是不凑巧啊，哈哈。不过作为故事的开头说不定还挺有趣的：
- It was the masked shrine maiden... ｜ 面具巫女小姐…
- #Hehe, this little {M#hero}{F#heroine}'s got the picture! Still, you two seem wise to our deal. Why? ｜ 呵呵，这位小豪侠说的是。不过这样看，两位似乎对我们的交易很清楚嘛。
- We cannot... delay any further. Let's swim from over there... ｜ 已经…不能再耽搁了，我们…从那边，游过去…
- Ah, it's Miss Amina's entertainment facilities renovation plan. ｜ 是首领大人阿米娜想的娱乐设施改造方案。
- We are happy to accommodate you during your stay. If I may add, are you sure it is Ganyu who is taking care of you, and not the other way around? ｜ 店家本分，乐意效劳。不过容店家多议论一句，这位小客人与甘雨小姐，不知谁才更像姐姐呢…
- Diluc: Flames ｜ 迪卢克·燃烧
- HP increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. Additionally, provides an ATK Bonus based on <color=#99FFFFFF>2.4%</color> of the wielder's Max HP. ｜ 生命值提升<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。此外，基于装备该武器的角色生命值上限的<color=#99FFFFFF>2.4%</color>，获得攻击力加成。
- Even if you have forgotten many things, you should know that we don't mean any harm! We're always on your side, and we'll always help Mawtiyima! ｜ 虽然很多事情你都记不起来了，但是我们没有恶意的！我们一直都站在你们这边！一直都会帮助「无郁夷摩」！
- About Other Shrines ｜ 关于其他神龛…
- Ehh? Grandpa Khayyam, can you really keep up with us? ｜ 欸？海亚姆老爷爷，你的腿脚真的能跟上我们吗？
- Huh!? ｜ 呜哇！！
- So now, our biggest problem is... ｜ 现在的问题是…
- Oh! What brings you here? No tea drinking today? ｜ 哎呀！客卿，你来啦。今天不喝茶？

- Ooh, by the way, you said that you'd already taken souvenirs with you. What did you get? ｜ 对了，你们之前还说，已经从那里拿走的纪念品，你们带走了什么呀？
- Romeuf promised me that he would leave Poisson alone if I could just take you out. ｜ 罗默夫答应我，如果我能杀了你，他就不会对白淞镇动手。
- Then we'll use that book as our teaching material. Now that I think about it, using a book that you like is the most suitable choice for teaching you how to read. ｜ ——那就用你自己喜欢的书来当教材吧。回过头来想想，既然目的是教你识字，你感兴趣的书，当然就是最合适的。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Story Quests</color>\nStory Quests include not only the Story Quests of each character themselves, but also Hangout Events that let you spend more time with your favorite companions.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Unlocking Hangout Events</color>\nTo gain access to Hangout Events, you must meet the following requirements:\n·Complete the required preceding quests\n·Reach the required Adventure Rank\n·Use the required number of Story Keys\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Obtaining Story Keys</color>\nTo receive Story Keys, you must obtain a certain number of Daily Commission rewards.\nEven the greatest heroes must first learn to excel at the small things in life before they can become worthy of undertaking legendary feats.\nReceive a Story Key for every 8 Daily Commission rewards that you obtain.\nThe maximum number of Story Keys in your possession at any one time is subject to a limit. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【传说任务】</color>\n「传说任务」包括角色的传说任务本身，以及与角色共度时光的「邀约事件」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【邀约事件的解锁】</color>\n解锁「邀约事件」需要达成以下条件：\n·完成相关前置任务；\n·抵达对应的冒险等阶；\n·消耗对应数量的「传说钥匙」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【传说钥匙的获取】</color>\n传说钥匙需要通过累计领取一定数量的「每日委托」奖励获取。\n无论是怎样的英雄，也需要在细微的点滴中，积累出通往传说的阶梯吧。\n每领取8次「每日委托」奖励，就可以获取一把传说钥匙；同时能持有的传说钥匙有数量上限。
- Y—Yes, Ma'am! ｜ 是、是的！九条裟罗大人！

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>The next time you use Switch Character to switch to the character to which this is attached:</color> This switch is considered a $[K2] rather than a $[K1].\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>Before you choose an action:</color> If the character to which this is attached is your active character, they immediately use a Normal Attack. The $[K100] this Normal Attack would deal is converted to $[K103]. Once finalized, this effect is removed. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方下次通过「切换角色」行动切换到所附属角色时：</color>将此次切换视为「$[K2]」而非「$[K1]」。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>我方选择行动前：</color>如果所附属角色为「出战角色」，则直接使用「普通攻击」；本次「普通攻击」造成的$[K100]变为$[K103]，结算后移除此效果。

- Let's go take a look. We might run into her if we're lucky. ｜ 我们去找找看吧，运气好的话，说不定能碰见她。

- Yeah! ｜ 嗯！

- I'm not losing! It's all... part of the plan... ｜ 你以为我这就会认输吗？

- The word "Windblume" dates from the age of Old Mondstadt. It was a code word that the people used to stay in contact and mount resistance in secret. ｜ 「风之花」这个词语，最初只是旧蒙德时代，人民之间相互联络、共约反抗的暗语罢了。

- Contains a random artifact of the "Maiden Beloved" series. ｜ 装有一件随机的「被怜爱的少女」圣遗物。
- I like to grind dried Jueyun Chilis and Violetgrass stamens into powder, mix them in with some Yunlai White Tea leaves, and then brew a strong pot of tea. It has the most powerful fragrance that makes you instantly fall in love with it. I prefer drinks like this with a long-lasting aftertaste to things like coffee and spirits. ｜ 将风干后的绝云椒椒和琉璃袋的花蕊一同研磨成粉，均匀混合在云来白毫之中，沏一壶酽茶，它馥郁的香气必定会让你沉醉。相比咖啡和烈酒，我更偏好这种回味悠长的饮品。
- Honestly, it was a bit disappointing at first, but I think I got over it as time went by. ｜ 唉，一开始确实有些失望的，不过时间久了也就看开了。
- Search Results ｜ 搜索结果
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- What if I were to say yes? What would you do then? ｜ 如果我说是呢，你会怎么样？
- I don't understand it either, but I have no reason to suspect or reject these dreams. They're too beautiful. ｜ 我也不明白为什么，但我也没有理由怀疑或是拒绝这场梦，因为它实在太美了。
- The Sky Kitsune Statue that was supposed to protect the ward... It's empty inside. ｜ 保管镇物的天狐雕像…的里面是空的。
- Ahem... I was just thinking about what to say after seeing you. ｜ 咳…我本来刚才还在打腹稿，想着见了你之后说些什么感谢的话。

- This place captures the atmosphere, yet avoids such disturbances and clamor as are common to the city. ｜ 烟火之气足矣，却不必被市井的吵闹烦扰。
- Unleash the wrath of the storm, Stormstress! ｜ 快施展风暴的力量，「信风舞姬」！

- C'mon, hurry up and put the fragments back on the star! Wow... I wonder what power will awaken? Maybe I'll even ascend to the sky... Hehe! ｜ #{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，快把失散的碎片放回星星上吧。哇…我会觉醒什么力量呢？说不定能去到天上…嘿嘿。

- I bet it was Katheryne... ｜ 难道是凯瑟琳…
- That being said... we won't have to worry about any of that if we can settle this the Arataki way. ｜ 但是…如果我们能用荒泷派的方式来解决这件事，那就没问题了。
- How are you, Ararycan? We're here to see you! ｜ 兰利遮，你好呀，我们来找你啦！
- Aeife ｜ 艾菲
- Certified player Hushang. A toy merchant in Sumeru City who is quite learned indeed in matters of popular toys and games. No doubt, he is also well-acquainted with Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 协会认证牌手胡尚。须弥城里的玩具商人，对于当下时髦的玩具和游戏都有相当的研究，想必「七圣召唤」也在其中。
- Don't rely on someone else when you can do it yourself! ｜ 不求别人只靠自己！

- Come with me. We only need to follow the paths left by the heroes of old, and we will reach our destination. ｜ 跟着我来就行，只要沿着古代英雄们的「心迹」，就能到达那里了！
- Cryo Crystal: Origin ｜ 冰晶·原态
- Lance Warrioress ｜ 长枪成女
- What? If it wasn't for Lombroso's companionship, I wouldn't have made it this far. How could I be mistaken... ｜ 怎么会？如果不是郎勃罗梭的陪伴，我可能都撑不到现在了，我不会认错的…
- Then explain why. ｜ 为什么要这么做？
- ...I apologize for letting you see me in such bad shape... I'm okay now. ｜ …呼…实在抱歉，让你看见我不成器的样子…我已经没事了。
- You speak only the truth. I have no quarrel with that. ｜ 你们所言非虚，没有问题。
- A masquerade mask worn by the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Its hollow eyes are fixated on the golden days of the past. ｜ 曾经属于旧日蒙德贵族的舞会面具，那空洞的眼眶依旧凝望着昔日的盛景。
- When the Sun Is Out ｜ 阳光很好…
- Very well. When you think you are ready, I shall be right here waiting for you. ｜ 好呀，在你准备好之前，本皇女会一直在这儿等着你的。
- Hmm... Alright, never mind. We'll come back to that another time. ｜ 嗯…也罢。下次再说吧。

- Sounds a little suspicious. ｜ 听上去似乎有些可疑。
- She said so in the beginning, you know... ｜ 她一开始就说过了…

- Coya can give you a lift. She's actually been following us this whole time. ｜ 可以让姐姐借助风力带你们上去——她其实一直跟着我们呢。
- Catch a total of {param0} medium fish using the medium net ｜ 累计用中型渔网捕捉{param0}条中型鱼类
- Leisure Reading Room ｜ 「闲阅书阁」
- A good-natured adventurer from Mondstadt who's unfortunately extremely unlucky. ｜ 蒙德的冒险家少年，拥有与他的善良毫不相称的霉运。
- Please report to Outrider Amber with any information you may have. Many thanks! ｜ 如有消息请联络侦察骑士安柏。万分感激！
- This is the guardian mage of tomes and spells! ｜ 她是司书的魔女哦！
- Step aside! Itto's back in town! ｜ 都给本大爷让道！
- Bravo, bravissimo! Well, what do you think — glad I dragged you out now? ｜ #心满意足，心满意足！怎么样？{NICKNAME}，跟我来这一趟不亏吧？
- I heard that people encountered doppelgangers on Mt. Yougou, too! C—Could it be the work of some terrible youkai? ｜ 我听说影向山那边，也有人遇到过「二重身」了吧？会…会不会是妖怪作祟…
- The sky is mighty indeed, to be able to accept all things, yet remain so majestic. I wish that one day, I could be as the sky. ｜ 天空真是伟大啊，能够包容一切，却又具有如此威严…真希望我也能有一天，可以如天空一样。
- There are a total of three potions that need testing. One will help people fight better! The other will keep people feeling warm. And the last one, um... ｜ 需要测试的药…嗯，一共有三种。一种能让人变得很厉害，很能打！一种能让人很温暖。还有一种…嗯…
- Magishroom, keep them back with some Dendro firepower! ｜ 「蘑菇魔法使」，用你的草元素火力压制对手吧！
- Do you still remember the flowers that I asked you to store on Dragonspine? ｜ 你还记得上次我拜托你放进雪山的那些花吗？
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Lupical protect each other. Human family also important. Must care about them. ｜ 卢皮卡互相保护，很重要。人类家人…也重要，必须在意。
- Hehehe! Originally, I didn't know either, but I figured it out today after hearing Big Sis Fujin's story! This must be the stuff that happened before the mural on Mt. Lingmeng was made! ｜ 哼哼！一开始，我也不懂画的是什么，但今天听了浮锦姐姐说的故事，我就想到了。这里的是灵濛山的壁画之前的事情！
- Before we attempt to engrave the inside pattern of an Ancient Name with phlogiston, we always use this to draw out the engraving diagram on a cliff or open ground. ｜ 每次尝试刻写古名内部的燃素刻录时，都要先拿它在悬崖或者空地上画一个同样结构的刻录图。
- Let me think. Actually, I don't think there's anyone around who really needs help at the moment! ｜ 嗯…我想想，最近似乎没有需要帮忙的孩子呢！
- Ideally when I'm not busy. ｜ 当然，最好是在我不忙的时候。
- Spiritbreath Thorn Interval|{param13:F1}s ｜ 灵息之刺间隔|{param13:F1}秒
- A simple wooden rack that can be found nigh everywhere in Chenyu Vale. It is made from Fragrant Cedar Wood that is as affordable as it is reliable. This type of wooden frame is not only robust and durable but simple enough that even those unskilled in woodworking can easily craft it. Due to these advantages, these racks are extremely popular with the residents of Chenyu Vale. It is not just used by tea farmers and merchants for drying, air-drying, or storing tea leaves, but some residents also make appropriate modifications, such that they may use it as a storage rack. ｜ 在沉玉谷各处均能看到的简易木架，采用了经济实惠且可靠的「垂香木」作为框架材料。这种木架不仅结实耐用，而且工艺简洁，即便是木工技术不太娴熟的人也能轻松制作。正因为以上的优点，这种木架广受沉玉谷居民欢迎，不只是茶农和商贩会用它来晾晒、风干或存放茶叶，部分居民也会对其进行适当改造，将其作为储物架使用。
- I've come to aid you! ｜ 我来协助你！
- Buliwyf ｜ 布利维夫
- I'm going to have to take stock again... I can already smell some of the fruit going bad. ｜ 我要在这把这些水果都检查一遍，我已经能闻到有不少水果坏掉了。
- Is something the matter, Demoiselle? ｜ 小姐，你有心事？
- You know, we're kind of similar, with both of us having a brother. ｜ 说起来，我和旅行者有点像呢，都有兄长。
- Heh... ｜ 噗…
- Of course, we should remain ready for anything and continue doing our best to rescue others. I'll be sure to have everyone at the Spina di Rosula ready to render assistance. ｜ 当然也不能就这样掉以轻心，我们更应该出力，我会让刺玫会的各位全程陪同「帮手们」。
- Eight-headed hydras, silver-haired banshees... Do they really exist? ｜ 八头海蛇、银发女妖…真的存在吗？
- Aah! ｜ 啊！
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- ...It disappeared... Did we win? ｜ …消失了…我们赢了？
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- See those torches over there? Those are sacred flame offshoots that we requested from the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. They contain the power of the Pyro Archon. ｜ 看见那些火把了吗？那是从圣火竞技场请回的次级圣火，其中蕴含了火神大人的力量。
- This new Finchball will have the ability to... lead everyone on a happy journey, progressing foward with joy, and removing all annoying obstacles! ｜ 这种雀雀球的能力就是…带着停步不前的大家，一起开开心心地前进，并且把烦人的障碍都推开！
- After that, if you still want to join us... ｜ 如果你「见习」过以后，还愿意加入的话…
- Not that I worry about being injured — that would be a small loss compared to any damage that might be done to the Pursina's Spike. How would I answer to our great tutor Firnas or my fellow researchers in the Kshahrewar... ｜ 我受伤还是小事，要是「普尔希娜光钉」一旦有什么损失，我怎么跟大导师菲尔纳斯还有「妙论派」诸多学者交待…
- Challenger: Series X ｜ 挑战者·第十辑
- Let me see... Yep, looks like your potion meets the requirements. You've passed once again! ｜ 我来看看…嗯，药剂符合标准，果然这次也顺利通过了呢。
- You can quit being an adventurer, but you can't quit respecting the code! ｜ 虽然我不是冒险家了，但是冒险家的规矩可不能坏啊。

- Jinglun ｜ 经纶
- Basically, since you asked him to do something, he should be given something in return. ｜ 也就是为了报答他的劳动，给他的好东西。
- Switch Segment ｜ 更换机件
- (Fine to buy in a shop, but can this really fetch a good price at an auction?) ｜ （作为商品是合格的，但作为拍卖品，真的卖得出好价吗？）
- Phew... Looks like it's finally over. Paimon's exhausted! ｜ 看上去终于结束了…呼，真是累死人了。
- First, you'll need to mix <color=#00E1FFFF>one portion of coffee extract</color> and <color=#00E1FFFF>one portion of milk</color> together completely. ｜ 首先，您需要<color=#00E1FFFF>一份咖啡液</color>，<color=#00E1FFFF>一份牛奶</color>，将它们完全混合。
- Is there some sort of new calamity coming that I haven't heard about? Another flood? Or an apocalypse maybe? What does the prophecy say this time — you'll be spared if you get rid of all your clothes? ｜ 喂，是提瓦特要爆炸了还是枫丹又要沉了？预言说不穿衣服的人能逃过一劫吗？
- Huh, there's more stuff over here. Perhaps some might even have been carried ashore by the waves. Let's go to the beach and have a look! ｜ 果然这里也有…啊，也许还有被浪拍上岸边的？我们去沙滩那边也看看吧！
- "No Fishing Ahead" ｜ 「渔采的绝对界线」
- This place is pretty great! ｜ 嘿嘿，的确是个不错的地方。
- Search the underground passage for clues ｜ 在地下通道中调查案件线索
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Outside the Canvas, Inside the Lens: Dew-Kissed Chapter" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「画外旅照·浮露之章」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- Rest Amidst the Rocks ｜ 岩间稍憩
- (These aren't topics I can speak about... I don't even know what Neuvillette's task was.) ｜ （都是我无法介入的话题…甚至连那维莱特的行动，我也还不清楚。）
- Searching isn't just some lowly task! It's not something anyone can do, because you gotta have lots of professional skills! For example... uh... ｜ 寻物才不是什么没有技术含量的工作呢！那可不是一般人能应付得来的工作，需要很多专业的能力！比如…比如…
- *sigh* I don't care how we do it... But so long as we find a method that brings results, I'll thank the Archons. ｜ 唉，不管是什么方法，只要能够奏效我就谢天谢地了。
- Change the look of this place? ｜ 改变布置？
- Listen ｜ 聆听
- Ah, so she probably figured that we'd be gone a long time... ｜ 看来她知道我们会离开很久。
- Well, it doesn't seem promising, but it's got quantity, so it'll at least keep my stomach quiet. ｜ 好吧，虽然味道不怎么样…但分量倒是很足，吃完至少肚子不叫了。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- The tail feather of a large bird. Perfect for discretely concealing a trump card. ｜ 大型鸟的尾羽，其中能藏得下能改天逆命的牌。
- It was so nice to spend this time with you... ｜ 和你们一起真开心…
- Increases Elemental Burst DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>. When Elemental Burst hits opponents, there is a 100% chance of summoning a huge onrush of tuna that deals <color=#99FFFFFF>150%</color> ATK as AoE DMG. This effect can occur once every 15s. ｜ 元素爆发造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>。元素爆发命中敌人时，有100%概率召唤大鲔冲击，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>150%</color>攻击力的范围伤害。该效果每15秒至多触发一次。
- Well, no, just different, being different doesn't make it bad. I like the Liyue Harbor you described. ｜ 不，是不一样。但不一样并不代表不好，不是吗？我很喜欢你所描绘的璃月港。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- And this one is called "Up, Up, and Away"! Just rub it between your hands and it will rise up into the air! ｜ 还有这个，只要放在两手之间搓一搓，就能升到空中的「飞高高」！
- "Spirit Gathering: Shackled Spirits" ｜ 「游灵觅聚·被缚隐灵」
- Hmm? What's a Front-Line Land Surveyor? Well, my duty is to scout ahead into unknown territory, survey the terrain, and identify key locations. Sometimes, we also have to deal with enemy sentries, so in addition to being able to map out the terrain, I also have to stay combat ready, know first aid, and have strong survival skills... ｜ 前进测绘员？这个岗位的职责是率先进入未知的区域，探明地形，寻找最有价值的阵位，有时还要对付敌方的哨兵。所以，除了测绘地形，我也得掌握战斗、医疗和野外生存的技巧。
- Nermin is putting a lot of work into taking care of that flower... ｜ 内尔敏正在努力地照顾着那盆花…
- Rhapsodia in the Ancient Sea ｜ 古海狂诗

- Gee, surely we must be some of the bravest adventurers in all of Teyvat! That or the stupidest... ｜ 哎，像我们这样勇敢的冒险家，整个提瓦特大陆都找不出多少啦。
- Back again, are we? Do you need something? ｜ 怎么，又回来了？有什么需要的吗？
- #{SPACE}Movement SPD decreased by <color=#B09057FF>{0}%</color> for {1}s. Select this stick multiple times to further decrease opponents' Movement SPD. ｜ 移动速度降低<color=#B09057FF>{0}</color>%，持续{1}秒。重复选择此签时，将进一步降低被命中敌人的移动速度。
- I'm not sure if this is helpful, but the story passed down in my family is a little different from the one told in the tribe. ｜ 我不太理解你们在考虑什么，不知道这样能不能帮到你们——我长辈讲给我听的版本和部族里流传的有一些差别…
- Advertisement ｜ 广告
- Startled, Bonnie rushes to hide behind Lynette... She stays there for quite some time before reluctantly emerging from her hiding place... ｜ 邦妮似乎受到了不小的惊吓…躲到琳妮特身后许久才不情不愿地出来。

- Goodbye... ｜ 再见…
- Yes. A rather inelegant method of doing things, you might think. ｜ 是的。在您看来，这种方式并不怎么优雅，是吗？
- How do you feel, Daddy? If you still can't walk, the Traveler can help you. ｜ 怎么样啊老爹，你要是还醉得走不动的话，旁边的这位旅行者可以帮帮你。
- A timepiece kept by the hero who conquered thunder and lightning. The tiny shards of Electro crystal within flow back and forth with the passing of time. ｜ 镇服雷电的勇士持有的时计，其中的雷之碎晶随流逝如雷如电的时间泻落。

- Well, guess we'll have to take responsibility and help Mamesuke search. ｜ 那就得负起责任帮豆助找到柴助了。
- How's your Concresoil coming along? ｜ 你的「凝成泥土」怎么样了？
- Stop talking about people and things that I care nothing about. ｜ 别讲那些我根本不关心的人和事了。
- All of us have been shooting continuously for a long time, so we should take this time to rest. Let's meet <color=#00E1FFFF>tomorrow evening</color> at the designated location. ｜ 正好我们所有人已经连续拍摄了很长时间，大家都趁这时间休息一下吧，<color=#00E1FFFF>明天傍晚</color>在指定地点碰面。
- Bloodstained Chevalier's Goblet ｜ 染血骑士之杯
- Huh? Oh, you misunderstand! I meant to say that... ｜ 欸？我的意思明明是…
- It's fine. I'm used to this. ｜ 没事的，我早就已经习惯了。
- Amazing, mini melon! ｜ 小堇瓜威武！！！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Ugh, why do they get angry? What's wrong with a few earnest health tips? ｜ 唉，为什么生气了？我只是在很真诚地讲健康的重要性啊。
- Read ｜ 阅读
- Items that Nilou bought for the Zubayr Theater. Apart from materials for making performance props, there are other items here that either fall under daily use or celebratory purposes. It would be too much of a burden for one person to move this stuff themselves, but an experienced adventurer would probably know how to handle that... ｜ 妮露为祖拜尔剧场采购的物资，除了演出道具的制作材料之外，还有很多日常与庆祝用品。想要单人搬运的话，负担的确有些大，但经验丰富的冒险家清楚应该如何收纳。
- No, wait, you can taste a little sweetness if you sample it for long enough... ｜ 不对，要是稍微含上一段时间的话，好像也确实能尝到甜味…
- It seems like some kind of knowledge. ｜ 它似乎是某种「知识」。
- Like Soaring Through the Skies ｜ 如在天际翱翔
- Taking All Comers ｜ 入彀者，多多益善
- Well, let's begin, then. ｜ 现在就开始吧。
- Restores 9% of Max HP and an additional 1,000 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的9%，并额外恢复1000点生命值。

- Farewell for now, my friend. ｜ 再会啦，我的朋友。
- Awesome! Bye-bye, blockade! ｜ 干得漂亮，这下就把它们全炸开啦！

- Lakamha ｜ 拉坎阿
- When is my growth spurt gonna come? Everyone my age practically twice my height, and I'm still... Ugh, enough, I need sleep, sleep is the answer. Good night! ｜ 什么时候才能长高呢？跟我同年的人身高都快是我的两倍了，可我还…不行，再睡久一点一定能长高的！我要睡觉了，晚安。

- Well bless my soul. Are you out for a stroll as well? ｜ 哎呀呀，你也在这里散步吗？

- Ugh, these guys show up everywhere... ｜ 这群坏蛋，怎么哪里都有他们…
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Sanctifying Ring</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>越祓雷草之轮</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。
- Specialized refinement material for "Cloudforged."\nA new type of component the Yuheng commissioned the Blackcliff Forge to make. According to the smiths, its dynamic load "wouldn't lose to adeptal mechanisms." By installing it on its counterpart prototype weapon, the latter's power can be considerably increased.\nThe world ruled by humanity is like the taut bowstring of a quality bow: It can only avoid snapping and collapsing with the appropriate quantity of tension. ｜ 「筑云」专用的精炼道具。\n由玉衡星委托黑岩厂锻造的新型机件，据工匠所说有着「不逊仙家机关」的传动载荷。安装在对应的实验式兵器上，便可以进一步提升其威力。\n人治之世亦如良弓之弦，唯有定度衡仪，方能使其不至绷断。
- Success! ｜ 钓鱼成功！
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启

- There are always people saying that we should consider everyone's happiness, that we shouldn't ruin the peace of our little town... ｜ 总是有人说什么为大家的幸福着想，小镇的宁静不能被破坏。
- ...Huh? ｜ …嗯？
- After all this training, I feel like I'm finally at my best. Thank you... But please, I'd still like for you to keep me on my toes. ｜ 这几番操练下来，算是达到了我武艺的巅峰状态了吧。谢谢你…对了，不如再陪我过两招吧。
- That color isn't showing up... The dyeing has failed. ｜ 那种「色彩」没有被复现…染色失败了。
- But the Abyss underestimated Natlan's forces, and they have suffered a devastating defeat. It will be a long time before they are able to pose a threat to us again. ｜ 但它错误估计了纳塔的战斗实力，发动这次战争也让它元气大伤，很长时间都无法威胁到纳塔。

- Cleansing of Filth: Heart of Khvarena's Brilliance ｜ 涤净污浊·灵光明烁之心
- Haha, so you concur with the other listeners, then? In a new era, we shall have new heroes and tales. ｜ 哈哈，和其他客人的评价一样呢。一个新的时代里，会出现新的英雄、新的故事。
- Looks like you're in pretty good shape already. Competitive fighting, extreme sports — you could take your pick! As for you, Paimon... We might have to start you off on a balanced meal plan. ｜ 你的身体素质相当不错，不管是竞技战斗还是极限运动应该都能完美胜任。不过派蒙嘛…最近是不是又胖了？
- Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with Maguu Kenki ｜ 在猫尾酒馆中小王子处进行酒馆挑战，在友好对局难度魔偶剑鬼中获得胜利后获取
- Analysts' Guild President Marco Borja has opined that this tragedy was nonetheless an inevitable step on the path to progress, and that the Guild expresses its deep sympathies and condolences. ｜ 分析师行会会长马可·博尔哈评论这一悲伤事件乃是技术进步在所难免的小小挫折，行会表示深切同情与哀悼。
- Anyway, I have to organize my findings. So, if you would excuse me... ｜ 无论如何，我还要整理资料。如果没什么别的事的话…
- You mean that sneaky detective that never seems to actually be working on a case? Well, no one from the Shogunate can be fully trusted, so I'll be keeping my eyes and ears on him! On a separate note, he does have some talent for investigation. But how can we know that this isn't all part of some nefarious scheme? Hmm. Only time will tell, I suppose. ｜ 你说那个鬼鬼祟祟，游手好闲的侦探先生？毕竟是来自幕府的家伙，没办法完全信任，我会继续盯紧他的。说起来，他倒是有那么点探案的功夫。至于这是不是什么阴谋诡计…嗯，就得用时间来证明了。
- <color=#00E1FFFF>The other two operate in Inazuma City. One, a man, is dressed as a merchant. The other, a woman, works in disguise at the Royal Hot Springs</color>. Got that? ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>另外两个稻妻城里的家伙一男一女，男人伪装成了商人，女人用假身份在御温泉工作</color>，记住了吗？
- ...Childe, you are as fond of jokes as ever. Well then, since we've purchased our kites without incident, there's no need to take a break before moving to the next step in our preparations. ｜ …「公子」先生还是这么爱开玩笑。好了，买风筝一切顺利，进行下一项准备之前，就不必休息了吧。
- You won't go by "The Balladeer" anymore? ｜ 你不打算叫「散兵」了？
- Sakurazaki Island ｜ 樱咲岛
- There he is! That shady Fontaine merchant! Has my luck really begun to turn around!? ｜ 出现了！那个枫丹无良商人！我真的开始转运了吗？！
- Lord Bamoun and I have spent our whole lives in the desert. He was full of life and boldness in his youth, just like you, and thus became our leader. ｜ 我在这片沙漠里待了一辈子，巴穆恩大人也一样。他年轻的时候就像你们一样，充满活力和勇气，所以他成为了我们的首领。
- You check out Atea's talisman... ｜ 查看阿伽娅的护身符…

- Tattered Paper ｜ 破碎的纸条
- Mere cogs in the well-oiled machine that is the Knights of Favonius that we are, it's no surprise that you haven't heard of us, Honorary Knight, or that our faces might have slipped your mind. Perfectly understandable! ｜ 嗯…作为西风骑士团里不起眼的部件，荣誉骑士没听说过，或是不记得我们，都没关系。
- It seems, from your expressions, that you still have more things you wish to ask. ｜ #另外，{NICKNAME}，看你的表情应该是还有其他事想问。
- A record from my personal collection. It was tucked away in a corner. ｜ 我从自己保存的所有信息中找到了一份被安置在角落的记录。
