- Given your great strength, you must have gone through much training... ｜ 您之所以如此强大，应该也是经历了无数锻炼吧…
- If that simply meant more work for me, then that wouldn't be an issue... But it's far more severe than that. The Withering is leaving lasting effects on the rainforest itself. ｜ 如果只是我的工作因此变多，倒也没什么。但是死域的状况会对雨林的方方面面产生影响。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param10:P}/{param11:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param10:P}/{param11:P}
- ... ｜ ……
- <color=#FFFFFF>"Mumbly-Bumbly Red-Hot Mage"</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFF>「不知道在嘀咕什么总之很烫的法师」</color>
- Looks like their plan to draw away the Abyss Order's forces really worked. ｜ 看来他们引开深渊教团兵力的计划成功了？
- If that's the case, how are we supposed to get in? ｜ 既然这样，那我们要怎么样才能进去呢。
- Timeless Dream: Eternal Stove ｜ 非时之梦·常世灶食
- In Snezhnaya, there's a kind of liquor called Fire-Water. ｜ 在至冬，有一种烈酒叫做「火水」。
- So... Even though the Princess is waiting for us at the end of this road, it's just a bunch of connected loops with no real end? ｜ 所以说…莉利丝公主在道路的尽头等着我们，但是这里的道路是一个连起来的环，根本没有尽头吗？！
- Now that she's better, she's started pestering me every day to go out at play, and I couldn't refuse her. ｜ 现在她身体好起来了，每天都和我闹着要出去玩，我拗不过她，就答应了。
- Large Furnishing ｜ 大型摆设
- 30,000 points ｜ 30000分
- I reckon that you just need to follow the trail of Anemo and search that way. ｜ 我想，只要循着「风」的痕迹搜索就好了。
- You encounter a serious guard in Constellation Metropole... ｜ 在星轨王城里，你遇见了一个严肃的守卫…
- Mahamata Announcement ｜ 教令官公告
- The thing that takes away dreams...? ｜ 夺走梦的机关…？
- Talk to Pallad ｜ 与帕拉德对话
- A bow adorned with nameless flowers that bears the earnest hopes of an equally nameless person. ｜ 点缀以无名花朵的弓，承载着同样无名之人的殷切希望。
- I've even made a contract with my father to "live a happy life"... I can't give up hope now. ｜ 亏我还和老爹定过「要快乐生活」的契约呢…唉，至少我不能消沉。
- Changsheng ｜ 长生
- Ah, I must be a little drunk... Well, it doesn't matter. What does matter is that I'm treating tonight! ｜ …嗝，我好像有点醉了…算了，总之今晚我请客！
- These monsters are stronger all the time... Probably 'cause I'm on the team, I bet. ｜ 我们遇到的怪物越来越厉害了，应该是我在队伍里的关系吧…
- Is it normal for people to come across this kind of stuff while fishing? Anisa never misses a single day fishing on Watatsumi Island, but she's never discovered anything special. ｜ 钓鱼是能钓出这种东西的活动吗…？阿妮萨学姐在海祇岛也天天钓鱼，没见到她钓出什么成果来啊。
- I need to uncover the truth, so I'm here to investigate. ｜ 我很想知道这些事背后的真相，所以亲自过来调查。
- Normal and Charged Attacks have a 50% chance to fire a Bolt of Perception, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>240%</color> ATK as DMG. This bolt can bounce between opponents a maximum of 4 times. This effect can occur once every <color=#99FFFFFF>12</color>s. ｜ 普通攻击与重击命中时，有50%几率发射一枚昭心法球，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>240%</color>攻击力伤害，至多在敌人之间弹射4次。该效果每<color=#99FFFFFF>12</color>秒至多触发一次。
- Stronghold Mechanism: Electro ｜ 据点机关·雷
- Sacred Simulacrum ｜ 仙像
- Seems like we've fixed all the wards. The rain's stopped, too. Let's go back and meet Kaji! ｜ 这下镇物都修复了，雨也停了。我们去约好的地点找梶先生吧！
- Yes indeed. And they are some of my most reliable helpers and friends. ｜ 是啊，他们几个都是我很可靠的帮手和朋友。
- Report back to Yasmin ｜ 向雅丝敏回报
- Game Master ｜ 主持人
- Combination Potions ｜ 复合药剂
- The Ruins Intentionally Demolished by the Institute ｜ 科学院故意引爆废墟
- What do you mean? ｜ 什么意思…
- A one-man suicide mission, hmm? That's the best idea that one of the finest minds of a generation could come up with, is it? ...It astounds me that you survived the journey, and you're lucky that Bamoun didn't finish you off when you arrived! ｜ 跑到沙漠里去送死，真不知道你怎么想的！也真亏巴穆恩没把你往死路上逼…
- But I think that it will need some rest before it can regain its efficacy again, haha... ｜ 只是呀，若是想要再度灵验，恐怕需要让它歇息一段时日了，呵呵…
- Paimon's gonna show this off to everyone! ｜ 下次我要把它带出去炫耀一通！
- Usable Materials ｜ 可用物材
- Industriousness is the foundation of the land of Geo. Diligence is having the bravery and the strength to conquer mountains and seas and to pursue gold and prosperity through honest, hard work. ｜ 岩之国土的根基是勤劳。勤劳即为通过人的努力，克服高山与大海，追求繁荣与黄金的勇气与力量。
- She defended Sumeru from calamities and troubles and left us inexhaustible knowledge and treasures after her death. ｜ 她守护须弥扛下了大大小小的灾祸，逝后也为我们留下了取之不竭的智慧与宝藏。
- Are you here to buy a kite? Please take your pick! ｜ 二位是想买风筝吗？随便挑。
- My name is Wanyu, I belong to Liyue's Shenglu Hall. I head up our human culture and civilization research. ｜ 我叫琬玉，隶属于璃月盛露厅，负责人文古迹的研究工作。
- But... I feared that she would not bestow her favor upon me, and so I brought a dragon scale with me. ｜ 但…但我实在担心，女神不会青睐我，所以我就带上了一片龙鳞。
- Take part in the banquet ｜ 参加宴会
- You self-righteous, conniving... Ugh, I'll wipe those smug looks off each of your faces, just you wait! My Vieille-Model Enhanced Meka will prove everything... ｜ 得意忘形的混账东西…你们也得意不了多久了，等着瞧吧！我的「维埃利式强化机关」会证明一切的…
- Need to... train harder... ｜ 仍需磨炼…
- He ended up being embarrassed for a whole week! ｜ …最后整整一个星期都抬不起头来。
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- Find a player and have a duel ｜ 寻找牌手并进行「七圣召唤」
- The Floral Courtyard ｜ 花影瑶庭
- Like the kiss of snow... So this is the taste of a blade? ｜ 像雪一样冰冷…这就是剑的滋味吗…
- Follow the current... ｜ 随波逐流吧…
- The story you found before? ｜ 你们之前拿到的故事？
- More About Alhaitham: I ｜ 想要了解艾尔海森·其一
- "Once, I quarreled much with this world,\nBut the flame of my rage has since been quelled by life.\nThat was the epitaph I once wrote for myself,\nBut those are all empty words now,\nFor the good doctor has plucked that terrible, harmful button from my throat."\n— Breeze Amidst the Forest: Anecdotal Anthology Part VI\n\nWhen unfortunate incidents occur, good luck waves at you from secret places.\nYou will find an opportunity for a "turnaround" hidden in the most unexpected of corners.\nWhat comes after can only be "better and best."\nPerhaps taking the opportunity to sort things out at home will result in unexpected gains? ｜ 「我曾与这世界有过诸多争吵，\n而今我的怒火已随着生命平息。\n这原本是我写给自己的墓志铭，\n但现在这些文字已经徒劳无用，\n好医生夹出了我喉咙里那颗害人的纽扣。」\n——林间风·趣谈集其六\n\n倒霉的情况发生时，好运在暗处悄悄招手。\n最意想不到的角落里，往往藏着「转机」。\n接下来的每件事情，都是更好、最好的事情。\n趁机将居所整理一番，也许会有意外的收获？
- Defense-Building ｜ 建造防守
- Pretending that you're not in debt is as ridiculous as pretending you're not living in someone else's home. Word will get out sooner or later. ｜ 假装自己没有负债，就像假装自己没有住在别人家里一样可笑。其他人迟早会知道的。
- Tourists usually only write stuff, don't they? ｜ 游客应该只会写字的。
- My sister immediately burst into tears. The two troublemakers were going for the meat, but when they saw my sister's distress, they froze on the spot. ｜ 妹妹大哭起来，那两个捣蛋鬼本来想吃肉的，看见我妹妹哭成那副样子，突然都不敢动了。
- Let's investigate. ｜ 我们赶快进去调查一番吧。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Winter Wonderland ｜ 一个冬天的童话
- Contrasts of the City of Wisdom ｜ 「智慧之城的兼罗」
- The magical weapon mounted on the Choo-Choo Cart can unleash a Jubilant Wave with which to attack the Cheering Bloatty Floatties.\nPress the buttons on the left and right sides to fire this wave off on either side of the tracks. ｜ 「呼呼飞车」搭载的魔法武装可以释放「欢呼激流」，打击悬浮的「喝彩蓬蓬果」。\n点按左右两侧的按钮，可以分别向轨道两侧释放「欢呼激流」。
- Pensive ｜ 沉思
- Chongyun: Steady Breathing ｜ 重云·吐纳真定
- Faf-40158 ｜ Faf-40158
- For example... the, um... formula for the sugar-free berry-flavored Fonta. This new Fonta product is quite important to the Institute. ｜ 比如…那个，呃…树莓味无糖枫达的最新配方。院里对这个枫达新品还挺看重的。
- The God King even... assigned me a guard to... to... conduct research under his glorious banner... such happiness... ｜ 神王还为我…为我指派了一支护卫队，能在神王的光辉下进行研究，实在是一种幸福…
- I recommend you say and do nothing on the matter for the time being, lest you tip them off and they disappear. Wait for them to come to you. That way, you can capture them all in one fell swoop. ｜ 我建议你先不要放出风声，以免打草惊蛇。等他们现身，就可以将他们一网打尽。
- Not a bad call. I'm sure it'll be a filling meal. ｜ 这主意不错，听起来一定能吃饱。
- ...Your suspicions are as banal as they are unwarranted. I merely think that this house should remain the focus of our investigation, and as such, someone ought to stay here and keep an eye on it. ｜ …无聊的猜忌，我只是觉得调查的重点毕竟还是这间屋子附近，最好有人留下观察。
- "Beside a bamboo bridge with flowers floating on flowing clear waters, a jade mist lingers on Mt. Xuanlian. The Adepti have been riding the clouds for thousands of years, while the jade pendant rests against the islet." ｜ 「流花碧水竹桥畔，沉玉烟耽悬练山。仙人千载截云去，玦佩无时倚渚还。」
- Correct. The Kamisato Clan is the head of the Yashiro Commission, who manage ceremonial and cultural affairs. I'd go into more detail on what exactly that covers, but I'm not even sure myself. ｜ 没错，社奉行的神里家，目前是掌管祭祀活动与人文艺术之类的家系，很多具体的职责连我也不甚了了。
- You made that look easy! ｜ 挺有两下子的嘛，不愧是你！
- "Look, the place they once revered as a temple, now trampled beneath the feet of Abyssal monsters." ｜ 「你瞧，他们昔日奉为圣殿的所在，如今也被踩在了深渊魔物的脚下。」
- Complete "The Crane Returns on the Wind" ｜ 完成「风起鹤归」剧情
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- Sailor ｜ 水手
- Activation and scorching... ｜ 活化与枯焦…
- ...What are you staring at me for? Go on, go get on with your cooking. ｜ …看我干什么？不是要去做菜吗，快去啊。
- I don't think she can hear us. We're too far away. ｜ 太远了，她好像听不到。
- Is there a book like that in Sumeru? I've never heard of such a thing before. What's the title? ｜ 须弥…还有这种书？我怎么都没打听到？它叫什么名字？
- So you are willing to help, then? Many thanks to you! ｜ 那您是愿意帮忙了吧，真是太感谢了！
- That's fine. I'm willing to accept any punishment for my little Nechca. ｜ 我没有问题。为了小妮赫佳，我愿意接受任何责罚。
- Oh, it's you, Traveler. How do you do? ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}，是你啊…你好。
- Examine your environment ｜ 确认周围环境
- A scarf with an alternating violet and white pattern. Can be used to build a Puffy Snowman.\nThis sort of scarf very much resembles Wolfhook Smoothies. Of course, the children would never dream of eating their snowmen. This is just a method of sharing their favorite things with their creations. ｜ 蓝紫与白色相间的围巾，可用于组装「噗噗雪人」。\n这种围巾的配色就像是浇上了钩钩果汁的冰沙。当然，孩子们并不会产生吃掉雪人的想法，而是就地取材，与雪人们一同分享甜点。
- A soft white fluffy little kitty. It may seem a bit timid at first sight, but once you become familiar, you will see just how friendly and warm it can be. So, why not pluck up your courage, try and get close, and make friends with it? ｜ 糯糯软软的白色小猫，初见时可能显得有些怕生，但等到熟悉起来，它会变得非常亲昵和友好。所以，不妨勇敢地接近它，与它建立友谊吧！
- Mt. Hulao ｜ 琥牢山
- This one grabbed a loan and leapt straight onto the bandwagon. In their haste, I fear they may have ended up with a mixed bag as far as quality is concerned. Given that their price isn't particularly competitive, either... I wouldn't consider them if I were you. ｜ 至于这一位，贷款投机，仓促之下买到的货物恐怕良莠不齐，加上价格也没有明显优势，我建议不要选。
- Hehehe... Paimon's looking forward to this one! ｜ 嘿嘿…这道菜的味道肯定会很不错的！
- Tavern Dining Chair - "Flavor's Multiplicity" ｜ 酒馆餐椅-「味觉倍增」
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- "Did you know that there is a region in Mondstadt that once belonged to the Great Wolf King of the North?"\n"I've heard it mentioned in this book that he was once a regional god, and that he was related to both ice and wind."\n"I was thinking that adding some lightning to the scene might make the battle even more awesome!"\n"Why lightning, you ask? Well, lightning's just cool!"\n"Not to be challenged lightly, you say? Well... Alright, let's just have the lightning, shall we? And make it very cool! This is going into a cover page, you know!" ｜ 「你知道蒙德有一片区域曾经归属于『北风的王狼』吗？」\n「我看书里说，他曾经是蒙德区域的魔神，唔…好像还和冰与风有关来着？」\n「我想想看啊，能再加入一点雷光的话，那战斗的场面一定会非常帅气的！」\n「为什么是雷？哎呀，因为雷光很帅嘛。」\n「欸？不能随便挑战？那、那展示一下雷光也可以，一定要非常帅气才行！我可是要用来画封面的！」
- I'm just hired by the butler to carry goods. To be honest, I haven't even met the Lord myself, so I really can't help. Sorry. ｜ 我是管家雇来搬运货物的工人，说实话还没见过这里的老爷是谁，所以这个实在帮不上忙，抱歉了。
- Ugh... It's raining again... ｜ 啊…又是雨天…
- So, what do we do, Master Mamere? ｜ 应该怎么办呢，玛梅赫老师？
- But... there are so many things I still need to do... ｜ 可是…还有很多工作等着做…
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Destroy them! And get those messages back. ｜ 我们快去消灭它们，把那些信拿回来吧。
- Eh? ｜ 欸？！
- Rawr... ｜ 呀…
- Shall we try a view from above? ｜ 派蒙从上边看看？
- Ironically, only a boulder of such enormous size could have bested him. Similarly, only a man of his strength could have placed himself in such a precarious position. ｜ 讽刺的是，只有小山一样大的石球才有可能压死他，反过来也只有他这位大力士才能把那么大的石球推上陡峭的半山腰。
- Paimon wonders what story these murals record... ｜ 这幅壁画，到底记录着什么故事呢…
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Lautaro ｜ 劳塔洛
- Well, these fruits have not been stored properly. They're completely useless now. ｜ 唔呃，这些水果完全没有做存储措施，已经完全不能用了。
- Keep moving ｜ 继续前进
- (If you mean the mysterious events, the kabukimono, and so on... Yes, I know about all of that.) ｜ （如果是说踏鞴砂那个神秘事件与倾奇者之类的…我知道哦。）
- Certificate ｜ 表彰状
- You are about to leave the challenge area ｜ 即将离开挑战区域
- After defeating an enemy, ATK is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color> for 30s. This effect has a maximum of 3 stacks, and the duration of each stack is independent of the others. ｜ 击败敌人后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>，持续30秒。该效果至多叠加3层，每层持续时间独立。
- Unlock teleport waypoints in Araumi ｜ 解锁「稻妻 荒海」传送锚点
- Estienne said that Agnes wrote them in the past, but that she never received a reply and thus stopped trying altogether. If they knew about the current situation, they might change their minds. ｜ 据艾蒂安说，艾格妮丝以前寄过信，但是没有回音，之后就再也没有联系过了。如果对方知道现在的情况，或许会回心转意。
- Lost Text ｜ 遗落的文本
- All party members gain a 60% Hydro DMG Bonus. ｜ 队伍中所有角色获得60%水元素伤害加成。
- Wyrmrest Valley ｜ 眠龙谷
- The other flower ponds are unlikely to be spared. This must be very upsetting for Sefana. ｜ 其他花池想来也没法幸免于难，瑟法娜肯定很苦恼吧。
- Uh... Paimon's never tried it, but it probably won't work... ｜ 唔…虽然没试过但是应该也不行吧…
- New "Mosaic of Moments" gameplay content has been unlocked ｜ 新的「缤纷见闻」玩法内容已解锁
- This is the worst! Ugh... Why did I have to run into you... ｜ 这可真是太倒霉了！怎么偏偏会碰到你啊！
- But... I didn't go. ｜ 但是…我没有去。
- Ahem... ｜ 那个…
- Each stack of Windblessing: Electro increases the DMG dealt by all party members' <color=#f39001>Elemental Bursts</color> by <color=#f39001>{0}%</color> ｜ 每层风之祝祷·雷使队伍中所有角色的<color=#f39001>元素爆发</color>造成的伤害提升<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Lyney's magic shows are amazing! Paimon never would've guessed how he did it before he revealed his secret.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hold on... I just thought of a magic trick!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh? You know how to do magic too?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Yep. I can make a big magician's hat float in the air, and even make it move at my command.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Whoa! Really? How do you do that?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hehe, simple! I put Paimon inside the hat.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>What? Why would Paimon be... Ohhh, so Paimon's the one making it float!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hehe, in that case, Paimon has an idea for an even better magic trick!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Huh? What is it?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Behold, the bottomless hat! No matter how many plates of delicious food you throw into it, it'll never get full!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Uh... Wait, so where would the plates go?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Oh, good point! Umm... Oh, the hat spits the empty plates back out! Tada! Whaddya think? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>林尼的魔术表演真精彩，在解答之前，完全想不到他是怎么做到的！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>啊，我突然想到了一个魔术。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？你也会魔术？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯，我会把大大的魔术帽悬浮在空中，还能让它听我的指示飘来飘去。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哇！真的吗？怎么办到的呀？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嘿嘿，因为派蒙在帽子里呀。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？为什么我在…哦！是我让它飘起来的呀！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嘿嘿，那我也想到了一个魔术！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>哦？说来听听。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你往这个帽子里塞好多好吃的，会发现它怎么装都装不满！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>呃…那盘子怎么办？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哦对！这帽子还会自己把盘子吐出来，很神奇吧！
- ♪ ... Ah. It's you. Come, come. These flowers are growing well, are they not? ｜ ♪…是你啊，来看看，这些花长得不错吧？
- An all new flavor that reminds you of the good ol' days! ｜ 用全新的美味，唤起您的美好回忆！
- So, I caution you against eating anything while enjoying the scenery. ｜ 所以，不推荐乘客边吃东西边欣赏风景呢。
- Talk to Ryuuji ｜ 与龙二对话

- This is the Chihu Rock Bulletin Board. You can find community news and shop advertisements posted here. Please do not post unimportant matters. ｜ 此乃吃虎岩公告板，街区新闻、店铺广告，无论大小，皆以公示。闲人如无要事，请勿擅自张贴。
- If you want it, then work for it. ｜ 想要就去争取。
- Uh... The thought had definitely crossed my mind. ｜ 呃…稍微有点那样的想法吧。
- Ugh, this is tough. This pollution's impossible to clear up! ｜ 这些污秽好难对付啊…根本清理不过来！
- It's all planned to scare people, right? ｜ 都只是吓唬人的对吧？
- Master Jean has a secret.\nThe Gunnhildr Clan is a venerable knightly house. This prideful blood comes from Jean's mother, Frederica.\nJean's father on the other hand is Seamus Pegg, an adventurer famed throughout the continent. When he came to Mondstadt, he dusted off his past self and started anew with the Church of Favonius, and ascended to high office within it, becoming known as the Cardinal of Daybreak.\nThe two lovers eventually parted ways. Young Jean, holding her mother's hand, would watch the silhouettes of her father and her sister, Barbara, grow ever more distant.\nLater, Barbara would follow in her father's footsteps and join the Church of Favonius, becoming a deaconess much beloved by the people.\nJean has always wanted to get closer to her younger sister by blood, but cannot bring herself to say anything when faced with Barbara's evasive eyes.\nPerhaps this all-too-similar awkwardness is a sign that the sentiment is shared.\nMaster Jean has yet another secret.\nNo matter how many times she has read the historical classics, despite her title of Dandelion Knight, and though she has become the Acting Grand Master whom everyone relies on...\nJean still loves romance novels.\nThis is not for the years as a young girl that she missed amid her training and duties, or due to the rift that formed in her parents' marriage.\nJean simply yearns for the mutual attraction spoken of in such stories, for those emotions as subtle and fragile as spider-silk.\nAs a knight, she must put Mondstadt and the Knights of Favonius first.\nBut...\n"If I too could..."\nIn her office, deep at night, Jean once again finishes reading "Vera's Melancholy."\n"If I have the time, it should be fine to go to Cape Oath, just before daybreak... right?"\nLowering her head, Jean peeks out her window at the glittering stars above. ｜ 琴团长有一个秘密。\n古恩希尔德家族是古老的骑士家族。这一骄傲的血脉来自琴的母亲芙蕾德莉卡。\n琴的父亲则是名贯大陆的冒险家——西蒙·佩奇。来到蒙德后，他扫去身上风沙，以崭新的姿态加入西风教会，一路升为西风教会总管，人称「拂晓的枢机卿」。\n曾经的爱侣最终分道扬镳。年幼的琴牵着母亲的手，望着父亲与妹妹芭芭拉远去的背影。\n后来，芭芭拉也与父亲一样加入西风教会，成为了一位深受蒙德人喜爱的牧师。\n琴一直想要亲近这位血脉相通的妹妹，但面对芭芭拉躲闪的眼神，不知该如何开口。\n或许这份相似的笨拙，就是姐妹心意仍然相通的表现吧。\n琴团长还有一个秘密。\n尽管熟读历史典籍，尽管身戴「蒲公英骑士」之名，尽管成为了深受信赖的代理团长…\n琴，依然十分中意恋爱小说。\n并非因为在训练与勤务中虚度了少女年华，也不是因为父母婚姻有裂痕。\n琴仅仅是向往故事所描绘的两情相悦，向往蛛丝般精妙又脆弱的情感。\n身为骑士，凡事要以蒙德城和西风骑士团为最优先。\n但…\n「如果，我自己也能…」\n深夜的办公室里，琴再一次读完《少女薇拉的忧郁》。\n「要是有时间，去黎明前的誓言岬看看也没关系。没关系吧…」\n琴低下头，在洒满星辉的窗台边偷偷想着。
- Could you please tell me about your experiences around the world, then? ｜ 能不能请您和我说说，您在世界各地的见闻？
- Flowing Blade Skirmisher ｜ 流刃勇士·游击人
- Fertile Crescent's Ruins ｜ 园圃之遗
- A simple clay grill with minimalistic red patterns that can be found in the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. Its simple appearance belies the high skill level needed to operate it. They say that experienced users can prepare all manner of dishes with distinct characteristics using this device. The secret lies in mastering "distance," much like in combat. But of course, neither controlling the distance between food and a heat source, nor between oneself and an opponent, are things that can be mastered overnight. ｜ 外观朴素的独立陶土烧烤炉，其表面绘有简约的红色花纹，可在圣火竞技场内见到。尽管外观看似简单，但实际上，操作这种烧烤炉需要极高的技巧。据说，熟练的使用者能够利用这种烤炉制作出多种不同特性的食物。而这其中的秘诀与战斗同理，关键都在于对「距离」的把控。但显而易见，无论是把控食物与火源之间的距离，或是控制自身与敌人之间的间隔，都绝非一朝一夕之功…
- Just a small opportunity away from a satisfactory outcome. ｜ 距离圆满，可能只缺小小的契机。
- ...Are you leaving, Fairy Nilou? ｜ …妮露仙子，要走了吗？
- I'll think of ways to keep visiting her in the future. Whatever she needs, I'll find a way. ｜ 以后我会经常想办法来看她的，她需要什么我会想办法。
- A voice-carrying device that can be found in the Veluriyam Mirage. It can send information to guests in a quick and convenient fashion. Perhaps these devices use the Mirage's unique energies, because they can only operate within its bounds... ｜ 可见于「琉形蜃境」各地的传声装置，能够便捷地对游客们发送通知。或许这种装置应用了蜃境之中的特别力量，仅能在这片神奇的秘境内运转…
- Are those packages big? ｜ 那些快件，很大吗？
- No, Zhenyu, it's only appropriate that I take responsibility for this. Everyone, please let me explain. ｜ 不，枕玉老师，这件事应该责任在我才对。各位，还是我来说明吧。
- Are you planning the Arataki Gang's escape? ｜ 你要带荒泷派跑路吗…
- If you keep getting hung up over the small details, you'll miss the best opportunity to act! Remember that time our mid-term thesis defense got delayed? Hesitating won't get us anywhere. ｜ 为求万无一失，反而错过了时机的话，就会就跟那次中期答辩一样悲惨延期…回头也只会闹出更多麻烦来。

### Part 142

- I have the archons to thank for all the blessings in my life — cleaning their statues was my way of giving something back. ｜ 多亏了神明，我才有了现在的幸福生活，这么做，也是我报答神明的一种方式…

- Wow... It sounds like a grand festival. ｜ 哇…听起来像是个很盛大的节日呢。

- Haha, in the circles I move in, anyone who says they've never seen Yun Jin on stage is at risk of getting laughed out of business! Hehehe... ｜ 哈哈，这要是没看过云老板的戏，在生意场上都要被人笑话一句，不识风雅啊。
- ...Director Merieux, Mr. Maloney, what on earth is going on? Why was Lynette not in the lead role? ｜ ——梅里埃导演、马洛尼先生，这是怎么回事！琳妮特竟然不是主演？

- An artificed Cryo Specter that looks much the same as those normally encountered... ｜ 被拟想而出的「冰飘浮灵」，看起来似乎和寻常所见的「冰飘浮灵」并无太大差别…
- Still... It might be too dangerous for our lil' Sumpter Beast to wander about in Natlan's unfamiliar environs. And I happen to need a partner to help carry some things... ｜ 不过…这小东西在纳塔的陌生环境里晃荡还是太危险了，我正好也缺少一个帮忙背东西的搭档…
- Before I go on a long journey, I tend to leave the children of the House of the Hearth with some homework to complete in my absence. ｜ 在远行前，我会给壁炉之家的孩子们留下一些「课业」。
- On the one hand, she is a descendant of the disgraced Lawrence Clan, the scion of a corrupt aristocracy. On the other, she is one of the top two sword fighters in Mondstadt.\nIn other words, Eula is equal parts tainted blood and superior swordsmanship.\nThere is no knowing when she might strike, nor what she might take from you... In the eyes of the citizens of Mondstadt, the Reconnaissance Captain is as unpredictable and tumultuous as the waves on a stormy sea.\nEula responds with a cold haughtiness to accusations of this nature. To any who dare insinuate such things to her face, she replies, "How dare you. Hmph, I will remember this."\nShe is consumed by the desire to avenge herself, but is often on the move far away from the city. Sometimes upon her return to Mondstadt, she will brandish her greatsword and march straight to the Knights of Favonius headquarters.\nOn one occasion, two fresh recruits standing guard on their first day on patrol watched just such a scene play out before their eyes. Alarmed and unsure how to respond, they ultimately did not dare to intervene. Instead, they simply watched on helplessly while Eula made a beeline for Master Jean's office.\nMuch to their surprise, however, hours passed and no sound of a struggle was heard from within.\nStill worried, the guards raised their concerns to Cavalry Captain Kaeya and Librarian Lisa as they were passing by.\n"The Reconnaissance Captain is back again? When you saw her, was she marching towards Jean's office with her sword in hand, looking like she wanted to settle a score?"\n"Goodness, I must head there straight away. How can they have a tea break without me?"\nLisa hurried to Jean's office the moment she finished speaking. Meanwhile, Kaeya took the two guards outside and explained to them whilst trying to suppress a fit of the giggles:\n"We all know that the Acting Grand Master is a good judge of character, don't we? The Knights of Favonius are interested in a person's ability, not their family history. That's why she gives up her time to spar with the Reconnaissance Captain. In doing so, she can preserve the dignity of the Knights of Favonius while also providing a way of settling old grievances. Quite brilliant, don't you think?"\n"Ohh... S—So that's how it is..." "...So 'tea break' is code for 'sparring'...?"\nThis kind of thing occurs almost on a monthly basis. But... if they're engaged in some sort of strange sparring ritual in there for the sake of settling old grievances and honing their fighting skills... How come they don't make a ton of noise? ｜ 既是罪人劳伦斯家后裔、旧贵族的遗毒，也是蒙德数一数二的剑术高手。\n罪恶的血脉与高超的武艺共同构成了优菈这一个体。\n不知何时就会发起攻势，不知会夺走什么…对蒙德居民来说，这位游击队长是如暴风天的海浪一般叵测的存在。\n对此，优菈表现得高傲又冷淡。如果有人胆敢在她面前提出质疑，她只会说：「胆子不小，这份仇我记下了。」\n被仇恨缠绕的她，常年在外奔波，偶尔回城便会提着大剑赶往西风骑士团总部。\n两名新到岗的值班卫兵看见她来，紧张得手足无措，却又不敢上前制止，只能目送她径直走向琴团长的办公室。\n奇怪的是，几小时过去，办公室内仍未传出任何械斗的声响。\n出于担忧，卫兵们向路过的骑兵队长凯亚与图书管理员丽莎提出疑问。\n「那位游击队长又来了吗？怎么，今天也气势汹汹提着剑去找代理团长了？」\n「哎呀，那我也得赶紧过去了，喝茶怎么能少了我呢？」\n丽莎说罢，快步朝办公室走去。凯亚则把两位卫兵拉到门外，笑嘻嘻地解释道：\n「代理团长大人眼光很好，这一点你们都知道的吧？对我们西风骑士团而言，重要的是能力而非出身。所以她才会抽时间与游击队长切磋剑术，既捍卫了骑士团的尊严，也为过往的恩怨倾情一战。很高明吧？」\n「哦、哦…原来是这样吗…」「喝茶，是切磋的意思啊…」\n这样的事几乎每个月都在发生。可…终结恩怨、增进剑技的神秘切磋，究竟为什么不会发出巨响呢？
- You should be happy for them. They have a bright future ahead of them. ｜ 为他们庆祝吧。两位前程似锦的年轻人。
- Roialte is happily fishing... ｜ 洛耶茨正在愉快地钓鱼…
- What? Did you both go deaf? What are you standing around for? <color=#00E1FFFF>Eight hunks of Raw Meat, four White Iron Chunks, and three Sea Ganoderma</color>, plus one set of clearly identifiable <color=#00E1FFFF>clothes</color>! ｜ 你们是听不懂人话吗？还愣着干嘛？！<color=#00E1FFFF>八块兽肉，四块白铁块，三颗海灵芝</color>，外加一件容易辨识身份的<color=#00E1FFFF>衣服</color>！
- Though apparently not long ago there was a leak in some sensitive business information, and as a result he ended up getting overcharged by someone from the Feiyun Commerce Guild. ｜ 不过前一段时间，听说商业机密泄露了，被飞云商会的人狠狠敲了一笔…
- Alright, to tell you the truth, a young woman asked me to send this letter for her. She looked really sick to me, so I agreed, and I didn't even take a single Mora! I'm paying for your compensation out of my own pocket... ｜ 好吧，实话说吧，这封信是一个小姑娘托我来寄的，我看她病得厉害就答应了，甚至分文未取！给你们的报酬可是我自掏腰包…
- Hmm? My Vision? Hehe, I suppose the Lord of Geo must be a fan of the opera. Perhaps the old man was so delighted with my performance that he decided to grant me a Vision. ｜ 这神之眼嘛…说不定岩王爷也喜欢听戏呢？大概他老人家听得开心，就把神之眼送给我了，哈哈。

- Ararycan ｜ 兰利遮

- Sweet-Flower Medaka ｜ 甜甜花鳉
- No need to be so formal, I'm just a regular person like everyone else now. Oh! Is this Fontinalia Mousse? It's one of my favorites! ｜ 不必那么正式啦，我现在就是一个普通人。哇，这不是「千灵慕斯」吗？是我喜欢的甜点。
- How dare the dragon be insolent as such! I pledged before the king, to not let the princess come to harm. ｜ 恶龙竟然如此张狂，我早与国王约定，绝不能让它靠近公主的身旁。
- Not all nightmares are the same. For individuals who are otherwise sound in mind and body, occasional nightmares caused by passing clouds of gloom are a natural source of nourishment for the yumekui-baku. But the nocturnal terrors of those afflicted by chronic illness or severe trauma are altogether a different animal. The baku may still consume them, even likening the experience to eating flavorless bread, yet their toxic threat remains undiminished.\nEven Mizuki, the most gifted of her kind, would find herself plagued by persistent ailments if she devoured too many of the latter.\nTo prevent healers from succumbing to the very maladies they sought to cure, Mizuki began exploring methods beyond her natural youkai powers, seeking to detoxify such negative emotions prior to consumption.\nAnd so, once she was certain that the dark calamity's lingering shadows had been fully suppressed, Mizuki set off for foreign lands. Her aim was to study humanity's most cutting-edge medical practices in order to develop her very own system of "clinical psychological therapy."\nIn Mondstadt, working with the Adventurers' Guild, she took on a part-time role as a "post-trauma disorder treatment consultant," gaining invaluable experience in hands-on clinical care.\nIn Liyue, under the guidance of the physicians of Chenyu Vale, she familiarized herself with various medicinal herbs that could be used to calm the mind and spirit, as well as the intricate process of cultivating and using them.\nIn Sumeru, inspired by the local incense burners, she built upon her previous explorations of herbal medicines by devising a method of aromatic therapy, using incense as a healing aid to facilitate relaxation and sleep.\nAnd in Fontaine, she supplemented her knowledge by delving into the theoretical medical insights of the Research Institute. By considering the scientific underpinnings of avant-garde cinematography, she even discovered fascinating connections between visual patterns and human psychology.\nAfter years of study and exploration, Mizuki eventually reached her final destination — the vibrant land of the seemingly indefatigable People of the Springs in Natlan's southern regions.\nNot only did the "hot spring warriors" give Mizuki the warmest of welcomes, they also showed her their courage by valiantly facing down enemies who shared the same origins as the dark calamity that had once blighted her native land.\nOf all the people she met, Mualani in particular left a lasting impression. The first time they crossed paths, Mualani had been dashing about, playing tag with a group of children, when all of a sudden she had lost her footing — at which point, she accidentally crashed straight into Mizuki, then dragged her down together into the hot spring beside them. A somewhat clumsy first impression, by any account...\nYet in the face of fearsome foes, Mualani's boundless optimism became an unshakable pillar of strength. Not only was she utterly dependable, but even after a fight, she showed no signs of the usual psychological scars that Mizuki had grown so accustomed to seeing.\nSpurred on by her curiosity, Mizuki investigated further, finally concluding that — aside from sheer willpower — a balanced lifestyle was crucial to mental well-being.\nLiving their lives to the fullest in peacetime, brimming with energy and savoring every moment, and then stepping onto the battlefield without regrets, refreshed and ready for the fight — could this, Mizuki wondered, be the secret to the strength of Natlan's warriors?\n"Play hard, fight hard, huh... Treating life's conundrums as you would challenges in a game — taking them on in a composed, timely manner."\nAnd thus, Mizuki conceived the idea of establishing an "entertainment group." Her vision was to introduce the residents of Inazuma to a wide range of different leisure activities, and thereby significantly improve their mental well-being.\nFrom the People of the Springs, she got the idea of hot springs and water sports; from the Scions of the Canopy, of (relatively) safe extreme sports like rock climbing and mountaineering; and she even planned to set up fitness centers staffed by professional trainers from the Collective of Plenty. With a team of collaborators soon in place, Mizuki's vision began to take shape... ｜ 噩梦之间亦有分别，身心健康之人偶尔会被灰暗的情愫困扰，他们的噩梦对于食梦貘而言，是正常的食粮；深受病痛侵扰，或是遭遇过严重创伤之人的噩梦，食梦貘虽能将其吞下，对外人声称，像是吃掉了无味的面包，但其中毒素般的威胁依然存在…\n饶是食梦貘中才能最为出众的瑞希，吞食后者过多时，也会被长久的病痛缠身。\n为了避免医人者先人罹患绝症，瑞希开始探索妖力之外的方法，以期为负面情绪去毒，再加以吞食。\n确认灾厄留下的阴影得到全面抑制后，瑞希便动身前往他国，开始学习人类最为前沿的医术，以建立自己独特的「心理诊疗」体系。\n在蒙德，她与冒险家协会合作，找了份「创伤后遗症诊疗顾问」的兼职，积累了宝贵的诊疗经验；\n在璃月，她跟随沉玉谷的医师，认识了多种安神定气的草药，并习得了种植与应用的细致方法；\n在须弥，她受到本地香炉的启发，结合先前探索的草药，开发出运用熏香，快速使人松弛入梦，有益治疗的辅助手段；\n在枫丹，她补充了「科学院」派系的医学理论知识，还研究了前卫的映影科学，一探图形学与人类心理的奇妙关联；\n历经多年游学后，瑞希的终点站是纳塔南域，活力奔涌的「流泉之众」。\n「温泉勇士」热情招待了瑞希，还向瑞希展现了他们面对漆黑灾厄同源之敌的豪放。\n尤其是玛拉妮，她与瑞希初见时，正和孩子们玩闹，跌跌撞撞闯进瑞希怀里，抱着瑞希一同摔进温泉，给瑞希留下了冒冒失失的印象…\n结果在面对那些可怕的敌人时，玛拉妮却将其乐观的性格转化为坚强的后盾，可靠得无可挑剔，战后也未曾留下瑞希认知中的心理创伤。\n千般好奇的瑞希深入调查后，得出了她自己的结论：除去强大的意志支撑，张弛有度的生活方式对于维持心理健康相当重要。\n平时尽情享受生活，挥洒热情与活力，将每天过得开心自在，战时不留遗憾地踏上前线，神清气爽地战斗，或许就是纳塔勇士们的诀窍？\n「玩得好、玩得尽兴，才能好好战斗，将生命中的难题当成游戏中的挑战，不紧不慢地打败。」。\n于是，瑞希萌生了建设一个「娱乐集团」的想法，要为稻妻居民引入多种休闲方式，从而显著改善人们的精神状况。\n她从「流泉之众」选中了温泉和水上运动，从「悬木人」选中了攀岩登山等相对安全的极限运动，还打算聘请「沃陆之邦」的专业人士开设健身馆，并找到了多位执行人，开始了自己的布局…
- Mirror Maiden ｜ 藏镜仕女
- Collect 400 rewards from blossoms of wealth or blossoms of revelation. ｜ 获取400次「藏金之花」或「启示之花」的馈藏。

- To be honest, judging by what stands before me, I find it very hard to believe that you're an astute Rtawahist student. ｜ 说实话，从你的精神状态和气质上看，我很难相信你是梨多梵谛学院的好学生。
- For example, the Moonchase Festival. Everyone gathers to enjoy the moonlight together. ｜ 比如逐月节会一起赏月…

- Clorinde offers to protect Kiara. Now, rendezvous with Neuvillette. ｜ 克洛琳德主动提出保护基娅拉，去找那维莱特会合吧。
- Huh, so that's how it is. Y'know, if Paimon had one of those as a pet for a while, and it got sick, Paimon would be really sad too. ｜ 原来是这样，如果陪着我长大的猫猫狗狗生病了，我也会很难过吧。

- So the one in this photo... are you sure it isn't me? ｜ 就是说，这个里面的，不是我？

- Humans become very vulnerable when they get sick. I've seen lots of huge guys who boast about their skills in the Pankration Ring suddenly look at me like a frightened Blubberbeast when they find out they need an injection. I always make sure to bring plenty of candies and stickers to make them feel better when the waterworks start. It's really effective — a little treat always wipes the doom and gloom away. ｜ 人类在生病时会变得尤其脆弱。平时会叫嚣着去拳力斗技场比试的高高大大的人，被告知需要打针时也会露出膨膨兽一样的表情。我准备了很多糖果和贴纸来安慰这类爱哭的病人，每次都十分奏效，他们脸上很快就阴雨转晴了。
- Hmph! Little Mao's a local, so of course he understands this place better than Paimon! ｜ 哼！因为小茂是当地人，所以懂的肯定比我多啦！
- Before they left, they asked me to make replicas of themselves using Hydro Eidolons. Then they tasked these replicas with maintaining everything they built here... as if this was their way of keeping their dreams alive. ｜ 在离开蜃境时，他们托我用水形幻灵模拟「自己」，替他们维护蜃境中的造物，就像是看管他们的梦一样。
- Oh, what a magnificent feast! Wait a second, I'll grab us some drinks to accompany the meal. ｜ 看着就很丰盛！稍等，我去找些饮品来，配着饭菜一起享用吧。
- As for all the belongings left by the Kaedehara Clan, I will deal with them promptly. ｜ 至于枫原家留下的东西，最近我就会处理它们。

- I'm in Mondstadt specially to try the food. Mostly because I heard that Chef Xiangling from Wanmin Restaurant gets some of her ingredients from here. ｜ 最近特地过来尝尝蒙德的菜肴，毕竟听说「万民堂」的大厨香菱也来这边找食材了嘛。
- It's very nice to meet you — I've heard so much about you. I am Yousuke, indeed, and I am currently providing oversight of the Mikage Furnace repair efforts. ｜ 久仰大名，初次见面，我是阳介，目前正在负责「御影炉心」的维护工作。

- A bountiful harvest... ｜ 代表丰收的花…

- The hilichurls dancing, dancing Dusky Ming's favorite dance! ｜ 丘丘人们正跳着小冥生前最喜欢的那支舞呐！
- The evil sorcerer isn't here right now. I... I'm not afraid! ｜ 坏巫师现在不在，我…我才不怕呢！
- Oh, it's you. Heh, you must be absolutely loaded with coupons if you have time to stroll around like this. ｜ 是你们啊，有空闲逛就证明…你们现在还挺有钱的吧？

- Hahaha, you actually came at me with your wok! Do you have a... ｜ 哈哈哈，居然扛着一口锅就冲上来了，真是找…
- Huh! What do you know? We've already collected so many components! ｜ 呜哇！不知不觉间，我们已经拿到这么多零件了！
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。

- Uh... arrest them? Well, it would solve the immediate problem... ｜ 抓…抓起来？虽然这样做是能解决目前的麻烦啦…

- A simple yet durable multifunctional cart, equipped with metal rain eaves and ventilation ducts. This experimental vehicle, modified by Mondstadt merchants based on years of trading experience, is primarily used for selling alchemical potions. Due to the active nature of some alchemical potions, which are prone to failure during long-distance transport due to heat, humidity, or severe jolting, merchants devised an improvement by transforming the vehicle's original chimney into a ventilation chamber to address storage conditions. However, a perfect solution to mitigate potion failure from jostling has not yet been found, so this type of vehicle still has a long journey ahead before widespread adoption... ｜ 结构简单，方便耐用的多功能货车，配备了金属材质的雨檐和通风管道，是蒙德商人们依据多年行商经验所改造的实验型车辆，主要被用于出售炼金药剂。由于部分炼金药剂的性质较为活跃，易在长距离运输中因闷热、潮湿或剧烈颠簸而失效，故而商人们想到了将货车原有的烟囱改良为通风橱的方法，以此来解决保存环境的问题。但至于如何减少因颠簸导致的药剂失效问题，大家未能找到完美的解决方案，所以这型货车距离大范围普及还有很长的路要走…

- ...Still nervous, though. ｜ 但是，还是好紧张啊。
- Oh, that's terrible... ｜ 怎么这样…
- Dehya can use her Elemental Skill to create a Fiery Sanctum field that will launch Pyro-DMG-dealing Coordinated Attacks when opponents take damage in its area of effect. Additionally, the character(s) within the field's AoE will have increased resistance to interruption and can transfer part of the damage they take as continuous damage for Dehya to bear.\nUpon using her Elemental Burst, Dehya enters the Blazing Lioness state, in which she will automatically and continuously unleash her Flame-Mane's Fists, dealing Pyro DMG. While in this state, her Normal Attacks and Elemental Skill will be replaced by Roaring Barrage. Unleashing Roaring Barrage within a short time after a Flame-Mane's Fist strike will increase the speed at which the next Flame-Mane's Fist strike will be triggered.\nElemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 迪希雅能够通过元素战技产生「净焰剑狱」领域，其中的敌人受到伤害时领域将进行火元素的协同攻击。此外，领域还能提升其中场上角色的抗打断能力，并在其受到伤害时将部分转为由迪希雅承担的持续伤害。\n元素爆发能使迪希雅进入「炽炎狮子」状态，自动连续挥舞炽鬃拳造成火元素伤害，并在该状态下，普通攻击与元素战技将替换为「炎咆连打」，在施展炽鬃拳后短时间内施放炎咆连打将提升下一次炽鬃拳施展的速度。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- "Tales of Humanity":\nWe have received reports that certain Clockwork Meka have departed from their regular patrol routes and been found outside the city.\nThe Gardes would like to thank citizens for bringing this issue to our attention. We are currently redoubling efforts to divert resources into recovering these <color=#3399CC>Clockwork Meka</color>.\nIt has also been reported that certain conscientious citizens have been helping us deal with these faulty Meka behind the scenes. We are extremely grateful to such high-spirited individuals.\nYour contributions help us make Fontaine a better place for all. ｜ 「人间百态」：\n有民众反映，部分脱离正常巡逻路线的发条机关出现在了野外地区。\n警备队在此感谢民众的监督，我们正在加大力度调集人手协调<color=#3399CC>发条机关</color>的回收工作。\n我们得知，有一部分公民朋友在默默协助警备队处理故障的机关个体，在此我们需要感谢这些公民朋友。\n你的贡献将有助于建设一个更加美好的枫丹。

- A countryside scene full of luxurious plants. It contains all sorts of flowers and bushes that can be found everywhere in Fontaine. Flowers and plants are common themes in paintings, and are a starting point for explorations into "color." Some painters in Fontaine believe that the world's palette uses plants to demonstrate the perfect combination of colors. As such, if all the colors in a painting may find their source in flowers, then this painting must surely have harmonious beauty equal to that of natural scenery. Of course, this is predicated on you not mixing all plant-derived colors together in a single conversation... ｜ 遍布繁茂植被的郊野景致，荟萃了枫丹寻常可见的多种花卉与灌木。花与草木是绘画中寻常可见的主题，以及对于「色彩」探索的起点之一。枫丹的部分画家认为，世界的调色盘以众多植株向他们示范了「完美搭配」的典例，因此，若是一幅画中的所有色彩都能在植物身上找到原型，那这幅画必然有着自然风光般的和谐美感。当然，前提是千万别将多种植物的色彩混为一谈…

- An old waterskin made from animal hide. It is older, in fact, than its owner. Sethos treasures it greatly and always has it by his side.\nIt was a gift he received from his grandfather. It is said that some tribes reward their warriors with high-quality waterskins. Though Bamoun did not say it to Sethos in so many words, he gave it to him after the latter shot a faraway bird out of the sky while it was in mid-flight.\nThe strap of the waterskin bears his name, engraved by his grandfather's own hands. ｜ 一只兽皮制成的老水囊。若以年份来算，它的寿命比赛索斯还长些。赛索斯非常珍惜它，时刻带在身旁。\n他从爷爷那里得到它。据说有些部族会将优质水囊作为赏给勇士的奖品。巴穆恩虽没这么说，却在赛索斯一箭射中远方飞鸟之后送给他这个。\n水囊的皮带上有爷爷亲手刻上去的养孙的名字。

- Healing Support ｜ 治疗援护
- Are you still in charge of the qualifications review? ｜ 你还在这里负责资质审核的工作吗？
- So, Candace actually saw things recorded by the Wedjat Eye! ｜ 所以坎蒂丝看到的，其实是记录在「乌婕特之眼」中的景象！
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 2 ｜ 突破等级「2」阶后开启
- Over there... just now? ｜ 那儿…吗？

- See you around. ｜ 再见。
- Indwelling Level ｜ [凭依]级数
- Not at all, I'd love to! What a nice surprise! ｜ 怎么会？我高兴还来不及！

- It seems like Jebrael didn't tell you anything at all, huh? Come on, that can't be! Jebrael, couldn't you even tell your own daughter the truth? ｜ 看样子，哲伯莱勒什么也没有告诉你？不是吧，哲伯莱勒，哪怕对自己的女儿也不能说出实话吗？

- There aren't any. ｜ 没有桌子。

- Yay! Let's quickly make Squirrel Fish for Miss Tang Wen! ｜ 好耶！我们就赶紧做一份松鼠鱼给汤雯小姐吧！
- #If I hadn't met you, {NICKNAME} the adventurer... and Paimon, I would already have given up by now. ｜ #如果没碰上你们，我估计就放弃了，但是，四处冒险的{NICKNAME}…还有派蒙。
- Foolish Buer. You will find no gratefulness from me, even if you heal me. ｜ 愚蠢的布耶尔，就算你治好我，我也不会感激你。
- Welcome, one and all, to this festival of poetry, jointly organized by Liyue and Mondstadt! ｜ 欢迎各位朋友来到璃月与蒙德合办的诗歌大会现场。
- ...Is that so. ｜ …这样吗。
- Excited Paper Frog ｜ 兴奋的纸蛙
- A large, flat-tipped sword designed in to fit as the weapon of an ancient king or some ceremonial instrument. ｜ 造型古旧的平头大剑，似乎曾是王器与某种仪式用的武器。
- Stupidity... is doing the same meaningless thing over and over again. ｜ 就是一而再，再而三地干一件无聊透顶的事。
- That little rascal... He always looks so smug, but the moment he sees people, he suddenly becomes all loving and affectionate. ｜ 明明平时那么傲气的，一见到人就这样子撒娇…这家伙还真是狡猾。
- A well-preserved ceremonial fox mask. A small, enigmatic smile ever graces its lips. ｜ 保存良好的祭礼狐面，永远带着一副神秘的浅笑。

- Liar, liar, pants on fire! It's a chunk of wood! ｜ 骗人！那根本就是块普通木板吧！
- You can dedicate one tenth of your time to the important things, but when it comes to the remaining nine tenths, it's just a matter of finding ways to pass the time. ｜ 就算拿出十分之一的时间去筹备水火、秣马厉兵，剩下的时间还是得想办法打发的。
- A crude wooden vessel filled only with memories. ｜ 木制的粗糙容器，其中空洞洞地盛满了回忆。
- Why don't we go say hi? ｜ 干脆过去打个招呼吧？
- Maybe we should start with his relationship with Samail? ｜ 还是先讲讲和萨梅尔的关系吧…
- Defeat 4 opponents with Hyperbloom within 2s (x1). ｜ 达成1次：2秒内，通过超绽放击败4名敌人。
- Wait. Are you trying to ask me what I was doing during the Stormterror Crisis? ｜ 呃，你该不会是想问，龙灾发生的时候我在做什么吧？
- The same thing happened... to all of them? ｜ 他们是…同归于尽哩？
- You sound more serious than usual. ｜ 没想到你解释得这么认真。
- Although you don't quite understand the purpose of this recording, you still follow Alhaitham's instructions for the sake of the plan. ｜ 虽然不知道录入这些有什么用，但为了计划，还是按艾尔海森说的做了。
- Boared to Death ｜ 十岁差点打倒野猪
- Do you mean that you want to... study Kuntira's children? ｜ 你是说…研究…她的孩子？
- You know what I mean? Like when you buy a drink, and under the bottle cap it says "Have Another Drink" — and then you go get your free drink, and that one gives you ANOTHER free drink! A string of good luck. ｜ 这种感觉就像，拿着「再来一瓶」的瓶盖去兑奖，开盖一看，还是「再来一瓶」，走大运喽~
- Continue the harvest. Compared to what we stand to achieve, these sacrifices are trivial. ｜ 继续进行「收获」，相比结果而言，这些都是微不足道的代价。

- No! He's gotta be here! ｜ 不会的，他一定在！
- Ah, the flood. That magic pocket your magician friend provided proved very useful. ｜ 啊，说起涨水这事，你那位魔术师先生送的口袋帮大忙了呢。
- No need to worry, I only need my hands to organize documents, I won't hurt my lower back further. ｜ 没事，我整理卷宗只用手，不用腰。您就放心吧。
- Revives a character and restores 400 HP. ｜ 复苏选中的角色，为其恢复400点生命值。
- He used to be a member of the Eremites? Huh, from the way he dressed, I would have thought he was a merchant from the rainforest... Let's ask him about it. ｜ 他是镀金旅团的人？看他之前的穿着打扮，还以为是雨林的商人…找他问问吧。
- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒

- Yes, we have. ｜ 听过了。

- Flamecrest ｜ 炳烈丘

- Unwilling participants will end up spoiling the game and ruining everything. That would leave everyone disappointed, and that's the opposite of why we have the games in the first place... ｜ 非自愿的玩家只会成为规则的破坏者，把游戏全盘毁掉，最后所有人都不开心，那不就违背初衷了么。

- Researcher ｜ 学者
- Yes, we know. Back when you started, you had to bite the bullet and do these things to keep the troupe afloat. ｜ 是，我们知道，如果当初您不这么做，我们根本走不到今天…
- This tastes amazing! I'd better not have any more, or I'll never be able to go back to my usual rations. ｜ 这道菜味道真不错！再多吃几口的话，我说不定以后就吃不下那些干粮啦。
- ...Okay. But before we move out, at least let me heal everyone with my <color=#00E1FFFF>Dandelion Breeze</color>. ｜ …嗯，好吧，但在一起前进之前，至少先让我用<color=#00E1FFFF>「蒲公英之风」</color>为大家治疗伤口。
- Swiftstep Armed Courier ｜ 疾迅勇士·重刃讯使
- #Golden-haired Nara {NICKNAME} read the journal and came looking for Arashakun? Then rescued trapped Arashakun? Nara is so kind and so powerful. ｜ #金发的那菈{NICKNAME}，看到了笔记，便来寻找兰沙恭的踪迹，又帮兰沙恭解围，真是心善又厉害的好那菈。
- I'm counting on you two to bring the fragments back as quickly as you can. Things will get dicey for me if I miss the deadline. ｜ 总之就拜托二位了，请尽快把碎片带回来吧，要是错过结项的期限可就麻烦了。
- But I only asked for your help from time to time. I also tallied a great deal of numbers myself... ｜ 但是我也只是偶尔拜托你，我自己也统计了很多数据…
- No more than 40 hits taken from opponents: #1#/%1% ｜ 被敌人命中次数不超过40：#1#/%1%
- *sigh* ...I might not be good for a lot of things, but if I can keep a historical relic safe then at least that's something. ｜ 呼，虽然我能做的事也很有限…但是能保护一件文物是一件吧。
- Dry-Braised Salted Fish ｜ 干烧香鱼
- Got it right here. ｜ 已经拿到了。
- A classic Liyue dish. Emerald green onions and the ruby red meatball complement each other perfectly, while exquisite and extraordinary knife skills make for a melt-in-your-mouth meatball, fatty but not greasy, guaranteed to have you praising it all week. Don't forget to clean your plate for good luck! ｜ 经典的璃月名肴。翠绿的葱花与深红的肉圆相映成趣，细腻超凡的刀工使得肉圆入口即溶，肥而不腻。吃下一口，不禁赞不绝口；全部吃完，定能鸿运当头。
- And by the way, don't worry too much when Eula says strange things. She's actually a very good person. ｜ 如果优菈对你们说了什么奇怪的话，别往心里去。其实她是个很善良的人。
- Valley of Dahri ｜ 荼诃落谷
- Oh, looks like Dunyarzad was on to something. ｜ 是不是被迪娜泽黛说中了啊？
- He thought he'd never make it, so he lunged in alone and drove all three bad guys away! ｜ 他以为自己回不来了，于是自己一只猫冲到前面，一口气击退了那三个坏蛋！
- Camera ｜ 镜头
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:P}
- A choice? ｜ 选择？
- Child ｜ 孩童
- Publish Domain ｜ 发布秘境
- Since even the Super Zenith Boss-Level Forces are absolutely interested, and this will make an excellent feather in my resume cap... Of course I'd be happy to help! ｜ 既然是「超天顶领队级战力」都很感兴趣的游戏，又能为我的履历写下光彩的记录…我当然乐意奉陪！
- Now the atmosphere here is like water poured into a container... The water is more secure and settled, but it has lost its free-flowing nature from the river. ｜ 现在的气氛就像装在容器里的水，多了一份循规蹈矩，但再也没有身处江河的自由自在。
- He was not only mortally wounded, but also under the heavy influence of Tatarigami. Add to that the fact that its aura seems to have attracted a horde of monsters, and... I'm afraid he may no longer be with us. ｜ 他受了致命伤，还被祟神的力量影响得很深。这浓郁的气息又引来了魔物，恐怕他已经…不幸遇难了。
- Fortune Slip ｜ 「御神签」
- Claimed the Favor and survived ｜ 获得「眷顾之能」并幸存
- The Maushiro, huh... ｜ 木簧笛…
- Apparently we'll know who he is the instant we see him. ｜ 据说看到就能认出来了。
- Thank you, Master! ｜ 谢谢师父！
- Another escort mission? I've lost count of how many of these I've done... ｜ 怎么又是护送委托，我都做了多少次了…
- Martial Artist's Feather Accessory ｜ 武人的羽饰
- Believe me, in this case more than any other, I have checked every last detail. ｜ 相信我嘛，这个案子，我也是仔仔细细地查过每一处细节了。
- Our opponents are getting more varied... Good thing we've got a good combination too, huh? ｜ 对手的种类变得复杂起来了…好在我们也能拿出很厉害的组合！
- I'm a genius, I know. I can only assume that's why Egeria chose me as her successor. ｜ 嗯，我真是个天才，也正因如此，厄歌莉娅才选择了我作为继任者吧。
- A letter? Oh, I see... This again... ｜ 信？哦哦，原来又是这么一回事啊…
- It just sort of became a tradition over time... at first it was a bit of a chore, but the more time I spent with them, the more I came to enjoy it. ｜ 久而久之就形成这样的规模了…一开始觉得是个麻烦活，但真的相处起来感觉还不错。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Okay, that's good, now pour some more water into this pot... ｜ 先这样，你先给这锅加点清水…
- I don't know if it's because his daughter is on break or what, but Draff has been extra jolly these days and is drinking even harder after work... ｜ 不知道是不是因为女儿放了假，杜拉夫先生每天都格外高兴，工作结束之后喝得更猛了…
- With this kinda speed, it'd be a shame if you didn't become a Saurian tamer. ｜ 这种速度不当驯龙师可惜了。
- Yeah, that's right. All that matters is that Xingqiu and his books are okay. ｜ 对呀，只要知道行秋没事，书也没事，对于我来说就足够了。
- Nearly every member of the Church joined the search for it, but it was never found. ｜ 当时，几乎所有教会成员都参与了搜索，但最后也没有找到。
- Fallen: III ｜ 倒下·其三
- A water-dwelling plant that can be found in shallow seas that resembles a striking jade butterfly spreading its wings in the water.\nThis plant is involved in a home remedy passed through the resistance — they grind it down into powder and boil it into a poultice that serves as an excellent disinfectant and prevent further infections, combining excellently with the use of other medicines. ｜ 可见于浅海地带的水生植物，宛如水中振翅之蝶，呈现出明亮的「玉子色」。\n反抗军中流传着一种治疗伤口的偏方——将这种水生植物磨制的粉末熬汤，能为伤口彻底消毒，防止感染，配合其他药物使用，效果极佳。
- Thank you. ｜ 谢谢。
- Eh? So, did someone manage to restart the Akasha? ｜ 欸？他、他难道把虚空重启了？！
- But you didn't catch any in the end, did you? ｜ 结果鱼也没抓到，对吧？
- A special pattern that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 特别的花纹，可用于装饰祝柬。
- Strangely enough, I actually happened upon a strange mural a while back, and it looked to me like it was depicting a Saurian and a human involved in some kind of Saurian-era contract ritual. ｜ 话说回来，前阵子咱还在外面路过了一副奇怪的壁画，上面画了一条龙和一个人，搞不好记录了某种龙时代的契约仪式呢。
- Aren't you worried about the price being over-inflated? ｜ 你不担心价格虚高吗？
- About Hu Tao: Name ｜ 关于胡桃自己·名字
- Now I finally know why Mr. Ed... Edwin never wanted you to take part in the core research project. ｜ 我总算知道，为什么当初艾德温前…先生，一直不愿意让你参与核心研究了。
- So I mostly just buy protective equipment. And it's always reassuring when you're wearing something with a beautiful pattern on it! ｜ 所以我买的多数是护具。在护具上画满好看的图案，总归能让人安心一些。
- What did you find? ｜ 你发现了什么？
- Trofin Snezhevich ｜ 特洛芬·雪奈茨维奇
- I see. I respect your proposal. ｜ 这样啊…我尊重你的提案。

- But that was so long ago... ｜ 那都多久以前的事了…

- Really!? Let Paimon have a look here... Oh, you're right! There it is! ｜ 是吗？让我看看——真的耶！就在那里！
- Hehe, you could say that! Mr. Boatman, are there any stories about the Jademouth that I haven't heard before? ｜ 嘿嘿，算是吧！艄公爷爷，这宝玦口有什么我没听过的故事呀？
- Traveler, keep your eyes peeled for enemies... ｜ 旅行者，小心敌人哦~
- So might I assume that your respective claims of looking for plants and artists in Mondstadt were just pretexts? ｜ 来蒙德找植物找画家什么的，都是借口吧？
- Hehehe, you're very direct, Master Lu. I will be plain — we're looking for proof that Dongsheng from Second Life has been evading taxation. ｜ 呵呵，路爷真是直爽。情况是这样，我们在寻找「荣发商铺」的东升漏税的证据…
- Complete Extreme Difficulty ｜ 达成极限难度
- Wow... I never expected this submission event would uncover such talented authors. ｜ 嗯…没想到这次征文居然发掘出这么有潜力的作者。
- But there are four of us... ｜ 可是我们有四个人欸…
- Report back to Masseira ｜ 向马塞拉回报
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- Talk to the children ｜ 和孩子们对话
- Whoa, did you see that? He not only got us our Mora back, but sent the Eremites running, too... ｜ 刚才那个人，他到底是怎么办到的啊？镀金旅团的人竟然把我们的钱扔下就跑了…
- Tubby ｜ 阿圆
- You've already been that high up? That's very impressive. Still... a cavern blocked by a strange air current, you say? Let me think... ｜ 你已经到那么高的地方了？你还真是厉害啊。不过…被奇怪气流封堵的洞窟？唔，我想想…

- Daddy took the boat over to that town, and Uncle Giustino also took a boat to come over here. ｜ 老爹就是坐着船去了佩特莉可镇，朱斯蒂诺叔叔也是坐着船来了拜达港。
- Jade Branch of a Distant Sea ｜ 远海夷地的琼枝

- No, stop! We can't let that happen! ｜ 快停下！那是绝不可能的！

- #N—No way! {NICKNAME} will definitely wait for Paimon, no matter what... ｜ #唔唔…不会啦！{M#他}{F#她}肯定会等我的，不管什么时候…
- A receipt you got from Jahangir. It can be used to collect goods purchased from Jahangir. ｜ 从贾汉吉尔那里拿到的收货单。可以凭此单据接收贾汉吉尔的货物。
- ...Did Shefket deceive us? ｜ …难道谢夫凯特骗了我们吗？
- Ah, him... he's probably gone off to become a bandit. ｜ 他啊…大概是跑去做流寇了吧…
- About you and Venti... ｜ 你和那位温迪老师…
- Elemental Burst: III ｜ 元素爆发·其三
- It's way better... ｜ 这里更好…
- This could be a safe place to set sail from... ｜ 从这里出海的话，应该会十分顺利…
- Can you believe that!? What a group of deadbeats... I'm not gonna put up with that, nuh-uh, not in my gang! ｜ 一个两个都这么说！大家都是一副无精打采的样子，这样可不行啊！
- How've things been for you? ｜ 近况可好？
- Even if... Even if that meant piecing together the version of myself that could have been... one memory at a time. ｜ 哪怕…哪怕只是靠人们的记忆去拼凑出来，拼凑出我好像在世上活过的样子。
- Navia... ｜ 娜维娅…
- Yun Jin ｜ 云堇
- Eh? What's a bake-danuki doing on this island? ｜ 咦？岛上怎么会有妖狸？
- You presume correctly. ｜ 那是自然。
- Thoma ｜ 托马
- Carefree Simulacrum ｜ 「慢悠悠仙像」
- Prince seems to have high hopes for you. ｜ 看来「小王子」大人对你有很高的期待呢。
- Judging by your faces, it seems like you two still have some questions, yes? ｜ 看你们的神情，应该还有很多事想要问吧？
- Vago Mundo ｜ 尘世闲游
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- Chat: Tactics ｜ 闲聊·军略
- Delicious Barbeque Ribs ｜ 美味的香烤肋排
- ...This isn't my pedestal... ｜ …这里不是属于我的底座…
- ...Well, I've certainly never taken a witness statement like this before. ｜ …竟然还有这种证言。
- Huh, isn't this what the bards called the "Fretnaught Fruit"? ｜ 啊，这不是就像是吟游诗人的故事里说的忘忧果吗？
- Lumidouce Case Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 柔灯之匣持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- If they're trying to use the collaborative project as an excuse to have me reconsider again... ｜ 如果他们又是想用合作课题当借口，劝我重新考虑…
- I would like to ask our guests from abroad, did you bring any light and breathable clothing? ｜ 我想请问外国来的乘客，有没有携带轻盈透气的衣服呢？
- Talk to {QuestNpcID} ｜ 与{QuestNpcID}对话
- Guardian's Sigil ｜ 守护徽印

---
### Part 143

- Stock a total of {param0} potions in the "Alchemical Ascension" event ｜ 在「升炼研巧万策金」活动中，累计上架{param0}瓶药剂
- As far as I'm concerned, though... Your showing in the duel was enough to prove your honor. ｜ 但除此以外…你已经在和我的「决斗」中，证明了自己的名誉。
- The two wraith leaders have designed an impossible conundrum for the wise ones and the Hydro Eidolon! The wraiths can see everywhere in the area, so there's nowhere to hide! ｜ 两名幽魂头领为智者和水形幻灵设下了不可能解开的难题！整片区域都被幽魂的视野笼罩，无处可藏！
- Attain a score of {param2} in Don't Push Your Luck ｜ 在「得胜便收」挑战中达到{param2}积分
- Anyway, we shouldn't delay. Let's head off! ｜ 事不宜迟，我们马上出发吧！
- Adventure Item ｜ 冒险道具
- Oh, come now, your work doesn't involve much public speaking, right? This is a good chance to practice — you might even pick up some fancy oratory tricks to impress your boss with in the future. ｜ 哎呀，你的工作应该不是什么负责发言的岗位吧？借此机会锻炼一下，以后工作场合也能说些精彩的话博取上司青睐哦。
- A workshop that Tlazolli announced had been abandoned and sealed off. Now, an ominous crackling echoes within... ｜ 特拉佐莉对外宣称已经废弃并封闭了的工坊。如今，不祥的裂鸣正在里面回荡…
- The secrets behind our magic are past saving, Lyney. ｜ 魔术的秘密已经守不住了，林尼。
- Speaking of, you guys only got here recently, how did you manage to get a permit? ｜ 对了，你们也是最近才来稻妻的吧，是怎么获得许可的？
- "Travel Notes: Whirling Waltz" namecard style. ｜ 「纪行·旋舞」名片纹饰
- Hey! ｜ 喂！
- I've gotta admit that my friend only told me the back half. I wonder, what did his father do to warrant such hate from the sun? ｜ 说起来朋友只给我讲了后半的故事，并没有讲前半。他父亲到底犯了什么错才会让太阳这么痛恨呢？
- "Despite the great dangers to themselves, and indeed, to 'Utha{RUBY#[D]Resilience}biti' Kachina in specific..." ｜ 「尽管战争的过程险象丛生，『乌沙{RUBY#[D]坚强}博蒂』的卡齐娜还一度遭遇险情…」
- Wow, this looks kinda disgusting. ｜ 呜啊，可是看起来感觉好难吃…
- Forbidden knowledge has the power to drive people insane, but this fact has never been shared with the public. Even I, who has worked in the Akademiya for some time, was never once informed of this. ｜ 「禁忌知识」会使人疯狂，但此事在须弥并未公开，就连任职于教令院的我也是第一次知道相关内容。
- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- Hah, you even sounded like my father back there. No wonder he likes you, Aurele. I mean, he always takes that stack of books with him when he talks to you. ｜ 就连说话的语气，和我爸爸一模一样…怪不得爸爸这么喜欢奥雷勒哥哥，每次都要拿一大堆书去和你聊天。
- These kids don't feel all that reliable... But well, they are kids. We shouldn't pin too many hopes on them... ｜ 总感觉「孩子们」不是太靠谱…唔，不过毕竟是小孩子，指望他们可能有点困难。
- Goods that have been secured, awaiting transport upon a hardwood pallet. Liyue's naval transport practice of using a large and a small pallet in tandem eventually became standard practice throughout the land. These are so stable that they will not overturn, no matter whether transported by sea or land...\nWell, that rule doesn't apply if the shipper is The Crux. ｜ 固定在硬木货盘上，等待运输的货品。璃月航运界习惯将大小两个货盘搭配使用，逐渐成为了大陆通行的标准货盘，这样的结构拥有更好的稳定性，无论陆运海运都不会倾覆…\n除非托运方来自南十字船队。
- Perhaps one cannot traverse every river and every ocean in a single lifetime. ｜ 像这样穷尽一生也没办法驶过每一条江流，走过每一片海洋吧。
- I feel like the mucus is following me... ｜ 这些粘液好像会跟着我…
- Prayerful Wind's Benefit Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 祈风之赐持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Unfortunately, she's super busy right now, and may not have time for gatherings like this. ｜ 可惜她现在很忙，应该没时间参加这样的集会。
- Tepetlisaurus ｜ 嵴锋龙
- It's trying to say that when they've suffered enough and reached the end of their life, they become a Tumor of the Withering. ｜ 它想说的应该是，当它们饱经折磨，最终亡故的时候，就会变成「死域瘤」吧。
- But I'm not your target, right? ｜ 总不会是你要伏击我吧？
- Thank you! I'm going to take a much-needed rest in the meantime... ｜ 谢谢，我要休息一下…
- No problem, just take it as me talking to myself. ｜ 没关系，就当我在自言自语好了。
- Xiangling believes that Lotus Heads and Jueyun Chilis alone will not let her prevail in the cook-off, and sets off to find more ingredients. ｜ 香菱认为只凭莲蓬和绝云椒椒这样的食材还不足以取胜，为了寻找特别的食材她再次踏上寻找之路。
- You are very observant. ｜ 你的观察力很强。
- By solving the puzzles, you prove yourselves worthy of inheriting the secrets of the past. ｜ 智慧的逐影猎人解开了谜题，证明了自己是能够继承往日秘密的适格者。
- And to hone one's skills without distraction is praiseworthy also. That is why one had Shuyu instruct him in the basics and focus on small devices that can be applied to beetle combat, such as Bloom Pruner. ｜ 心无旁骛修习本领，值得褒扬，那便让漱玉领他入门，着眼于「花羽叶月神机」这类能在斗虫游艺派上用场的小机关。
- Beidou ｜ 北斗
- You overlooked all of that because you were so focused on targeting us. That's why only Blanche remembers. ｜ 你的心思全都花在怎么对付我们身上啦，所以才对这些视而不见。反而布兰奇就能记住这些。
- In order to ascend to Aaru... Does that mean Aaru Village? But Paimon doesn't think Aaru Village existed back then... Anyway, shouldn't the opposite of the underworld be a really wonderful place? ｜ 升入阿如…难道指的是阿如村？不过那时候应该还没有阿如村吧…既然能够和幽冥相对，应该是很好的地方才是。
- Prince ｜ 小王子
- Fancy a spar? ｜ 要练练手吗？
- 刘三木 ｜ 刘三木
- Once order is disrupted, the consequences spread like wildfire. I'd like to avoid such a scenario, so I can keep my life intact and uninterrupted. ｜ 一旦秩序被破坏，其后果会迅速蔓延。我不喜欢这样，会打扰到我现在的生活。
- The sea's too rough today... I should stay on dry land till things calm down. ｜ 风浪太大了，让我留在岸上吧…
- Ally at Low HP: I ｜ 同伴生命值低·其一
- Kamisato Ayaka's Hobbies ｜ 绫华的爱好…
- You sure this wasn't all made up by people later? ｜ 真的不是后人编的吗？
- I wasn't thinking about any of that, actually. ｜ 和强弱没关系。
- See? Just follow my intuition. ｜ 就是这个，我的直觉不错吧？
- But it is likely no large problem. Long years have passed since, and time grinds all civilizations into dust. ｜ 我想也不会有太大问题吧。毕竟太古过于久远，文明已化风沙。
- I must say that the inspiration I got from "that fellow" is... outdated in some places, but it was useful overall. ｜ 虽然「那位老兄」的灵感…说实话，有一部分稍微落后了些时代，但整体来说，还是给了我一些启发。
- Can you briefly describe the application of the law of triple-orbit shift calculation? ｜ 简单阐述一下三轨偏移推算法则的适用情况吧。
- The dark metallic vessel owned by the Bloodstained Knight. Its exterior has been stained as black as the night by smoke and coagulated blood. ｜ 染血骑士持有的黯淡金属杯皿。外壁因为烟熏与凝结的血变得漆黑如夜。
- You're going? Well, alright then. As for me, I've got to stick around here... ｜ 你要走了？好吧，我还得接着守在这…
- (Current) ｜ (当前）
- How are you? Do you need any help? ｜ 怎么了，需要帮助吗？
- Alright, take your fortune slip. ｜ 好的，请您收好「御神签」。
- ...It's fine. ｜ …没什么。
- Haha, Paimon bet you had incredible luck, and Paimon was right! ｜ 哈哈，我就说你运气超级好，果然如此！
- Loyal Luke never abandons his post! I must keep watch over the— Ahem! Diplomatic mission! ｜ 忠诚的卢克绝对不擅离职守，因为卢克要看管重要的…咳！驻地！
- Whoa, nice one, Boss! ｜ 哦哦——不愧是老大！
- #We didn't, did we, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #我们来时的路上没有看到它呢，对吧，{NICKNAME}？
- Aimed Shot|{param7:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param7:F1P}
- Albedo's Starsilver Ore ｜ 阿贝多的星银矿石
- We have a long journey ahead. Let's stop wasting time and get moving. ｜ 前面的路还很长，没时间耽搁了，继续前进吧。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Spiritbreath Thorn Interval|{param6:F1}s ｜ 灵息之刺冷却间隔|{param6:F1}秒
- I am sure you have heard from your travels that the study of mechanisms is among the most wondrous arts in this world. With that in mind, I earnestly recommend procuring every last item in this collection. ｜ 您见多识广，最知道机关术本是不传世的奇妙之物，此等藏品，我若是您，必要尽数收下。
- You misunderstand, Citlali... I'm nothing more than a fragment of memory. There's not much I can do. ｜ 茜特菈莉竟然没有想明白啊…现在的我只是一个记忆碎片，恐怕无能为力呢。
- "Well, but with the knowledge that lifeguards need to rest as well — for safety reasons, you understand! Thanks for your cooperation." ｜ 「但救生员也是要休息的，为了安全考虑，还请各位见谅！」
- The Hero Twice-Returned! ｜ 英雄，二度归来！
- The deadline is looming... I'm counting on you. ｜ 截稿期马上就到了，那就拜托你了哦，「老师」。
- Um... But Paimon can't swim, what if Paimon accidentally falls into the water... ｜ 欸？可…可我不会游泳，万一飞太快掉到水里…
- It's alright, you two did a lot today. Care to join me for a cup of tea? ｜ 没关系，两位小姐今天也辛苦了，要一起喝杯茶吗？
- You meet two children playing at the Fleuve Cendre... ｜ 在「灰河」之中，你遇见了两位似乎正在做游戏的小孩…
- The House of the Hearth has been investigating this for a very long time, trying to uncover its mysteries... ｜ 很久以前，壁炉之家就一直在调查这件事，想要揭露其中的秘密…
- You look confused. Listen, I'll tell you where the nearest deposits are. ｜ 这样吧，看你迷迷糊糊的，我把附近铁块比较多的地方告诉你。
- I'm just saving time, Kimosi. This is hardly the moment for storytelling — we're right in the middle of investigating the recent thefts at the Tephric Ruins. ｜ 省点时间吧，基莫西，现在可不是讲故事的时候，我们本来是来调查「喷发遗迹」最近的失窃案件。
- Go to the rehearsal location ｜ 前往排练场地
- Allow Paste ｜ 允许粘贴
- "Akitsu Harpastum: Dreams Doubled" ｜ 「秋津羽球二重梦」
- This is farewell then. I hope we'll meet again! ｜ 哈哈，我们就此别过，希望下次还有机会相见！
- Complete Extreme Difficulty ｜ 达成极限难度
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- "Draw near to good and shun evil."\nThis is a secret treasure of Byakuyakoku, able to store light and disperse darkness. ｜ 「亲睦好事物，疏远恶事物」。\n此物是白夜国的秘宝，可以收纳明光，驱散黑雾。
- Ley Line Monolith's Remaining HP not less than <color=#f39001>{0}</color>% ｜ 地脉镇石剩余耐久度不低于<color=#f39001>{0}</color>%
- That's gotta be the volcano's mouth, right? What a view... ｜ 那里就是火山口…还挺壮观的呢。
- Soloist's Solicitation ｜ 独舞之邀
- Switching gears. ｜ 需要调整。
- The limit to one's power is self-destruction. Answer me. Why do you persist? ｜ 力量的尽头，是自我毁灭。回答我，为何如此执着呢？
- Ororon? Well... He was left at the side of the road as an infant and the people of the tribe took him in. You could say that everyone had a hand in raising him. ｜ 欧洛伦？他啊…是被丢在路边的弃婴。部族里的人捡他回来，所有人一起照料。他算是吃百家饭长大的孩子。
- (*sigh* Man, these city folks have no sense of vigilance.) ｜ （这些城里人的警戒性可太差了。）
- Camera has been adjusted to the correct angle ｜ 已经将镜头转至正确角度
- I bet old Colin had the underpants scammed off of him. If you ask me, he's long gone. ｜ 老科林怕是底裤都被人骗走了吧。要我看是不可能找到他咯。
- Haha, okay, I'll leave Shinobu to you then. Boys, we've got some apologies to make! ｜ 哈哈，那阿忍那边就交给你了。弟兄们，我们去道歉了！哈哈哈——
- Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle ｜ 胜利时，角色被击倒次数小于2
- Hah, we could all starve, and those nobles in the palace wouldn't even break a sweat. ｜ 哈，再怎么也饿不到那群管事的王公贵族头上。
- I'm sorry. I was busy with my fish stall, so if there was, I didn't notice. ｜ 抱歉，我忙着打理鱼摊，没怎么注意。
- And mother will be watching over us, too. ｜ 母亲…也一定会保佑我们。
- Yeah! As long as you put in the work, you'll do great, I know it! That's how it is for all of us. ｜ 对对，只要愿意花点力气，绝对没问题！我们每个人都是这么过来的。
- Are you here for the limited-edition festival wine, too? Let's drink together. Come, come, have a seat! ｜ 你也是为了节日限定美酒来的吗？一起喝一杯？来来，坐坐坐。
- Cooling down ｜ 降温
- No one is any the wiser as another day passes in the dream, and so begins another samsara cycle... ｜ 在一无所知中，梦里的一天结束了，一个新的「轮回」便会开始…
- That was quick thinking back there. ｜ 还好你反应得快。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Roll-Roofed Fruit and Vegetable Cart.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「卷棚果蔬舆」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- It's about time to close the serial theft case in Inazuma. ｜ 关于稻妻城内的连环盗窃案，终于要向结案的时刻迈进了。
- Now that the Fortress is a few days into its trial opening, my friend wants to understand whether or not the cats like her toys, but she doesn't really have time, and she doesn't understand cats very well either... ｜ 现在「猫茸茸城堡」试营业好几天了，我的朋友想了解一下，这里的猫猫喜不喜欢她做的玩具，但自己又没时间，也不怎么懂猫…
- You know what? Go for it. ｜ 我支持你，冲啊！
- Opponents' HP increased by an additional 300%. ｜ 怪物的生命值额外提升300%。
- Young people, you say? ｜ 年轻人？
- Oh... Th—Then can we leave? ｜ 啊…那、那我们还能出去吗？
- Uh... I'm really not sure, sorry. What I've heard is that the people around Mt. Tianheng have some sort of magic trick that can pinpoint the location of the stuff. ｜ 呃…我也不清楚。听说天衡山一带的人知道某种秘法，能锁定秘华石的位置。
- About Hot Springs ｜ 关于温泉…
- Message ｜ 留言
- (I think something's definitely up with Dakan Al-Ahmar.) ｜ （总觉得「阿赫玛尔之须」这件事很蹊跷。）
- Ooh, it's so pretty! ｜ 哇啊，好漂亮的贝壳！
- What, you too? Alright, fine... let's focus on the matter at hand. ｜ 竟然连你也这么觉得…好吧，那就先办正事。
- Chapter III: Act V ｜ 第三章 第五幕
- Oh, it wasn't just the two of us. Just now— ｜ 也不光是我们啦，其实刚刚——

- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Item cannot be used. Max Original Resin limit reached. ｜ 原粹树脂已达存储上限，无法使用道具
- Ask-Me-For-Directions Arnold. ｜ 我是「渴望被问路的阿诺德」。
- Tell me about wine. ｜ 关于酒。
- You can keep chatting with your friends nearby. I think I'll stay here for now... and watch over them. ｜ 你可以和附近的朋友们再聊聊。我还会在这里，看看他们。
- Please be careful. ｜ 也请你务必保重。
- Feather of Jagged Peaks ｜ 嵯峨群峰之翼
- Another group... and the other Fatui working alongside them, huh? ｜ 另外一组…还有和他们一起行动的愚人众啊…
- A key that you found near the mysterious plant. This may be used to open a certain door in a high-up location within Xinyan's Mirage. ｜ 在奇妙的植物附近找到的钥匙，应该可以用来开启辛焱幻境中某扇位于高处的门扉。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Pine Street Light.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「野外松木路灯」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Do be careful! ｜ 路上小心！
- It would be a nice place to set sail from... or take off from... ｜ 从这里出海…起飞的话，应该还挺有氛围的…
- Shield DMG Absorption|{param2:F1P} Max HP+{param3:I} ｜ 护盾吸收量|{param2:F1P}生命值上限+{param3:I}
- Initial number of uses in a single stage ｜ 初始单局可使用次数
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Why not wolves? Many a tale has wolves in it, and even the compendium personally burned by Madame Mage had a wolf character! ｜ 为什么不能是狼呢？很多故事里都有狼呀，就连魔女小姐亲自销毁的设定集里也有狼的角色呢！
- About Qiaoying Village... ｜ 关于翘英庄…
- In this time, there is little peace to be found anywhere, and the young people of the village are busying themselves elsewhere. Seeing you youngsters come here does warm the cockles of this old heart. ｜ 这阵子到处都不太平，村里的年轻人大多还在外面忙活计。能看到有年轻人来，我这老婆子还是挺开心的。
- I've been alright, thank you. You're looking very well, Sir. I'm glad to see it. ｜ 还不错，您看着也很有精神，真是太好了。
- We were taking care of some errands in Liyue and the boss got tangled up with some Millelith while we were standing in a line... He was about to get arrested when, luckily, Yanfei happened to be walking past and helped us out. ｜ 我们到璃月港办事，老大排队时跟千岩军士兵起了冲突，险些被拘捕，幸亏烟绯小姐路过出手相助。
- Prior to the competition, the judges reviewed both contestants, and we can comfortably confirm that neither side is participating in a way that contravenes the competition rules. ｜ 本届决赛开始前，组委会已对两位参赛人员进行调查，可以确定双方的参赛形式及行为并不违规。
- ...The way I did things wasn't optimal, but I wouldn't have been comfortable not doing it, either. My conscience would've weighed on me. ｜ …做法确实不妥，但不这样做，我总觉得不太舒服，心里隐约有种负罪感。所以…
- Attain {param0} Festive Fever ｜ 节庆热度达到{param0}
- #<color=#D3BC8EFF>Battle Pass Type</color>\nSojourner's Battle Pass is unlocked by default at the start of each period. In order to receive more precious rewards, Travelers can unlock the Gnostic Hymn by purchasing Gnostic Hymn or Gnostic Chorus. Daily missions are updated each day at 4:00 AM, and weekly missions are updated each Monday at 4:00 AM ({TIMEZONE}).\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>BP Level</color>\nComplete BP Missions to gain Battle Pass EP (BEP). BEP increases your BP Level, which brings rich rewards. \n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>BEP Limit</color>\nFor this BP Period, BP Missions will stop providing BEP after you reach the maximum BP Level.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Notes</color>\n1. If due to exceptional circumstances a repeat purchase of Gnostic Hymn or Gnostic Chorus is made, no further BEP will be awarded. Instead, you will receive either 750 or 1,410 Genesis Crystals, the quantity being equivalent to the sum spent.\n2. Likewise, you will receive 860 Genesis Crystals in the event of a repeat purchase of Travel Notes. ｜ #<color=#D3BC8EFF>【纪行类别】</color>\n每期纪行中，大地纪行默认解锁获取，旅行者还可通过兑换珍珠纪行或珍珠之歌，解锁珍珠纪行，获取更丰厚的奖励。每日任务将在凌晨4点刷新，每周任务将在每周一凌晨4点刷新【{TIMEZONE}】 \n \n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【纪行等级】</color>\n旅行者可通过完成纪行任务，来获取纪行经验，提高纪行等级，获取丰厚的奖励。 \n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【纪行经验上限】</color>\n本期纪行内，到达等级上限后，将不能够通过纪行任务获取经验。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【特殊说明】</color>\n1.如因特殊情况导致重复购买珍珠纪行或珍珠之歌时，纪行经验将无法进行累加，并将直接返还对应购买价格的750或1410创世结晶。\n2.同时若因特殊情况导致重复购买纪行成歌时，将直接返还860创世结晶。
- My apologies, I didn't mean to be rude. I'm sure a great hero like yourself would have no reason to lie. Now, could I ask you to provide a few claims to fame? ｜ 抱歉，无意冒犯，我相信大英雄是不会说谎的。那，能请你报上一些荣誉吗？
- Give five White Iron Chunks to Dwarkanath ｜ 将五个白铁块交给妲卡玛忒
- Paimon can't figure out if he's brave or cowardly... ｜ 真不知道他到底是胆大还是胆小…
- Opening Treasure Chest: I ｜ 打开宝箱·其一
- People often romanticize perfume, assigning it all sorts of poetic qualities. But, in reality, perfume-making is much closer to a science. It can be boiled down to a simple chemistry experiment, really. It's up to the perfumer to bridge the gap between the product's artistic and scientific qualities, and doing that with any degree of success takes quite a bit of skill. ｜ 人们常为香水赋上浪漫与诗意，但实际的调制过程却与科学紧密相关，本质上和化学试验并无二致。如何做好这二者间的桥梁，就要看调香师的本事了。
- Hmm? What do you mean? ｜ 有问题，这朵花会有什么问题？
- Oh no! It's... Hey, you! Stop, don't go any further...! ｜ 啊！那边是…喂！不要再向前走了——
- Hahaha, these books are actually pretty good. I bet the boys in the gang would enjoy reading 'em, too. ｜ 哈哈哈，这里的书真有意思，有机会我一定要带荒泷派的弟兄们来看一看。
- #Wh-What!? {NICKNAME}, it was Babel all along! She fooled us all! ｜ #什…什么…？！{NICKNAME}，是芭别尔！我们都被她耍了！
- It's just... I'm not very good at this kind of thing. No matter what I do, it always ends up looking weird. ｜ 只是…我并不是很会做这种东西，怎么做都感觉怪怪的。
- A transit point for moving goods from place to place. Beside the piled-high cargo crates and wooden barrels are drinks for the workers.\nThough typical porcelain bottles and jugs are quite sturdy these days, they will still break easily under a heavy load. Thus, the workers wish that their foreman would get a cupboard of some sort, rather than leave the bottles on the ground. ｜ 运输货物的中转地，堆叠的货箱和木桶旁，摆放着为工人准备的饮品。\n虽说如今流通的陶制瓶罐都很结实，但被重物碾压磕碰，还是很容易破碎，因此工人们一直希望管理者准备一个橱柜，而不是将瓶罐放在地上。
- Play to your heart's content, and when you're ready to focus, come back and study hard. ｜ 玩的时候便好好玩个痛快，之后再收了心，回来好好学习。
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- I know that Uncle Ramsay has been staying at the Komore Teahouse. I wanted to go find him. But the gatekeeper, Sister Kozue, wouldn't let me in because I'm a kid... ｜ 我知道拉姆齐叔叔一直待在木漏茶室里，就想直接去找他。但看门的梢姐姐不许我这种小孩子进去…

- Scholars are fond of it, but as you can see, there aren't many scholars still studying around these parts. No seller would be able to make a profit here. ｜ 熏香通常是学者的爱用品，可你们也看到了，附近根本没有几个正常学者，那东西卖不出好价钱。

- As the giant rock serpent swims a few laps in the lava, the flowing liquid Phlogiston inexplicably begins to solidify into stone... ｜ 巨大的石蛇在岩浆里游了几圈，原本流动的液态燃素居然逐渐凝结成了坚固的岩石…

- You're amazing! How did you manage to remember all these little details...? I'm just in awe! ｜ 真不愧是你！居然连这些细节都一清二楚…我好佩服！
- Kaedehara, why did you lead us to this beach? ｜ 枫原，为什么要带我们来这片海边？

- Indeed. A pleasure to see you. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，真是幸会。

- Forgive my forwardness, but I do not think these are places where a child should go... ｜ 恕我冒昧，这些都不是小孩子应该去的地方…

- Restores 30% of Max HP and an additional 600 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的30%，并额外恢复600点生命值。
- Be the first to be eliminated during this match ｜ 在本局游戏中，第一个被淘汰
- Ahem... This is a matter of utmost importance. Please, allow me to explain... ｜ 咳咳…这件事事关重大，劳驾两位先听我说完…
- Aranaga leaves with the flower. ｜ 兰纳迦带着花朵离开了。
- Even if it's not a joke, you shouldn't be so loud... ｜ 就算不是开玩笑，也不要那么大声嘛…
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When the Action Phase Begins:</color> The Pneuma Energy of the character to which this is attached is replenished, and that character changes to be in the "Pneuma State." ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>行动阶段开始时：</color>为所附属的角色补充芒性能源，使其转换为「芒性形态」。
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- On the Evil Spirits' Trail ｜ 继续探寻妖邪线索
- Mini Durin ｜ 小杜林
- What do you think of my daddy's specially chosen hiding place? Pretty well hidden, right? ｜ 怎么样，我爸爸帮我挑的这个位置，很难找吧。
- Whenever I go to the Grand Bazaar, I head straight to the food stalls, grab some snacks and a drink, and then I take my time checking the place out. ｜ 我每次去大巴扎都会先直奔小吃摊，买几样零食饮料，再慢慢吃慢慢逛。
- Farewell, Friend ｜ 再见了伙伴
- (May the Natlan of their day be united as one, free once and for all from bloodshed and strife...) ｜ （希望那时候纳塔已经团结如一，再无流血、再无纷争…）
- Touch ｜ 触摸
- This grid... Are they planning to play tic-tac-toe here or something? ｜ 这个格子…难道它们是打算在这里下棋吗？
- Hey, don't be so mean! It just smelled too good to resist... ｜ 小偷什么的，别说得这么难听嘛！我们只是因为味道太香才…
- An unusual motif that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 奇异的纹样，可用于装饰祝柬。
- It's alright. You'll get there. You just need a bit more practice. ｜ 没关系，尝试多了就会更加熟练的。
- Thanks, but we're not here to drink. ｜ 谢谢啦，我们不是客人。
- Yes, I'm glad too. I didn't expect her to grow up so fast. ｜ 我也很开心，没想到海达长得这么快。
- The operator in charge of test rails is currently away. Test rails will reopen when they return. ｜ 试验场负责人有事暂离，试作轨道将在后续开放。
- #How come you're so hyped all of a sudden, {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}? Anyone'd think you were a film buff yourself, chiming in like that! ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}怎么这么高兴，你附和他做什么呀？你也喜欢映影吗？
- Hey, hold on! Before you go around trying to collect payments, why don't you settle your own debts first? ｜ 喂喂，忙着收债之前，要不要先好好把自家的账算清楚了。
- A special combat training session prepared by the Adventurers' Guild. They say that you can use Lures to attract a great many opponents to the scene.\nLures mounted inside camps will start in a state of "Source Cold," which will cause it to buff nearby opponents at fixed intervals and increase the rate at which Sheer Cold will accumulate on your characters.\nYou might be able to change a Lure's state if you can find Scarlet Quartz and activate certain mechanisms nearby... ｜ 冒险家协会精心准备的战斗特训。据说只要启动「诱饵装置」，就会有很多敌人被吸引而来。\n营地中的「诱饵装置」初始会处于「寒源」状态，在间歇性使周围的敌人获得增幅效果的同时，还会提高角色身上「严寒」的累积速度。\n如果能找到「深赤之石」，或许就能启动周围的机关，并转变「诱饵装置」的状态…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Paimon still doesn't get it, but we should probably take this stuff with us in case we need it later. ｜ 虽然还是完全看不懂，但之后说不定会在什么地方用上，还是先带在身上吧？
- Aww, you won... But that's okay! Just wait until I come up with an even harder challenge! ｜ 呜…虽然被破解了，但是没关系，我以后肯定能想出更难的！
- Humans and Saurians, one heart and one mind! ｜ 人与龙，心意相通！
- That's right, we can do that! You're so smart, Ms. Paimon. Let me go feed the cat right now! ｜ 对哦，可以这样！派蒙姐姐真聪明，我现在就去喂猫猫。
- The Akademiya is probably the true target of their hatred. ｜ 比起草神，更讨厌教令院势力吧。
- The storm in Liyue Harbor has passed, and all aspects of life within the city are slowly undergoing changes... For Ivanovich, this means working hard to adapt to said changes... ｜ 在璃月港的风波过去后，城里的一切事情似乎都在慢慢发生变化…而伊凡诺维奇先生，正在努力让自己适应这种变化…
- Right! I—I'll show them what I'm made of! ｜ 嗯，我一定会好好表现，让他们见、见识一下我的厉害！
- Message ｜ 留言
- The heavy snow banks sometimes conceal unexpected treasure... ｜ 雪堆下，有时也会藏着意外的小小宝藏…
- Yup, I'll see you too! ｜ 嗯，那就再见了！
- Still, it could take a long time for those who suffered to forgive Dvalin. And who knows whether they can forgive him fully... ｜ 不过，那些受灾民众，不知道会在什么时候原谅…又会原谅它到什么程度呢…？
- Zuria... ｜ 祖莉亚夫人…
- Eh, it wasn't that bad. It's just some kite-making materials. Plus, we didn't have to walk very far. ｜ 还好啦。都是些扎风筝的材料，总共也就没几步路。
- It is said that some wandering tribes will adopt or plunder young children and raise them into Falcons who are devoted to the elders.\nOnly a handful of them can eventually be favored by the tribal leaders. ｜ 据说一些流浪氏族会收养或劫掠幼童，将之培育成专门忠于长老的「猎鹰」。\n他们中的极少数人，最终能够成为部族首领的宠儿。
- This never-ending stalemate, the ambitions of our lords, the despair of the common folk, the hatred welling up from the innocent victims, the charnel-sick of vulneraries filling the rooms of dying old people... ｜ 停滞的战争、大人们的欲望、小人物的绝望、无辜受难者的憎恨，老人临终时弥漫满屋的药剂气味…
- I do not know if I have family, or where my hometown is. There is nowhere for me to go but here. ｜ 我不知道自己有没有家人，故乡何方，除了此地我无处可去。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- <color=#FFACFFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}Electro Application</color> ｜ <color=#FFACFFFF>附着{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}雷元素</color>
- But if I can simulate the atmosphere of an exam, then I can learn how to cope with it. ｜ 如果能习惯考试的氛围…也就能冷静下来好好应对了吧。
- This was left behind by one of The Yakshas. ｜ 留下这段话的人，是「仙众夜叉」里的一员呢。
- Any second now, we'll be face to face with her... ｜ 马上就要再次见到那个女人了…
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- They're even taking care of the crops... Are they simply mirroring the elemental life-forms' behaviors? ｜ 它们居然知道应该怎么照料农田…可能只是在有样学样吧。
- That Water Droplet looks so lonely. Let's go comfort it if we get a chance! ｜ 那个「小水珠」也好孤单，有机会的话，我们去慰问一下它吧！
- Have other people made any donations to the repair works? ｜ 有其他人捐物资来修庙吗？
- Oh, really? ...Well, he must be tired from treating me for two nights in a row. ｜ 这样吗…也是，这都让白先生操劳两夜了。
- Meng (Memory) ｜ 回忆中的老孟
- I have a friend who's very skilled at making handicrafts, and used to make all kinds of toys for kitties and doggies. Many of the furnishings at The Cat's Tail were made by her! ｜ 我有个很擅长手工艺品的朋友，以前就会为猫猫狗狗做各种宠物玩具。猫尾酒馆的一些陈设，就是她制作的。

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁
- I used to use my rest time to review documents, but... that was when we were at war. ｜ 虽然我以前会利用休息时间批阅文书，但…那也是战斗迫在眉睫的情况。
- Um, Paimon heard you mention that he committed a "little crime." ｜ 你们刚刚说…「犯事」？
- Hahaha... It will! You will just have to come and listen to the next chapter... and then the one after that... ｜ 哈哈，您想听下回分解，那您得常来。
- Hmm... ｜ 嗯…
- I really like that bard... He's a very talented performer, and his melodies always seem to make me feel at home. If I had to pick a tune that best represents Mondstadt, it'd definitely be one of his. It's too bad that I'm not often in the city, otherwise, I could bring him some gifts every day... ｜ 好喜欢那位吟游诗人，他是演奏乐器的强者，他的曲调总让我有种回到家里的亲切感。如果要选出最能代表蒙德的曲子，我一定投他的作品一票。可惜我平常待在城里的时间不多，不然就可以每天送他一些礼物了。
- I've got something else on, so I'll be back later. ｜ 还有别的事，之后再来。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param11:P}/{param12:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param11:P}/{param12:P}
- ...Hey! Wh—What's wrong...? Say something!!! ｜ …喂！你、你怎么了…说话啊！
- *sigh* ...You know what, Traveler? Since you're here, why don't you be the judge? ｜ 真是…旅行者，既然你在这里，不如就由你来判断一下这件事吧。
- Help Hatim select a Golden Dish ｜ 帮哈特姆选择一份「吞金料理」
- Of course! Wait, did you not see one? Oh no, I must've forgotten to bring it... ｜ 当然有说明书了。咦？你没发现说明书吗？糟了糟了，我是不是忘记带了。
- Which means that it can make more than just building materials, but pottery and many other things as well! ｜ 换句话说，不只是建筑材料，它还能用来做陶器，还有许多其他东西！
- Yay! Rewards! ｜ 好耶，报酬！
- Ohh, so that's why you asked to come along when Aarav briefed you on the situation! ｜ 原来是这样！所以阿拉夫跟你汇报的时候，你才提出要跟来看看！
- Get ready. It's time to go. ｜ 打起精神，该出发了。
- Sure. ｜ 好。
- Imagine, you'll be able to eat and drink whatever you please, just as if Yujing Terrace was your very own kitchen! ｜ 从此以后吃香的、喝辣的，就算是搬到玉京台也是指日可待！
- Nara Avin has not completely remembered. Memories and dreams are both necessary. ｜ 那菈艾文还没有完全想起来，回忆与梦想，都不可或缺。

- So I found a cave for her. Before she left, I even installed a door there that could be closed whenever she wanted undisturbed sleep! ｜ 所以我给她找到了那个洞窟，她离开之前，我还给那个山洞安装了机关门，随时可以关上门安心睡觉！

- Xiao, you there? ｜ 魈，你在吗？
- Indeed. ｜ 嗯。
- Bah, there's gotta be a limit to how rude you can be! What's with this "I'll wait for you at Domus Aurea, mwahaha!" nonsense when you won't even leave the door open, huh!? ｜ 哇，没礼貌就是没礼貌，还装模作样地说什么「我在黄金宫殿等你」…结果连门都没给我们留！

- Easy peasy! White Fur, dumb. ｜ 简单，白毛，笨。
- And the method to solve its riddle is the same? Then there must be some link between these two sundials, and the two places they are located in. ｜ 而且，连解谜的方式都一模一样。这两座日晷，还有这两个地方，一定有着某种联系…
