- I'm here for information about a specific individual. ｜ 我来打听一个人。
- Should I drink more Primordial Seawater? ｜ 我再喝点胎海水？
- Did that ring a bell, Sudabeh? ｜ 怎么样，素达蓓想到什么了吗？
- ...The Fravashi Trees are no doors. You'll disturb the residual Pari residing within if you simply barge through them. ｜ …这些「灵谷木」可不是什么门扉，若是冒冒失失地穿过去的话，可是会打扰到寄宿在其中的残灵的。
- Maybe we need to use the tower controller? ｜ 是不是需要用到那个虚界塔的控制器啊？
- Played by Sasano ｜ 笹野饰
- The Chasm is a dangerous place for ordinary people. Plants and fungi growing here could also be harmful to the human body. That's why Huishan Hall has set strict rules against eating these things. ｜ 层岩巨渊下面的环境对于普通人来说很是凶险，生长的菌类和植物说不定也对人有害，所以辉山厅是严禁矿工进食那些东西的。
- I'm alright, really... The air down here is just kinda thin, which doesn't sit too well with me. ｜ 没事啦，没事…只是地下的空气比较稀薄，有点水土不服而已。
- Check the exam requirements... ｜ 查看考核要求。
- Weapon forging material. Can be used to forge 4-star bows.\nIn terms of the "state" of the many weapons that can be crafted from billets, while their potential has long been contained within the original materials, the exact forms these weapons will ultimately take remain unknown to this day... ｜ 生产武器的原材料。通过锻造，可以生产出4星的弓。\n原胚所能打造而出的诸多武器的「事态」，其结果的「可能」虽然早已包含在了原物之中，但是最终能被制成怎样的形制，仍是现在无人知晓之事…
- The copies of The Steambird I've left here are already piling up. You know him, do you? ｜ 我这儿已经堆了好几份他订的蒸汽鸟报了，你们认识他是吧？
- Our God King believed that it was because human souls could not escape the gravity of fate, and so he wrote the "Symphony," a music that could weave destiny. ｜ 神王认为那是因为人们的灵魂还不能逃脱命运的桎梏，因此他才谱写出了能够编织命运的「乐章」。
- So... You're blast fishing? ｜ 这不就是炸鱼吗？
- Synopsis (Shots 1 to 4):\nOpen with <color=#e5870a>Guoba greeting customers out front</color>, followed by <color=#e5870a>Chef Mao's</color> sales pitch, which promotes Wanmin Restaurant's <color=#e5870a>location, mouthwateringly delicious dishes, and excellent service standards</color>. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第4镜）：\n由<color=#e5870a>锅巴在店门前打招呼</color>作为开场，后接<color=#e5870a>卯师傅</color>的打油诗，以宣传万民堂的<color=#e5870a>位置、菜品质量与服务水平</color>。

- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Iridescent Arataki Rockin' for Life Tour de Force of Awesomeness" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「荒泷生命摇滚虹色大巡回」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for setting up a "Lone and Cautious Adventurer."\nAdventurers who travel solo tend to be rather conscientious, setting up camp near to road signs as these are places where others tend to have traveled before, chasing the nearby monsters off.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「孤独而谨慎的冒险家」的放置方法。\n独自远游的冒险家大多相当谨慎，会在路标附近宿营，因为路标代表此地曾有前人探索，并将附近的魔物驱离。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。

- Never judge a squirrel by its appearance... ｜ 真是鼠不可貌相…

- Yeah, what the heck was that? ｜ 是啊！怎么回事儿！

- A rare and valuable butterflyfish variant from Liyue. At present, it can only be found near water bodies around the abodes of the adepti. Its pale white lines are very striking, and it has greater longevity than other members of the species and is thus regarded to be a lucky fish blessed by the adepti.\nMost people from Liyue will refuse to eat this fish on principle, given the common respect for the adepti, but some fear no such superstition and claim that eating these fish can help one extend one's years. ｜ 生活在璃月的珍稀蝶鱼，如今只在仙家之所附近的水域中出没，体表的妃白色纹路轻逸出尘，相较于其他同类而言，寿命也更为悠长，因此又被认为是受仙人恩赐的祥瑞之鱼。\n出于敬仙的朴素观念，多数璃月人拒绝食用这种蝶鱼，但也有不信邪的少数派坚信吃了它们可以延年益寿。
- But since you're here, Traveler, may I ask you to help me take some pictures? ｜ 现在正好你来了，旅行者，能请你帮我留个影吗？
- Try Fungus Mechanicus ｜ 试玩「灵蕈棋阵」

- There! Looks like something's... crawling out!? ｜ 看那里！好像有什么东西…在不停地钻出来。
- Rumor has it that people who've ascended to Celestia have also witnessed the same helix-shaped divine ladder that can be seen within Visions. Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。
- To say hello, and help while we're at it. ｜ 打个招呼，顺便帮个忙。

- May the God of Anemo protect you. ｜ 愿风神护佑你。
- So, you two know each other then? ｜ 原来你们之间认识吗？
- (Hmm... They're definitely up to something.) ｜ （唔…好在意…）

- Oh, you mean like a ruins tour with treasure-hunting sessions? You're in the wrong place for that. This might seem like a ruin but... Well, actually, it is a ruin. ｜ 哦，你们是说会安排一些寻宝环节的废墟旅游？那你们可找错地方了，这里虽然看起来像废墟…不，实际上也是废墟吧。

- An ancient Natlan dish. Traditionally, the ingredients are wrapped in large leaves and steam-baked in a pit using red-hot stones. When billows of steam begin to rise like clouds, this Natlan delicacy, perfect for sharing with larger groups, is ready to serve. ｜ 古老的纳塔菜肴。最为传统的做法是，在土坑中用炙热滚烫的石块闷熟被大片叶子包裹的食材。看见大片蒸汽如烟云一般升腾后，一道可供多人共享的纳塔美食便完成了。
- Simply put, a recent star observation by researchers from the Akademiya led to the discovery that the northern skies have become blocked by a strange, heretofore unseen phenomenon. ｜ 简单来说呢，教令院的学者在最近一次的星象观测中，发现北方的天空被未曾见过的奇异天象遮蔽了。
- If you ever had to face her, my only advice would be... Your life is worth more than victory in a duel. ｜ 面对那位大人，我只能建议您…不必把决斗的胜负看得比性命还重。
- Obtain a score of {param3} in Show of Force ｜ 在「小试锋芒」中获得{param3}评分
- Ugh, Paimon can't think of a good comeback... Alright, it's all on Alhaitham if things go south. ｜ 唔…我竟然不知道该怎么反驳…好吧，反正要是出了情况，就交给艾尔海森应付了。
- My doubt and helpless anger pushed me forward until I got what I deserved. ｜ 被怀疑与无从施放的愤怒推着往前，通向了罪有应得的结局。
- Thank you. May both our journeys prove meaningful. ｜ 谢谢，希望我们各自的旅途都能寻到意义。
- *sigh* You might be right... I should go back and gather more people to help with the search. ｜ 唔…你这么说倒也有点道理，我确实得回去找点人…

- I hereby inscribe my mind's greatest perplexion onto this monument. O, reader in the far-flung future, will you be the one to resolve this riddle? ｜ 我将心中疑问刻于碑上，不知道后世观此碑者，能否为我解惑？

- "Can a game like this really contain the secrets of the art of war, like the Lady Guuji says it does? ... - Then wait for me! I can make a lot of bombs really fast because I already prepared the materials! ｜ 那你等等我哦，我马上就可以做出好多炸弹，原材料早就准备好啦！

- Sorry, I didn't see anything... In fact, I didn't know about it until I was woken up by the sound of Mr. Kanbei's roaring... ｜ 抱歉，我什么也没看见…被勘兵卫先生怒吼的声音吵醒之后，我才知道这件事…
- *sigh* I'll keep waiting for you here then. ｜ 就是说嘛，那我继续等你们咯。
- I don't want to become an adult... Not like this. ｜ 就这么变成大人，我不要啊。
- After she finishes speaking, Chiori turns and leaves... ｜ 千织说完之后，转身离开…
- That way, you won't need to relocate the injured. I'll just treat them here. ｜ 发生意外的时候，不用转移伤员，这里就能作为第一救治现场。
- That child has asked someone to come ask us for news practically every day... ｜ 那孩子，每天都要拜托人从我这里打听消息…

- During my days as a wanderer, if I came upon a beautiful view and was feeling in a poetic mood, I'd stop to compose a few lines. ｜ 之前漂泊途中，路遇美景时，若是我起了诗兴，也会偶得佳句。

- The stone slates in the ruin showing the prophecy describe a "history of the future." Fontainians will eventually be dissolved into the sea, and the Hydro Archon will sit alone on her throne and weep.</color> ｜ 遗迹中的预言石板，描述了枫丹「未来的历史」。其中的第四块。\n<color=#759BA7>上面的内容和枫丹一直流传的预言基本一致，枫丹人最终会溶解在海里，水神自己在神座上哭泣。</color>
- Although things are the way they are now... there must've been a point to their establishment, right? Otherwise Zurvan wouldn't have helped them and you wouldn't have been drawn to them. ｜ 虽然现在是这副模样…但是建立之初一定还是有可取之处的吧？否则祖尔宛也不会帮助他们，斯露莎也不会被他们所吸引了。
- C'mon, knock it off. ｜ 好啦，你就别揭我短啦。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge {0}: Foothold Hunt</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Rules</color>\n1. During the challenge, collect <color=#FFCC33FF>Adventure Coins</color> to score 1 point, and collect <color=#FFCC33FF>Large Adventure Coins</color> to score 5 points. Reach the target score to complete the challenge.\n2. The <color=#FFCC33FF>Floating Tiles</color> will collapse rapidly upon being stepped on.\n3. Use the portal at the bottom to quickly return to the top.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color>\nAlhaitham\n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 稳固落点搜寻术</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.挑战中拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>冒险币</color>时获得1分，拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>大型冒险币</color>时获得5分，达到目标积分时挑战成功。\n2.<color=#FFCC33FF>「空悬石板」</color>被踩踏后会快速崩塌。\n3.通过底部的传送门可以快速回到顶部。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n艾尔海森\n\n\n
- Hmph... In terms of the result, yes. ｜ 哼…从结果来说，确实如此。
- It's been a while since we visited Poisson. Maybe we should head over and have a look around? ｜ 有段时间没去白淞镇了，今天我们到那里逛一逛吧？
- If one lands in a <color=#00E1FFFF>field</color>, no one dares to go and harvest the crops, and if one lands <color=#00E1FFFF>at the entrance</color>, access is a complete nightmare. ｜ 落在<color=#00E1FFFF>田里</color>，谁都不敢去收粮食，落在<color=#00E1FFFF>大门口</color>，进出又成了问题。
- But, at one point in time, Natlan's Ley Lines were decimated. Even after reconstruction, the rules needed for the Ode of Resurrection made it impossible to reconnect the Ley Lines to other nations. ｜ 然而纳塔的地脉曾经毁坏过一次，夜神之国重建之后，因为要创造「还魂诗」的规则，也没有重新与其他国家连通。
- The fungal beasts proliferated in frightening numbers outside, and even the tranquil ruins would also become fertile soil for them.\nDestroy the monsters within to obtain materials with which to enhance your equipment. ｜ 外界蕈兽大量增殖，原本平静的古遗迹中也成为了孢子的沃土。\n消灭其中的魔物，或许能获得强化装备的物质吧。
- That said, the Knights of Favonius must be pleased to have found someone like this... Anyway — can I get you a drink? ｜ 不过，能和这种怪物战斗，他一定很受骑士团器重了吧…对了，客人，你要喝一杯吗？
- ...Well, let us go down together, then. ｜ …那我们就一起下去看看吧。
- Hmm. Speaking of that, how do the Melusines of Merusea Village trade with merchants from outside? Paimon doesn't think normal merchants would be any good at diving... ｜ 唔，这么说来，住在海沫村里的美露莘们，平时是怎么和外面的商人贸易的呢？一般的商人应该也不会潜水…
- When a character's attack hits an opponent, a "Shockwave Blast" will be unleashed at the position of the attack, dealing True DMG to nearby opponents. "Shockwave Blasts" can be triggered on each opponent once every 2s. ｜ 当角色的攻击命中敌人时，将在命中的位置释放一次「震爆冲击」，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害。每名敌人每2秒只能被触发一次「震爆冲击」。

- Atocpan ｜ 安饶之野

- So, other than teaching materials for children... ｜ 除了儿童用的识字教材…
- Huh, that so? ...Y'know what, judging by your appearance, and how you acquitted yourself back there, you do seem to be an experienced adventurer. ｜ 是吗？看您的模样，和刚才的身手，确实也像是一位经验丰富的冒险家。
- The feather of an exotic bird rarely seen on this continent. ｜ 异国的奇妙鸟类的羽毛，在这片大陆上非常罕见。
- What do we need to do? ｜ 那要怎么帮忙？
- Ere the End, a Glance Back ｜ 穷途望归路
- Huh, I didn't even know there was such a thing. I never would've guessed. Ahem, what I'm trying to say is that we didn't report Alkami because we thought we could make some Mora off of it. ｜ 还有奖金？太意外了。呃…我的意思是，我们本来也不是为了奖金才举报阿尔卡米的。
- I never expected this White Flying Mushroom could be so smart! Thank... ｜ 没想到你这个白色飞蘑菇还挺机灵！谢…
- It's fine. Maybe we'll meet again in Romaritime Harbor. We can always play then. ｜ 没关系，说不定以后我们还能在海露港再见呢，到时候再来玩牌也不迟。
- She has a different color in each eye. You'll know at the sight of her. ｜ 那位姐姐的两只眼睛颜色不一样，你一见到就能认出来啦。
- Ugh, I failed again... But wait... What's gotten into Chongyun? He's been so quiet up until now... ｜ 哈，又失败了。但怎么感觉重云话变多了…
- Hmph! Looks like someone is only half-blind. ｜ 哼哼，算你有点眼力见。

- Battle reports indicate that the crisis in this area has been resolved by Nusta and her team. Let us hope everything has gone well. ｜ 战报显示，此地的危机已由努斯妲和她的小队前往解决，希望一切顺利。
- Tang Wuchou currently believes himself to be a great hero of the Guhua Clan, and spends his days behaving all crazy and stuff. ｜ 唐无仇现在以为自己是古华派的大侠，每天疯疯癫癫的。

- The Vision Hunt Decree has brought pain and suffering to many people. It's no surprise that after the Tatarasuna workers provided refuge to people bearing Visions, they'd have grievances against the Shogunate. ｜ 毕竟眼狩令让那么多人受苦，踏鞴砂工人们也曾经庇护了不少神之眼的持有者，自然对幕府多有怨言。
- Increases Movement SPD by 10%. When in battle, gain a <color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color> Elemental DMG Bonus every 4s. Max 4 stacks. Lasts until the character falls or leaves combat. ｜ 移动速度提高10%；在场上每4秒获得<color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color>元素伤害加成。该效果最多叠加4层，持续直到角色倒下或离场。

- Arama! We're back! How are you feeling? ｜ 兰罗摩！我们回来啦，你状况如何？

- You see, we're extremely intrigued by the practice of diving. Fontaine's waters are full of priceless treasures, left by nature and our ancestors alike. ｜ 您瞧，我们对「潜水」非常感兴趣，非常感兴趣。我们枫丹的水下充满了数之不尽的财富，无论是自然的还是前人留下的。

- Vissudha Field ｜ 二净甸
- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> On the way back to Mondstadt after rescuing Dvalin...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> We finally got to see one of the Seven Archons, didn't we? It was interesting to see what kind of god he was.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hmm... Haven't we known Venti for quite a while now?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> As Venti, yes... But still, this was the first time that we got to see him as the Anemo Archon, Barbatos.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Normally, he hides his true divinity behind the facade of a bard.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> "What does freedom really mean, when demanded of you by a god?"\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> That was the question that he asked Dvalin... I'm still contemplating that... you know? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我们救回特瓦林之后，在回蒙德的路上…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>第一次见到了「尘世七执政」的面目呢。原来是这样的神…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯？我们认识温迪，不是已经很久了吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我是指…他作为风神巴巴托斯的那一面。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>在吟游诗人的躯壳之下，藏着真实的神灵。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「被自由之神命令的自由，还能称之为自由吗？」\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>他问特瓦林的这个问题，我也还在思考答案…

- "May all the world be at peace." ｜ 「万世安泰，天下太平。」
- Originally designed to hold drinking water, this cup was stained black after a scholar used it to wash their paint brushes. ｜ 原本是饮水用的容器，因为常用来洗笔而被染黑。

- Follow this road and you will come across <color=#00E1FFFF>a tightly shut door</color>, behind that lies the legendary treasure trove! Apparently you only need to sacrifice the souls of <color=#00E1FFFF>100</color> cursed monsters to the watcher of the maze, and then you can just pop open the treasure trove door! ｜ 你只要沿着这条路一直走就会发现<color=#00E1FFFF>一扇紧闭的大门</color>，那之后便是传说中的藏宝库了，据说只要向看守迷宫的神灵献祭<color=#00E1FFFF>100</color>个被诅咒怪物的灵魂，就可以打开藏宝库的大门！$UNRELEASED

- (I'll try going over the stuff Mr. Kaveh taught us once I get back home. I mean, it can't hurt.) ｜ （等放学回家好好学一学卡维老师教的内容，反正又没什么坏处。）

- Ah... Yeah, you're right. By themselves, our resources probably don't feel like much. ｜ 这个…嗯，确实，只凭这些，可能是有点轻飘飘的。

- All I can say is that... our previous hypotheses are being confirmed, one after the other. ｜ 目前只能说…我们之前的假设正在一个接一个被证实。
- Haha! Interesting. But to my eyes, Paimon is just like a little rainbow balloon floating in the air, and her string seems to extend upward, to somewhere above the sky itself... ｜ 哈哈，好有趣。不过在我眼中的派蒙就像只飘在空中的彩虹小气球，而且系着她的线似乎还一直连接到天空之上呢。
- After I introduced her to you, she seemed a little flustered and started walking away. I told her to stop because of the cliff... ｜ 她听我介绍了你们，就有点慌张地往前走，我让她别过去，那边是悬崖…
- The dog runs toward the camp... ｜ 狗往营地的方向跑去了…
- Hmm... I sure can. You're a very brave boy, after all. ｜ 嗯…当然可以，你很勇敢呢。

- Maybe it's a figure of speech. ｜ 是比喻吧。
- In the depths of The Chasm, the yaksha Bosacius and the thaumaturge Boyang once supported each other when all hope seemed to have been lost. Bosacius — overtaken by madness and had forgotten his identity and past — often mistook Boyang for his brothers and sisters in arms. As time elapsed quietly, Boyang eventually realized that he could never reunite with his family, and that Bosacius, his only companion here, was reaching the end of his life. Bosacius might have been seeing visions on the wall, for his family — four yakshas each holding a light in hand who were now in the form of shadows — walked past him. In Bosacius's last moments, the yaksha finally recalled his name and past: that he was Bosacius, and his name means he was destined to make the ultimate sacrifice. ｜ 在层岩巨渊地下深处，可怖的黑暗之中，夜叉浮舍与术士伯阳曾互相扶持，挣扎求生。陷入疯狂的浮舍忘记了自己的身份与过往，时不时将伯阳误认为战友。时间悄然流逝，伯阳终于确信，自己无法再与家人团聚，而他在这里的唯一同伴浮舍，终于也走到了生命尽头。然而，或许是幻觉，此时的浮舍却在岩壁上看见了自己过去的手足同胞——四名仙众夜叉的影子手执烛火从浮舍身旁走过。在这油尽灯枯的最后时刻，夜叉浮舍终于回想起自己的姓名与过往——浮舍二字，原是指：浮生一刹，万般皆舍。
- Mahamata Announcement ｜ 教令官公告

- This is not "weird talk." These are words that befit a Pari's stature. Well then. I shall take that as your acquiesence. ｜ 这才不是什么奇奇怪怪的语气，是符合吾辈花灵身份的语气！总之，那就当你答应下了。

- A cake made from flowers. Prepared with Qingxin petals still glistening with their morning dew, the filling is wrapped in many layers consisting of two different types of pastry — a flaky crust and a buttery dough. Baked to perfection, Qingxin Flower Cakes are best enjoyed fresh from the oven. ｜ 花朵制成的糕点。取带有晨露的清心花瓣制成馅，一层层裹上酥与油两种饼皮，烤制而成。刚刚出炉的清心花饼最为美味。
- I noticed one of them knocked over the hilichurls and ran away... ｜ 我之前留意到，有一只驮兽撞开了那些丘丘人，自顾自地跑远…
- (That can't have been easy.) ｜ （很不容易呢。）

- ...That's just one of the objectives of this operation. But right now, our priority is to retrieve the condensing components that fell into the water and restart the suppression device. ｜ …这只是本次行动的目的之一。但我们现在的当务之急是取回那些落进水体里的冷凝部件，重启抑制器。
- To get paid double, I just have to stay put and keep my mouth shut. ｜ 想拿双份钱的话，自然就得闭嘴在这儿守着。
- I might have an idea about who that Mondstadter is. ｜ 其实，关于那个蒙德人的身份，我已经有一些头绪了。
- Uhh... But we... ｜ 呃，可是我们…
- Unfortunately, we wouldn't be able to participate. ｜ …没有办法来。
- Their libraries have been emptied of a great number of obsolete books, and the Matriarch had me purchase and safe-keep them for everyone to read free of charge. Hmph... I operated at a loss there. ｜ 他们的图书馆淘汰了一大堆旧书，芭别尔主母就让我把它们收购回来细心存放，还让大家免费借阅。哼…赔钱买卖。
- A masterpiece of the alchemist Hajanad, a truly special solid potion. Theoretically, this alchemy tablet can be stored for a long time and is quite safe and easy to carry and transport. However, when in use, the tablet needs to be put into the "remelting device," where the two solid agents will be mixed via micro-explosion to obtain complete efficacy.\nAnd it is always a little disturbing to think that the device in hand may explode... ｜ 炼金术士哈贾娜德的倾力之作，极为特殊的固体药剂。理论上，这种炼金药剂能长期存放，便于携带和运输，还有着不错的安全性。不过在使用时，需要将片剂放入「重熔装置」内部，通过微型爆炸将两种固体药剂混合，以获得完整的药效。\n可是，一想到手中的装置内部会发生爆炸，总让人有点不安…
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- #No need to worry! {M#He}{F#She} knows {M#his}{F#her} way around a fight. ｜ #放心啦，{M#他}{F#她}很能打的。
- Northern Birch Folding Counter ｜ 极北桦木折角柜台
- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- Wasn't she after our souls? She said that herself. ｜ 不是要我们的灵魂吗？我听她是这么说的。
- Oh, that's very kind of you, but I'm okay... ｜ 啊，我就不用了…
- Fish and Chips ｜ 炸鱼薯条

- Good morning. I'm going for coffee shortly, would you like to join me? I brought coffee cups — you can borrow one if you need. ｜ 早上好。我正准备去喝杯咖啡，一起吗？我自带咖啡杯，如果你需要，我可以借你一个。
- Yeah, and that's when I started having sleeping problems... I just began to sleep less and less each day. ｜ 嗯，我从那时候起就有了睡眠障碍，每天睡觉的时间变得越来越少。
- Or maybe its... its power core will suddenly explode! Or someone controlling it remotely will use it to attack us? ｜ 或者它…它的能源核心突然发生爆炸，或者是被人遥控着攻击我们！
- I'm on it! ｜ 明白！
- Ugh! That's it, I'm done! Mori, get him! ｜ 啊啊，烦死了！莫里，上！
- Enter the cave ｜ 进入洞穴
- (She's strong. I can't rush this. Just like the Traveler said, I need to observe my opponent and look for an opportunity...) ｜ #（她好像很强，这时候不能急。要记住{NICKNAME}的话，观察对手，寻找机会…）
- Cool, sounds like a plan. ｜ 嗯，这样应该行得通。

- I'd avoid resorting to a friend's kindness to achieve my dream as much as possible. All I need from a friend are their kind regards, and to keep in touch. ｜ 我还不想利用朋友的好心完成自己的愿望。作为朋友，我只需要你的问候，和时不时的联络。
- Huh? ｜ ……?
- That's right! What I yearn to see is that "Qingyun Peak"! ｜ 不错！我渴望观瞻的，正是这「庆云顶」！
- Paimon will be your vault-keeper! ｜ 我当仓库管理员！
- The trail's heading towards the abandoned house on that cliff! ｜ 元素粉末的痕迹，往山崖边的方向去了！
- The guest has left, Master Kaeya... ｜ 客人离开了，凯亚少爷…
- Your recent travels have seen you and Paimon encounter all manner of strange creatures, but in light of various factors, Paimon would still like to have some fun with cats.\nAs such, you intend to return to Mondstadt and drop by The Cat's Tail... ｜ 近来的旅途中，你和派蒙遇见了不少奇妙的动物，不过，考虑到各种因素，派蒙还是想和猫猫们好好玩一玩。\n于是，你们打算返回蒙德，去猫尾酒馆逛一逛…
- Place ｜ 布置
- Healing Bonus +15%. ｜ 治疗加成提高15%。
- Why don't you take The Durin? Now you've given it a name, it'll be a maiden voyage for the boat and a brand-new journey for you. ｜ 不如就乘「杜林号」出去吧，以命名后的初次航行开启新的旅程。
- My blade will lead us through the shadows. ｜ 剑锋，直指暗影。

- Well, maybe next time... ｜ 下次再来看看…
- A feather-shaped brooch that symbolizes someone's yearning to defend others like a shield. ｜ 象征着某人「渴望成为坚盾」的羽形别针。
- This, uh... *cough* Keratry, there are lots of other people around, you know. ｜ 这…咳，柯蕾特莉，现在这附近还有许多行人。
- C'mon! It's not that bad at all. We can just explain! ｜ 还没到要动手的程度吧，喂，好好解释一下呀！

- Ahem... Uh, on second thought Connor, I think you should taste this... unique drink. ｜ 咳，康纳，你才应该细细品味一下这杯…新奇的酒。
- (Listen...) ｜ （聆听…）
- Wonderful! Ah, this may be a point of reference for the novel... I'll chronicle this game right now! ｜ 精彩！啊，这说不定能成为小说的参考，我这就记录下牌局…
- Send one, send 'em all! ｜ 一波送走，全送走。

- Like... going on a shopping spree... or checking out the <color=#00E1FFFF>Statue of The Seven</color> again. ｜ 比如去蒙德购物…或者一起再去看看<color=#00E1FFFF>七天神像</color>？

- But they didn't know that the darkness of the Abyss was a terrible poison to elemental beings. ｜ 但是它们没有预料到，深渊的黑雾对元素生物来说是更加可怕的剧毒。
- Tiara of Frost ｜ 祭冰礼冠
- All I know are some abstract Haravatat theories. In any case, my time with you has shown a lot of them to be utterly useless. I'm still trying to make sense of everything... ｜ 只是一些缺乏实践的知论派理论而已，不过很多理论在和你们相处的过程中发现是不灵的，真搞不懂…
- Even after the Vourukasha Oasis was sealed off from the outside world, their pilgrimage still lasted for quite a long time. ｜ 即便后来花海不再对外开放，他们的朝圣之旅也持续了相当长的一段时间。
- N—No, we've gotta take those monsters out first! ｜ 不、不对！总之先打倒那些魔物！
- Got it. ｜ 嗯，我记住了。
- Let's hear them. ｜ 请说说看吧。
- Touch Statues of The Seven to reveal areas on your Map ｜ 触碰「七天神像」以点亮地图
- Pfft, they're your family, not your arch-enemies. What's there to be afraid of? Unless... Oh, did you do something horrible to them? ｜ 是亲戚又不是仇人，有什么好怕的？难道说…你做了什么伤天害理的事！
- Look for another three Strange Teeth ｜ 再寻找三枚奇异的「牙齿」
- Hey, isn't it... you... You're here for the wine too? ｜ 哦！这不是…嗯…是谁来着…你也是来喝酒的吗？
- Seriously, it's not like she needs to recognize voice patterns anymore! But still, she calls me noisy and asks me not to get close, saying that intel gathering is also a test for the ears... C'mon, isn't that just too much? ｜ 真是的，她现在明明都用不着辨别声纹了嘛！结果还是嫌我吵，不让我靠近，还说什么情报工作也需要听力…是不是很过分？
- No, I just remembered... ｜ 不，吾只是想起了…
- The boss of Wanmin Restaurant recounts the tales of adventure that his customers once discussed as they dined in his restaurant. These tales serve as the perfect beginning for an Adventure Challenge... ｜ 「万民堂」的老板叙说之前食客在饭馆吃饭聊天时作为谈资的冒险经历，以此作为冒险挑战的故事开场…
- Hmph... ｜ 哼…
- I can accept this arrangement. ｜ 交换条件如此，我可以接受。
- Tubby ｜ 阿圆

- No matter how many disagreements we've had, the truth is that you are still my father. ｜ 但事实上，就算发生了很多不愉快，你依然是我的父亲。
- Yes, you're right. Follow me, please! ｜ 嗯，是的，请跟我来！
- The following labor shall be little, but it is still a radiant shard. Yasnapati mine, record it down with a reverent heart, and use even this mote of shattered light to grace your mighty hymn. ｜ 接下来的功业虽小，但也是光辉的破片，「谒颂主」可要怀着虔敬之心好好记录，以便将这零碎的光彩点缀于吾之颂诗之上啊。
- "Slimo movo!" ｜ 「slimo movo！」
- Speaking up back there was so brave of you, Lyney! It's all thanks to you that we were able to convince "Father" to back down. ｜ 这次多亏了你挺身而出，才争取到了「父亲」的宽宏大量。

- Realistically speaking, there is no such thing. ｜ 以普遍理性而论，确实没有。
- Whenever you're in trouble, won't you stand by me? ｜ 当你惹上麻烦，是否还愿意同我相伴？
- I didn't expect things to get complicated like this... ｜ 结果，没想到出了这么一茬事…

- Though in practice, the one inspecting things is my dog, Baguette. I'm just here to take care of her in turn. ｜ 不过真正在进行安检的是我的狗贝格艾蒂，我只需要管理好她就行了。
- It's not our style to just lie down and take a beating, though. Let's hunt the truth! Paimon's worried about Taruka and Oberon, too. ｜ 不过被动挨打可不是我们的作风，就由我们来查明真相吧，也很担心塔卢加和奥伯龙呢。
- (Phew... a fortuitous result indeed. One's tea surplus has hitherto resolved itself.) ｜ （呼…还好本仙找到了这两全其美之策。）
- Alright, then. Please convey my intent to Mr. Huffman. I'm sure he'll understand. ｜ 好了，你就把我说的话带回去吧，我相信霍夫曼先生会理解我的。
- I guess what I'm getting at is... Is this what you really want in life? It feels like you're busier than a swallow trying to build a nest. ｜ 你每天好像比筑巢的燕子还忙，我还挺好奇这种状态真是你当下想要的吗？
- Phew, I didn't know I could do that! ｜ 呼，我居然能做到这样的事…
- Moeava ｜ 摩亚瓦
- Heh. I never expected that someone else would find this place... ｜ 哼，没想到居然还有人能够找到这里…
- I mean, prophecies can't really be verified — we've got more practical problems to deal with! ｜ 「预言」这东西又说不上真假，我们还有更实际的问题要处理呢…
- This shrine is super creepy... Paimon's getting goosebumps... ｜ 这个神龛…怪可怕的，我鸡皮疙瘩都要起来了…

- I'll be fine. You guys take care too. ｜ 我不会有事的，你们也要多保重。
- Let me see... ｜ 让我看看…
- Osse ｜ 小呜斯
- I always love to take a stroll around the night market after a performance. ｜ 每次唱完戏散场之后，我都爱去夜市逛逛。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Alright. If you do find anything, please share them with me and quench my thirst for knowledge. ｜ 好吧…如果有什么收获的话，不妨来和我分享一下，满足我对知识的渴求。

- But since his victory, he's been acting extremely strange. It's like he's become a completely different person... The doctors can't find anything wrong with him, so I'm betting it must be the work of an evil spirit. - *sigh* Well, whatever it might be, you should be able to find the charm as long as you find the right spot. ｜ 唉…总之，如果找对地方的话，直接就地搜寻就好了。
- Are you talking to me? Well, as you can see, I'm just a lowly merchant from Mondstadt that can't get in on the action. ｜ 我？如你所见，连一勺汤都分不到的，没人在意的蒙德商人罢了。
- Master Jean, you drink coffee all the time. Wouldn't you like to try something else? ｜ 琴团长平时咖啡喝得够多了吧，要不要换点别的口味？
- Are you awake? Collei says it's time for breakfast. C'mon, get up! ｜ 你醒啦？刚好柯莱喊我们吃早餐，快起来吧！
- Once you've worked here for long enough, you'll see just about anything. ｜ 在这里工作久了，真是什么东西都能见到。

- I have a lot of questions for you. ｜ 我有很多事情要问你。
- I'm sorry... I have to go. I made a promise to my friends, and I'm already very late... ｜ 抱歉…我得离开了，我和朋友约好了，我已经迟到很久了。

- If you need a competent, reliable bodyguard or watchman in Port Ormos, see our Captain Feroz. ｜ 在奥摩斯港，如果你需要身手好又靠谱的保镖或者守卫，就请找我们的队长费罗兹吧。

---
### Part 144

- An Amur Maple with a lovely form. Its deep red, almost chocolate leaves each seem to resemble the silhouettes of birds.\nThe Amur Maple was once seen as a marker of the cold seasons, with the deepness of its leaves' colors corresponding to the harshness of the coming winter. However, though Inazuma's climate has since stabilized, the leaves of these maple trees still retain their deep red coloration. ｜ 树姿雅致的羽扇枫，叶片呈现出深赤的「红鸢色」，细看每一丛枝叶，似乎都与飞鸟的轮廓相仿。\n羽扇枫曾被视为天气转寒的标识，叶片色泽越深，则会有越强的寒流攻来。不过，如今稻妻的气候已趋于稳定，这种枫树的叶片却依然维持着深红的色彩。
- Textured Whitestone Stairs ｜ 磨砂白石阶梯
- The target is in a special locale, please go to the notice board to access the mission location ｜ 目标处于特殊场景中，请先前往公告板进入任务场景
- But why did we see things from his perspective...? ｜ 但我们所看到的东西，为什么是以他的视角…
- Feelings About Ascension: Building Up ｜ 突破的感受·承
- Hey there. How are you feeling? ｜ 嗨。昨晚休息得好吗？

- Arama ｜ 兰罗摩

- Huh, how come... ｜ 怎么会这样？
- (Wow! Now that's an exciting thought.) ｜ （哇！好刺激。）
- A short while after deciding to take part in the exhibition, I heard that some big shot would be attending to assess the business prospects of Theater Mechanicus. ｜ 决定参展后，过了一段时间，我听说会有一位大人物到场，考察「机关棋谭」的商业潜力。
- The Legend of Vennessa ｜ 温妮莎传奇
- Now who should I send... Hmm... Miyuki, perhaps? ｜ 嗯…让谁去好呢，阿幸吗？
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- "Close"? Hmph, not sure that's the word I'd use. He wouldn't even let me use his patent. ｜ 很熟？连专利授权都不肯给我，算是很熟吗？
- The Reminiscent Regimen challenge has three themes: Descent, Raid, and Convoy. Complete these challenges and accumulate scores to obtain the corresponding rewards.\nYou can match-make in single-player mode to engage in the Co-Op challenge.\nOther players in your team may be invited to take part in the challenge when in Co-Op Mode. ｜ 「追想练行」挑战共拥有三个主题：垂降、急袭与护航。通过完成挑战，累积评分，可以获取相应的奖励。\n单人游戏状态下，可以进行联机匹配挑战。\n多人游戏状态下，可以邀请队伍中的其他玩家进行挑战。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启

- Hahahaha! Nope! Nuh-uh, no thank you! Hard pass — you can keep it! ｜ 呃啊啊！我不要，不要不要！你们收好！
- The ingredients are... Ugh... Totally unintelligible... ｜ 这里写的药材是…呃…真是难读…
- Ilyas... Why...? ｜ 伊利亚斯…为什么…
- D—Did Paimon hear that right? ｜ 我、我听错了？

- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- This reminds me of a story that a retainer once told me several years ago. ｜ 说起来，大概十几年前，有一位家臣跟我讲过一个故事。
- Hmm... Too bad Lisa's not working today, otherwise we could ask her... Well, we're here anyhow, and this place doesn't look too dangerous. Why don't we take a look around? ｜ 唔…可惜丽莎小姐今天休假，不然就可以问问她了。不过既然来都来了，这里看起来也没什么危险的样子，不如四处看看吧？

- Why would a Mondstadter leave a note in a tree hollow deep in the Avidya Forest? ｜ 为什么道成林的那个树洞里，会有蒙德人留下的纸条呢？

- No matter what Tartaglia's true identity might be... he's doing something good right now, and I think he deserves to be treated accordingly. ｜ 我觉得…无论达达利亚先生的身份是什么。他现在正在做着「好事」，那他就理应得到做好事应有的对待才是。

- Of course, it's also essential to learn how to lead properly in order to hit fast-moving targets. The faster the target and the slower the shell, the more difficult it is to predict how much to lead. ｜ 当然，打击高速目标时所需要的提前量，也是必修科目。炮弹飞行的速度越慢，对炮手的预估能力要求越高。

- The Scions of the Canopy believe in and worship the Wayob, which manifests upon the land with the power of totems and Nightsouls.\nIn the stories of the storytellers, Wayob manifestations often appear as the messengers of trials, or guides to the kingdom of the Lord of the Night. A Saurian-Crowned Warrior once said that he fought with a Wayob in a trance while practicing his skills, and in doing so, gained deeper understanding.\nThe Scions of the Canopy believe their Wayob has the power to control the growth of fruits and leaves, and can also control the roots of crops and draw the patterns of the veins of leaves. ｜ 「悬木人」部族所信仰与崇拜的「大灵」，借由图腾与夜魂之力，于大地之上显化的形体。\n在叙事人的故事中，大灵显化身经常作为试炼的使者，或者夜神之国的引路人的形象出场。也有龙冠武士曾言，自己在武术修行的恍惚中与大灵显化身交手，从而获得了更深层次的领悟。\n「悬木人」的人相信他们的「大灵」拥有控制果实与林叶生长的力量，能够执掌作物的根茎，画下叶脉的走势。
- Ley Line Disorder: All team members are afflicted by the "Corrosion" status, causing continuous HP loss. After <color=#FFCC33>defeating an opponent</color>, characters regain <color=#FFCC33>3</color>% of their Max HP every second for <color=#FFCC33>5</color>s. ｜ 地脉异常：队伍中所有角色被施加「侵蚀」状态，持续损失生命值。在<color=#FFCC33>击倒敌人</color>后的一段时间内，角色每秒将恢复生命值上限<color=#FFCC33>3</color>%的生命值，此效果持续<color=#FFCC33>5</color>秒。

- The storm clouds gathering over Liyue have finally parted, and the schemes that once gripped this land have been shattered by the combined efforts of the Qixing, the adepti, and yourself.\nStill, the memories of your duel with Childe of the Fatui in the depths of the Golden House remain fresh in your mind.\nRelive this duel, and you may yet learn something new... ｜ 一度笼罩璃月的疑云终于散开，胁迫这片土地的阴谋也因为七星、仙人与你的共同努力被粉碎。\n但在黄金屋的深处，与愚人众的「公子」交锋的记忆再次鲜明地浮现。\n在回忆中重新演练这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…
- Haha um... Haha, fine by me. Shall we get going? The winery isn't far, we'll be there in no time. ｜ 哈哈哈，没问题。那我们就出发吧，酒庄就在不远的地方，很快就能过去。

- "The fourth flint lights up a tempestuous night of rain-soaked despair, and a sea of anguishing descent — we call it failure. - To permanently banish the forces of evil from the world is my ultimate goal as an exorcist. If that grand day ever comes, I suppose I should be able to consider trying many new things, such as hot springs, Jueyun Chilis, and... partaking in other activities of a more passionate nature. Ugh, what am I doing... Ugh, I shouldn't be dwelling on these things, even thinking about them is too stimulating for me... ｜ 剿灭天下妖邪是我身为方士的最终目标，将来这个宏愿实现之后，不管是温泉、绝云椒椒还是别的什么…热血刺激的东西，我其实…都可以考虑。唔…不行。这样想想就会有些激动…不好不好。

- You jumped to that topic way too quickly! ｜ 你的思路跳得太快了！

- Those who play Genius Invokation TCG often and complete the Advanced Player Trial match will obtain this Player Badge.\nMany are those who become players, but the vast majority treat the game as a sort of pastime, and so those who become Advanced Players are few and far between.\nEven games do provide the dedicated with unique rewards. ｜ 经常进行对局的七圣召唤牌手，在通过高级牌手的试炼对局后就能够领取到的牌手徽章。\n成为牌手的人有很多，但大多数只是将七圣召唤视为一种消遣，能成为高级牌手的只是其中少数。\n即使是游戏，认真对待的人也将获得独属自己的回馈。
- If it can, then it truly is a blessing bestowed upon us by Lord Barbatos. ｜ 该说这是巴巴托斯大人留给我们的祝福吗？

- Don't try to stop me... I still need to make some changes, need to make the perfect plan... ｜ 你别说了，我还要再改改，一定要拿出最完美的方案…
- And our Archon, Mavuika, created a bridge between them. ｜ 而火神玛薇卡大人，则是将「生」与「死」连接在了一起。
- Chikya... ｜ 奇科娅…

- Still, that place is pretty sketchy, and we don't yet have any clue as to what's up with that prophecy either. ｜ 但是那个地方还是很可疑，关于预言的事情也还没有搞清楚。

- Such impertinence... Well, no one can help you now! ｜ 真是不知天高地厚…这次你可没人来帮忙了！
- When I held your hand just now, I could sense that you've got a great affinity for phlogiston. You're extraordinarily gifted. ｜ 刚才握着你的手，能感觉到你对燃素的亲和力很不错。算得上天赋异禀吧。
- Dropped by Lv. 30+ Lava Dragon Statues ｜ 30级以上熔岩辉龙像掉落
- Ah, Cyno, it's been some time since I've seen you last. I trust you are doing well? ｜ 好久不见，赛诺。最近还好吗？
- A small drop of water obtained from a defeated Tainted Hydro Phantasm.\nThe life force in it has yet to ebb away. ｜ 击败浊水幻灵后，取得的一小滴水。\n其中的生命力似乎尚未完全消散。

- You could add a few more accessories to match with your outfit. ｜ 不如再搭配点别的。
- They both have their benefits. ｜ 各有各的好。
- We're good. ｜ 没事了。
- Hehe, simple! I put Paimon inside the hat. ｜ 嘿嘿，因为派蒙在帽子里呀。
- "Though the court burned to rubble, the flame never once went out. It shall reignite the next morn, more radiant than afore." This is one of my favorite quotes from Lord Traore. I—I must keep working hard! ｜ 「王庭焚弃，火却未曾殄熄。明晨它要再度燃起，比昨日更为辉熠。」这是陶奥鲁大人说过的话中，我最喜欢的一句。我，我必须要努力才行…
- It's starting to seem very likely. If we want to figure out her true identity, I'm afraid another conversation with those two merchants might be our only... ｜ 可能性确实很高。想要了解她的真实身份，恐怕还是得去问问那两位…
- "May the eternal Khvarena guide us on the upward path." ｜ 「永恒的灵光，将指引我们上升的道路。」
- Raaawr! ｜ 呀！
- A little surprise from the Children of Echoes. ｜ 来自回声之子部族的小小惊喜。
- Talk to Diluc ｜ 与迪卢克对话
- There are many kinds of hot springs here. Don't wander off into the wrong one! ｜ 这边有很多不同种类的温泉，可别跑错了哦。
- Guest from Afar ｜ 客从远方来
- Though the island itself may have been destroyed, the bloodline of its people persists to this day. ｜ 尽管鹤观的文明被毁灭了，鹤观人的血脉似乎却一直传承到了今日。
- This time, Aradashan and I won't help you suppress the power of Bulky Iron Chunk. It will be more like the Bulky Iron Chunk in the stories. Worry not, Arasata and Arasaha will still help you! ｜ 这次，我和兰提沙不会帮你压制「大方方铁块」，更接近故事里的「大方方铁块」了，不过没关系，兰沙陀和兰沙诃会帮你的！
- I gathered the available data, did some analysis, and came up with some more effective battle strategies... Oh, I should write them down for her... ｜ 综合手上已有的情报进行分析，更加高效的作战方法…帮她写在纸上吧。
- My word, "swindle"!? You make it sound so awful. Is there any difference between us? Don't you guards use Coupons to make people do miscellaneous work for you, too? ｜ 什么行骗…说这么难听。我们之间有什么区别吗？你们看守不也会用特许券打发人干些杂活…
- Ride the lift and enter the Fortress of Meropide ｜ 使用升降平台进入梅洛彼得堡
- Do not fret, Madame President, I shall not be eating any of this... Not until we are done here, anyway. ｜ 放心吧会长，我不会吃这些东西的。呃…至少在处理好之前，我是不会吃的。
- Goodbye. Be careful, this is an uncannily perilous place. ｜ 再见，千万小心，这里可是凶险异常啊…
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:P}

- ...Why don't I just make the main character a psychic that can intuit the needs of the buyer? ｜ 不如让主角可以读心好了，这样他就可以准确洞察买方的需求…
- "...Also, get Wu the Seventh to roll the wine barrel in the cave away! The Boss doesn't want to see it!" ｜ 「…顺便，叫吴老七快点把洞里的烈酒桶搬走！老大不想再见到」
- Ah, such elegant names! Welcome to the Court of Fontaine, it is truly an honor to meet the two of you here. ｜ 啊，多么优雅的名字。欢迎来到枫丹廷，很荣幸能在这里与二位相遇。
- As long as you promise not to argue. ｜ 如果你们答应不吵架…
- Not in the slightest... ｜ 根本不会啦…
- Whatever your school of swordsmanship is, it doesn't matter. ｜ 无论你的流派是什么，都无所谓了。

- Look, she even passed me a checklist and all, telling me to keep the various items recorded there in mind. ｜ 你瞧，她还给我列了张清单，让我留意一下里面记着的东西。
- A water body said to be able to wash off all filth and connect to the sea within the earth. Perhaps because of the many similar scents and memories, it is still inhabited by monsters that devoured the remains of greater life forms. ｜ 据说可以洗净一切污秽，连通着地中之海的水域。或许是循着相似的气息与思念，如今盘踞其间的乃是诸多吞噬了伟大生命尸骸的兽类。
- Inazuman florist Sakuya is current organizing a special flower-related event... ｜ 稻妻的花匠咲耶小姐，似乎正在举办一场有关花卉的特别活动…
- My desire is a simple one... I just want to reforge the Unseen Razor. ｜ 我想做的很简单，那就是…重铸「藏锋」。
- However, given the extent of your determination, I suppose we shall have to go about this a different way... Draw your weapons, and face me. ｜ 但是，如果你们真的下定决心，那就拿起武器，上前来吧。
- I heard that someone placed a custom order... ｜ 听说有特别订单…
- Tsumi... ｜ 阿祇…
- You little...! Gah, well maybe I spoke too soon! ｜ …我！啰嗦…你不喜欢就不做好了！
- Follow me! Oh, I suppose both of you can come. ｜ 跟我走吧。哦，就你们两位就行。
- Good... Well if there's nothing left for me to do then I'll be... ｜ 那，应该也没我的事了吧…
- Farewell! How I wish that I could see such sights in my homeland! ｜ 再见！真希望在我的家乡也可以看到这样的景色啊！
- I've developed a few feather-care sprays myself, actually. They keep feathers bright, repel insects, and eliminate odors... Maybe Tubby would find them helpful. ｜ 我也学着配过一些羽毛护理喷雾，不但能保持羽毛鲜亮，还能驱虫除味…不知道阿圆能不能用得上。

- It's my fault. ｜ 要怪就怪我吧。
- In ancient times, the human warriors who walked with Pari would hold a ritual of purification for the Pari scattered in the desert, so as to bring them back to the Vourukasha Oasis. ｜ 在古时，与花灵同行的人类勇士，会为流散在沙漠中的花灵举行净罪的仪式，将她们带回花海。

- But they have Ritou... ｜ 既然有「离岛」…
- I plan on starting from the person with the most defined stronghold, so let's go to the library. Lisa should be there. ｜ 我打算先找据点最稳定的人，第一站就去图书馆吧，丽莎小姐应该会在的。

- They're all fake. Be careful! ｜ 其实都是假的，要小心！
- Help Xamaran's kin ｜ 帮助赞玛兰的同族
- Well, if you want to learn magic, you'll have to start by addressing me as "Teacher"... ｜ 想要学魔术的话，至少要叫我一声「林尼老师」吧？
- I think either that the "Phantom Blubberbeast" criminal base is extremely well hidden and kept very secret... ｜ 我想，要么是「膨膨兽怪盗」的犯罪地点极其隐秘，保密程度很高。
- Ah, well... I'm sorry to say that "When the Wind of Death Blew Towards the Blond Samurai" didn't sell too well at the Irodori Festival previously. ｜ 这个…说起来有些遗憾，之前的容彩祭上，《吹向金发武士的死亡之风》没怎么卖出去。
- Clorinde walks onstage silently, blade in hand. Furina seems suddenly nervous and shocked, but she steadies herself and tries to intimidate her opponent... ｜ 克洛琳德从舞台的一侧持剑默默上前，芙宁娜明显有些紧张和惊讶，但随后强装镇定，试图威慑对方…
- H—Help me... ｜ 救、救救我…
- Hey, you zoning out over here, again? There's such a thing as overwatering the radishes, you know! ｜ 喂，你怎么又在看蔬菜？浇太多水萝卜根会烂的，知道吗！
- Records of the Gallant ｜ 侠客记
- I... I want to do something about it, but I can't. I fear that one mistake on my part will send this house tumbling down. ｜ 我…我想做些什么，但根本无从下手。我怕只要做错了一件事，就会让这间机关屋子整个垮塌掉。

- You are wise indeed! ｜ 不错，三爷果真慧眼如炬！

- Oh? Is it that obvious I can sing? ｜ 欸？你怎么看出来我擅长唱歌的？
- The prophet and the ruler, heroes and fell dragons, the grand opera of the golden age once played out here.\nNow, the only players left on the stage are monsters of unknown provenance. You shall earn priceless Artifacts, if — and only if — you can defeat them. ｜ 先知与君王，勇士与恶龙，黄金时代的宏伟歌剧曾在这里轮番上演。\n如今舞台上的演员只剩下不知从何处而来的魔物。将它们击败，或许能获得珍贵的圣遗物吧。

- Ei ｜ 影
- What trouble are you all planning to cause me now? ｜ 你又想给我找什么麻烦？
- The doctor said that I just needed to eat full meals, but I... I've always had a bigger *GRUMBLE* than most. If I were to eat my fill every time, I'd burn a hole right through my wallet. ｜ 医生说只要我吃饱了就好，但是我…我食量比人家都大啊咕噜，要是一直吃到吃饱的话，我的钱包也撑不住。
- Tu ｜ 老图
- Oh please, Lord of Geo, save me! Please! ｜ 谁来…岩王爷保佑！岩王爷救救我！

- He still hasn't arrived? Come on, Kaedehara Kazuha... ｜ 还没来吗？那个枫原万叶…
- Well... I mean... ｜ 该如何评价呢…
- Complete "Of the Land Amidst Monoliths" ｜ 完成「浮世浮生千岩间」剧情
- Using an Elemental Burst increases the DMG taken by all characters in that player's party by 15%. This effect stacks up to 4 times. ｜ 施放元素爆发后，该玩家队伍中的角色承受的伤害提高15%，至多叠加4次。
- Nara's "taste of happiness" is so strange... But since Nara is happy, Arapacati and her brothers shall be happy too! ｜ 那菈的「快乐的味道」很怪…但是那菈开心，兰帕卡提和哥哥们也开心！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Light of the Land of Wisdom.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『卓识之地的柔光』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Wyatt is looking for a key he has lost. ｜ 怀尔德正在到处寻找自己弄丢的钥匙。
- Nacker ｜ 纳克
- How much do you charge for your services? ｜ 需要付委托费吗？
- What a childish conversation this is. ｜ 真是小孩子气的谈话。
- My heart's desire? To start my very own cooking tradition, of course! Li-style and Yue-style cooking are good, but they have a limited palate. The missing ingredient? Chili pepper! Come, let me fry up one of Guoba's chili peppers for you... ｜ 问我的愿望吗？那当然是要创造全新的新菜系！璃菜和月菜都是有极限的。哦，关键一定在于辣味吧！事不宜迟，让我爆炒个锅巴辣椒给你尝尝！
- That bossy guy back at Chang's — sounds like he's working for a "Gentry Maocai." ｜ 那帮人自称是帮茂才公做事？
- Well, since everything's gone so smoothly, why don't we hit the hot springs tonight? ｜ 既然一切顺利，我们晚上去泡温泉怎么样？

- Player {0} invites you to join them to play "Shuyu's Baffling Beetle Battle Bowl" together. You will automatically refuse the invite in {1}s. ｜ 玩家{0}发起「漱玉工奇斗虫大玄境」游戏邀请，{1}秒内未确认将自动拒绝。
- <color=#f39001>{0}</color> additional Geo DMG instance(s) will be dealt by <color=#e09800>Stonecrystal Strikes</color> ｜ <color=#e09800>岩晶强袭</color>将额外造成<color=#f39001>{0}</color>次岩元素伤害
- Agh! No wonder that name felt familiar! The person Seymour mentioned and is looking for also goes by that name! ｜ 啊啊！难怪我总觉得这个名字，怎么好像在什么地方听过！西摩尔提到的那个，一直在寻找的人，也叫玛丽安！
- The people facing Mr. Hampeq should be Locust members... Only two of them? That's fewer people than we have! ｜ 汉佩克先生对面的应该就是蚱蜢派的人了吧。他们只有两个人，比我们人少很多呢！
- "And neither would you, were you ever to have been regarded as a criminal." ｜ 「如果你曾经被当做罪人，那么我相信你也不会喜欢这里的。」
- And since you insist on opposing me too, I have no choice but to keep you here until the dust has settled. ｜ 既然你们不愿加入，那就老老实实地待在这里，等到地上一切尘埃落定再下去吧。
- We wouldn't dare mess with her. We are no match for her! ｜ 那位小姑奶奶我们哪敢惹啊，我们根本就折腾不过她啊！
- Replicator Keystones can be used to create the following ruin devices: Everlight Cells, Neverlight Cells, Obscuring Cells, Verity Cells, Primal Sconces, and Primal Sandglasses. - Can't you give him some advice? ｜ 你就不能给他点建议吗？
- Hey, check out the painting! Paimon wonders what kind of treasure we'll find this time. ｜ 嗯！确实有图画，不知道这次会找到什么样的宝藏呢？

- So, I want to ask you if you could... ｜ 所以说，我想拜托您…
- Balancing Dye ｜ 「调和的色温」
- This is your first blessing, the one you received from a pair of people who loved you with all of their hearts. ｜ 这是你最初拥有的「祝福」，来自于一对全心爱着你的人。
- Thank you both for your help. Who are you...? ｜ 谢谢两位出手相救，不知道你们是…

- Thoma's "Akitsu Harpastum"... ｜ 托马那组的「秋津羽球」…

- No Mere Stone ｜ 匪石

- Triggers the Flowrider effect after using an Elemental Skill, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>140%</color> ATK as AoE DMG upon hitting an opponent with an attack. Flowrider will be removed after 15s or after causing 3 instances of AoE DMG. Only 1 instance of AoE DMG can be caused every 2s in this way. Flowrider can be triggered once every 12s. ｜ 施放元素战技后，将触发「沿洄」效果，在攻击命中敌人时造成<color=#99FFFFFF>140%</color>攻击力的范围伤害，该效果将在15秒或触发3次范围伤害后移除。每2秒至多通过这种方式造成一次范围伤害，每12秒至多触发一次沿洄。

- Cyno ｜ 赛诺

- Your treasure's gone, but you seem oddly happy. ｜ 明明东西不见了 ，小可莉怎么很开心的样子？
- Oh, uh, don't worry! The night's not quite as hot, so it's perfect for getting some fresh air outside. ｜ 你别急，不用担心，晚上天气没有那么炎热，我正好可以出来透透风。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得

- An adeptus of artistry, sounds like! I'm sure he will bless us with novelty! ｜ 听上去是位很喜欢创新的仙人呢！那一定能保佑我们璃月人的生活日新月异吧！
- Namecard style.\nThe yumekui-baku consume nightmares and leave only pleasant dreams. But what if dreams are to be understood in reverse? Faced with such conjecture, her warm-natured response: A truly beautiful dream, even if turned upside down through reality's lens, would still remain beautiful. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n食梦的貘会将噩梦食去留下美梦，可万一梦都是反的呢？应对这样的忧虑，她温柔的解释是这样的：全方位的美梦，即使透过现实翻转过来，那也是美好的呀。
- So... Honorary Knight, maybe you could, uh... ｜ 嗯…「荣誉骑士」，这件事就…
- Jeht, you've changed a lot since we last saw you! ｜ 婕德，比起上次，总感觉你变了样子呢！

- A group of Eremites is skulking out in the wilds, and they're up to no good. Defeat this threat to ensure the safety of the surrounding areas. ｜ 一群不怀好意的镀金旅团出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全，前往将其消灭。
- A recently formed ore deposit containing an abundance of ores. For someone looking to strengthen their weapon, discovering this place would be like hitting the jackpot. ｜ 最近出现的矿簇，能开采出大量矿物。对想要锻炼武器的人来说，是非常难得的好地方吧。

- ...After all, its existence cost me my life. ｜ …毕竟我曾为它献出生命。

- There's so much I wanted to ask you, but for some reason, I'm not interested in asking those questions right now. ｜ 本来应该有无数的问题想要问你，但现在又忽然没那么想问了。
- Clouds and mist... Hmm... I think Chenyu Vale really does have places like that. ｜ 有云有雾…唔…沉玉谷好像真的有这样的地方呢。

- Drills by Lamplight: Grand Finale ｜ 灯下演武·总决
- Summons lightning, dealing Electro DMG to the farthest away Flying and Ground units within its range. ｜ 召唤落雷，对攻击范围内最远的空中和地面单位造成雷元素伤害。
- Even as a Hilichurl, seeing the terrible sight within the mirror wasn't enough to taint his spirit. ｜ 就连他作为丘丘人时，摘下面具后在镜子中看到的东西也无法污染他的精神。
- Seems there's some sort of noise coming from deeper inside... Is it... chanting? ｜ 最深处似乎传来了奇怪的声音，是在念经吗。
- Hope the radishes are doing okay... ｜ 萝卜还好吗…
- We'll just have to put this last page in and see what we get. Maybe the contents will link up, or something! ｜ 只能把最后这张书页也放进去试试了，或许上面的内容可以连起来呢！
- It looks like it shows people getting ready to board a ship. ｜ 这上面好像画着一群准备乘船的人呢。
- Body tissue left behind by a Fungus that has been exposed to intense elemental stimulation.\nIt is generally believed that the Fungi evolved into more mobile forms to better disperse their spores.\nA poet once depicted a shared dream of the Fungi in which their spores covered every inch of the mountains and oceans. The world had never been more tranquil. Then the Fungi turned into fish, birds, beasts, men, and gods, relying on rainfall, land, and their own kind who had returned to the earth. ｜ 蕈兽的部分身体组织，在外界元素的剧烈刺激下才会形成。\n一般认为，蕈兽之所以演化出移动能力，是为了将孢子散布在更为广泛的天地中。\n曾有诗人称，在蕈兽共同的梦中，孢子覆盖了山岳与海洋，世界无比宁静。蕈兽演化成游鱼、走兽、飞禽、人与神，仰赖雨水、土地与回归土地的同伴而生。
- Contact Venti in a less conspicuous place ｜ 到隐蔽地点联络温迪
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When your character uses a Normal Attack:</color> If you have no more than 1 card in your Hand, this Skill costs 1 less Elemental Die.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 1</color> (Can stack. Max 4 stacks) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方角色进行普通攻击时：</color>如果我方手牌数量不多于1，则此技能少花费1个元素骰。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：1</color>（可叠加，最多叠加到4次）
- But I... I failed them. If only I could have been stronger, I might've been able to survive the thunderstorm and make it back to Koseki Village with my friends safe and sound... ｜ 只是我…我辜负了他们的期待，我如果能够更结实一些，说不定就能穿越雷暴，就能完好无损地与他们一起回到越石村…
- Brave adventurer, we have need of 5 crystalflies. ｜ 勇敢的冒险者啊，我要5只晶蝶。
- Mail content length exceeds maximum limit ｜ 邮件正文长度超出限制
- Emilie ｜ 艾梅莉埃
- I'd suggest you focus on the comforting. ｜ 还是先去安慰小匿叶龙吧。
- If I decided not to take action when things can still be done, or if time ran out before I've used up all my energy... ｜ 如果有能做的事最后却决定不做，如果还没有用尽力气就耗光了时间…
- A delicious dish with some extra seasoning! It gives off a titillating aroma... But whose tastes will this dish suit? Invite your friends, invite your pals — get them to try this new dish! ｜ 加入了调料的美味料理，散发着诱人的香气。不知道适合谁的喜好呢？快去邀请伙伴们试吃吧！
- "Marvelous Merchandise" Liben ｜ 百货奇货·立本
- All proceeds smoothly. You plan to search for Albedo to discuss the changes the sword has undergone further. ｜ 一切似乎都很顺利。你打算找阿贝多聊聊这把剑的变化。
- So, it's safe to say the girl couldn't have left through here... ｜ 也就是说，少女没有从这里离开…
- I'll protect us! ｜ 我会保护大家！
- Rectangular fir flower beds that are often used to decorate the streets.\nA special coating has been applied to these flower beds to prevent water from seeping out through the gaps in the fir planks, thus allowing it to lock the soil moisture in. ｜ 方方正正的杉木花坛，常被用于装点街道。\n为了避免木板缝隙的渗水现象，这种花坛采用了特殊的涂料，能够牢牢锁住土壤中的水分。
- They still prayed for your safe return... ｜ 也在祈祷你能平安归来…
- Talk to Ooshima Junpei ｜ 与大岛纯平对话
- Shock Me, I Dare You! ｜ 请配冲击波
- Huh? But... that would mean the detective gets all the credit for our hard work! Bet they make a tidy sum of Mora off of it, too! Hmph, Paimon won't stand for that. Let's go have a little talk with Detective Armchair right now! ｜ 欸？那原本应该给我们的报酬岂不是会被侦探拿走一部分？那可不行！我们现在就去找侦探抗议！
- Go to the port to investigate the Fatui ｜ 前往港口调查愚人众的踪迹。
- Your opponent generated a Combat Status ｜ 对方生成出战状态
- "Great order, great power, great civilization, all is great." ｜ 「伟大的秩序，伟大的力量，伟大的文明，伟大的一切。」
- Kapatcir ｜ 卡帕奇莉
- Hey, Boss! The name's Gaming — I'm a guard from the Communications Office. So, all this needs shipping, right? No, no, you grab a seat and have some tea — I'll get these packed up for you, no problem. It'll only take me a minute, then we can get the delivery scheduled. Oh! And if you ever wanna book a Wushou Dance, me and my crew are available in a heartbeat! The troupe's called the Mighty Mythical Beasts, and I'm the head, hehe, not to brag or anything. ｜ 老板你好呀，我是和记厅的镖师，叫我嘉明就行，要运货吗你？请坐请坐，饮杯茶先，我帮你打包好货就可以排期出发咯！哦！如果是找我舞兽的话即刻可以出发！「威水舞兽队」我就是话事人，嘿嘿，失礼失礼。

- Yumemizuki Mizuki ｜ 梦见月瑞希
- So you also remember two gunshots, then? ｜ 你也记得是两声枪响，对吧？
- Yes, and you've been to the new Vanarana. Meanwhile, Marana's Avatar is imprisoned by three seals deep within this place. ｜ 嗯。你们之前所见到的，是新的桓那兰那。而无留陀的化身，被三重封印禁锢在这里的最深处。
- Destroy Transverse Explosive Rocks to blow up a whole row of rocks\nDestroy Big Explosive Rocks to blow up all the rocks on the field\n<color=#FFCC33FF>Elemental Skills</color> are especially effective at destroying rocks\nFor 4s after using an Elemental Skill, your rock-smashing ability will be enhanced ｜ 击碎横爆岩块可引爆一排岩块\n击碎大裂岩块可引爆全场岩块\n<color=#FFCC33FF>元素战技</color>能更高效破坏岩块\n施放元素战技后的4秒内，将强化破坏岩块的能力
- Oh, it's nothing particularly pressing. It's just that we recently returned from Sumeru, and given how long it's been since we last visited the Winery, we thought we'd drop by and say hello. ｜ 也没什么特别要紧的事啦。我们刚从须弥回来，想着似乎好久没来酒庄了，就一起过来拜访拜访。
- Complete a duel with Ibuki on Hard difficulty ｜ 完成与「伊吹」的困难难度比试
- Yes, and in no uncertain terms. But that was then. It does not preclude him from changing his mind in the future. ｜ 他之前是这么说的，但不代表他之后也都这么想。
- An Ancient Name, Tumaini, forged after many twists and turns, whose meaning is "hope."\nYou are its first bearer, and it shall record all your deeds and adventures in Natlan, to be passed down forevermore.\n"Wisdom" is not the sole domain of living things, nor are all memories or emotions a "blessing." It is a nameless, shapeless existence, nor can common sense comprehend it. Just as we know naught about places that no light may touch, we cannot be sure that there are not countless pairs of eyes watching us from the deepest reaches of the dark. It is a condescending thing that lusts after the knowledge and information stored in the land. Even the horror and despair, which humans can never transcend, are mere emotions "simulated" for your benefit once it has understood all that Natlan is.\nLend your ear to Xumucul's roar. Hear the hatred that festered in the heart of the unrivaled warrior a thousand years ago. How he regrets lifting his weapon before the tombs of his companions in days bygone! For if this battle could never have been won, then he was no leader, but a cruel, lonesome king.\nLook upon the tears of Cochanina — witness her thousand-year-old despair. Resolute she was to the end, but fire, sword, and death never ceased to ravage her homeland. At the last, she would kneel before the icy coffins, and reflect upon the image the rain-puddles painted of her: If it cannot be rejected, why not embrace it?\nFeel Ndenge's fury, and know his thousand-year madness. He fought for Natlan all his life, shed and spent his fiery blood, only to learn the truth of war from the Sacred Flame once he had attained the throne. He was not a hero, beloved by all — he was but a blind, ignorant clown, for humanity can never hope to conquer the true master.\nFathom the words of Xbalanque, perceive his thousand-year-old lie. The utmost wisdom births the utmost paranoia, and as he held time and death in his hands, he doomed Natlan to an endgame without any solution. Humans need not light lamps before the destined darkness to come, lest it be to attract still larger monsters.\nThink upon Mavuika's plan... No.\nIt can warp history and memory, but it cannot twist your personal experiences. This is the meaning of this name you hold, and the light that Ancient Names mean to pass down.\n"Our forebears carved 'miracles' into obsidian rock, yet future bearers looked upon them and saw 'strength.'" ｜ 几经周折终于打造完成的全新古名「杜麦尼」，其名意为「希望」。\n你是它的第一任主人，它将记录你在纳塔的所有冒险故事，长久地传承下去。\n并非拥有生命之物才可获得「智慧」，也并非一切记忆与情感都是「祝福」，它的存在无法名状，也无法以常理去诠释，就像我们对光芒不及之处一无所知，所以无法确认黑暗最深邃之处是否存在无数双聚焦于你的眼睛。它永远居高临下，贪食土地中存储的知识与信息，就连人类永远无法跨越的恐惧与绝望，都只是它完全理解纳塔的一切之后，为你「模拟」出的情感。\n仔细聆听库穆库尔的咆哮，那是来自千年前的怨恨，在彼时难逢敌手的至强战士，在伙伴的坟前后悔曾举起了手中的武器——倘若这场战争在最初就无法胜利，那他的身份不再是领袖，而是暴戾的孤王。\n仔细观察柯夏尼娜的眼泪，那是来自千年前的绝望，即便她的心智始终坚强，战火与死亡从未停下侵蚀故乡的脚步。最后她跪倒在冰冷的棺椁前，在雨水的倒影中质问自我：若无法拒绝它，为何不拥抱它？\n仔细感受恩德盖的怒火，那是来自千年前的疯狂，他为纳塔征战一生，燃尽热血，直至登上王座他才从圣火中得知了战争的真相，他不是万众敬仰的英雄，只是被蒙在鼓里的小丑，因为人类永远无法战胜其真正的主人。\n仔细揣摩希巴拉克的言语，那是来自千年前的谎言，极致的智慧才会诞生极致的偏执，他将时间与死亡握于手中，将纳塔的未来纳入了无解的残局，面对注定到来的黑夜，人类本不必将灯点起，除非这盏灯是为了引来更大的怪物。\n仔细回味玛薇卡的计划…不。\n它可以扭曲历史与记忆，却不能扭曲你的亲身经历。这就是手中之名的意义，也是古名想要传递下去的光辉。\n「人类将『奇迹』刻在黑曜石上，后世的继承者，却称之为『力量』。」
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- There is no escape from the creeping wildland grasses. Even the sturdiest fastnesses shall be ruined without leaving so much as a trace.\nAfter opponents affected by <color=#FFCC33>Quicken</color> are attacked, their Dendro and Electro RES will decrease. Keep weakening them to win with ease! ｜ 荒草的渗透无孔不入，将坚韧的防御摧毁于无形之中。\n处于<color=#FFCC33>原激化</color>状态下的敌人受到攻击后，这些敌人的草元素抗性和雷元素抗性会降低。不断削弱敌人，利落地取胜吧！

- Synopsis (Shots 1 to 6):\nThe scene revolves around members of the Tabletop Troupe taking part in an activity together. Guided by their Game Master, Clorinde, they encounter a <color=#e5870a>merchant</color>, a <color=#e5870a>Sternshield Crab</color> blocking their path, and a <color=#e5870a>Cryo Regisvine</color> guarding some treasure, in <color=#e5870a>that order</color>. Navia, who is playing an Adventurer, will attempt to use <color=#e5870a>"Persuasion"</color> in each encounter. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第6镜）：\n展现桌上剧团成员们一同进行活动时的场景。在克洛琳德饰演的主持人的引导下，众人<color=#e5870a>依次</color>与<color=#e5870a>商人</color>，挡路的<color=#e5870a>坚盾重甲蟹</color>和守护宝藏的<color=#e5870a>急冻树</color>遭遇。而在每一次遭遇中，娜维娅饰演的冒险家均会尝试对对方使用<color=#e5870a>「说服」</color>。

- Cyrus said that we need to stop monsters from taking this opportunity to attack us. So he put out commissions for adventurers to scout their movements out. ｜ 塞琉斯先生说，为了防止野外的魔物趁机发动攻击什么的，就发布了委托，让冒险家们去监视魔物的动向。
- Forget about the informant. Let's save her! ｜ 先别管接头的事了，快去救救她吧！
- You're most welcome. ｜ 不用客气。
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Hello there, dear passenger. Is there anything I can do for you? ｜ 亲爱的乘客您好！有什么可以为您服务的吗？
- Oh, so that's what you were... Meh, not as enticing an offer as I was, uh... Wait, Onikabuto farm? How many Onikabuto did you say you have? ｜ 哦原来是这样…这倒没那么吸引人啊…啊？鬼兜虫养殖基地！有多少鬼兜虫？
- Hmm? Are we not within our defensive walls as we speak? ｜ 哈？保护这座城市的城墙，我们现在不就在城墙里面吗？
- Gao the Sixth ｜ 高老六
- Well, so much for working at the Ministry of Civil Affairs. They still ask you to do stuff like "look for Archaic Stone in The Chasm"... ｜ 说来，没想到进了总务司，还要负责「在层岩巨渊找老石」这种工作…
- Elemental Reaction Record (Single Trial) ｜ 单次试炼元素反应次数记录
- "Please grace these insignificant, unfortunate souls with but a moment of bliss, just as my mistress once did, in that blissful era she once ushered in..." ｜ 「请您令这些渺小的、不幸的人也体会哪怕一瞬的幸福，正如我的女主人所带来的时代那样吧…」
- Are you an adventurer? ｜ 你是冒险家？
- Flowfrost Arrow DMG|{param1:F2P} ｜ 霜流矢伤害|{param1:F2P}
- Rumor has it that people who've ascended to Celestia have also witnessed the same helix-shaped divine ladder that can be seen within Visions. Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。
- Ningguang ｜ 凝光
- From that moment on, Peruere's journey was one written in flames. When the rain finally came and washed it all away, there she stood — the sole victor in "Mother's" endless game of slaughter, a trail of corpses strewn across her path to success. ｜ 烈火灼烧一切，又被大雨冲刷。孤身一人的佩露薇利踏着无数尸骸，成为了「母亲」心中唯一的「王」。
- I am the Millelith responsible for this zone. This is a major thoroughfare to Dihua Marsh. Merchants and tourists all pass this way, so I'm stationed here to stand guard. ｜ 我是负责这片区域的「千岩军」。因为这里是荻花洲的交通要道，无论是商货还是行人，都要从这里经过，所以我被派来做护卫。
- Español ｜ Español
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Haha, relax. I did say that a certain responsible adult would help him. ｜ 哎呀，别急嘛。我都说了，某位可靠的成年人会帮他的。
- Great, everyone's happy. You're good, we're good. However... ｜ 如此甚好。你们也好，我们也好。只是…$UNRELEASED
- Ahh... I haven't used up much energy today, but it's so late that I'm getting kinda sleepy... Why don't you find yourself a nice, soft pillow, and we'll call it a night? The best pillows are those ones made from dried Grainfruit leaves... Remind me to... make one for you... some time... zzz... ｜ 唔…虽然没有用掉多少力气，但到了这个点还是困了…你也找个软软的枕头，早点睡吧？用晒干的颗粒果叶片做的枕头最好了…下次我帮你…做一个…呼…
- Forest Trail Shuttle ｜ 林间小径的穿梭技巧
- Phew... I'm saved... Thank you so much... ｜ 呼…得救了…谢谢你们…
- That's normal. She never talks about her injury. ｜ 很正常，阿伽娅阿姨从来不谈论自己的伤。
- Look for suspicious documents ｜ 找到可疑的公文
- We were just acting, but now I can't stop thinking about all the changes I could make to the design... *sigh* Maybe I need a break from commissions... ｜ 明明是演戏，为什么刚才不由自主地想着图纸怎么改…唉…乙方做久了…

- Don't push yourself. ｜ 不必勉强。
- This must be the entrance the Pyro Archon told us about... The one ripped open by the Abyss. ｜ 这就是火神说的，被深渊撕开的入口吧。

- Marcel is the leader of the Confrerie of Cabriere, and was the organizer of the banquet years prior. The Confrerie and the Spina di Rosula have always maintained a close working relationship. Though his recollection of the events of the case is quite foggy, he is willing to defend Navia. ｜ 玛塞勒是卡布里埃商会的会长，也是几年前宴会的主办者，一直以来，刺玫会和卡布里埃商会都保持着很密切的合作关系。虽然对过去案件的记忆有些模糊，但他愿意为娜维娅提供庇护。
- Perhaps the outlanders are worried that something drastic will happen the moment they remove <color=#00E1FFFF>it</color>. ｜ 外乡人可能觉得<color=#00E1FFFF>发条</color>被拔出来的一瞬间会发生什么紧急情况。

- *sigh* Map? ｜ 地图。

- Anyway, what nice weather we've been having lately! ｜ 天气真不错啊，哈哈。
- Talk to Allpa ｜ 与阿尔帕对话
- Huh? Curve! Why didn't you say so earlier! Paimon was getting all worried for nothing! ｜ 啊？曲线！你怎么不早说！害我白担心！

- Because... most people aren't willing to give it a try. They think it's an unusual combination. Even though everyone who's tried it before rates it highly... ｜ 因为…很多人都不愿意尝试，觉得这种搭配很奇怪，虽然尝过的人评价都还不错…
- You're back! You were gone quite a while, too. So, how did it go? Run into any problems? ｜ 你们回来啦，还去得挺久的呢，怎么样，有遇到什么事吗？
- Listen to Kaveh's thoughts ｜ 倾听卡维的内心想法
- Everlasting Incense ｜ 永生香
- You two must be very good partners. ｜ 你们，肯定是很好的伙伴吧！
- What is it, Razor? Whatcha thinkin' about? ｜ 怎么了，雷泽，你在想什么？
- Wow, they really are. I didn't know such a flower existed, but I have heard about something similar! ｜ 哇！真厉害，没想到还有这样的花。我以前也听过类似的事情呢！
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- This is just a best guess, of course, but we suspect that the gaseous phlogiston stored in the trackballs... is drawn directly from the qucusaurs. ｜ 虽然只是猜测，不过「控制球」里储存的气态燃素…估计就是从绒翼龙身上抽的。
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Traveler, walk with me for a while. I know a perfect place for enjoying these Sakura Mochi. ｜ 旅行者，和我一起出去转转吧，我知道一个地方，很适合悠闲地吃掉这些点心。
- But I've been meaning to ask, does it never rain here? ｜ 但我想问一下，这里不会下雨是吗？
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Arataki Itto's specialty. He insists that this is a "heretofore unmatched dish" hand-made by "Arataki 'Number One Gourmet' Itto." Whether standing, sitting, or lying down, this'll fill your tummy in one shot and send you well on your way to becoming the second-mightiest being in the world. What a swell guy. ｜ 荒泷一斗的特色料理。对方一再强调这是由「荒泷美食大师一斗」亲手组装的「美味到古今无双的料理」。不管站着、坐着、躺着，只要吃下就能填饱肚子，吃完之后就能成为一人之下万人之上的强者…真是多谢他了。
- Tomoki ｜ 智树
- Relax, I've had a lot of experience with regret. Things are painful at first, but as they say, time heals all wounds. ｜ 放心吧，应对「遗憾」这方面我经验充足。刚开始确实会有点痛苦，但总有适应过来的那一天。
- Increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>. When party members obtain Elemental Shards from Crystallize reactions, the equipping character will gain 1 Seal, increasing Elemental Skill DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>27%</color>. The Seal lasts for 15s, and the equipper may have up to 2 Seals at once. All of the equipper's Seals will disappear 0.2s after their Elemental Skill deals DMG. ｜ 攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>；队伍中的角色获取结晶反应产生的晶片时，会为装备者赋予1枚「约印」，使元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>27%</color>，约印持续15秒，至多同时持有2枚。所有约印将在装备者的元素战技造成伤害后的0.2秒后移除。
- He pointed out that I am like the final pillar propping up my clan. If I marry into the Kujou Clan, that pillar is taken away. There will no longer be a voice of authority in the Hiiragi Clan, and it could be a disastrous move for my personal image, too... ｜ 如果我嫁去九条家，相当于顶梁柱离开，柊家就真的没有人能站出来说话了，对我个人的影响也很不利…
- Cannot play another <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C124051]</color> this Round. ｜ 本回合无法再打出<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C124051]</color>。
- I have friends who write novels. If they wrote this story, it would probably be even more complex. ｜ 说起来，我有些朋友平时常常创作小说，要是让他们来写，说不定，这个故事会更复杂。
- An elevated boardwalk that can used to construct paths between floating platforms as well as taller buildings. These boardwalks seem to have been made from simple wooden boards and ropes, but each board actually has an appropriately-sized Liyue Plaustrite shard embedded inside of it.\nCompared to large Sub-Space Boulders, these boardwalks have limited load-bearing capacity. Therefore, please refrain from leaving heavy items on the boards for a long time, or running or jumping while on the boardwalk... ｜ 高悬于空中的栈道，可以用来在各式浮空平台和较高的建筑之间搭建通路。这种栈道看似由简单的木板和绳索组合而成，实际上，木板内部嵌有厚度恰到好处的璃月「浮生石」断片。\n相比于硕大的「外景磐石」，这种栈道的承载能力有限，因此，切忌在栈道上长期放置重物，或是蹦跳打闹…
- Thundersoother ｜ 平息鸣雷的尊者
- Everyone has their preferences, so it's important to choose the right gift if you want to get through to them. ｜ 每个人的喜好都有不同，送出合适的礼物才能打动别人…
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- But why would one of The Four Winds... ｜ 可是，「四风守护」之一，为什么反而会…
- #Well, {NICKNAME} is Paimon's best friend, so of course {F#she's}{M#he's} the best person ever! Anyway, Paimon guesses this Withering business has been settled once and for all then, right? ｜ #毕竟，{NICKNAME}是我最好的伙伴，当然是最好的人！这样一来，死域的问题就彻底解决了吧！
- Obtain {param2} points ｜ 积分达到：{param2}
- My friend, I too have a letter for you to deliver. Please see it safely into the hands of the one who sent you here, and inform them that they will just have to wait a few more days. ｜ 这位朋友，你把这封信带回去吧，让船上的人再宽限我几天。
- Reply ｜ 回复
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- Gazing Up at Eternity, Looking Down at the World ｜ 仰观千秋，俯察万象
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- You and Paimon deliver the unconscious man to Lumidouce Harbor.\nThe people there immediately take him to receive medical treatment.\nKnowing that he is in good hands, the two of you return to where you were before. ｜ 与派蒙一同，将失去意识的人送到了柔灯港。\n柔灯港的人立刻出发，将他送去救治。\n随后才放下心来，与派蒙回到了原来的位置。
- And the seals of the ancient sages were created with energy from the Ley Lines, so if there's an anomaly in the Ley Lines... ｜ 而且古代贤者们使用的封印原本就是利用了地脉的力量构筑的，要是地脉发生了什么异变的话…
- Yeah, they said that I could go as long as I left the goods with them. Otherwise, they'd stuff me into my delivery box and toss me into the sea to drown... ｜ 嗯，他们说只要留下身上的货物就放我走，不然就把我装进快递箱丢海里，淹得死人的那种海。
- However, there are slightly too many dangerous Commissions for me to handle on my own. That is why I started asking you to help. ｜ 不过，足够危险的委托数量稍微有点多，我一个人已经忙不过来了，所以我才会请你来帮忙。
- Talk to Diona ｜ 与迪奥娜对话
- It's always a pleasure doing business with such sterling patrons. ｜ 不愧是客人，交易愉快。
- Report back to Heinry ｜ 向安里回报
- Oh no, you stay right there! ｜ 站好。
- #Say, {NICKNAME}... ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你说…
- Huh? What was I planning to send to Nechca again? Ugh, this memory of mine... ｜ …欸？我当初打算…送什么东西给妮赫佳来着？唉，我这个记性。
- ...Right, I'll let you handle that area, I'll take another. Let's meet up top when we're done. ｜ 那这边就交给你喽，我去处理另一侧。忙完之后，就到上面会合吧！
- Law and order-related affairs. ｜ 治安相关事务。
- We're here to see you, of course. ｜ 来看看丽莎。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param11:P}/{param12:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param11:P}/{param12:P}
- Before the Sakoku Decree was instated, it was our best-selling product... But the old edition has long ceased production, and we've switched to a new one since. ｜ 唔，本来在锁国令实施之前，这还是本店最热销的商品来着呢…但现在旧版的那种早就停产了，换成了重新设计的新版本。
- But given everything you've done for me, I'll be leaving the course in place for you in case you can't find a suitable place to train. ｜ 不过为了防止恩人你想要训练但找不到合适的地方，布设在这里的赛道我不会拆掉。
- We are both warriors, and the dialogue we must now have shall be conducted by the blade alone. ｜ 我们同为武人，此时此刻的对话方式，只有「战斗」这一种吧。
- (Apparently, these are military assets belonging to the Fatui Skirmishers. It is unclear how they ended up here. They're already filled with sand...) ｜ （显然是属于愚人众先遣队的军事资产，不知发生了什么才会被遗落在这里，里面已经盛装了不少沙子…）
- I mean, that girl didn't look all that strong to me... ｜ 而且那个小姑娘，看上去确实有点弱。
- Let's look at the next page. If you fold an origami bird like this, it'll fly further and more stably... ｜ 我们再看下一页，用这种折法来折小鸟的话，可以飞得更稳更远…
- In a way, I suppose I am... I have no idea what to do about my thesis. ｜ 这么说也没错，我的论文根本看不到出口。
- Hmm, if so many adventurers have failed to complete this commission, maybe this "missing villager" doesn't exist at all? Could it be some sort of... prank or something? ｜ 而且那么多冒险家最后都失败了，有没有可能根本就没有这个人？或者说是…恶作剧之类的？
- Number caught: {0} ｜ 捕获数量：{0}
- I'm sure Mona's mirage will stay true to her kind heart. ｜ 怀抱平常心的人，其幻境也会呈现出相应的亲切。这不是好事吗？
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> How does a person become as rich... no, as super rich as Lady Ningguang?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Is that the only impression she gives you? Riches?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Well, there's the huge Jade Chamber, too! But isn't that also made of Mora?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well, you need an excellent mind...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Well... Paimon's really good at giving people nicknames!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> You need to be very familiar with the workings of the markets...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> A serving of Fisherman's Toast goes for 1,025 Mora, and no discounts — even on rainy days.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> You also need to be willing to work really hard...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Okay then... so, how do you make friends with a really rich person?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Wait, you're giving up already!? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>要怎么样才能成为凝光大人那种，很有钱，又很有钱的人物呢！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>凝光给你的印象就只剩下钱了吗…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>还有大大的「群玉阁」！不过那也是用摩拉堆出来的吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那么，要有精明的头脑…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>派蒙擅长给人取绰号！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>要熟悉市场运作的规则…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>一份渔人吐司卖1025摩拉，下雨天也不会打折。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>要有高人一等的办事手腕…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>…怎样才能跟一个有钱人成为朋友呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这就已经放弃了吗？！
- Oh, Traveler, it's you. Well, "The Wrench" has always taken good care of me. Even now, he helps me out all the time — he's almost like a real brother to me. ｜ 是旅行者啊，是这样。从小扳子哥就一直很照顾我，平时也帮了我很多忙，他就和我亲哥哥一样。
- A rather compact tent that a single adventurer can set up with ease and spend the night.\nIt provides scant protection against the rain, however. A strong wind will simply blow the raindrops in through the tent's side. ｜ 紧凑的帐篷，独行的冒险家也能轻松搭建，就地过夜。\n可惜挡雨的效果不太理想，横风稍大，雨点就会从帐篷侧面灌进来。
- Oh, me? I'm chatting with the Spring Fairy. ｜ 哦，我在和泉水精灵聊天呢。
- "Gyoubu Koban" ｜ 「刑部小判」
- Thank goodness! Paimon thought we were done for! ｜ #你可算彻底恢复啦，{NICKNAME}，我都以为我们要完蛋了！
- ...Actually, I'm employed by the Commerce Guild to do menial tasks for all those stuffy old business people... ｜ …其实就是在商会任职，给那些迂腐的大商人打杂的…
- If you're up for it, why don't you help me take it out to him? You'll be paid for your work. ｜ 你要是愿意，就帮我跑个腿吧，报酬少不了你的。
- Talk to Little Meng ｜ 与小蒙对话
- Upon damaging an opponent, increases CRIT Rate by <color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color>. Max 5 stacks. A CRIT Hit removes all stacks. ｜ 攻击造成伤害时，暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color>，最多堆叠5次。攻击造成暴击后，移除已有的专注效果。
- Houzhang ｜ 侯章
- Uhh, Nahida's talking about confusing stuff again... ｜ 纳西妲又在讲些让人摸不着头脑的话了…
- #{M#No. It's just that I find this story quite familiar...}{F#Definitely not!} ｜ #{M#没有啦，只是，总觉得这个故事很熟悉…}{F#我才没有！}
- Table & Chairs ｜ 万用的桌椅
- Eh? Is that the bell? ｜ 欸？是这个铃声…
- Nor does time retain any meaning — ten million years pass in what seems but a moment. ｜ 千万年的岁月好像只在一个瞬息就过去了。因为时间已经没有意义。
- Deceitful Domain: Where Bloodhounds Gather ｜ 诡境·血狼集群
- Mika ｜ 米卡
- Uh... Ahaha, I've got to say that I've never tasted such... outlandish flavors in my life. ｜ 唔嗯…呃…哈哈，是没尝过的异国风味呢。
- Should you get caught, you would easily be able to talk your way out of it. ｜ 失手了以后好好解释一下，或许就能蒙混过去了。

- Illusory Bubble Explosion DMG|{param2:P} ｜ 泡影破裂伤害|{param2:P}
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Oh, yeah, and I was with Yakov. We got into a fight, and that's why he threw the insignia away. ｜ 哦，对了，雅科夫，我是和雅科夫一起行动的，这之间还和他大吵了一架，导致他扔掉了这枚徽记…
- Nara got it wrong, but it doesn't matter. There is a lot of "next time". Any time playing with Nara is "the right time" for Aragita. ｜ 那菈记错了，不过没关系，有很多「下一次」。和那菈玩耍，对兰耆都来说，任何时候都是「正确的时机」。
- A handwritten Pita Pocket recipe, with detailed cooking tips in small letters. The writer's penmanship seems questionable. Some letters are shaky, perhaps due to the bad condition she was in. However, every word was written carefully.\nIf you have learned how to cook it, don't forget to enjoy this delicious food together with her the next time you visit Gandharva Ville. ｜ 一份手抄的「口袋饼」菜谱，还用小字注明了详细的烹饪要点。从字迹来看作者并不怎么擅长书写，或许是因为受疾病影响，一些字迹还有些抖动，但纸上的每一笔都写得很认真。\n如果学会了它，下次来化城郭的时候，再和她一起分享这种美味的食物吧。
- Details ｜ 详情
- Hmm? ｜ 欸？
- This? Is a musical instrument? Can it really make a decent sound? ｜ 乐器，这个吗？这个真的能敲出声音吗？
- The iron mask the knight used to conceal their identity. Many have speculated about the face behind the mask. ｜ 骑士用来遮掩自己面目的铁面具，关于面具下的容貌几何曾有无数猜想。
- Bubu Pharmacy always runs out of digestive herbs during the festival seasons. With Lantern Rite just around the corner, I thought we should get prepared. ｜ 每逢节庆，「不卜庐」内健胃消食类药品都会脱销。很快就是海灯节了，我想提前做好准备。
- My name's Xavier. ｜ 我叫泽维尔。
- Why don't you pick? We'll let you know if we've heard it already. ｜ 你选吧，听过的我们就直接跳过。
- Beacon of the Reed Sea ｜ 苇海信标
- I appreciate it, and I'll take it. ｜ 这份好意我就不客气地收下了。
- Even if Cater was here, you still wouldn't be allowed to drink any more Fonta today. ｜ 哪怕卡特哥哥在这里，今天也不能再喝枫达了。
- <color=#B09057FF>Glacial Bloom</color> gains a new ability: Periodically unleashes Ice Mist. ｜ 为<color=#B09057FF>「奇术机关·鲛冰万华」</color>附加新的能力，使其能够间歇性在周围释放冰雾。
- Read ｜ 阅读
- This is hardly a peaceful land. That such things would happen is little surprise. ｜ 毕竟这是块充满争斗的土地，发生这样的事也并不奇怪吧。
- She's just... awkward in social situations. ｜ 她只是不善交际。
- "The sky graced with stars far and wide casts bright light. The birds of tireless tweets are a company to your sleep." ｜ 「繁星渺茫，但也是光亮的灯火，鸟雀啁哳，但也会伴你憩息。」
- About the Sign of Apaosha... ｜ 关于「焚真之天象」…
- Could that person over there really be the Gem Master? Let's go ask! ｜ 那边的人，难不成就是那位「珠宝大师」？我们去问问吧！
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Seems like Ororon found a chance to fight back. ｜ 看来欧洛伦反击了。
- It certainly sounds tasty. ｜ 听上去很好吃。
- We need to help move some goods at the port. Let's go. ｜ 去港口帮忙搬运一些货物，我们快出发吧。
- Note ｜ 便条
- You fail to escape... ｜ 逃离失败了…
- Where are you off to today, is it far? My schedule is actually free right now. ｜ 是要出远门吗？我今天暂时还没有什么安排。
- Decreases Stamina depleted by climbing and sprinting for all party members by <color=#3399CCFF>15–25%</color> for 900s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色攀爬和冲刺消耗的体力降低<color=#3399CCFF>15%-25%</color>，持续900秒。

- He would go underwater to play with the children as well. ｜ 他还会下水陪「孩子们」玩。
- Xiao Lantern-making is a traditional craft form at Lantern Rite. It's quite technical, you need to cut the paper, insert the wick, add wish sticks, paint it... ｜ 制作「霄灯」可是一门传统手艺，扎纸、入芯、置签、上漆…
- Hello, Archon. I'm fishing. ｜ 火神大人，你好。我在钓鱼。
- I'm sorry, please let me mark these down... Alright, I've got it. I will get people to verify these locations immediately, and once we have verified them, we will go and repel these Treasure Hoarders. ｜ 抱歉，请让我记一下…好了，我知道了，我们会马上派人去核实，如果情况属实的话，我们马上就会前往击退他们。
- That's enough, Jean. ｜ 够了，琴。
- But Paimon doesn't see Ruu anywhere either... ｜ 不过，也没看见阿瑠…

- Inazuma: Realm of Tranquil Eternity ｜ 稻妻·寂远无妄之国
- No need. I have a fairly good idea of where you were headed. And today is just not good for me. ｜ 不用说，我也知道你要说什么，今天不太合适。
- A map of Mondstadt carried by a Treasure Hoarder. Someone with terrible handwriting has made some notes on a location not too far away. ｜ 盗宝团成员所携带的蒙德地区地图。上面用歪歪扭扭的字迹做了标注，标注的地点就在不远处…
- Right! And the contract I have is enough to get him arrested... Isn't it? ｜ 是啊，明明凭我手上的契约，就足够把他抓起来了…是吧？
- Complete Desperate difficulty ｜ 达成死斗难度
- Thank you, friend. If it weren't for you, I'd still be taking a beating from those meka... ｜ 谢谢你，好心的朋友。要是没有你，我不知道要被那些机关揍到什么时候…
- Gathering Swell ｜ 水形聚引
- "As the ruler is, so shall the people be."\nThis precept was something Kokomi heard from her mother a long time ago.\nThe Divine Priestess' role is one of utmost importance to Watatsumi Island, and its people's eyes are always upon her every move.\nThe things she loves will be in fashion, and the things she dislikes, the people will also distance themselves from.\nKokomi, in truth, has no wish to affect the people's lives, and as such has rarely ever revealed much of her personal likes or dislikes.\nShe treats all things with an egalitarian manner, and holds "fairness of judgment" and "justice in dispensing rewards and punishment" to be her guiding principles.\nHowever, these are not necessarily her true feelings, and so she prepared a book of secret notes for herself.\nHere, she records the fluctuations in both her energy levels and mood.\nWhen the night deepens and the world falls silent, Kokomi will open this book and write the day's experiences, whether they be joyous, sad, or frustrating.\n...Of course, this object is for her eyes only — and so it must remain. ｜ 「人君犹盂，上行下效。」\n这是心海许久之前从母亲那听来的箴言。\n现人神巫女对海祇岛的意义重大，无数双眼睛盯着她的一举一动。\n她喜欢的东西会被民众追捧，她厌恶的东西也会被民众摒弃。\n心海不希望自己影响到民众原本的生活，所以很少表露出自身的好恶。\n她对任何事物都持平等态度，将「公平公正」、「赏罚分明」当做原则。\n然而，这些并非心海的本意，所以她为自己准备了一本秘密笔记。\n上面不仅记录了她「能量」的变化，也记录着她心情的起伏。\n每当夜深人静，心海就会打开笔记，记下一天的喜怒哀乐。\n…当然，这是绝对不能被别人看到的东西。
- (A faint fragrance lingers on the pages.) ｜ （书页间还留有些许香气。）
- #Hmph, {NICKNAME}'s culinary skill needs no praise! Hey, save some for Paimon! ｜ #哼哼，{NICKNAME}的手艺那还用说！喂，你们也给我留点呀！

- You could say that... ｜ 嗯，算是吧…

- The capsule is clearly visible in the picture I took. You can look for yourself. ｜ 在我拍摄的画片上，也能清楚地看到这枚神明罐装知识喔。
- There... appears to be a great number of hilichurls over there... ｜ 那边…那边好像有很多丘丘人…

- It's like when a Rishboland Tiger comes leaping at you and you quickly slip under its tummy to dodge its attack... Weird analogy, I know, but that's basically how it is. ｜ 举个例子就是，当长鬓虎向你扑来的时候，你是否有可能一个滑铲到长鬓虎肚子底下规避攻击…例子很怪，但大体是这种感觉。
- You are back! I gotta say, that was quick. Did you find the food? ｜ 你们回来了！好快啊，找到口粮了吗？
- Auspicious Motif 64 ｜ 祝语纹样·之六十四
- Oh... Sorry for eavesdropping, sounds like you were talking about something private. ｜ 哎呀不好意思，难道你说的是那种不能公开聊的话题？
- "Thank you, I'll work on creating a film advertisement poster that will satisfy Mr. Xavier."\n"This is the first time I've had to attempt such an artwork, so I must admit that I'm actually a little nervous, hehe..." ｜ 「谢谢你，我会努力画出让那位泽维尔先生满意的『映影宣传画』的。」\n「我还是第一次画这种画，有些紧张呢，嘿嘿…」
- <color=#625C41FF>"Big boat, strong! Bake-danuki, sat in mud boat once... Glug glug."\n"Why would anyone make a mud boat!? ...Actually, that reminds Paimon of that guy Ulfr from Mondstadt..."</color> ｜ <color=#625C41FF>「大船厉害。以前，有妖狸坐泥巴船，咕噜咕噜。」\n「为什么会有人用泥巴做船啦！不过，泥巴船的故事，感觉有点像蒙德的乌尔法…」</color>
- That's not all! We also provide an on-site cadaver collection service covering almost all regions in Liyue. Now, we do charge a slight premium for a very small number of especially dangerous areas, but... but don't you worry about that, I promise you it's still very affordable! ｜ 还有还有！我们支持现场回收服务！业务范围覆盖璃月绝大部分地区，个别凶险地带要追加收费，啊——你可以放心，很便宜哦！
- What do you mean? Don't they all look like this? Don't worry, I won't be too long. ｜ 嗯？合成台不是都长这个样子吗？放心吧，我很快就好。
- Yeah, I've got them. ｜ 带回来了。
- I'm really curious to find out what the first thing you'll do today is. ｜ 我很好奇你今天的第一件事，会做什么呢？

- Upon completing this challenge, you will be awarded Glimmering Essence.\nThe power that surges beneath the earth attracts monsters that desire it. Since Festering Desire also yearns for power and will grow as you continue to fight, this may be a good place to test it out. ｜ 完成挑战后，能获得「微光精粹」。\n因为地下奔流的力量，会吸引魔物与贪求力量的人。既然「腐殖之剑」具有渴慕力量的特殊性质，能随着战斗成长，或许这也是不错的试剑之地。

- Is he allowed to eat soup while at work? ｜ 他在工作时能喝吗？
- A berry with thorns that often gets attached to a wolf's pelt. When you look at it, you can almost hear the echoing cries of the wolves in the woods. ｜ 带着勾刺的莓果，会挂在狼的毛皮上来迁徙。看见它时，仿佛能听见狼的凄嚎在林间回荡…

- But we can't just do nothing at all, because then... nothing at all will happen. ｜ 可是什么都不做的话，也不会有什么发生嘛。

- A bird feather that was picked up by the knight who walked with the North Wind in the snow. It still awaits the day when it will thaw. ｜ 与北风同行的骑士于雪中拾获的鸟羽，如今依旧静候解冻之刻。

- Let's see... This time, try to reach the destination within 100 seconds. ｜ 我想想，这次的目标是在100秒内，抵达终点。
- Anyway, Seelie annoy me... ｜ 总之，我讨厌仙灵…
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 击败所有敌人
- Two Weasels in a Trenchcoat... or Was It Three? ｜ 没有第三只吗？
- Though the battle with the Lord of Eroded Primal Fire has ended, this ring-shaped flame yet burns.\nIn the beginning, in the deepest, darkest of nights, the master of flame emulated the sun, thus supplanting the light of the starry skies.\nThough the flame's glow has been halfway corroded, it still reflects the world of old in its glory. ｜ 在与蚀灭的源焰之主战斗后，仍在不息燃烧的环状火焰。\n最初，在最深邃的夜晚里，执掌火焰的主人仿照太阳，以此取代星空的光芒。\n一半的火焰已受侵蚀的焰芒之辉，似乎还能看出映照旧日世界的光采。
