- This is the Soul Guide's Locus, and this is where my final thoughts remain. ｜ 此处是引魂之处，也是妾身最后的执念所在。
- Come now, this is for an important occasion, is it not? Even I've chosen to throw profit to the wind. Surely a... selfless hero like yourself wouldn't turn your back on a good cause? ｜ 哎呀，这可是为了「三川花祭」，连我都不计得失全力操办，你这么善良…一定不忍心拒绝吧？
- Report back to Najat ｜ 向纳杰特回报
- Recommendation: Cut from the wilds of Natlan ｜ 推荐：纳塔野外砍伐
- ...Huh!? ｜ 啊？
- I don't think so. With her personality, it's more likely that she got wrapped up in some sort of trouble. ｜ 倒也不一定，以她的个性，被其他麻烦事缠上的可能性反而更大。
- Oh, a rare guest. We don't see small Tepetlisaurs every day here. And combined with this... Well, you sure have quite a few different breeds of companions, don't you? ｜ 哦，这还真是稀罕的客人，我们这儿可不常见小嵴锋龙。还有这边的…你的伙伴品种真是多样啊。
- #You indeed have an agile mind, {NICKNAME}. Cloud Retainer was not mistaken in her high estimation of you. ｜ #{NICKNAME}你素来机敏，也不枉留云对你评价甚高。
- (Knock on the chest.) ｜ （敲箱子。）
- Well, now that our work is out of the way, there's nothing standing between us and that afternoon tea we were promised... ｜ 好！那接下来就是快乐的下午茶时间…
- ... ｜ ……
- The fireballs raining from the sky were probably missiles... ｜ 如果从天而降的火球是导弹…
- I merely feel that if I am to offer up a poem for Liyue as it is today, then I must draw inspiration from the city itself. ｜ 我是想，既然要以如今的璃月港赋诗，那从这座璃月港本身取材最好。
- (Nod.) ｜ （点头。）
- (It looks like an ordinary box, but Lyney somehow moved instantly from the stage to being inside of it... how did he do it?) ｜ （看上去只是个普通的箱子，林尼在表演的时候用某种手法瞬间从舞台移动到了这里面…怎么做到的呢？）
- Then there's no time to lose! Please, just relax, and get ready to enjoy this paper theater performance! ｜ 那事不宜迟，就请两位放松心情，好好体验一下「剪纸戏」！
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Tsk... ｜ 「嘁…」
- Get your mojo back today! Choose Favonian-brand potions, for peace of mind and results you can trust. ｜ 扫除疲惫，做回自己！西风骑士团特许炼金药剂，给您安心，让您放心。
- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Makani 'olu'olu." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「浪暖风柔」。
- Fruit tea mixed according to precise ratios. The tea's aroma is light and elegant while the fruit's fragrance is gentle, making for a drink that can be enjoyed hot or cold — each with its own unique charm. ｜ 以恰当比例混合而成的果茶。茶香淡雅，果香温润，冷饮热饮各有一番风味。

- I didn't expect it to go so well. You've recovered two relics now! What a hook, Mr. Kayvan! ｜ 没想到会这么顺利，一下子就找回了两件文物！不愧是你呀，凯万先生！
- Yes... yes... ｜ 是的。是的。

- Well, that is quite enough ancient history for now. Ganyu, have you had word from Shenhe? ｜ 本仙的事就说到这吧。甘雨，申鹤那孩子最近有联系你吗？

- Get up... In a crowded market like this, the only person who should be trying to hide is me. ｜ 爬起来…偏偏是在人这么多的集市，想要藏起来的应该是奶奶我才对。
- A seasoned and cooked meat dish. Though it contains animal organ meat and bits and scraps of other things, the strong-flavored seasonings have masked the stench of the meat. Many have had this dish for the entirety of their lives without knowing "chop suey" is actually a swear word in the local language. ｜ 调味后烤熟的肉料理。虽然原料主要取自动物内脏及边角料，但经过一番调味和加工，完全掩盖了原本的肉腥味。很多人吃了一辈子才知道原来菜名中的杂碎不是在骂某个叫中原的人。
- Village Keepers are researchers who have been exiled to Aaru Village. But in truth, I don't really remember what I did there. ｜ 所谓的「守村人」，就是曾经被流放到阿如村的学者。但说实话，我不太记得自己在那边的经历了。

- This doesn't feel very comforting. ｜ 感觉没起到什么安慰的作用。
- They had to find a scapegoat to pacify the Takatsukasa Clan, so Kujou Takayuki must have told her to sign it immediately. ｜ 因为这就是九条孝行指使的，九条家必须要尽快拎出一个替罪羊，不平息事件，就没法和鹰司家交代。
- It's this guy called Kunihiko. He's practically always been unemployed, wastes his days away, and he owes a lot of money... like, a lot! But get this — I don't see him for a few days, and suddenly I find him dressed to the nines and feasting at a high-class restaurant! ｜ 我认识一个叫邦彦的小子，成天不务正业，欠了不少钱。结果呢？几天不见，就穿得人模人样，还在高级饭馆里吃香喝辣了！

- Let us take in the sights for a bit longer, if just for his sake. ｜ 我们再多看几眼吧，替他多看几眼。
- Tall ｜ 高位
- Guess I better hit the books again and do some more research before trying again... ｜ 我回去得再好好研究一下…
- Life is unfair, and not all have the luxury of enjoying their hobbies. Thus, Emilie truly treasures such opportunities.\nCollecting perfumes was once her mother's hobby, but due to her work, she was able to apply them less than frequently, and so those top-shelf fragrances would eventually become Emilie's treasures. She loved the shiny bottles and the clear fluids within, basking in the mysterious reactions produced by interwoven aromas.\nIt was due to her hobby of perfumery that she later became quite taken with traveling to gather materials.\nShe has scaled snowy mountains few have traversed, and squeezed her way through the packed markets of other lands. Fragrances are shapeless, and are thus easily overlooked, but they are a necessary component of any person's living environment. Most people have somewhat unvaried preferences in this regard, but Emilie accepts all comers. Good, bad, simple, complex, Emilie carefully categorizes them all in her heart, and they form for her a bridge to understanding this world.\nFrom such a perspective, fragrances are no luxury, but rather, a thing that people can naturally enjoy... and thus, perfumes should be no different.\nOf course, this is very much against market trends. It is practically taken as a given that those crystalline, gem-like products should be placed under the searing spotlight and sold at extravagant prices.\nAnd Emilie remains but a hobbyist, and as such, cannot change this state of affairs by herself. Thus, many of her works have never reached the shelves of any shop. As one who works outdoors herself, she has designed insect-repelling, anti-perspiration perfume, though such a notion doesn't even sound remotely romantic. She also developed a fragrance specifically for Melusines to enjoy, but humans seemed unwilling to buy them.\nNot that she was disappointed, of course. That she could get these products into the hands of those who needed them was satisfaction enough.\nOf course, she does have some real regrets. For example, the risk of small animals knocking over or inadvertently ingesting chemicals keeps her from having a psychological support pet, which limits her to playing with other people's puppies in the park.\nNaturally, she also has to avoid wearing perfume when going to meet them. Animals have sensitive noses, after all, and she would very much like to be their friend. ｜ 生活是不公的，不是所有人都有享受爱好的余裕。艾梅莉埃格外珍惜这样的机会。\n收藏香水曾是母亲的爱好，但工作让她不能经常喷涂，那些置之高阁的香水后来都成了艾梅莉埃的宝藏。她喜欢亮晶晶的瓶子和里面澄澈的液体，享受香味交织的神奇反应。\n后来，因为调香这项爱好，她又迷上了到各地采风旅行。\n她登上过罕无人迹的雪山，也挤过气味繁杂的异国集市。气味是无形的，总是被人忽略，但它们是构成一个人生活环境的必要因素。人们对香味的喜好倾向总是类似，但艾梅莉埃却将它们全部接纳。或好的，或坏的，或简单的，或复杂的，艾梅莉埃将它们在心中细细分类，搭成她认识世界的桥梁。\n这样看来，香味并不是奢侈品，是人们自然而然可以享受到的东西，那么香水也不应当是。\n但这明显有违市场倾向。那些晶莹剔透、如宝石一般的作品，似乎理应被放进灯光聚焦的展柜，卖出更高的价格。\n艾梅莉埃终究是只是个爱好者，无法以一己之力改变这种趋势。因此，她的很多作品并没有登上货架的机会。她为室外工作者设计过驱虫止汗的香水，但这明显听起来不够浪漫；她为美露莘们调制过她们喜欢的味道，但人类似乎并不愿意买账。\n对此，艾梅莉埃倒不觉得遗憾。她将这些作品直接送到需要的对象手中，就已经得到满意的结果。\n当然，也有一些遗憾的事情。比如她不能冒着小动物打翻或者误食化学品的风险满足自己的心理需求，所以无法在家中饲养宠物，只能在公园散步时和其他人家的小狗玩耍。\n去见狗狗们的时候她自然也是不涂香水的。小动物们的鼻子都很敏感，她希望能和它们成为好朋友。
- Food ｜ 食物

- ... ｜ ……
- It's over. It's not like we're making a big cut anyway, I'm not losing my life here. ｜ 认栽吧。就咱们拿到的那点分成，犯不着把命搭上。
- One day, you and Paimon receive a mysterious commission from the Adventurers' Guild: "Protagonist Wanted." You set off on a new journey, searching for wondrous companions... ｜ 某天，你和派蒙在冒险家协会处接到了一份「寻找主角」的神秘委托，踏上了寻找奇妙伙伴的旅途…
- There's no need to be afraid, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙不要怕。
- My master is a much better storyteller than me. Even when we're telling the same story about Antara, he's always able to draw in a huge crowd! ｜ 师父讲故事的功力可比我强上不少，同样是安塔拉的故事，从他嘴里说出来，就能吸引一大片听众！
- I'd like to invite you to come and see these flowers when they bloom. It's probably going to be tomorrow or the day after. Will you be able to make it? ｜ 这些花开了我就叫你们来看，明天或者后天，它们说不定就开了，你有空来看吧？
- Ugh, what's up with him? He's being so calm and polite, so why does everything he says make Paimon wanna punch him? ｜ 这家伙到底怎么回事？虽然他和和气气的，但听得我好生气啊。
- As the number of exiles increased, more and more people joined the community. When the first group of exiles died, they left the yet-unfinished fortress to their successors. ｜ 随着被流放者增加，更多人走上他们的老路。最初一批成员去世前，将当时还不完善的梅洛彼得堡留给其他被流放者。
- Oh, the creep who calls himself K'uhul Ajaw! Yeah, we've had the pleasure of meeting him too... He sure loves pushing people's buttons. ｜ 啊！是那个自称库胡勒阿乔的坏东西！我们也领教过了，真是生怕别人不讨厌它的样子…
- Follow Little Mao ｜ 跟随小茂
- Sesshou Sakura DMG: Level 4|{param4:F1P} ｜ 杀生樱伤害·肆阶|{param4:F1P}
- Cheerful Paper Frog ｜ 欢快的纸蛙
- Complete "Caribert." ｜ 完成「卡利贝尔」剧情
- Report back to Cabin ｜ 向小屋复命
- Chongyun is one-in-a-million: He has a pure-yang spirit! So, as soon as he gets close, evil spirits run and hide! ｜ 重云他是千年一遇的「纯阳之体」，妖邪们见到他都得躲着走呢。
- Get this free special issue to bring you that first ray of sunshine after the rain! ｜ 惠请各位市民免费领取本期特刊，在雨过天晴之时，为您带来第一缕阳光！
- Taste ｜ 品尝
- Avuia ｜ 阿乌伊娅
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Only the people of Natlan are eligible for the Pilgrimage... But you can still cheer Kachina on. ｜ 归火圣夜巡礼似乎只有纳塔人才能报名…接下来就先帮卡齐娜加油助威吧。
- I feel like running. ｜ 好想跑一会儿步呀。
- When the dash from the Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>Swallow-Wisp Pinion Dance</color> hits a target, if it interacts with <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>Pyro</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>Electro</color>, the Swallow-Wisp Shield will undergo Elemental Absorption, with the converted shield absorbing DMG from the corresponding element with 250% efficiency.\nAdditionally, if this use of <color=#FFD780FF>Swallow-Wisp Pinion Dance</color> causes the Swallow-Wisp Shield to undergo Elemental Absorption, the Feathermoon Rings that Lan Yan throws at her foes additionally deal Elemental DMG equal to 50% of the original in the corresponding Elemental Type. This DMG is considered Elemental Skill DMG. ｜ 元素战技<color=#FFD780FF>凤缕随翦舞</color>的突进命中目标时，如果接触了<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>火元素</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素</color>，则会使凤缕护盾发生元素转化，转化后的护盾对于对应元素伤害有250%的吸收效果。\n此外，如果这次元素战技<color=#FFD780FF>凤缕随翦舞</color>使凤缕护盾发生了元素转化，蓝砚向敌人抛出的翦月环将附加原本50%对应元素伤害，该伤害视为元素战技伤害。
- Hey! Stop! ｜ 不准跑！
- So here you are, Ganyu! ｜ 甘雨小姐，果然在这里。
- Shhh! Don't let anyone else hear! I'm only telling you, alright!? ｜ 嘘！让别人听见就不好了！我可只跟你一个人说啊。
- I couldn't say... ｜ 我不好说…
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Dwelling Wall: Guiding Lines."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「端居石墙-『辅助线』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Wait up! I'll come too! ｜ #{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！我、我也来帮忙！
- Strange Bottle ｜ 奇特的水瓶
- Worse than you for sure. ｜ 比你差远了。
- King of Constellation Metropole ｜ 星轨王城国王
- We'll go with you. ｜ 我们陪你一起。
- Anyway, it's all yours now, Traveler. Take a look, see if you can see Nora's imaginary friend. ｜ 总之东西已经给你了，你来试试，看诺拉的「幻想朋友」吧。
- Oh, sorry! Am I talking too much? Hehe, I just get so excited when I'm in a new place — I wanna see everything there is to see. I've always got the energy to explore! ｜ 啊，抱歉，是不是我自顾自说太多了？嘿嘿，到了新地方我静不下来，这也想看那也想看。完全不觉得累呢！
- Lure the Wenut into attacking the rocks and wait for charging to complete ｜ 引导沙虫攻击岩石，等待充能完成
- Do you know me? I'm sorry, but I don't recognize you... ｜ 你认识我？抱歉，我对你好像没什么印象了。
- Thank you, but that's not why I did it.... I did it for the future of my tribe and the future of Natlan. ｜ 谢谢，但这并不重要，我是什么都不重要。但是部族人的未来，纳塔的未来非常重要。
- So they're all worth about the same amount? ｜ 这么说来它们的价值都差不多吗？
- Motif: White Flower ｜ 纹样·素花
- Speak to Short-Tempered Wallit ｜ 与急躁的瓦里特对话
- #{M#Huh. He seems to only respond to you, Mamere...}{F#...?} ｜ #{M#唔，好像只对玛梅赫说的话有反应…}{F#…？}
- Ah, finally some relief... ｜ 总算是好点了，唉…
- I was talking about the script! ｜ 是桌上剧团的故事啦！
- ...But I suppose that might be a quirk endemic to navigators. ｜ …不过话说回来，这可能是大部分航海士的通病了吧。
- I guess I would've remembered the place and the people more fondly if it wasn't for that disagreement I had with that one commission-giver while on a map-making assignment... Eh, whatever. No point talking about that now. ｜ 如果不是因为那次制图委托，和雇主闹了些不愉快…或许我还会更想念庄里的茶和老人家…算啦，那些事情就不说了。
- Natlan ｜ 纳塔
- Yeah, that's right... ｜ 那倒是…
- Although sometimes, I almost wish I could. ｜ 有时候会有点可惜。
- Wow, what a professional answer. He even had the specific clauses handy! ｜ 好、好专业的发言！而且还有具体的条款！
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- You don't need to worry about me. Mr. Edwin taught me how to use the Generator personally. ｜ 您大可不用担心我。「实验性场力发生装置」的操作方法可是艾德温先生亲自教给我的。
- The only tangible thing my great-great-grandmaster left is the original draft of "Legend of Antara." ｜ 现在祖师爷实打实留下来的东西，也就只有《安塔拉传奇》的原型考据了。
- Player {0} invites you to join them to play "Across the Wilderness" together. You will automatically refuse the invite in {1} second(s). ｜ 玩家{0}发起「跨野寻踪」游戏邀请，{1}秒内未确认将自动拒绝。
- Spray the potions with Yasmin ｜ 和雅丝敏一起播撒药水
- Give it your all, you guys... ｜ 你们俩继续加油…
- A Creature From Someone's Imagination ｜ 被某人拟想而出的虚型之物
- #And that is where the secret lies! If the goal was only to follow the rules and move about on the wooden piles, then it would have been a piece of cake with {NICKNAME}'s agility. ｜ #你看，这便是其中玄巧所在！如若只打算循规蹈矩，在木桩之上闪转腾挪，以{M#少侠}{F#女侠}矫捷的身法，自然也是易如反掌。
- Great, that's just what I was thinking! ｜ 好，正合我意！
- You call this "nothing bad"? Ohh, poor Benben... ｜ 这也叫没出什么事吗…奔奔，奔奔…
- Frostflake Arrow DMG|{param9:P} ｜ 霜华矢命中伤害|{param9:P}
- Select material ｜ 选择材料
- Teucer ｜ 托克
- Use your Splish-Splash Waterballoons to suppress the enemy, Bongo-Head! ｜ 用「哗哗闪闪大水球」来压制对手，「咚咚小圆帽」！
- Consider it a pearl of wisdom from a retired Saurian rider. My issues are my own to solve. Don't let them ruin your mood. ｜ 就当是前驭龙师教给你的经验之谈吧，我的问题需要我自己解决，不要因为我的失态坏了你的心情。
- Talk to Oleg ｜ 与奥列格对话
- The Fontinalia Film Festival is an event proposed by the Fontaine Film Association this year. Now that film technology has matured as a medium, it's the perfect time to introduce more people to the art form. ｜ 这是今年「枫丹映影协会」提出的活动。如今映影技术渐渐走向成熟，也是时候让这一艺术得到更多人关注了。
- Ahem... If I may so ask, where do you usually collect your literature? Perhaps you could share a tip or two with a friend, my liege...? ｜ 咳咳…你平时都从哪搜集这些读物的，可否透露一二？
- Darn it! We've been kicked out again! ｜ 可恶，我们又被弹出来了！
- The exorcism will take place this evening. You're both more than welcome to come and watch if you're interested. ｜ 驱邪仪式会在晚上举办，如果两位感兴趣的话，也可以过来看看。
- Knowing the truth will put our minds at ease. ｜ 还是掌握真相最让人放心。
- So that's why you wanted us to come with you. ｜ 原来这才是找我同行的理由。
- I find that's a very reasonable suggestion, Ms. Mary-Ann. But I will need to ask for Ms. Mamere's consent. ｜ 我认为您的提议十分合理，玛丽安小姐。但我需要先征求玛梅赫小姐的同意。
- Exactly! Heehee, look, Paimon's tummy is so stuffed, it's all round and plump now... ｜ 就是啊！嘻嘻，你看我肚子都吃得圆滚滚了…
- (Passive) When the battle begins, attach <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C124032]</color> to this character. ｜ 【被动】战斗开始时，本角色附属<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C124032]</color>。

---
### Part 147

- Ugh... I think I've had too much to drink again, I've got a headache setting in and my memory's gone foggy... ｜ 呃，我好像又喝多了，头有点痛，记不太清了…
- Do you see all these pots here? Some of them are bound to have liquor inside, right? ｜ 你看，这里有这么多罐子，肯定会有一两个装酒的吧？
- (Test) I like your style. I'm excited to see what we will come up with. Now, go and get me the materials I need! ｜ （Test）不错啊，不知道这次我们能炼出什么，快去给我找些稀有材料来吧！
- ...Hey, don't do impressions of Flora! It's disrespectful! ｜ 喂，怎么突然学起人家说话了！也太没礼貌了吧！
- (Fade to black. Shitou obtains samples.) ｜ （黑屏取样品）
- If you talk to the enemy too much, you will become close and your heart softens, which puts you at a disadvantage in battle... ｜ 如果跟敌人说太多话，关系也会变得亲密，心也会变的柔软，这样在战斗的时候就会陷入劣势…
- When carrying an Electrogranum, you can gain its blessing for so long as it lasts:\n·Characters can pass through the protective screen of Elementary Thunder Barriers.\n·When your active character is not <color=#FFACFFFF>affected by Electro</color>, they can interact with Thunder Spheres and other objects.\n·Electrograna can help characters block 6 instances of DMG from some of Inazuma's environmental hazards, such as Thunderstones and Balethunder areas.\n·Electrograna will last for 15s. ｜ 携带雷种子时，将在其存在时间内获得它的眷顾：\n·角色可以通过「若雷结界·初阶」的屏障。\n·当前场上角色在不处于<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素附着</color>状态下时，也能与「雷极」等物件进行交互。\n·雷种子将代替角色，抵挡6次稻妻的部分环境伤害，如「若雷石」与「雷祸」区域。\n·雷种子存在时间为15秒。
- Titu ｜ 蒂图
- Too far away, cannot activate this Emplacement ｜ 距离过远，无法开启当前兵机
- Don't worry too much about the material. If you think it'll be difficult to obtain, we can get it for you. ｜ 不用顾虑材料的事，如果觉得材料获取很麻烦，可以交给我们去找。
- "If you can do these things, you may light the lantern of utmost joy and receive a supreme blessing." ｜ 「只要能完成这些，就能够点亮至福之灯，从而获取无上赐福。」
- Diona's Special ｜ 迪奥娜的特制饮品
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Don't worry about it! We're just glad you're okay. Let's see... Your goods look fine, too. Guess the Abyss isn't after Mora! ｜ 不用客气啦，没事就好。我看看…嗯，东西也完好无损，嘿嘿，看来深渊一点都不喜欢摩拉。
- Keep Trying! ｜ 继续努力
- #So, I've been picking them here since then. If {F#he}{M#she} returns, or if I make new Nara friends, we can eat them together. ｜ #所以，我一直来这里采果实。如果{MATEAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}回来了，或者是，遇到了新的那菈朋友，就可以一起吃果实。
- Oh, and this is for you. Many thanks! ｜ 对了，这是餐费，辛苦你了。
- Hehe. So after all that, you do care! ｜ 嘿嘿，说了这么多，其实斯露莎还是关心同伴的嘛。
- Ann ｜ 安
- More About Kachina: IV ｜ 想要了解卡齐娜·其四
- Read the Signaling Guide ｜ 阅读「信号指南」
- Hah! Youkai-Style Play, at your service! ｜ 喝呀，妖球流参上！
- (Huh?) ｜ 呃？
- Guessing wrong when I flip an insignia is one way to use up some of the bad luck. So the probability of having some good luck in the near future just got a little higher. ｜ 举例来说，只要扔鸦印失败，就等于是消耗掉了不幸，接下来遇到好事的概率就会上升。
- Static Electricity Field ｜ 静电场力
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Huh! ｜ …哈！
- ...I don't want to meet him! I—I haven't really mentally prepared myself yet for such a... grand occasion! ｜ …我不要见那位大人！我、我还没做好心理准备，承担不了宏大的场面。
- The suspects who threatened Kiara might have to do with a certain smuggling case, but it is still uncertain if there is, in fact, another party behind all this. ｜ 威胁美露莘的人，应该与一起走私案有关。但不确定背后是否有人指使。
- That doesn't sound right... I need to carefully think things through... ｜ 好像不对…还是要再好好考虑一下…
- That's all I have to say. ｜ 我言尽于此。
- Does this have any practical applications? ｜ 这功夫有用吗？
- ... ｜ ……
- I could hardly understand anything that they were talking about, so I left saying I needed some inspiration. ｜ 他们的讨论我几乎都听不懂，所以就借口取材跑了出来。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Mazatan ｜ 马扎坦
- It's not nearly as scary as it sounds. Basically, natural hot springs have higher temperatures that not everyone can withstand. ｜ 没有听上去那么吓人啦。简单来说，天然温泉的水温比较高，不是每个人都能承受。
- (And why are there so few people around here? Where did everyone go?) ｜ （对了，这附近人怎么这么少？大家都去哪儿了？）
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Steel Stopper.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『禁足铁菱角』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Furthermore, could the grandeur of a land as magnificent as Liyue ever possibly be captured in a painting? ｜ 再说了，如此大的璃月，又怎么能是一幅画能画下来的？
- Florian ｜ 弗洛莱恩
- I do not understand. Previous lives do not exist. ｜ 不能理解。前世并不存在。
- #What an exhilarating match! Congratulations to the researcher and her assistant! And of course to their coach, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #真是精彩的比赛！恭喜研究员和助手！以及他们的教练{NICKNAME}！
- Let's go somewhere else. I want to show you something. ｜ 换个地方，我带你看一件东西。
- She had us run an errand for her. ｜ 我们帮过她的忙。
- Hey there, fancy trying your hand at Windtrace? ｜ 你好，想试试「风行迷踪」吗？
- Oh, so this is the place... ｜ 原来就是在这里啊…
- Traveling Doctor's Medicine Pot ｜ 游医的药壶
- That power reminds me of someone. ｜ 你让我想起了一位熟人。
- Oh, sorry, I'm getting off-topic... Thanks for your help, and please, take your payment. ｜ 啊，我扯远了，哈哈，这次多谢你们了，这些报酬还请收下吧。
- Verify ｜ 佐证
- That would be nice. Chatting with you would be great. ｜ 跟你聊天，是一件很舒服的事情。
- Ride the Maritime Express to the end of the world ｜ 搭乘「海上列车」，前往世界尽头
- Sorry, sorry! Did I push the pace a bit too much? I mean, you were the ones who said you were travel experts. ｜ 对不住对不住，赶路太快了？不是说一直在外面旅行的吗你。
- Domain of Blessing: Crumbling Assembly ｜ 祝圣秘境：朽废的集所
- Always energetic and full of life, Amber's the best — albeit only — Outrider of the Knights of Favonius. ｜ 永远充满活力的女孩，骑士团最优秀，同时也是最后的侦察骑士。
- Hey, looks like those two people are lying on the ground... Are they stargazing? ｜ 哦，看上去像是两个人躺在地上呢…是在看天上的星星？
- The Nameless Fishing Village ｜ 无名的渔村
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Passage's Perfumed Potted Plants.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『回廊的馨香牵缠』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Survey Site: Yaoguang Shoal ｜ 勘测点·瑶光滩

- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} "Add Chat Participant" to chat with your friends ｜ 点击「添加会话对象」与好友聊天
- This is Big G? He's just a child! ｜ 他就是狼哥？为什么是个小孩子？！
- ...Hold on, I think... ｜ …等一下，好像…
- An ancient heavy helmet. It is an heirloom that bears the mark of a venerable lineage of northern warriors. ｜ 古老而沉重的头盔，是标识了北方古老战士家系的传承之物。
- Hmm... I'm not sure this counts as a lead, but follow me. There's a place I'd like to show you. ｜ 线索…我也不知道能不能算是线索，你们跟我来，我带你们去一个地方。
- Sorush ｜ 斯露莎
- Ominous Stick: Rust ｜ 诡签·朽坏
- Day 4: The drinks are good ｜ 第四天：好喝
- This vessel was specially made for a single purpose. It has absolutely no secret compartments built into it. ｜ 是特制的、用于单一用途的容器，但其中并没有欺诈用的机关。
- Full Image ｜ 组合全貌
- Oh, Rana's friends... Unfortunately, Rana should be patrolling the forest today. ｜ 哦哦，是拉娜的朋友啊…很遗憾，拉娜那孩子，今天应该去巡林喽。
- A meticulously well-maintained woman's hat that keeps wrinkles safely out of sight. ｜ 精心保养的女士帽，即使是眼角的皱纹也可以完美遮盖。
- What a dreadful ending... ｜ 结局真是糟糕啊…
- A pizza covered in cheese and mushrooms. When still warm, the cheese becomes stretchy and gooey, making it extremely satisfying to eat. ｜ 铺满蘑菇和奶酪的薄饼。热的时候奶酪可以拉出细长的丝，大口咬下去很过瘾。
- A steaming-hot stew. There was some flaw in the flame control during the stewing process, leading to a product with a very stiff mouthfeel. You can ignore those flaws if you scarf it all down — it'll keep the cold away regardless. ｜ 热乎乎的炖菜。在炖煮的火力选择上出了一些纰漏，让成品的口感僵硬了几分。如果只是胡乱喝下去的话也不算太坏，毕竟驱寒的效果还是有的。
- I'm certain that he's the one who's been following us these past few days. ｜ 我很确定，他在前几天刚刚尾随过我们。
- Critical Moment\nA short period after using an <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color> or <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Burst</color>.\nSupersense Skill\nUnleash a shockwave at the character's position, dealing True DMG to nearby opponents and restoring HP to all nearby party members equal to 100% of the character's Max HP.\nIn addition, all party members gain a 75% Geo DMG bonus for 20s. ｜ 「关键时机」\n施放<color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>或<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>后的短暂时间。\n「超感技能」\n在角色的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，并为队伍中所有角色恢复生命值，回复量相当于角色生命值上限的100%。\n此外，队伍中所有角色获得75%岩元素伤害加成，持续20秒。

- Brother Qian from the Liyue Adventurers' Guild is still inviting people to try playing with the Illumiscreen... ｜ 璃月港冒险家协会的小千似乎还在招揽人过去试玩「玲珑霄灯图」…
- Oh, so it's due to your love of stories... ｜ 看来你还真是喜欢看小说呢。
- Weapon Ascension Material.\nFolktales tell that once upon a time, there lived an oni named Torachiyo. Torachiyo was a highly skilled warrior, such that it was once said the Torachiyo might dance amid a thousand blades, juunihitoe robes becoming shredded like falling violet petals, and yet not receive a single wound. Yet this oni would eventually betray the Shogun and revolt, becoming shorn of an arm and a horn in the battle before fleeing and slaying itself in a fit of furious madness.\nHearsay holds that the stubborn oni often hold fear and distress in their hearts. That they should fantasize about eternity yet fear the moment, and are apt to become swallowed by terror or anger is their just reward. This mask depicts Torachiyo, fangs bared. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n民话传说中，过去有名鬼人「虎千代」。武艺高强，曾有在刀剑一千柄当中狂舞，被割破的十二单如同菫花般零落，身体却未受一丝伤害的说法。后来却对将军大人露出獠牙，拔刀反叛，被斩下一臂一角后遁逃，最终郁愤发狂，自裁而殁。\n狂言称怀抱执妄之鬼往往内心惊悸而忧患。妄想永恒却恐惧须臾，总会为恐惧与怨怒吞没，是为自业自得。这种面具刻画的就是露出尖牙的虎千代。

- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Well, that is true, but he is a human Vijnanapati. Surely this is not beyond him? ｜ 虽然是这么说…不过既然是人类的「识主」，知道这些也是理所当然吧。
- Whenever Citlali's friends make plans to celebrate her birthday, they always run up against a rather tricky question — just how old is she, actually?\nJudging from her appearance... There's no way to tell.\nAccording to Citlali's own oft-repeated claim, the answer seems to be 200. However, some elders of the Masters of the Night Wind insist that she must be older, for she has an intimate knowledge of many things that happened over two centuries ago.\n"D'you think Granny was adopted by Saurians when she was young too?" Chasca would wonder, drawing a parallel with her own childhood experience of being raised by a Qucusaur and losing track of her real age.\n"Granny'll always be Granny, and that's not gonna change — whether she's 200 or more." Ororon would respond when people came asking. Having been raised by Citlali since childhood, his awareness of her "ageless" aura is perhaps keener than any other's.\nBut Xilonen was never satisfied with that answer. After all, if they were planning to order a personalized birthday cake, a vague number would only confuse the baker. In her view, clarifying your requirements is the most basic courtesy a customer owes.\n"Hah! If a mere two hundred years has you all running around like headless Flowcurrent Birds, imagine if you could comprehend the unfathomable antiquity of this Almighty Dragonl—" Before he could finish, Ajaw's comments were cut short by Kinich, whose lightning-fast elbow sent the little party pooper flying.\n"Why don't we just settle for 200? Seeing as Granny always insists that's how old she is, I'm sure she has her reasons — just like how many people say they're 'forever 18.' It's a way of making themselves seem younger!" Despite leaving them all deep in thought for a while, Mualani's suggestion was collectively rejected in the end. No matter how you spin it, "forever 200" is an absurd way of projecting a youthful image.\nWhen all others had given up, the ever-resourceful Iansan called upon Mavuika, hoping that the memories passed down by the Sacred Flame might offer some clues. But even Mavuika could not provide a definitive answer. So far as past Pyro Archons remembered, Citlali had always lived the life of a recluse, leaving no indication of her exact age.\nAnd so, they continued to hesitate, knowing that asking Citlali directly was simply out of the question. The quick-witted great shaman would see right through them, completely ruining their celebratory surprise in an instant.\nIn the end, they decided to sidestep the issue altogether, settling on a cake design that didn't require her age to be displayed.\nOn the evening of her birthday, they lured Citlali out of her home with a knock at the door, unveiling the cake and an array of gifts as she stepped outside. At last, their long-planned celebration was successfully underway.\nPerhaps moved by their enthusiasm, Citlali drank a lot that night. As her eyes began to grow hazy, someone finally worked up the courage to ask the question that had been puzzling them all along.\n"How old am I exactly? *hic* Let me tell you something funny..." Citlali began, slurring her words. "I'm certainly not the only one in this world who's lived a long, long life. For the others, it usually goes like this... In the beginning, keeping track of the years is easy, but the longer they live, the more of a hassle it becomes, so they just stop paying attention... *hiccup* But me, well... I'm a lil' different, you see... At first, I never used to worry exactly how old I was. It was only after... something happened... that I suddenly started noticing how old I was becoming... And from that moment on, I started counting, and it's been exactly... 200 years... *hic*!"\nThe mystery behind the "200 years" claim had finally been solved, but her answer had sparked a new question. What could possibly have happened to make Citlali, who had remained so youthful over the past two centuries and longer, suddenly become so acutely aware of the passing of time?\nBut despite their curiosity, no one pressed her any further, for they noticed that Citlali was staring blankly at the night sky — a sign that she had already fallen asleep. ｜ 茜特菈莉的朋友们想要给她庆生时总会面对一个很棘手的问题——她到底多少岁了？\n反正从外表是什么都看不出来。\n按照茜特菈莉经常挂在嘴边的说法，这个答案似乎是两百岁。但按照烟谜主部族内一些长者的说法，茜特菈莉肯定不止两百岁，因为她熟知很多发生在两百年前的事。\n「难道是因为奶奶小时候也被龙领养过？」恰斯卡会发出这样的猜测，她小时候有段时间就因为被绒翼龙领养而搞不清楚自己的真实年龄。\n「两百岁或者两百多岁，奶奶都还是奶奶啊。」当大家向欧洛伦询问时，他会这样回答。作为从小被茜特菈莉养大的人，欧洛伦最能体会到岁月在她身上的「模糊感」。\n但是希诺宁不喜欢这个答案，毕竟大家还要定制蛋糕，一个模糊的数字只会给店家带去困扰。对于她来说，明确需求是身为客户最基本的道德。\n「哈哈！区区两百年就让你们如此苦恼，要是你们知道本圣龙活过的岁月…」煞风景的阿乔则会被基尼奇眼疾手快地打飞。\n「要不就按两百岁算嘛！奶奶总说自己两百岁情有可原，就像漂亮的姐姐们总喜欢说自己永远十八岁嘛，这样显得年轻！」玛拉妮的的建议让大家沉思了一段时间，最后遭到否决。再怎么讲，用「永远两百岁」来表示自己年轻也太离谱了。\n其他人都感到无奈时，行动力最高的伊安珊请来了玛薇卡，希望能从圣火传承的记忆中找到线索。然而玛薇卡也没能就茜特菈莉的年龄问题给出准确答案，历代火神记忆中的茜特菈莉都过着离群索居的生活，从这些记忆入手也很难推断出茜特菈莉的具体年龄。\n大家就这样纠结了很久，毕竟直接询问茜特菈莉根本不是可选项。这位犀利的大萨满会当即识破他们的意图，让庆生会的惊喜感荡然无存。\n最终，大家还是选择先将这个棘手的问题放到一边，商讨出了一种不需要年龄标识的蛋糕设计方案。\n生日当天的夜晚，用敲门声将茜特菈莉引出房门后，大家动作麻利地将蛋糕和各种礼品展示出来，这场筹谋许久的庆生会终于被成功举办。\n或许是大家盛情难却，那一晚的茜特菈莉喝了很多酒。在她醉眼惺忪时，好奇的大家还是问出了那个困扰他们许久的问题。\n「奶奶我具体多少岁了？嗝！跟你们讲个有趣的事情，这个世界上，活得很长的人肯定不只我一个…他们应该都是这样的，一开始能数清年份，到后来，活得越久越嫌麻烦，就渐渐不再关注具体的数字了…嗝！奶奶我呢，有点奇怪…我一开始反倒没有关心具体的年份，等经历了某件事之后，我才忽然注意到岁数越来越大这种事情…从那时起，我开始数年份，到现在正好两百年了吧…嗝！」\n大家终于明白了两百年这种说法的由来，但也因此产生了新的疑问。两百多年来都如此年轻的茜特菈莉，会因为什么样的事开始注意到岁月的流逝呢？\n但大家还是收回了自己的好奇心，因为他们看到茜特菈莉正呆呆地望向夜空——这意味着她已经睡着了。

A well-tuned spiciness awakens your slumbering tastebuds with its touch, and as the meat meets your teeth, its rich juices spill forth, filling your heart with sumptuous joy. Not a drop, you declare, shall be spared. Not one drop. ｜ 辣味的炖肉。各式各样的香料，渲染出了浓厚的肉香。随着齿间的碰撞，合宜的辣味打开了沉睡的味蕾，丰盈的肉汁喷涌而出，满满的幸福感随之翻涌，就连滴落的汤汁都不想放过！

- Pure elemental life-forms composed of drifting Geo particles, as free and unbound as the butterflies they resemble.\nA glittering Geo creature that is the product of rising and condensing elements, and which feeds off the ubiquitous power of Geo.\nIn antediluvian ages, even rocks could dream. They say that these crystallized flying butterflies are those very dreams the mountains had. Perhaps after hovering over the sky suffused with Sub-Space Creation energies for a long time, their posture will assume the form of pens and knives, etching these shadowed dreams into the Serenitea Pot. ｜ 空气中飘荡不定的岩元素微粒聚合而成的纯粹元素生命，同蛱蝶一般悠游。\n闪光的岩元素生物，是元素上升凝合而成的产物，以无处不在的岩元素维生。\n在难以尽览的万古中，即使是磐岩也会做梦。据说岩晶凝成的飞蝶正是嵯峨山石之梦，或许在弥漫着外景仙力的天空长久盘旋后，它们的身姿亦会化为笔与刀，将这些梦影隽刻在「尘歌壶」之中。

- The Seven Archons do not need Visions, for they already have great power.\nYet Barbatos was fond of the mortal world, and wanted to roam Mondstadt more freely as "Venti." As such, he constructed a glass ornament very much like the Visions worn by those chosen by the gods.\nThe imitation has no special abilities, nor does Venti rely on it to channel elemental power.\nHowever, since Venti does not keep the Holy Lyre der Himmel by his side, and since he is too lazy to bring a normal lyre, he gave his fake Vision the ability to turn into the wooden lyre "Der Frühling." ｜ 「尘世七执政」并不拥有对「神之眼」的期望，他们本就身负伟力。\n但巴巴托斯喜欢人世，自然也希望以「温迪」的身份在蒙德更自在地行走。他仿照着神选者的特征，制作了与「神之眼」非常相像的玻璃珠。\n仿制出的道具并没有什么特殊功能，温迪引导元素力也并不依靠它。\n不过，由于天空之琴不在身边，温迪又懒得把普通的琴挎在腰间，便为它增加了变成木琴「斐林」的能力。

- Ugh, I swear I saw that bizarre creature — I mean, seriously, a dog with flames spewing out of its back!? Eh? No way, don't accuse me of eating too many mushrooms, I swear I saw it {0}! At first, I thought some mischievous kid had set a dog on fire, but once I got closer, it gave me an awful scratching! I swear on my name, it's too dangerous to let this searing dog lie, and I'm certain I wasn't dreaming it up! ｜ 哎呀，真是看到了奇怪的东西，是背上点着火的狗！咦，你问我是不是菌子吃多了…才不是，我真的看见了，就在{0}！我本来还以为是哪家缺德孩子点了火烧狗，结果靠近被挠了好几下，那家伙可危险了，我说的是真的，真的是火狗啊！

- I was expecting a sudden plot twist, but it's a pity that it never happened... Still, his story is quite the tear-jerker... ｜ 可惜没有出现像我预期之中那样的「转折」，但他的故事还是有些催人泪下。
- Yeah. Could be that we're too far away, and they can't smell the fish? If only we could get 'em ashore somehow... ｜ 是呀，可能是因为距离太远了，没闻到鱼肉的气味吧？要是能想办法先把它们引到岸上来的话…

- Judging by your look... You're not from the Adventurers' Guild. ｜ 看您的样子…也不像是冒险家协会派来的人。
- We established several nodes in Fontaine in accordance with the Seal of Chymical Marriage as part of our response to the apocalypse. ｜ 根据「密合之约印」我们在枫丹设置了数个节点，就是为了应对世界末日。
- This one before us only lingers because of its immense size, and the fact that it has been hidden away in this cave from the glaring eye of the sun and lashing winds. Thus, the intactness of its condition. ｜ 我们眼前的倒霉家伙嘛，只是因为原本就格外巨大，又生在免于酷晒与烈风的地下洞穴，这才保留得较为完好。
- *sigh* Here we go again... ｜ 唉，又来了…
- Oh, meow, meow... Where did they go... ｜ 哎呀…喵喵，跑到哪里去了…
- "Members of the Fatui spotted in this area will be arrested as enemies. Please stay alert!" ｜ 「在此地活动之所有『愚人众』成员，将被视为敌寇要犯加以抓捕，敬请注意！」
- Rayen ｜ 蕾伊安
- If you wanna find the Geo Archon, this is the only chance you'll get all year. ｜ 要寻找岩神的话，一年里只有这一次机会。
- Wow, that sounds like a great idea! It wouldn't require a lot of manpower, so it'd save heaps of time and effort. Plus, you wouldn't even need to go to the trouble of training them up. ｜ 唔哇！这个方法不错！既不用大量人手费时费力，又不用专门费工夫教学生。
- A Failed Reference Book...? ｜ 失败的画册…？
- We had warned them to report to Huishan Hall should they encounter anything unusual. ｜ 虽然已经警告过他们，要是遇到什么异常，就立刻向辉山厅报告。
- You could always see how amazing he was, even when he was teaching us a lesson... ｜ 哪怕是教训我们的时候，他都展现出了卓越不凡的才能。
- You wanted... rice, right? Please wait a moment, I will pick rice of better quality for you... ｜ 你之前说…想要稻米，对吧？请你稍等一下，我挑一些品质比较好的给你…
- Heh, who doesn't miss their time at the Akademiya? Life was a lot simpler then, and we all had far less troubles. ｜ 谁不怀念在教令院求学的日子呢？那时可没有这么多烦心事。
- Hm? What is that you ask? Hahaha, would I do such a thing? I wasn't jibing him. ｜ 嗯？哈哈哈哈，怎么会呢，我可没有骂他哦。
- And every precious thing in life as an enemy to be annihilated... That is a far more painful nightmare, both for the person in question and those around them. ｜ 将现实中的所有喜乐都蒙上深黯，视作必须斩杀的仇敌。就会为自身与周遭…带来更深痛的「噩梦」。
- They were probably followers of the God of Salt. ｜ 这些人，恐怕是当年「盐之魔神」的信徒吧。
- More About Iansan: I ｜ 想要了解伊安珊·其一
- However, the Almighty Shogun's recent policy has been pretty harsh... ｜ 只是最近将军大人推行的政策，也太不近人情了…
- You can situate the rhythm point as you please by adjusting the speed and tempo of the song. ｜ 可以通过调整倍速以及节拍，定位自己想要的节奏点。
- Plunge DMG|{param11:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param11:F1P}
- Also, I have some doubts about its mobility after seeing how it moved just now... ｜ 而且从刚刚的移动方式来看，机动性也不能保证…
- The Fall of the Faded Castle (III) ｜ 褪色古堡的崩塌·卷三
- Is her condition really that serious? ｜ 妮赫佳的病，有这么严重吗？
- Icewind Suite: Nemesis of Coppelius ｜ 冰风组曲·科培琉司的劫罚
- The hilichurl worshipers have disappeared, too... ｜ 那些朝拜的丘丘人也不知道哪里去了…
- Look for clues ｜ 寻找线索
- <color=#FFCC33FF>Dispatch Character on Expedition</color> ｜ <color=#FFCC33FF>探索派遣</color>
- Yes, it's all true. I can even show you the memories themselves, if you're willing. ｜ 皆是真实。如果你愿意，我也可以为你展现出真实的记忆。
- By offering that Plume of Purifying Light to the Amrita Pool, you will enable the Pari to return to the Vourukasha Oasis once again. ｜ 只要将你们手中的「净光翎」供奉到「甘露池」中，那流散在外的花灵便能重回花海的怀抱。
- (The abode of Mountain Shaper. This adeptus is presently absent...) ｜ （「理水叠山真君」的仙府。仙人似乎不在府内…）
- Anyway, let's go see if there's anything we can do to help! ｜ 总之，我们也去看看有什么能帮上忙的吧！
- He'd have been badly injured if there were no mats to break his fall. That really isn't how you're supposed to wrestle. ｜ 要是下面没有软垫啊，已经受伤啦。不是这样打的。
- A New Letter ｜ 方才的来信
- Heh. My apologies, Dr. Baizhu, for having to have you come over every so often to adjust my prescriptions. ｜ 呵呵，每隔一段时间，白大夫就要来给我看病开药，也是麻烦您了。
- Hourglass of Thunder ｜ 雷霆的时计

---
### Part 148

- Hehe, please pardon me... But I haven't asked for your names. ｜ 嘿嘿，请恕我冒昧…但还没有问过两位朋友的名字呢？
- Then let's get rolling, and look for this token while we're at it! ｜ 那我们就一边旅行，一边找找这个信物的线索吧！
- You feel loss keenly. It seems to stir up feelings of regret in you... But this is something I have long since come to terms with. ｜ 看来你们很容易为了失去而遗憾…对于这个，我早就做好觉悟了。
- Hmm, so you have two different mental states? Almost like... different phases of matter? Interesting... I want to learn to do that, too! ｜ 也就是说有两种状态？好有趣，像物质转换一样自由…我也想学会这招！
- Very good. Allow me to test my skills against you. ｜ 很好，让我来领教领教你的本事。
- That one? ...Hmm, I suppose it's fair to say the method is the same — broadly speaking. But no single person can take credit for it. The whole of Liyue comes together to make it. ｜ 那个？那个…也可以说是「编制」来的吧，但并不是某一个人编制，而是璃月的所有人一起编制的。
- My father's log mentioned that the Magical Crystal Ore must be mined from the ruins at Araumi. ｜ 父亲的日志中有提到，魔晶矿一定要在荒海那边的废墟里发掘。
- These gentle beasts can be found all over Teyvat and were among the earliest livestock tamed by humans.\nFluff-Fleece Goat, as their name indicates, have soft and warm fur that is used to weave clothing. Humans also love them for their delicious milk. In the distant past, these beasts, often called "Soft-Furs," played an important role in the ceremonial affairs of the region's ancestral people, but that's a story for another time. ｜ 生活在提瓦特大陆各处的兽类。性情温顺，是最早被人类驯服的家畜之一。\n正如其名所示，柔柔羊的绒毛又暖又软，是用来编织衣物的优质材料，而口感柔顺的羊奶，也是深受人们喜爱的美味饮品。传说在遥远的过去，先民的祭祀活动中，这种被称作「柔毛」的生灵也扮演着相当重要的角色——不过，那就是与今日无关的另一个故事了。
- You have to keep the flame in check — too low and the meat won't cook through, too high and the paste will break up and lose its texture. ｜ 记得火力要适中，火力太小就无法把肉茸煲熟，大火则会把肉茸冲散，无法聚团。
- "Dopey Dazzler" ｜ 「炫彩呆子」
- Scylla ｜ 斯库拉
- Gambler's Pocket Watch ｜ 赌徒的怀表
- You know, just like asymmetry, irregularities can also be a style. ｜ 就像不对称一样，不规律有时也被当成一种风格。
- C'mon, it's dangerous! Why do you seem so happy about this... Are you not scared at all? ｜ 那可是很危险的事，你怎么一脸开心样呀…难道你不怕烫吗？

- Felis Fuscus Chapter: Act I ｜ 黑斑猫之章 第一幕
- Thank you all so much for offering to help! But first... I'm sorry for asking, but, um... How do you want us to pay you back? ｜ 谢谢你们向我伸出援手。不过请允许我冒昧问下，你们…需要什么样的酬劳呢？
- Boosts your Superconduct blessing to <color=#f39001>the highest level</color>. Choose between 2 diverging paths:\nSuperconduct: <color=#f39001>Systematic Shock</color>: After dealing <color=#f39001>Physical DMG</color> to an opponent with the maximum number of <color=#f39001>Yielding</color> stacks, the <color=#f39001>Surging Shock</color> unleashed deals <color=#f39001>{0}%</color> increased DMG and has increased AoE.\nSuperconduct: <color=#f39001>Systematic Collapse</color>: Every <color=#f39001>Yielding</color> stack increases the <color=#f39001>Physical DMG</color> dealt by characters to opponents by <color=#f39001>{1}%</color>. ｜ 强化超导祝福至<color=#f39001>最高等级</color>，可选择以下两种分支：\n超导·<color=#f39001>极限涌震</color>：对处于最高层数<color=#f39001>低阻</color>效果影响下的敌人造成<color=#f39001>物理伤害</color>后，释放的<color=#f39001>涌现震波</color>伤害提升<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>，且伤害范围提升；\n超导·<color=#f39001>极限崩阻</color>：每层<color=#f39001>低阻</color>效果将使角色对敌人造成的<color=#f39001>物理伤害</color>提升<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>。
- ...Shoot. ｜ …这样啊。
- Haha... New recruits these days certainly do not beat around the bush. ｜ 哈哈…现在的新人怎么变得这么直接了…
- After obtaining Elemental Shards from the <color=#f39001>Pyro Crystallize reaction</color>, obtain the <color=#f39001>Pyro Crystal's Boon</color> effect for <color=#f39001>{0}</color>s: All party members gain a <color=#f39001>{1}%</color> Pyro and Geo DMG Bonus. Additionally, you will obtain nearby Crystallize Shards every <color=#f39001>{2}</color>s ｜ 获得<color=#f39001>火元素结晶反应</color>产生的晶片后，将产生持续<color=#f39001>{0}</color>秒的<color=#f39001>火晶庇佑</color>效果：使队伍中所有角色获得<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>火元素与岩元素伤害加成。此外，每<color=#f39001>{2}</color>秒，将获取附近的结晶反应产生的晶片
- A musical instrument that can be used in performances.\nA drum with a clear sound and unique design. It has an exquisite exterior and features intricate craftsmanship. High-quality materials have been used in its construction, with a view toward sound quality during performances, intonation and long-term wear and tear.\nIt is said that this small drum combines an Inazuman traditional instrument with some quirks of drums from other nations. When it plays certain tunes, it can even bring people good luck... ｜ 使用后，可以进行演奏的乐器。\n构造独特，音色清脆的小鼓。外形雅致，做工精细，采用了上佳的材料，兼顾了演奏时的音质、音准与长期使用的耐损度。\n相传，这种小鼓结合了稻妻传统乐器与异国之鼓的特点，演奏某些乐曲之时，还能为人们带来好运的护佑…
- You're amazing! ｜ 你好厉害！
- "Once the Dragonborn have passed through, Legio VII Caelicantica and Legio IX Benedicti Praecones shall reinforce this position and seal Portus Anticus against northern barbarian attacks, which might otherwise disturb talks..." ｜ 「…待龙裔通过后，增派第七『天乐』军团与第九『祝言使』军团至此，封锁安提库港，以免北境的蛮族发起袭击，搅乱会谈…」
- Ah, by the way, the power of the wishes within the water will last a few days more. If you are willing, you can come by again anytime for another divination. ｜ 顺便一提，水中「愿望」的效力应该还能坚持些时日，两位愿意的话，可以随时来找我占卜哟。

- A hideous iron mask that has been left half-shattered from vicious battles. ｜ 在不顾生死的厮杀中一半破碎的骇人铁面具。
- Dear friends, I apologize for interrupting your lovely conversation, but I believe you haven't been informed that the gate ahead has been locked. ｜ 各位朋友，打扰你们愉快的聊天时间实在非我所愿，只是，你们应该还不知道前面的大门上了锁。
- Hanging in there? ｜ 你还好吗？

- Huh, now that you mention it, it does kinda look like a dragon's head... ｜ 咦，这么一说，好像确实是长了个龙头呢…

- You... ｜ 你…
- If you want to see the evidence, you can go to the city and look for Sango. She will explain everything to you in detail. ｜ 二位…如果还想看看证据的话，可以去城里找社长，她会再详细地和二位解释。

It appears that you could form a full ring using three of them, though what that will achieve, you cannot tell. ｜ 在探索时偶然得到的，刻画有「烟谜主」风格纹饰的黑曜石断片。看上去只要有如是三个就能够组成一个完整的环，但不知道有什么作用。
- *sigh* ...You take care too Bennett. ｜ …哼，你们也当心。

- Such strength... Still, it is best not to push yourself too hard. ｜ 真坚强啊…不过，勉强自己也不是一件好事。

- Let's move on, I want to share the cipher for the next treasure trove. ｜ 事不宜迟，我们就进入下一个环节吧，我要公布第二段藏宝地的暗语了。
- Fatui operational orders that you obtained from Lyudochka. They detail an operation that will take place in the future on Watatsumi Island. This intelligence is very important — peoples' lives are at stake here! ｜ 从柳达希卡手里得到的愚人众行动指令，详细叙述了接下来要在海祇岛上执行的任务。由于事关民众的安危，这张纸上的情报尤为重要。
- Why, it's because of my extraordinary charm, of course. Such magnetism is mine that all who know me are inexorably drawn to me! ｜ 当然是说我超凡的人格魅力，每个认识我的人都会不可避免地被我所吸引！

- No Dreamblooms ｜ 暂无「梦里花」
- Never finished it, huh? ｜ 你没写完吗？

- It's been a while, you two. So, you're the ones looking into the Sage-Lord of Fungi... ｜ 原来是你们，好久不见。似乎你们在打听「蕈之贤主」的知识？
- Find the suspicious bake-danuki statue ｜ 找出可疑的妖狸石像
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Even though Granny lost her memories, she never forgot to show me how much she loved me. So, I thought maybe one day... ｜ 奶奶她即便逐渐失忆，也仍然把她的爱毫无保留地给了我。所以，我想将她的梦想延续下去——
- Not only that, but their presence is essential. You can't have a healthy human psyche without negative emotion. ｜ 而与此同时，也必须要有这些负面情绪的存在，他们才能获得健全的人格。
- Aranishat and Aralila both won, twice. All Aranara, and friends of Aranara, all won, for many times! ｜ 兰难世和兰梨娄都赢，赢两次。所有兰那罗，还有兰那罗的朋友，都赢了，赢很多次！
- Definitely. Those lowlifes... Slander and libel are all their specialties. They drown out the truth with a flood of misinformation, and they stop at nothing once they get riled up! ｜ 没错，那些宵小之辈，最擅长的就是口诛笔伐、混淆视听，红了眼什么事都干得出来！
- So being able to talk to you should cheer him right up! ｜ 如果能和「阿釜」对话，可能也会开心吧！
- Ah, it's you. Ugh, forget it. I'd just found a buyer too, and that was when Goldman barged into my house and seized that box of trinkets! ｜ 是您啊。别提了，我本来都悄悄地找好了卖家，但戈尔德曼突然闯进了我屋子，把那盒首饰都拿走了！
- Go to the Speaker's Chamber to speak to Mavuika ｜ 前往「话事处」寻找玛薇卡
- "Wait, what do you mean that kind of 'salvage'?" ｜ 「等等什么叫这个『打捞』？」
- Jean's waiting for you at the <color=#00E1FFFF>Cathedral</color>. It's something to do with the Holy Lyre der Himmel... You'd better head there now. ｜ 琴团长正在<color=#00E1FFFF>大教堂</color>等你，好像是关于天空之琴的事…还是赶快去一趟吧。
- (The Akasha indeed contains this information, and it clearly appeared in my mind.) ｜ （虚空中的确有这样的信息，在脑海中清晰地出现了。）
- It is true that I did not know why the Oratrice gave out a guilty verdict that day. ｜ 我的确不清楚「公子」到底是怎么回事。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Everyone at the Grand Bazaar loves Lesser Lord Kusanali, and we're all looking forward to the Sabzeruz Festival. ｜ 大巴扎的人都很喜欢小吉祥草王大人，也都对花神诞祭很期待呢。
- Cooo? ｜ 呜？
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- #<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nThe searing summer sun envelops the earth, and at Paimon's suggestion, you return to the Knights of Favonius headquarters. There, you learn by chance of an astounding occurrence. The curtains are about to rise upon a most special adventure...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 18 and complete the following prerequisite quests: "Song of the Dragon and Freedom." (Complete the Archon Quest "Akasha Pulses, the Kalpa Flame Rises," the Story Quest "Dracaena Somnolenta Chapter: {NON_BREAK_SPACE}Act I," and the Story Quest "Aphros Delos Chapter:{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Act I" first to get the best experience from this event.)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nThe "Secret Summer Paradise" event has 4 main themes:\n\nTheme 1: Spino Blaster\nOperate a special water cannon to hit targets floating in the air and complete time trials in marksmanship.\n\nTheme 2: Sojourns of the Barking Fox\nComplete special speed trials within the Veluriyam Mirage using the toy Barking Fox.\n\nTheme 3: Dance of Flashing Thought\nUnleash your will without reserve and become the star of the stage. Defeat all foes in your path using your elegant combat skills!\n\nTheme 4: Bing-Bang Finchball\nEnjoy a cute and relaxing tabletop game. Launch Finchballs with care and patience to score higher.\n\nAdditionally, you can collect Joyeux Vouchers as you explore the Veluriyam Mirage by opening Voucher Boxes and Fascinating Chests, or by completing Curious Challenges. These Vouchers can be used the unlock all manner of rewards. ｜ #<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n炽烈的夏日阳光渐渐笼罩大地，在派蒙的建议下，你们回到了西风骑士团的总部，意外得知了某件奇妙之事，一场特别的冒险即将拉开帷幕…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到18，并完成以下前置任务：「巨龙与自由之歌」。（完成魔神任务「虚空鼓动，劫火高扬」、传说任务「浪沫之章{NON_BREAK_SPACE}第一幕」、传说任务「眠龙之章{NON_BREAK_SPACE}第一幕」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n「清夏！乐园？大秘境！」活动分为四个主题：\n\n主题一·「飞迸湍流大作战」\n驱动造型特别的水炮，打击空中漂浮的标靶，完成限时射击挑战。\n\n主题二·「吼吼小狐巡天记」\n挑战独特的竞速试炼，操纵新式玩具「吼吼小狐」在「琉形蜃境」各地巡游。\n\n主题三·「幽思闪念旋步舞」\n毫无保留地释放锐意，成为战场舞台的「焦点」，以优雅的身姿击败所有可见之敌！\n\n主题四·「哐哐当当雀雀球」\n享受可爱放松的桌面游戏，耐心而细致地投掷「雀雀球」，尽可能赢得更高的积分。\n\n此外，探索「琉形蜃境」的过程中，通过开启礼券秘盒、妙趣宝箱，完成奇乐挑战，可以收集「欢兴礼券」，解锁多种奖品。
- Hate to break it to you... ｜ 很遗憾…
- How should I put this... There's so much room for improvement that the only way is up. ｜ 怎么说呢…小家伙，需要努力的地方还有不少哦？
- Reverse Sweep ｜ 绝地逆转

- The Balladeer!? No it can't have been, he got locked up... Quick, let's catch up and see! ｜ 散兵？！不可能吧，他不是被关起来了吗…快追上去看看！

- This time, I found a super hard-to-find spot and hid the Temari. Want to take on the challenge? ｜ 这次我找了个特别难找的位置，把手鞠藏好了。要来挑战吗？
- I'm very grateful to you as it is. I wouldn't wish to bother you further. ｜ 况且今天的事已经让我很感激了，再麻烦两位就太不礼貌了。
- We first met while fishing. Gradually, as we got to know each other, we started discussing all sorts of topics. ｜ 刚开始我们只是偶然认识的钓友，后来慢慢熟络，才开始聊各种话题。
- These grapes look excellent, you're a fast learner. ｜ 这串葡萄不错，你学得很快啊。
- As one who is thrown into the sea, though he fights back desperately against his predicament, it does nothing to prevent his descent into the depths. ｜ 就像落水的人一样，手忙脚乱地挣扎，还是坠入冰冷黑暗的深海。
- Sorry, partner... ｜ 是我的错吗…
- Touch the paper charm hangers ｜ 触碰「纸垂」
- Ah, yeah, good point! ｜ 啊，确实！
- Hahaha, this feast is for you, Cyno. Sounds to me like you'll have to be there. ｜ 哈哈哈哈，赛诺，那可是为你举办的宴会啊。身为主角的你必须参加。
- Versemonger of the darkest alleys — that's me! ｜ 小巷派暗黑打油诗人，正是本人！
- When I was preparing materials to repair the White Lift with, I did come across some sites that contain ore. I even discovered some Magical Crystal Ore there, if you'll believe it! ｜ 之前我去准备维护白之梯所需的材料时，发现了一些出产水晶矿的地点，甚至还有不少质地更加坚实的「魔晶矿」。
- Unfortunately, despite that the ores there are of good quality, they are not suitable for my current research. ｜ 很遗憾，我去看过后，发现它们质量虽然不错，但并不适合我现在的研究。
- *sigh* It would seem that that's as far as we go. A transient bloom of incomparable beauty... Life's proudest achievement. ｜ 唉，看来这就是极限了。只能盛开一瞬却无比美丽的花朵，生命的极致也在于此。
- Special defeat condition: If you have not defeated all of your opponents' characters by the end of the first round, you lose the duel.\nAt the start of the first round, you gain an additional 2 Omni Element Dice.\nAfter an opponent's character is defeated or one of your characters uses an Elemental Burst: Gain 3 Omni Element Dice, and draw 1 card, and you will be able to act again after the current action is completed. ｜ 特殊失败条件：第一回合结束时如果你未能击倒所有敌人，则你输掉对局。\n第一回合开始时，我方获得2个额外的万能元素。\n敌方角色被击倒或我方角色使用「元素爆发」后：生成3个万能元素，抓1张牌，并且本次行动结束后我方可以再连续行动一次。
- Increases all party members' ATK by 114 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高114点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- I didn't know anything for sure until you chose to take that potion bottle and spare our lives. But if you're asking when I started suspecting you, it was the first time you came to see me at the infirmary. ｜ 在你选择换取那瓶药水之前，都只是怀疑。如果说从什么时候开始怀疑的话，应该是你第一次在医务室见到我的时候哦。
- It also gives Inayah shelter from her family... It has brought us together after taking care of every single one of us. ｜ 还为阿娜耶提供了家庭之外的庇护…它关照了每一个人，才让我们像现在这样聚在一起。

- Oh, you're joining too, Archon? ｜ 咦，火神大人也来？

- Pyrrho ｜ 毕洛
- There should be a total of three crates piled up at the dock. ｜ 应该就是三个箱子，就堆在港口上了。
- "Ganyu is so busy that she does not often get a good night's sleep. Today is her day off, however, so she finally has a chance to catch up on some sleep. Can the owner please make her bed extra soft and comfy for her?" ｜ 「甘雨姐姐每天要忙好多好多事情，很少睡好觉，今天放了假才能睡饱饱。老板可不可以把床铺弄得软软的，让甘雨姐姐睡得舒服一点？」
- Recently, our war with the Shogun's Army came to an end, and we finally saw the abolition of the Vision Hunt Decree. ｜ 在过去的一段时间里，我们与幕府军的战争告一段落，也见证了眼狩令的废除。
- Cold and solid scales from a Solitary Suanni. They retain pure adeptal energy even after falling off and cannot be damaged by ordinary weapons.\nOrdinary beasts can sometimes be affected by errant adeptal energy and become more powerful than usual. However, a suanni's adeptal energy originates from within themselves, which is why their leader is often regarded as equal to adepti.\nDespite being considered auspicious beasts, there are nearly-forgotten legends of a suanni named "the mountain lord" attacking villages. The Wushou Dance was thought to have originated from a ritual to appease said being. However, since very few people have seen a suanni at all, the theory naturally cannot be verified. ｜ 隐山猊兽的甲鳞，质地冰冷而坚硬。纵然剥离脱落，其上依然萦绕着纯净的仙力，普通的武器难以损之分毫。\n普通的野兽有时也会被逸散的仙力影响，变得比往常更为强大，但猊兽的不同之处在于，萦绕其身的仙力并非源于环境，而是源于它们自身——这也是其首领的地位往往被认为与仙人等同的原因。\n尽管被普遍认为是带来吉运的祥瑞之兽，在如今几乎已经无人记得的古老传说里，依然有着名为「山主」的猊兽袭击村落的说法，而「舞兽戏」的起源也被认为是安抚那位「山主」的典仪。然而，漫长的岁月里，真正目睹过猊兽的人类少之又少，这种说法的真实性自然也无从查考。
- "There's no time to delay if you want to catch a world-class performance by Yun Jin. Tickets at Heyu Tea House are going fast, don't miss out!" ｜ 好戏名角，时不我待，和裕茶馆火热售票中！！
- Found in Inazuman seawater ｜ 稻妻海域采集
- Not just yet. ｜ 还没有。
- ...Ah! You're the people from earlier... Wait, you're from... the Gardes!? ｜ …啊！你们是之前的…等等，你是…警备队的！？

- See you. ｜ 再见。
- I can confirm that a clockwork meka is patrolling {0}. Based on my analysis, it belongs to the "out of control batch" that has been widely reported. Unfortunately, I am but a journalist. Even a Guard Poodle is far more useful in a fight than I, so I simply have no way of dealing with it on my own. That's why I am publicizing this valuable information! If any brave soul takes down that meka using my intel and receives the commission reward, please show your support by reading my articles in The Steambird! ｜ 我确认，{0}，有一台发条机关在徘徊。根据分析，这家伙也属于报道中「失控的批次」。可惜，我只是个普通的报社记者，一条卫兵犬的战斗力都远远强于我，只凭我自己，是没法制伏它的，所以我要把这充满价值的情报公开给大家！如果有哪位勇士通过我的情报，拿下了那台机关，获得了相应的奖励…请多多支持我在《蒸汽鸟报》上发表的文章！
- I get it, okay? You just wanted to help me out to thank me for giving you shelter from the rain that day. Even then, I don't understand why you're so adamant that you don't want any pay for it... ｜ 谁会不明白呢？你帮我的忙，不过是想报答我让你躲雨的事，甚至特意不收工钱…

- I hereby appoint you as captain of the Watatsumi Island special operations unit: Swordfish II. ｜ 从现在起，你将升任海祇岛特别行动队「剑鱼二番队」的队长。

- Well, that sure sounds impressive. ｜ 听起来很厉害的样子。
- And Paimon thought Lisa would be the expert on this kind of thing. ｜ 我还以为丽莎小姐已经是这方面的专家了。
- As you immerse yourself in the liquid Phlogiston, images flash through your mind like warm memories. ｜ 将身躯沉入液态燃素之后，画面犹如温热的记忆直接在脑海之中浮现。
- Nope! No way, not a chance! Arataki Itto would never ask innocent people for Mora in order to post bail... Whoever wrote this is a liar and a cheat! And we gotta get out there and get this guy off our streets... ｜ 没有！我才没有，不！荒泷一斗绝不会跟无辜的人要保释费…这个写信的人绝对是骗子！我们快去把他抓住…
- "I would like to apologize. Due to my heavy workload recently, the latest volume of 'A Country From the Center of the Earth and a Bouquet for You' will not be completed on time." ｜ 「很抱歉地告知各位，由于本人最近工作繁忙，《来自地心的国度与献给你的花束》最新卷无法按期完成。」

- Restores 70 Stamina. ｜ 恢复70点体力。

- It's fine. That's just how Ajaw is. ｜ 没事，阿乔就该这个样子。
- Score: #1# ｜ 评分：#1#

- So, are you ready? ｜ 如何，准备好了吗？
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Brewing Developments" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「合剂演进」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- Anyway, the point is that if I can't produce results ASAP, those Kshahrewar dolts will certainly beat me to the punch! So grabbing passersby out here away from prying eyes is my only option. ｜ 反正，我现在如果不能更快拿出成果的话，一定会被妙论派的课题组抢先。只能出此下策，在野外招揽路过的人进行实验。
- Unfortunately, you'll have to take a rain check on the swanky feast we promised. However, we do have some Mora for you. Please, take it. ｜ 总而言之，旅行者，前面答应你们吃香的喝辣的，可能没法兑现了，但是这里有一些摩拉，请你们收好。

- Small-scale mining operations have been approved at The Chasm. At Katheryne's introduction, a miner commissions you to investigate certain anomalies within The Chasm. ｜ 层岩巨渊已经准许部分矿工进行小范围的开采了。经凯瑟琳小姐介绍，一位矿工大哥交给了你一件委托，内容则是关于层岩巨渊内部某些诡异现象的调查…
- Light Shield of the City of Wisdom ｜ 「智慧之城的轻盾」
- Oh yeah! Paimon remembers now! ... That's the stronghold of the Guhua Clan, right!? ｜ 呜啊，我想起来了！「王山厅」…就是古华派的本堂吧！
- Thanks for saving my son, Great Rukkhadevata... ｜ 树王大人保佑，我的儿子得以从海难中幸存…
- Continue Performance ｜ 继续演出
- Jinwu ｜ 瑾武
- But? But what!? There isn't going to be some new problem to solve, is there? ｜ 不过？该不会又有什么问题吧！
- But well, isn't it a crying shame that your Shogun hates outlander drifters, eh? ｜ 就是可惜了，你们的将军并不喜欢外国来的漂流客。
- The irony is that the researchers became even more impetuous afterward. Who knows, maybe the subject will be unbanned in a few years. ｜ 说来可笑。后来学者们越来越浮躁，再过几年，说不定这种课题又会被解禁。
- I can't guarantee we'll be able to win the second round, but I'll do my best to help. Let's give it our best shot! ｜ 我不确定能不能帮你们赢下第二轮，不过我会尽力的。一起加油吧！
- Ooh! Reclaiming your glory! Thy goddess here has golden glory, silver glory, and bronze glory. Which is it that the prince has lost? ｜ 喔——寻回荣耀哟！本女神这里有一个金荣耀，一个银荣耀和一个铜荣耀，哪一个才是王子遗失的呢？
- Only one other person has come close to beating the Varesa challenge, and that would be the Pyro Archon herself. ｜ 要说最接近完成「瓦雷莎级」的人，我想应该是火神玛薇卡大人。
- Ya ika! ｜ ——Ya ika！
- It's okay, that's completely normal. Actually, I completely understand how Viramdra feels. ｜ 没关系的，这很正常，其实我也能理解维兰德的想法。
- Land of Vibrant Stone and Flaming Springs ｜ 彩石与焰泉之国
- ...That should do it. ｜ …这样，应该就可以了。
- Great Lake! ｜ 大湖！

- Ah, so you found out... ｜ 你也知道了啊…
- I saw someone I know just now... ｜ 看到了熟悉的人…
- Chatelet just ordered a <color=#00E1FFFF>Latte</color>. ｜ 夏特莱小姐刚刚点了一杯<color=#00E1FFFF>「溶奶咖啡」</color>。
- A reliquary used to hold artifacts. May the one who sees it be beloved.\n\nEach reliquary will grant an artifact from the following sets:\n·Berserker\n·Instructor\n·The Exile ｜ 收纳圣遗物的圣物匣。愿见者可以领受敬爱。\n\n每个圣物匣中，能获得以下圣遗物套装中的一件：\n·「战狂」\n·「教官」\n·「流放者」
- Wait, you're saying that this is your home? And that you're protecting it? ｜ 等等，你说这里是你的家乡？你在守护你的家乡？
- Pyro: DMG Bonus|2 Characters {param2:F1P} ｜ 火：伤害提升|2名角色{param2:F1P}
- I went to Bubu Pharmacy to get myself checked out, only to discover that this sort of stone cannot be worn as jewelry... But how could I let all that money go to waste? ｜ 我就去「不卜庐」问了问，然后才知道，这种石头压根就不能贴身带，但这样的话，我这么多钱不就白花了吗？
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Adventurer, I've heard about you from my kids. You're a fascinating young person. ｜ 冒险家，我听孩子们说了你的事，你是个有意思的年轻人。
- Record the condition of the roots ｜ 记录根系的情况
- I don't think I've ever seen you around here... Are you a new guest here? ｜ 是以前没见过的生面孔呀…是来这里的新游客吗？
- Defeating all the... What? Just you? ｜ 打倒了…真的假的，就你一个人？
- Magnifico ｜ 马尼菲科
- The Archon War? ｜ 那是魔神战争吗？
- Although it looks slightly gloomy, it feels very peaceful here. I don't see any Tenryou Commission soldiers roaming the streets... What a nice place. ｜ 虽然看上去有些萧条，不过很和平的样子，街上也没什么天领奉行的人…真是个不错的地方。
- Wait, you came to Ochkanatlan, the forbidden city, on account of some notes you just... happened to pick up? Heh. "The more skilled the person, the more bold their deeds," I guess. ｜ 捡到的笔记？因为这种理由就跑到了这座禁忌之城「奥奇卡纳塔」里来，该说不说，还真是艺高人胆大呢。
- Nilou's outfit. It is neither flower nor mist, but when she begins to dance, both seem to bloom into being. ｜ 妮露的装扮款式。既非花也非雾，她身着舞衣飞旋时却有如花开雾起。
- Is administrative work really more important than the Mikage Furnace... ｜ 文书工作比「御影炉心」还重要吗…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Yes, Collei and I discovered a fairgrounds in the forest. ｜ 嗯，是我和柯莱在森林里发现的。
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Multi-Finger Recommended ｜ 推荐多指
- Anyway, our original plan was to come down here to play. I mean, no one else usually comes down here other than Uncle Rongo anyway, so this is our super secret base... or something like that! ｜ 总之，我们本来打算来这里玩。毕竟除了朗戈叔叔以外，平时一般不会有人到这里来，所以这就是我们的秘密基地——之类的吧？
- Trial by Fire ｜ 命运试金石
- The corruptive power emanating from Durin's remains is making the monsters stronger, which, in tandem with the frigid climate, depopulated some mountain areas. ｜ 杜林亡骸中的污秽之力会强化怪物。再加上严寒气候，一些雪山区域便成了无人区。
- Hm... Feels plain and ordinary. Eh? So is this place different from the other places? ｜ 哦…感觉就普普通通的。欸？那这里和其他地方不一样吗？
- Enjou ｜ 渊上
- See... around? ｜ 再…见？
- Whoa! It's huge... ｜ 哇…好大…
- Besides, they've got this saying in Liyue, don't they? "The deal may be off, but our honor still stands." And we Inazuman samurai are the most honorable people there are! ｜ 再说了，我听说璃月有句话，「买卖不成仁义在」。我们稻妻的武士也最讲究仁义了！
- Huh? Oh... Okay... ｜ 嗯？哦…好吧…
- Take us to the world of reverie! ｜ 带我们前往遐想的世界吧！
- Sure! We got to see our friends and play games together, that's definitely worth celebrating! ｜ 好呀，见到了好朋友，还一起玩到了开心的游戏，这一刻确实值得纪念！
- Namecard style.\nThe sands subsume the tracks of travelers, and they await the day when a gust of wind will reveal gilded memories once more. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n砂原埋藏下旅人的足迹，等待来日的尘风卷起饰金的回忆。
- Perfume Merchant ｜ 香水商人
- Complete "Incandescent Ode of Resurrection" ｜ 完成「炽烈的还魂诗」剧情
- Ever since they closed the Chasm, I've been patrolling this area. Mostly to stop people breaking the rules and trying to get inside... ｜ 自从「层岩巨渊」被封了之后我就在附近巡逻，主要是不希望下面的人违反命令去「层岩巨渊」…
- Touch the Inscribed Map to light up the map ｜ 触碰「地图石刻」以点亮地图
- Complete "As Light Rain Falls Without Reason" ｜ 完成「仿若无因飘落的轻雨」剧情
- Domain of Blessing: Dance of Steel II ｜ 祝圣秘境：钢铁之舞 II
- Thanks to that master physician, Anna's finally turned the corner... ｜ 安娜的身体总算是好转了，感谢那位神医…
- Kolu! ｜ 咕噜！
- A key to the front gates of the Fatui stronghold in the desert. It should open their massive doors without any issues. Here's hoping... ｜ 愚人众于沙漠建立的据点大门钥匙，有了这把钥匙应该能轻松打开他们的大门吧，希望如此…
- How about this? I see our two guests are quite young. They might prefer snacks to tea-tasting. Why not turn these two batches into teacakes? The quality of each will be evident with a single taste. What do you think, Old Luo? ｜ 这样吧，我看两位客人年纪小，比起品茗应该更爱吃点心。要不咱们用这两份茶叶，做两份茶糕。个中好坏，一尝便知。老罗，你看如何？
- <color=#FF5E41FF>(When in Solo mode, select at least 1 ally to fight alongside you)</color> ｜ <color=#FF5E41FF>（单人挑战时，至少选择一名同伴同行）</color>
- The place we were trying to get to was blocked off. We couldn't see anything past it, and there was no way around. ｜ 本来我和凯亚哥哥去的地方，眼前像是被挡着东西，什么都看不清…也没有办法往前走。
- What choice do I have! Hmph, using my granddaughter to force me into some event... People these days! ｜ 我还能怎么办！居然拿这一套来对付我这个老头子，世风日下，世风日下啊！
- Don't worry, I'll be there to make sure no one falls off. I haven't been up there in a long time myself. ｜ 没事，我和你们一起去，我也好久没上去过了。
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Well, perhaps only half as great as me, though. ｜ 不过，可能只有吾辈一半厉害吧。
- *coughing* ｜ 咳、咳！
- It is what it is. In a few days, I'll sell the failed Ley Line Extractor for some Mora and continue my experiments. Life goes on, and I have to as well — I don't have any other choice. ｜ 就这样吧，过几天我会把研发失败的地脉提取机卖掉，换点钱来继续实验。路总要走下去，我没有别的选择。
- See that over there? That's a collection of classics by a famous writer of kids' songs. One of our bestsellers! ｜ 你看，旁边正摆着的著名童谣音乐人的经典合集专辑，就是本店的成功作品之一。
- Sagitta Scutum ｜ 箭盾座
- A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion. ｜ 制式的教官帽子。是拒绝了晋升的军官才能获得的殊荣。
- So! Fill me in, how have you all been doing? ｜ 你们最近过得怎么样啊？
- Having witnessed Bloom Pruner's performance, I see it now — the wisdom and foresight the Oni King had in saying that he would expand the boundaries of beetle battling using mechanical Onikabuto! ｜ 看见现今「花羽叶月神机」的表现，当初鬼王声称要用机关鬼兜虫之道拓展斗虫的边界，这决定无比正确，富有远见！
- "There is time for you and me, enough to hesitate a hundred times.\nDally and daydream a hundred times, before one eats one's bread and tea.\nShake one's head and give up a hundred times, as the wrinkles climb to your eyes and no teeth remain to adorn your mouth."\n— Breeze Amidst the Forest: Spins-In-Circles Simon\n\nIf you fall to stagnation, the way forward and back will be obscured.\nAt such times, any rash decision is merely an opportunity for future misfortune to ambush you.\nKnow that stopping to think things over is no sign of weakness, but always remember that your body is subject to the ticking clock.\nAnd when the timepiece rings, you must make your move. ｜ 「于你于我总有时间，足可犹豫一百遍。\n犹豫一百遍，幻想一百遍，在吃完面包、喝完热茶之前。\n摇头一百遍，放弃一百遍，皱纹爬上眼角、已无牙齿在嘴边。」\n——林间风·转圈子的西蒙\n\n状况陷入粘滞，前路与退路都无法看清。\n此时仓促决定即是为日后的不幸埋伏笔。\n须知停下脚步仔细考量并非懦弱的表现。\n但请记住你身体的时钟始终在滴答作响。\n报时声响起，那最后的一步便必须迈出。
- Smiley ｜ 微笑
- *eating ravenously* ｜ 嗷呜，嗷呜，嗷呜——
- About Virgil... ｜ 关于维吉尔…
- Now Let Time Resume ｜ 然后时间开始流动

- Uh-oh, a falling rock! ｜ 糟了，是滚石！
- It seems as though there are some okay people among the ranks of the Tenryou Commission... Oh! Though Paimon would never agree with their actions in the Vision Hunt Decree, of course. ｜ 天领奉行里居然也有还不错的家伙…当然，这不代表我会认可她执行眼狩令的事！

- Incomplete Note ｜ 残缺的留言
- The Lochknights... ｜ 纯水骑士…
- Your neck... ｜ 你的脖子…
- Goth's Furnishings Shop ｜ 摆设商店·歌德
- Long time no see! ｜ 好久不见！
- Calm down, Cuallee. That monster is already— ｜ 冷静点，库阿勒，那只魔物已经——
- We found a bottle by The Steambird, just like these ones. You left it there, right? ｜ 大叔，报社门口的酒瓶和你这的一模一样，就是你留下的吧？
- I'm just in shock, that's all. It's always been my dream to wear a Chioriya Boutique dress for my wedding... I really thought the chance had passed me by... ｜ 不如说，在婚礼上穿「千织屋」的婚纱，一直是我的梦想…本来还以为，这次穿不上了呢…
- What— Paimon is too rock 'n' roll! Paimon was just being humble! ｜ 呜哇！我就是谦逊！谦逊！我摇滚着呢！
- {0}/{1} ｜ {0}/{1}
- And don't get caught by the Shogunate's people, alright? And if you do, don't mention me. ｜ 对了，要是不小心被幕府的人发现了，求你千万不要提我。
- But she, branded by you, established by your hand, has fled from your blessings. She has betrayed us! ｜ 而她，被你所标记，为你所成就，却逃离你的恩赐，背叛了我们！
- Haniyyah ｜ 海妮耶
- Miss Rie said that although the taste of this pizza is not bad... ｜ 这位梨绘小姐说，这份披萨的味道虽然还不错…
- "Azure Gem of the Springs" ｜ 「流泉的湛蓝宝石」
- You describe the condition Maruf is treating... ｜ 叙述了马鲁夫所面对的病症…
- The door opened! Whew, that was kinda tricky. ｜ 门打开了！真是有点麻烦的机关…
- Don't forget our salary. ｜ 记得报酬哦。
- Ever-Changing ｜ 变化万端
- You know Wriothesley? Haha, well aren't you full of surprises. From what I know, the Duke tries to keep a very low profile — most people don't even know he exists. Monsieur Neuvillette once tried to recommend my services to him, but apparently he thought that the Fortress of Meropide would have no occasion for them.\nI can't know what his reasons were for turning me down, as I've never met him in person. But if I was to speculate... I would say perhaps there are certain things he doesn't want washed away. Perhaps he prefers to leave them there... as a warning. ｜ 你认识莱欧斯利先生？呵呵，你果然不是一般人，据我所知，这位公爵大人十分低调，甚至不太有人知道他的存在。那维莱特先生曾想将我引荐给他，不过他似乎表示梅洛彼得堡没有需要我工作的场合。\n我从未当面见过这位先生，对他自然不甚了解，但恕我冒然揣度…也许他是不想将某些痕迹清洗得太过干净，从而留作警示吧。
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- Chamber of Deliberation: Sovereign Rulers' Council Records ｜ 审议之庭-至高领主共识评议会记录
- Most people won't take these, but I'll give you a good price for them. ｜ 虽然一般的商人不会收这种东西，但我会出一个好价钱收购它们的。
- Phew, I'm getting a little nervous. First time I'll be organizing something this huge... ｜ 呼，已经开始紧张了，这么大型的派对我也是第一次筹备…
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Let's start by asking around at the Yashiro Commission headquarters. ｜ 等等我们先在社奉行所里找几个人问问吧。

- ...She's gone. ｜ 她消失了呢。

- Next time, I'm sleeping in, and you can wake me up. ｜ 以后你先起，我睡懒觉。

- Quite a few of our expedition teams have been forced to turn back after being blocked by ice barricades that they could not get around. ｜ 我们的好几支探险队都被那些冰拦住，用尽方法也绕不过去，只能折返回来。
- Finish quest, complete parent quest ｜ (test)任务结束，完成父任务
- You need ores? Head in this direction and you'll find them. ｜ 你需要矿石？那往这个方向走就能找到了。
- If the war had dragged on, it would have resulted in even more serious economic hardship and social unrest. I imagine that would have given the Fatui even greater openings to increase their influence. ｜ 假如战争迁延日久，它所造成的严重经济匮乏与社会紧张，就会极大地方便「愚人众」在两方的夹缝中扩张自己的影响力。
- I see. That's probably how all of us exiles will end up. ｜ 是这样啊，的确，既然成为了流放者，最后的结局都会如此吧。

- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- A dried flower stained black with blood and now as hard as steel. Probably some sort of a memento for its former master. ｜ 被血染黑，变得如钢铁一般坚硬的干花。对故主而言，是某种纪念品吧。

- "Conches that were once influenced by Tatarigami"... Hahaha, they're sure to fetch a good price! ｜ 「曾经被祟神影响的海螺」…哈哈哈，肯定能卖出一个好价钱！

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "A Sweet Dream in Fontaine." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「好梦，枫丹」。
- If you'd rather not stand in line, I could make you a glass of my very own Chilibrew. ｜ 如果不想排队的话…我也可以亲手做一杯「辣味饮料」给你。
- Investigating everything as always — guess that's Diluc for you... ｜ 不愧是迪卢克，果然只有他已经全都调查完了…
- Defeat the opponents that appeared ｜ 打倒出现的敌人
- Hehe, c'mon, Sumpter Beasts aren't that annoying. Paimon's sure you think so too! ｜ 嘿嘿，不过驮兽也不讨厌呀。你肯定也这样觉得吧！
- Hilichurl Cultural Customs (I) ｜ 丘丘人习俗考察·卷一
- The white wings of the pigeon suspended in flight are lovely to behold indeed! ｜ 鸽子白色的羽翼，在飞起来的时候可真好看啊。
- #...Have you noticed something off about this, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #…{NICKNAME}，你是不是也察觉到了一点不对？

- If in the river lived any adepti, could we ask them to make the river flow backward? That way, we can reach the mountaintop effortlessly!\nComplete adventure challenges in the wilds of Sumeru to search for inspiration.\nBlessings of Attraction will sometimes appear along the challenge routes. Touch them to pull in Adventure Coins within a certain AoE.\nCollecting more Adventure Coins along the way will reward you with higher challenge scores. ｜ 如果河里住着仙人，可不可以拜托他让河水倒流？这样就可以毫不费力地登上山顶了！\n在须弥的野外完成探险挑战，寻找灵感。\n探险路径内偶尔会出现「引揽祝福」，可以让角色自动吸引一定范围内的「冒险币」。\n同时，成功搜集探险路径中的「冒险币」，可以提高挑战得分。
- Event Shop ｜ 活动商城

- Definitely Candied Ajilenakh Nuts. I just need one little bite and my brain starts chugging away at top speed, and suddenly there's no problem too difficult for me to solve. The only thing you need to watch out for is: Don't put the jar somewhere that's too easy to reach. ｜ 当然是枣椰蜜糖了，只要吃上一小块，大脑就会噼里啪啦地飞速运转，没什么问题解决不了。唯一需要注意的是，装蜜糖的罐子不能放在太容易伸手够到的地方。
- Well, anyway, not long after grandpa handed over the money, he received yet another note. ｜ 总而言之，爷爷把钱交出去没多久，又收到了一张纸条。

- We're your official search party! ｜ 我们是专程来找你的。

- Do people really say that? ｜ 还有这样的说法喔！
- There can be no trust without honesty. ｜ 彼此信任的前提是保持诚实。

- While they say such pretty words, they'll be reaching their filthy hands into your back pocket. ｜ 如果你认真在听他们说话，他们一定已经把脏手伸到你的口袋里了。
- Kevin is back home... But this can't go on. Isn't it time to tell him? ｜ 凯万回来了…这样下去也不是办法，是不是该告诉他…

- Contains a random artifact of the "Deepwood Memories" series. ｜ 装有一件随机的「深林的记忆」圣遗物。
- How're the fish selling? ｜ 鱼卖得怎么样？
- You came to the desert from Mondstadt to do business...? ｜ 从蒙德跑到沙漠来做生意吗…
- A Very Festive Problem ｜ 佳节里的小问题
- Wait... Where is that guy, anyway? And where did Kokomi and Gorou go? ｜ 咦？对了，平藏去哪了？还有心海和五郎好像也不见了…
- The dangerous suggestions keep on coming one after another. You start to get a bit overwhelmed... ｜ 眼前的几个人不停地提出危险的方案，有点难以招架…
- Well that's nice and all, but will those petals be useful for the Rite of Parting? ｜ 还有这种好事？那这些花瓣可以用在送仙典仪上吗？
- Lunja ｜ 卢妮雅
- Luckily, Dr. Zakariya at Bimarstan has offered to prescribe medicine and get the ingredients ready for me... ｜ 还好城里「健康之家」的扎卡里亚医生答应过我，可以帮我置办药方和药物…
- (test) ｜ （test）
- Thanks to everyone's efforts, the border crisis has finally been resolved. It seems that Xiangling has something she wants to talk to you about in Liyue Harbor... ｜ 在众人的努力下，边界危机终被化解。璃月港里，香菱好像有什么事情找你…
- All on your own here, I see... ｜ 一个人待在这里…

- I just want to know what you're still doing here. What's left? Don't you have all your answers by now? ｜ 我只想知道，你还在等什么？这里还有什么值得你好奇的答案吗？
- Or so I thought... But alas, the world seemed bent on finding a reason to make me despise it. ｜ 可是…这个世界为什么非要给我一个憎恨它的理由？
- I've only just arrived in Liyue, so seeing as I've still no friends or companions, I can only book the place for myself, haha. ｜ 我刚来璃月不久，也没什么朋友，没人陪我吃饭也只能一个人包场了哈哈。

- I've got this. ｜ 交给我吧。
- I'm telling you, everything will be fine! Stop worrying! ｜ 肯定没问题的！你就放心吧！

- "Long low note, long low note, long low note, long low note, long low note" — that's how this signal's supposed to go. ｜ 「长低音，长低音，长低音，长低音，长低音」，这是你选择的讯号哦。

- In the past, I used to have many believers coming to see me at the shrine every day, and most of them came for the same reason. ｜ 以前，这里每天都会有非常多的信徒求见，而相当多的人又有着同样的目的。
- This part of the regimen is actually derived from a story titled "The Owl Musician." ｜ 这一环节，其实是来源于一篇名为《猫头鹰乐师》的故事。
- They commissioned Ganyu as their envoy to deliver a letter to Jueyun Karst and bring the adepti the latest news about the crisis. ｜ 于是派甘雨小姐作为使者，带信函前往绝云间，将最近璃月风波的处理情况交给仙人过目。
- A Chaos Cluster will chase characters around once the challenge begins. When the Chaos Cluster touches a character or opponents, it will deal immense DMG to them. If it touches a character, it will disappear. The size and DMG dealt by these clusters will gradually bleed away and grow smaller, but its speed will also gradually increase. ｜ 挑战开始后，将会出现追踪角色的混沌能量团。能量团在接触到角色或魔物时，会造成大量伤害；如果接触的对象是角色，该能量团会消失。能量团的体积与能造成的伤害会随时间流逝而逐渐减小，速度会逐渐提升。
- Character Card ｜ 角色牌
- But yesterday, Albedo told me that Sucrose has been working hard to help another girl achieve her dream... ｜ 可我昨天却从阿贝多先生那里听说，砂糖最近在为一个女孩子的梦想拼搏…
- The beasts are actually quite dangerous, so if you do end up encountering one... *sigh* Anyway, please do not leave the village on your own! ｜ 玄文兽是真实存在的猛兽，如果遇见它的话…唉，请您一定，务必不要独自离开庄里！
- A small step towards hiding the truth. ｜ 迈向隐藏真相的一小步。

- But just so you are aware — the paths in the ruins are winding and filled with mechanisms, so stay wary. ｜ 事先警告你们一句…遗迹里道路曲折，机关众多。一定要小心危险哦。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰

- But with the seal removed now, the filth from the past has been freed, too. ｜ 不过封印既然解除，那么属于过去的污秽应该也一并被释放出来了。

- Terrified Kersh ｜ 害怕的赫尔斯

- Ahaha, I'm envious. If only someone would take me out traveling too... ｜ 唉，真是羡慕啊，要是有人也能带我去旅行就好了…
- A Silkpod whose flowers almost seem perpetually bathed in dawn's first light. Don't fret, however: this flower's bloom will last much longer than a single dawn, so you can admire it at your leisure. ｜ 花色如同晨初晓光般的绣荚。但花期比晨光的持续时间长很多，可以放心欣赏。
- And the adventure that is married life is more than enough to deal with on its own, I don't care who you are... ｜ 而「婚后生活」这场冒险…无论是多伟大的冒险家，都必须要全身心投入。
- Sometimes, it even dispatches a few mini mujina and has them turn into parents or teachers to frighten the children. ｜ 有时候，它甚至会派出手下的「小貉」，变成孩子们家长或者老师的模样吓唬他们。
- "34: Those who release junk while airborne will be subject to lifetime imprisonment." ｜ 「三十四：空中放飞杂物，人生走进牢房。」
- What do you think? My Hilichurlian is not bad, huh? Now that we can communicate, all that's needed to understand each other is time. ｜ 怎么样？我的丘丘人口语很不错吧？只要语言能够相通，那么互相理解也只是时间问题。
- You misunderstand me. I don't doubt your abilities, I'm just overwhelmed at the number of orders piling up in front of me. ｜ 哦、哦不是这样的，我没有怀疑你的实力，只是眼下的订单实在太多了。

- Matra's Message ｜ 风纪官的留言
- Seeing you flourishing... ｜ 看到你阳光的样子…
- Ahem! This is Grudoc — I hired him to be my bodyguard in Natlan. As you can see, he's not the sociable type. I'm sorry for any offense. ｜ 咳咳！他是格洛德克，受我雇佣，负责在纳塔保护我的安全。看来他不太擅长待人接物，让两位见笑了。
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…

- Go through the Looking Glass and enter the world of Meditation. ｜ 穿越「谜镜」，进入「冥想」的世界吧。
- Excerpt ｜ 摘录
- A vessel for holding liquids made from Mallow Wood that can be found in Fontainian harbors. This well-sealed container was originally specially designed by the Fontaine Research Institute for long-distance waterborne transport, and it has become ever more widely used to transport fluids as the technology has matured.\nThey say that the designers increased its structural strength and made it easy to mass produce on account of it combining the advantages of wine barrels and wooden boxes. Although workers at the wharf often complain that these containers aren't very "convenient," ship crews greatly prefer them over wine barrels that sometimes roll around the deck. ｜ 可见于枫丹港口的多边形「悬铃木」液体罐，密封性较佳，原本是枫丹科学院为了长距离水运而特别设计的容器，随着技术普及而成为了通用的液体运输容器。\n据说，设计者认为这种多边形的罐体兼具酒桶与木箱的优点，在提升了结构强度的同时，还便于批量制造。虽然码头工人们经常抱怨这款木桶搬运起来没有那么「便捷」，但比起会在甲板上四处滚动的酒桶，船员们显然还是喜欢现今的这个设计。
- Really!? Thanks a lot, Knight of Candies! ｜ 真的可以吗！谢谢糖之骑士！
- The shining pearls that the shrine maidens of Watatsumi Island offer up shine eternally and never dim. ｜ 海祇岛的巫女们所供奉的明珠，始终闪烁着点点光芒，从未黯淡。
- Let me see here... hmm, let's start with this one. ｜ 让我看看…就从这一封开始好了。
- *cough* Ahem! That's enough for today. It is time for Lord Sangemah Bay to return to her room for some repose. Farewell, all! ｜ 咳咳，今天就到这里吧，桑歌玛哈巴依老爷该回房间休息了。各位，回见啦！
- Complete the challenge by dispersing the Electro fog ｜ 完成驱散雷雾挑战
- No matter! Once my techniques have been refined, I shall leave them all speechless. ｜ 无妨。等我训练好了飞行技术，他们定然会哑口无言。

- Hmm. Well, in that case, there is a reasonable explanation for the strange events of the past two days. ｜ 若是如此，那这两天发生在梅洛彼得堡的怪事倒真能有一个合理的解释了。

- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Criminals altering their facial appearance to commit crimes is nothing new. In fact, one of the explicit duties of the Melusines in the Marechaussee Phantom is to identify criminals in disguise. ｜ 利用易容进行犯罪的案例很早就出现过，美露莘在逐影庭的一大职责就是辨别这一类犯人。
- I believe so. I've tried everything, but he won't wake up. ｜ 恐怕是的。我用了很多办法，也没能叫醒他。
- So, what I mean is that I seldom have time for anything that others would consider "fun." I don't even know the first thing about playing with kids... ｜ 所以其实我几乎没有休闲娱乐的时间，也不太清楚要怎么和孩子们玩。
- Cold noodles! Cold noodles! ｜ 凉卤面！凉卤面！

- Well, here's the remaining funding... ｜ 这些是剩下的经费…
- Y—Y—You... Chongyun, please, just... stop... ｜ 你…你你你…好重云，我求求你别念了…
- Aha, pressure getting to you? ｜ 是不是有点紧张了？
- #In that case, we'll leave the experiment in your hands, {NICKNAME}, Paimon. All the best — the success of the project is riding on you! ｜ #那，实验就拜托两位了，{NICKNAME}和派蒙！研究项目的存亡，在此一举。
- Right, you wanted a gift for a child, yes? Well then. Coming right up... ｜ 对了，你是想要一个适合送给小孩子的礼物对吧？请稍等一下…
- Ferry, can I leave you to follow up on the Feiyun funeral arrangements? ｜ 老太公之事，渡渡姐，先麻烦你费神了。
- Paimon's not all that interested in this studying stuff, but if we can make a little this and that off their budget, why not, right? ｜ 虽然对学术研究什么的不感兴趣，不过要是能因此分给我们一点项目经费的话，也算是赚了吧？
- That's great! I'm happy for you! ｜ 太好了，为你开心！
- Nazuchi Beach ｜ 名椎滩
- Restores 8% of Max HP and an additional 800 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的8%，并额外恢复800点生命值。
- Does that mean your family doesn't even have one Sumpter Beast...? ｜ 那你家是不是一只驮兽都没有啊…
- You're just assuming things. ｜ 这只是一种没有证据的说法。
- I guess it must be missing... We'll just have to look for it later... ｜ 看来是没有啊…那看来只能之后再找找了…
- Perhaps dueling a Fatui Harbinger might do the trick? ｜ 比如单挑愚人众的执行官？
- About the "prophecy" that has been circulating around Fontaine... ｜ 关于枫丹流传的预言…
- Achieved victory within 120s ｜ 在120秒内获得本局游戏的胜利
- Mysterious Memento Lens ｜ 神秘的「留念镜」…

- Well, this is pretty awkward... ｜ 气氛…气氛好尴尬呀…
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- Rex Lapis... Assassinated? ｜ 帝君…遇刺了？
- I won't forget, Maman... And so is my love for you. Greater than the entire distance between here and the Kingdom of Water Imps. ｜ 我不会忘的，妈妈也要记住哦，我爱妈妈，就像从这里到水妖王国再回来那么多！
- Oh? A traveler? Huh, now that you mention it... You do look like you've come a long way to get here! ｜ 哦？旅行者！这么一看…确实是张陌生面孔哪！

- The boom shaka-laka feeling, I suppose. ｜ 是「噼咔」的感觉吧。

- No, nothing comes to mind. There's nothing special about the box, either... ｜ 我是真想不起来了，好像也没什么特别的…
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- She doesn't seem the most... intellectual sort, but she cares deeply about you. ｜ 她虽然看起来…脑瓜是不太灵活，但十分在乎你呢。
- Hilichurls are manufacturing exploding barrels in the wilderness. Stop them! ｜ 丘丘人正在野外制作危险的炸药桶，材料是…史莱姆？！快去消灭它们！

- Report your findings to Tsuyuko ｜ 向露子回报你们的发现。
- "We know everything you've done!" ｜ 「你做的一切我们都知道了！」

- Court of Dancing Petals ｜ 折旋落英之庭
- Is this definitely the right place? ｜ 你说的真的是这里吗？
