- On occasion, I hear others whisper in secret, calling me cold and cruel. People are free to believe as they wish, and I don't intend to clear up their misconceptions. Prejudice has a way of concealing the truth, and that is hardly to my disadvantage. Still, I believe the time has come for certain measures to be taken to "live up" to their expectations... Let's just hope those on the receiving end of these measures have enough power and status to escape with their lives. ｜ 偶尔，我会听到其他人在暗处的议论，说我是个感情淡漠、手段狠辣的人。对此我无意澄清，偏见会将真相包裹起来，对我来说是件好事。不过，我确实需要采取一些手段，来「满足」他们的期待…希望他们有足够的实力和地位，能从我手上活下来。
- A journalist? ｜ 记者？
- A round carpet with a simple pattern, made from high-quality wool and dyed with warm-toned phlogiston-based pigments, featuring a centrally symmetrical design with a comforting warm orange hue. Orange, being the color most commonly associated with phlogiston, the outer flames of a fire, and sunlight, is believed by some to bring people warmth and peace. For this reason, such carpets are often placed in dining rooms or bedrooms to imbue these spaces with a sense of passion and warmth. ｜ 花纹朴素的圆形地毯，采用了优质的毛料，暖色调的燃素染料，绘有中心对称的图案，呈现出令人倍感温馨的暖橙色。据说，橙色是常见的燃素颜色，更是火焰外焰与日光的颜色，被部分人们认为能赋予人以温暖，赠予人以平和。因此人们也会倾向于将这种地毯布置在餐厅或是卧室，用以赋予生活以热情与温暖。

- Even the most acclaimed authors of Fontaine would struggle to explain to a child why a suspect to whom all the evidence clearly pointed could not be convicted. Why everyone maintained their silence as an innocent officer of the law was falsely accused. Why many who witnessed the crime refused to speak the truth. And why the victim of the miscarriage of justice must pay with their own reputation and future for justice to finally make an appearance.\nEven harder to explain is why the path to justice must be paved with crime.\nBut for Chevreuse, what was most concrete were the changes in her life wrought by her entire family moving to the Fleuve Cendre.\nA narrow room, the food less tasty, friends who now never contacted her, and a mother growing more fatigued by the day... Her father's colleagues often came by in plainclothes, bringing all kinds of gifts with them. In addition to their presents, they brought news as well. They told her mother of the appeal they were all working so hard on — not just the Gardes and the members of the Special Patrol, but even several Gestionnaires who oft worked with them — and how despite the fact Donatello had broken the law was indisputable and established fact, and legally speaking his sentence could not be commuted or shortened, they at least could ensure he didn't need to endure further castigation. It was all of scant comfort to her mother, whose worries did not subside.\nTo take care of her mother, Chevreuse didn't hesitate to take up burdens that one as young as she should never have had to shoulder, stepping into the dark currents that swirled through the Fleuve Cendre.\nPerhaps it was because the residents of the Fleuve Cendre had heard tell of or been on the receiving end of her upright father's care that so many helping hands were extended to her. A well-meaning shop owner gave her a job, and the couple next door often took care of her infirm mother.\nAnd when the children of the Fleuve Cendre heard that the child of a Garde had come to live among them, they flocked to her like plaintiffs and defendants, seeking her arbitration on all manner of quarrels and disputes.\n"Chevreuse! You gotta uphold justice, y'know!"\nSo cried the children with one voice, before laughing as one. They did not truly intend to allow Chevreuse to determine who was at fault, but rather saw it all as merely another game.\nYet the next day, Chevreuse brought a thick stack of legal materials when she went to see them, along with a notebook newly opened to the first page, and began speaking to the chortling children in a tone most serious.\n"Very well. Let both sides present their evidence."\nAnd from that day forward, the Fleuve Cendre had one more enforcer of the law — the littlest one around. But unlike the law enforcement officers aboveground, all judgments rendered by Chevreuse were executed under her personal supervision.\nThere in the sewers, she learned many ways to ensure that "justice" would be upheld. ｜ 即使是将枫丹廷最好的故事作家请来，也很难向一个孩子解释，为何迟迟不给一个被所有证据指明有罪的嫌犯定罪；为何无辜的执法者被诬时大家却保持沉默；为何众多明见罪行的人不愿意说明真相；为何被诬者必须要以自己的前途与名誉为代价，才能请来正义列席。\n更难说明的是，为何行使一件正义的好事，必须要以罪行铺垫。\n但对于夏沃蕾来说，更切实的体会，则是全家迁入「灰河」后突变的生活。\n狭窄的屋子，不那么好吃的食物，不能再联系的朋友，还有日渐疲惫的母亲…虽然父亲的同事们时常穿着便服，带着各种东西前来拜访，他们对母亲说，所有人都在努力为多纳泰洛先生申告，不仅是警备队和特巡队的队员，甚至几位和他们相熟的复律官也一同参与了申告，虽然多纳泰洛先生违律事实确凿，从律法角度不能减刑，但他们至少会保证多纳泰洛先生不会再多受苛责。但即便如此，母亲依然每天都忧愁如初。\n为了照顾母亲，夏沃蕾毫不犹豫地挑起了本不需年幼的她担负的责任，迈入了「灰河」这条幽深的暗流。\n或许是因为「灰河」的居民们也听闻过，或许是因为受到过正直的父亲之前的照拂，许多人都向夏沃蕾伸出了援手。好心的老板给了夏沃蕾一份工作，隔壁的夫妇愿意帮忙照顾体弱的母亲。\n而当小朋友们听说，有个警备队员的孩子来到「灰河」后，他们就像是找到了审判官的原告和被告一样，将所有还没解决的摩擦打闹都交给了夏沃蕾处理。\n「夏沃蕾！你可要伸张正义呀！」\n孩子们齐声大喊，然后齐声大笑——他们并不是真的打算让夏沃蕾判定谁对谁错，这只是一场孩子们之间的游戏。\n但是，第二天夏沃蕾却带着厚厚的律法材料再次找到了他们，她的手里拿着一本刚刚翻开第一页的笔记本，用严肃的口吻对笑嘻嘻的孩子们说道。\n「那么，双方先举证吧。」\n从此，「灰河」里多了一位小小的执法者。但与地上的那些执法者不一样的是，夏沃蕾所作出的裁决，会由她亲自监督执行。\n她在「灰河」里学到了许多手段，能保证「正义」彻底得到伸张。

- A wooden sign whose maker remains unidentified. The cool colors on the poster stuck to it really stand out amidst the blazing-hot summer, making it exceedingly eye-catching and capable of greatly increasing a customer's appetite in the blink of an eye. The image even features a striking Cryo Slime that has triggered the endless imagination of gourmets:\n"If this restaurant had the Cryo Slime as the master chef, what would its signature dish be?"\nRound flatbreads, perhaps, or pizzas with special toppings?\nAfter all, Slimes' figures are blessed by nature such that they can create perfect flatbreads simply by jumping and rolling on kitchen boards.\nPerhaps this Slime master chef will even set strict rules for its apprentices, such as "No matter how hard you jump and roll on the dough, your chef's hat must not fall on the chopping board!" ｜ 来历成谜的木制招牌，招牌表面贴有色彩清凉的宣传画，在气候炎热的夏日之中令人眼前一亮，食欲大开。画面上的冰史莱姆尤为醒目，引发了美食爱好者们的无限遐想——\n「如果冰史莱姆成了大厨，那这间餐馆的招牌菜会是什么？」\n答案或许是圆圆的大饼，口味独特的披萨？\n毕竟史莱姆圆滚滚的身躯有着天然的优势，只需在案板上来回滚动，就能制作出厚度恰到好处的面饼吧。\n也许史莱姆大厨还会为学徒们定下严格的标准——「制作面饼的过程中，无论怎么滚动，厨师帽都不能掉在案板上！」

- Ah, understood! ｜ 明、明白了，埃泽先生！

- A new contract? Okay. I'm still on leave, but I can accompany you for a while. What name should I use on the contract? I have a great many names, though when on leave I tend to go by Zhongli. And you, Traveler? What name will you be signing on this contract? ｜ 一份新的「契约」？好吧…虽然我还在度假，但也可以陪你走一趟。契约书上，该签什么名字呢？我有许多名字，度假期间的话…我会自称「钟离」。你呢，旅行者？你会签下什么名字？

- Ah, Sigewinne. I hope all is well with her these days. Her work in the Fortress of Meropide has not been too much for her, has it? ｜ 希格雯，啊，希望她最近一切都好。梅洛彼得堡的工作不会太沉重吧？
- Don't even think about it... Sumpter Beasts are meant for transporting goods. ｜ 别想了…驮兽就是用来运货的。
- For the justice in this world... ｜ 为了世界的正义…
- Stubbornness is an all-too-common vice among scholars. I hope that never rubs off on you. I'm always happy to see you visit Mondstadt, and experience the feeling of freedom for yourself. ｜ 至于顽固…许多学者都容易顽固。我不希望那种氛围影响你，所以才希望你多来蒙德走走，体会「自由」。
- You decide to investigate freely.\nAs you are strolling around, you see some familiar faces... ｜ 你决定进行自由调查。\n闲逛时，你遇到了一些熟面孔…
- The captain of The Crux — a formidable woman indeed. She once promised to take me out onto the open ocean to get a look at the thunderstorm that seals off Inazuma from the outside world. It's a shame that to this day, I've never had the chance to take her up on the offer... ｜ 「南十字」船队的大姐头可真是个飒爽的人呐。她曾经允诺带我去遥远的外海，看看封锁一切的雷暴是个什么样子。只是可惜，我一直没这个机会出去看看…

- (The scattered footprints have not been completely buried by the wind and sand, but it is impossible to speculate on the direction of the merchants' escape from the footprints.) ｜ （散乱的脚印还未完全被风沙掩埋，但也无法根据脚印推测商人们逃跑的方向。）
- Eh, what was so good about that bag, anyway? I don't remember there being anything to eat in there... ｜ 唔…那个袋子有什么好看的，我记得袋子里面可没有吃的东西…

- Oh, of course! Of course! I'm just glad you agreed! ｜ 不会不会，能答应我就很高兴了！

- A flower vessel decorated with orange sakura. Its pattern is particularly beautiful under the sunlight. The main body displays a light black color, exuding elegant charm. ｜ 饰有橘色樱花的花器，图案在天光映照下尤为美观，主体呈现出浅淡的黑鸢色，蕴含着风雅的韵味。

- This is because the Yashiro Commission is in charge of the religious and ceremonial affairs as well as other cultural matters in Inazuma. Therefore, the shrine maidens of the Grand Narukami Shrine must also follow the orders of the Yashiro Commission. ｜ 这是因为，社奉行负责稻妻的神明、祭祀、庆典等文化事务，所以「鸣神大社」的巫女们也会听从社奉行的指引。
- Get outta here! ｜ 上天去吧！
- "Mega-Mighty Boulder Breaker" ｜ 「超猛巨大碎岩转转」
- An evolved Fungus. When it is hit by <color=#f39001>Electro attacks</color> and Catalyze reactions, it will accumulate Activation. When it is hit by <color=#f39001>Pyro attacks</color>, it will lose Activation progress. When it accumulates sufficient Activation, it will enter an <color=#f39001>Activated state</color>. An activated Jadeplume Terrorshroom will unleash more fearsome attacks until it becomes exhausted. When it is not Activated, the Jadeplume Terrorshroom can be put into a Burning state via the use of <color=#f39001>Pyro</color>, which will cause it to become Scorched. It will then spread spores around to create Fungi in an attempt to escape this status. ｜ 蕈兽进化之后的形态。承受<color=#f39001>雷元素攻击</color>与激化反应时，会积累「活性化」状态；受到<color=#f39001>火元素攻击</color>，「活性化」则会减少。在「活性化」状态积累满后，将进入<color=#f39001>活化状态</color>。活化状态的翠翎恐蕈会进行更加猛烈的攻击，直到力竭。不处于活化状态时，若翠翎恐蕈因为<color=#f39001>火元素</color>陷入燃烧状态，则会变得枯焦，会向四周散播孢子，产生蕈兽以摆脱这种状态。
- Oh! It's Abyss Mages! Just like Ararycan said! ｜ 啊！是深渊法师！兰利遮说的果然没错！
- In truth, I'm just an amateur artist who can't "correctly" differentiate color the way other people do, but I didn't want to give up on my dream to become a true artist. ｜ 其实我只是个半吊子，无法像其他人一样「正确地」分辨颜色，但是又不想放弃成为画家的愿望。
- Ah, I'm just a regular seafarer. Worked hard my whole life, made a bit of Mora, now I'm debating whether to put it in savings or not... ｜ 唉，我只是一个平凡的跑船人，辛苦了小半辈子攒了些钱，现在正在犹豫要不要把钱存起来…
- Good Evening ｜ 晚上好…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- And knowing your health, carelessly running around like this is gonna hurt ya. For the sake of those who love you, don't be stubborn. ｜ 你的身体不好，这样贸然在外面闲逛，对健康伤害很大。所以为了那些爱你的人，还是请小姐不要任性了。
- Dehya and Candace! So nice to see you! Actually, seeing all of our friends is the whole reason we're here! ｜ 迪希雅，坎蒂丝，这次回来能见到大家真好呢，嘿嘿。

- Cannot submit item in Co-Op Mode ｜ 在联机状态下无法提交道具
- If you find them, go ahead and <color=#00E1FFFF>crack them open</color>. ｜ 找到的话，<color=#00E1FFFF>就直接把箱子拆了吧</color>，不要紧的。
- That's precisely what I'm curious about. ｜ 这正是我好奇的地方。
- Let's go take a look. ｜ 我们过去看看吧。
- This Battle B(Rook)s No Dishonor! ｜ 尊严的「喧哗」之争！
- Your hypotheses regarding the origin of Fontainians and the sin of the Hydro Archon were both correct. ｜ #关于枫丹人的起源与水神的罪孽，{NICKNAME}的推断均属实。
- An unusual pattern that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 奇异的花纹，可用于装饰祝柬。
- #Feel like putting your luck to the test, {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}? ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}也想去碰碰运气吗？
- A musical instrument that can be used in performances.\nA small drum that Itto gave you. He bought it from an outlander merchant, and while it does look quite normal, it is said to be a relic left behind by an ancient and powerful onmyouji who used it to drive out calamity and pray for blessings.\nIt would cost an ordinary person a large sum if they were to wish to possess this, but the price may be negotiated if one has some connection to the drum.\nAnd wouldn't you know it? An 8,000,000 Mora treasure was eventually purchased for 80,000. What a steal for Itto, eh? ｜ 使用后，可以进行演奏的乐器。\n一斗赠予的小鼓，是在一个异国商人那里买到的，虽然外观看起来普普通通，但据说是古代大阴阳师留下的宝具，有驱灾祈福的妙用。\n普通人若想要据为己有，代价将十分高昂，但如果与此鼓有缘，价格便可以再商量。\n真实惠呀，原价八百万摩拉的贵重物品，最后只要八万摩拉就可以买到，感觉让一斗占了大便宜。
- This kind of mushroom is a favorite in the tribe. But, it's not well-known outside the Collective of Plenty. ｜ 这种蘑菇在「沃陆之邦」很受欢迎，不过还没怎么在外面出名。
- Blessing of the Welkin Moon Expiration Reminder ｜ 空月祝福即将到期提醒

- I asked a lot of people, and Mr. Sayid... You know who he is, right? He's that researcher. ｜ 我问了很多人，然后那位萨义德先生…你知道吗？就是那位学者。
- Leave it to me. ｜ 交给我了。
- She has been a wise and worthy archon. ｜ 她明明是那样一位贤明的神。

- "Be careful what you say here." ｜ 「你在这里说这种话可小心挨揍。」
- Heh, now let's release this Xiao Lantern together, shall we? ｜ 呵呵，我们就一起放了这盏霄灯吧。
- I would even like to perform an opera there, letting adepti and people alike hear my voice echoing through the lands. ｜ 想到那里唱上一曲，请天地人神都听一听我们的声音。

- (...It seems that she emerges as champion whenever she enters the competition. Is that why so many challengers come here to ask around?) ｜ （…好像只要她参加了比赛，冠军就是她的，这就是一直都有挑战者问讯赶来的原因吗？）

- This is all your fault! This place nearly scared me to death! ｜ 都怪你，都怪你，来什么试胆大会，吓死我了！

- Come on, get up. What are you crouching there for? ｜ 起来吧，还蹲在这里干什么？

- The name "Withering Zone" did not refer to fixed locations. Instead, it referred to areas that had been corroded by some sort of mysterious and ominous power.\nFor now, it is just a matter of cleaning up the existing Withering Zones. ｜ 并不是具体的固定场所，而是一些地方被这种神秘的不祥力量侵蚀后变成的区域。\n就现在而言，只需要将已经形成的死域清理干净就可以了。

- Hehehe... What I mean is, even though I had asked you to solve this puzzle, you two are still the only ones who can see me and sense my presence. ｜ 呵呵呵…我的意思是，虽然是我在拜托你们两个破解谜团，但反过来，也只有你们两个才能看到我、感受到我。

- Give potentially useful items to Baulande? Lombroso? To have a sniff. ｜ 把可能有用的东西给博兰德？郎勃罗梭？闻一闻。
- You're saying... fight smarter not harder. Having the strength to win is just as important as knowing the right strategy. ｜ 我不仅要变强，我还要变聪明，不仅要有能力去赢，还要知道该怎么赢…

- You two have finished speaking, then? Don't look at me like that. If he doesn't want me to listen, I don't listen. ｜ 怎么，师兄和你说完话了？别这么看着我，师兄不愿我听的事，我自然不会听。

- Boosts your Melt blessing <color=#f39001>to the highest level</color>. Choose between 2 diverging paths.\nMelt: <color=#f39001>Extreme Prohibition</color>: The Pyro and Cryo RES of opponents hit by Frostfall and Flamespire will be reduced by <color=#f39001>{0}%</color> for <color=#f39001>{1}</color>s.\nMelt: <color=#f39001>Extreme Thermoflash</color>: While Significant Thermocline is active, when characters deal Pyro or Cryo DMG, their CRIT DMG is increased by <color=#f39001>{2}%</color>. ｜ 强化融化祝福至<color=#f39001>最高等级</color>，可选择以下两种分支：\n融化·<color=#f39001>极限禁绝</color>：被冰霜崩破或炽升火柱命中敌人的火元素和冰元素抗性降低<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>，持续<color=#f39001>{1}</color>秒；\n融化·<color=#f39001>极限骤温</color>：高度温差效果持续期间，角色造成火元素或冰元素伤害时，暴击伤害提升<color=#f39001>{2}%</color>。

- If a little private gossiping helps them let off some steam, well, good for them. It does no harm to the Kamisato Clan. ｜ 如果在背后骂几句能够发泄心中不满，那就随他们说去吧，这对神里家也不是什么坏事。
- What do you mean to capture through film? ｜ 「映影」到底要拍什么？
- Ugh, don't get me started. I was recuperating on Nazuchi Beach — it's complete chaos over there. ｜ 别提了，我原本在「名椎滩」短暂歇息，那里已经乱成一团了。
- Ugh... You're finally back. ｜ 呜啊…你终于回来了。
- Blessing 6 ｜ 吉语·之六
- Go in search of the Inscriptions of Remembrance with Arama ｜ 与兰罗摩同行，寻找「记忆的铭文」
- Complete production work in a timely manner and ensure all products meet quality standards. Be willing to accept technical assistance when necessary. ｜ 按时完成生产任务，并且保证生产质量，必要时接受技术指导。
- What would she need those for... Forget it. Please take these with my thanks. ｜ 她要风车菊做什么…算了，这些请你收下吧，算是答谢了。
- You meet Katheryne once again in Natlan... ｜ 在纳塔，你又遇见了凯瑟琳小姐…
- And what for again? ｜ 什么原因？
- Bye. I sense a certain confidence in you; we should team up some time. ｜ 再见。看样子你对自己的本事挺自信啊。有空一起合作。
- Of course! Are you questioning the wisdom of the ancients? ｜ 当然了！你要质疑古人的智慧吗？
- Masters of the Night-Wind's Tranquility ｜ 「烟谜主」的安适
- No space left in Artifact Inventory. Please free up some space and try again. ｜ 圣遗物背包空间不足，请清理出足够的空间再试
- *sigh* Who would have thought that things would turn out the way they have... ｜ 唉，实在想不到现在会变成这样…
- Just like last time, there's a bunch of buried mechanisms. ｜ 和上次一样，这里的场地底下埋藏着不少机关。
- Look for and rescue the Aranara ｜ 寻找并解救兰那罗
- A wooden marker sign, placed here by Lamiya, indicating that she has placed some animals around the site. Use the Inscribed Mirror to find the animals she left in the area. ｜ 拉米雅竖立在此处的木牌，说明她将几只实验用的小动物放在了周围。使用「铭随流镜」，找到她放置在周围的那些动物吧。
- First is the periodic meeting with the representatives of the Eight Trades, after that, fielding opinions on revisions to the current tax legislation. ｜ 首先是与璃月八门的代表举行定期会议，接着是税法修订案的意见征集。

- With this Qingxin flower, I should be able to pacify my daughter tonight. I'll make sure the work is done before I return home. ｜ 有这「清心」，晚上回家，小姑娘大概就不会那么闹了吧。嗯…回家以前，我就先为你走一遭。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Distributed Forward Supply Depot.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「分布式前进补给站」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- I can trust the Traveler won't, but the detective here is a Tenryou Commission officer! ｜ 你说那个旅行者不会，好，我信，可是旁边那个侦探，他可是天领奉行的官差！

- Geological Survey Mek - Ousia ｜ 机关·地质勘探型·荒
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> {NICKNAME}, you know what a brush is, right?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Of course! Kinda like pens but with animal hair at one end for calligraphy, right?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> That's correct! They say that finely-made brushes sell for high prices among Liyue's merchants!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> So, would you like to make some too?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Uh-huh! But wild wolves are too fierce, so we should use Razor's fur to make brushes instead!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Razor's fur is all downy and soft. It'll definitely make great wolf-fur brushes! We could make lots of Mora like this!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Brushes made like that would conduct electricity. I'm not sure we could use them.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Besides, Razor isn't a wolf, nor are wolf brushes made from actual wolves' fur...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Huh? Why are they called wolf-fur brushes, then?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well, does Cider Lake look like it's full of cider to you?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hmm. You have a point. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>{NICKNAME}，你知道毛笔吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>用动物的毛做成的笔，可以拿来写字？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯，答对了！据说好的毛笔能在璃月商人那边卖出高价呢！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>所以派蒙也想做毛笔？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯！但是野外的狼都太凶了，所以我们去薅雷泽的毛做毛笔吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>雷泽毛茸茸的，肯定能做出上好的狼毫笔！然后我们就能大赚一笔！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这样做出来的笔肯定带电，没办法用吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>而且雷泽不是狼，狼毫笔也不是狼毛做的…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸——那为什么要叫做狼毫笔！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>你看果酒湖里不也没有果酒吗。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喔——很有道理呢！
- Good idea! Let's try to be more tactful this time. Let's think of it as practice for dealing with any well-intentioned but very confused people we might run into in the future! ｜ 有道理，这次我们委婉一点吧，也算是练习了——以后遇见一些迷迷糊糊的好人，我们就有更多经验了！
- Haha, you're back! You really do enjoy climbing, huh? ｜ 哈哈，你又到这里来了，看来你也很喜欢登高啊。

- A gamepiece based on Pyro Specters.\nA monster born from highly-concentrated Pyro elements that can float in the air.\nAs a relatively compact and resilient flying monster, Specters have long been considered the touchstone for anti-aerial defensive capabilities by the armies of various nations. The results of attacking them with ordinary bows are far from ideal, and the mobility of more powerful ballistae and cannons is quite limited. Perhaps a highly mobile firing platform with significant firepower is required to deal with them... ｜ 以「火飘浮灵」为原型的兵棋。\n高浓度的火元素孕育而生的魔物，能够飘浮在空中。\n作为体型相对紧凑，抗击打能力又不错的飞行魔物，飘浮灵一直被各方部队视为「防空能力」的试金石。以普通弓弩打击它们的成效往往不甚理想，而威力较大的弓弩和火炮的机动性又相当有限，或许需要一种能灵巧移动的重型火力平台来对付它们…

These allow her to quickly equip her Character Cards with weapons. ｜ 「翘班时的消遣格外宝贵，不如…在这牌局中多带给我一点惊喜？」\n【提示】夜兰的牌组包含大量的「武器」装备牌，以及与其相关的支援牌和事件牌，能够快速地武装队伍中的角色牌。
- <color=#FFE14BFF>Cuihua Tree</color>\nA tree from which fruit hangs heavy. They say that some lush trees had fruits and cores which both had the color of sunset, hence earning them the moniker of "Cuihua Tree."\nCuihua Trees are oft found around the <color=#FFE14BFF>Starfell Valley</color> and <color=#FFE14BFF>Bishui Plain</color>.\nCut a Cuihua Tree down to obtain <color=#FFE14BFF>Cuihua Wood</color>. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>「萃华树」</color>\n生长着饱满果实的树木，据说其中一些树木的芯材与果实相仿，有着日落晚霞的色彩，凝萃着草木之华，因而得到了「萃华之树」的美称。\n「萃华树」零星分布于<color=#FFE14BFF>「坠星山谷」</color>和<color=#FFE14BFF>「碧水原」</color>等地，砍伐「萃华树」可以获得<color=#FFE14BFF>「萃华木」</color>。

- A bookcase that can be found in the Yashiro Commission Headquarters. It is made from Maple Wood and has a fair balance of dimensions and work-hours used to build it. It is somewhat lacking in the space department, though.\nIt is said that Inazuman artisans are skilled at maximizing the revenue they get out of every resource and save on the amount of materials used in anything they build. This type of bookcase is a classic example — the lacquer used on this wood has a deep color and contains harmless byproducts derived from the ink-making process. ｜ 可见于社奉行本部的书柜，由「枫木」制成，平衡了尺寸与工时，只可惜容量略显不足。\n传说稻妻工匠善于利用每一种材料创造营收，尽可能地节约物资。这种书柜就是典型的例子——木材表层所用的漆面色泽深邃，含有制造墨水时的无害产物。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Wow, we've really had a lot of good food recently, haven't we?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> You know what they say: "Have food, will travel"!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Hmm... Won't you be unable to fly if you get fat?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Nope! Paimon never gets fat!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Huh...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> So Paimon demands more food!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Ever eating but never growing... Don't you fail as emergency rations, then?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Yeah, yeah... Well it sure doesn't look like you have any other candidates... So you'll have to make do with Paimon! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇，最近在旅行途中，吃了很多好吃的呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>只要吃到好吃的，旅行的疲惫就能一扫而空！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…如果发胖了，小派蒙会飞不起来吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼哼，才不会！我是吃不胖的类型！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>所以我还要吃更多好吃的！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>光吃不长肉。从应急食品的角度来看，不合格了吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂——难道你在外面还有其他合格的应急食品吗？

- Three years ago, Klee was entrusted to the Knights of Favonius by her parents, who were famed adventurers.\nThis was how the fates of Klee and "that boy in white" became intertwined with their "family" in Mondstadt.\nKlee is curious about everything in the outside world. She has an innocent passion for explosives, and is incredibly enthusiastic in all that she does.\nUnder the protection of the Knights of Favonius, she is protected from harm and those of ill intent.\nThis young girl soon forged an unbreakable bond with everyone in the Knights of Favonius.\nBeing sent to the solitary confinement room by Jean, helping Amber improving Baron Bunny, as well as developing new bombs...\nThese parts of Klee's life are all invaluable treasures to her. ｜ 三年前，可莉被身为知名冒险家的父母托付给西风骑士团。\n年幼的可莉就这样和「那位白色的哥哥」一起，与蒙德的「家人们」结下了缘分。\n可莉对外界一切都抱有纯真的爱与好奇。对于会爆炸的物件，她更是始终投以极度的热忱。\n在骑士团呵护之下，她得以远离恶意与中伤。\n小小的少女与骑士团众人缔结了无法割舍的缘分。\n对可莉来说，被琴关禁闭室的日常、帮助安柏改进兔兔伯爵的日常，或偷偷研制新型炸弹的日常…\n所有这些，都是她珍贵的宝物。
- I used the Coupons I'd saved up in the past to hire a bunch of people to help me work. What we have now is the product of their work this whole time. And I believe this falls within the rules, too. ｜ 用之前积攒的特许券雇了很多人帮我工作，他们这段时间的产出就是我们的所得了。这也算是规则容许的范围吧。

- Pick Up ｜ 拾取
- My colleagues must be working very hard to write project applications right now. ｜ 我的那些同事们哟，现在一定又在精心撰写项目申请了吧。
- "...It's just a shame that my current topic of study does not permit me to stay here for too long..." ｜ 「…只是目前的课题或许不会给我时间在这里多做停留，实是可惜…」
- Achieve victory within 6 Rounds ｜ 6回合内胜利
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Receiving a Gift: II ｜ 收到赠礼·其二
- Thank you so much, Sir. ｜ 太谢谢您了。
- What? You're gonna leave just like that? ｜ 欸——？这就事不关己了吗！
- (I wonder if there will be any new sightings today...) ｜ （不知道今天会不会有什么新的目击情报呢？）
- Hmm... Actually, this could be a great business opportunity for us, don't you think? If we took over all foreign trade for Merusea Village, we'd be rich! ｜ 嗯？等等，仔细想想的话，这好像是不得了的商机？要是能承包整个海沫村的对外贸易，我们不就发财了吗！
- Continuous Regeneration|{param3:F2P} ATK+{param4:I} ｜ 持续治疗量|{param3:F2P}攻击力+{param4:I}
- Oh, it's been so long. Oh no. ｜ 哎呀，已经过了这么久了吗。糟糕。
- Thank you so much, Ma'am. Well, I won't disturb you any further. See you in class! ｜ 多谢前辈。不打扰前辈逛街了，等前辈开课后我再来。
- Why didn't you say anything before we all used it!? ｜ 那我们用的时候你为什么不提醒？
- Hmph, I never lie. ｜ 哼，我可从来都不会说谎。
- C'mon, don't give up that quickly! Look, we don't mean any harm, and we... Well, we're sure that you're not the fighty type by nature... ｜ 不要这么快就放弃嘛！小金盏花，我们没有恶意的，我们也知道，呃，好勇斗狠绝对不是你的本意…
- Don't let it bother you. Oh — hey, how about I treat you to a meal at Good Hunter? ｜ 不要把你的心情也影响了就好，不如这样吧，我请你去「猎鹿人」吃饭怎么样？
- I guess that explains everything. You also lost your memories the last two times you tried to leave the city. Those days' memories can't be awoken. ｜ 这下之前的事也说得通了，那两次你们试图出城，也都完全没有了当天的记忆，无法被唤起。
- Talk to Xingqiu ｜ 与行秋对话
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- Conclusive Ovation ｜ 完场喝彩
- About Yaoyao ｜ 关于瑶瑶…
- Where should I go? ｜ 我该去哪里呢？
- Thank you for the creative and thoughtful gift, Klee! ｜ 谢谢你！细心手巧又体贴的可莉！
- Make an unexpected friend in an unexpected location. ｜ 在意想不到之处，结识了意想不到的朋友。
- Tasses Ragout ｜ 塔塞斯杂烩
- Oh, I wouldn't dare disbelieve you. You did, after all, succeed right before my very eyes. Still... I've gotta see it — for my own sanity, if for nothing else! ｜ 我哪敢不信，毕竟你们就在我眼前成功了一次，不过…还是让我亲眼看看，求个心安吧！
- Universal Diagnosis ｜ 太素诊要
- Amos' Bow ｜ 阿莫斯之弓
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Standard Railing: Scattered Structure.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「标准护栏-『错落结构』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Guys, I—I think... it's gotta be because of me. The avalanche only happened because I'm here. ｜ 各位，我、我觉得…果然还是因为我在，才会有那种雪崩的。
- Huh... Nothing at all...? ｜ 咦，一点也没有吗…
- Please Lantern Rite, go off without a hitch! ｜ 千万要顺利呀，海灯节！
